\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{84}{\Tt{}BOOT1{\_}LOAD{\_}TRACK\nwendquote} is the sector loader.  It takes a track number
in~A and reads all 16 sectors:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Seeks to the target track via {\Tt{}BOOT1{\_}SEEK{\_}TRACK\nwendquote}.
  \item Builds the destination page table by adding the base page ({\Tt{}{\$}3E\nwendquote}) to each entry of the interleave table at {\Tt{}{\$}0C48\nwendquote}.
  \item For each sector found by {\Tt{}BOOT1{\_}FIND{\_}SECTOR\nwendquote}, looks up the destination page in the table and calls {\Tt{}BOOT1{\_}READ{\_}SECTOR\nwendquote} to decode the data.
  \item Zeros the table entry after a successful read so it will be skipped on subsequent passes.
  \item Loops until all 16 entries are zero (all sectors read).
\end{enumerate}
A retry counter at {\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote} prevents infinite loops on persistent errors.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{85}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}}}\moddef{boot1 load track~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NPXV2SIILUN2N4BMR22352XV7Q000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C00
\nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_LOAD_TRACK}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_LOAD_TRACK}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_SEEK_TRACK}{PYNWmai0-GSWV55ABDP2BJQZ3BYKTEJMFD4000000-1} ; seek to track in A

    ; Build destination page table: interleave[i] + base page
    LDY     #$0F
.build_table:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_INTERLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-OWAIWBVITD6UW3YD3ZTXOIJFRE000000-1},Y
    CLC
    ADC     $3E             ; add base page
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_DEST_PAGES}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1},Y
    DEY
    BPL     .build_table

    LDX     $2B             ; slot index
    LDA     #$60            ; retry counter
    STA     $40
.retry:
    DEC     $40
    BEQ     .timeout
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_FIND_SECTOR}{PYNWmai0-LY6SNVIV65XLG7I7FWR3HFGBBI000000-1} ; find address field -> sector in $2D
    BCS     .retry          ; error -> retry

    LDY     $2D             ; sector number
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_DEST_PAGES}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1},Y ; destination page for this sector
    BEQ     .retry          ; zero = already read, skip
    STA     $45             ; destination page
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $44             ; destination = $xx00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_READ_SECTOR}{PYNWmai0-5Q7JSYCDYMODTBJIWSV667QB2M000000-1} ; read and decode data field
    BCS     .retry          ; error -> retry

    ; Mark sector as done
    LDY     $2D
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_DEST_PAGES}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1},Y ; zero = done

    ; Check if all sectors read
    LDY     #$0F
.check_done:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_DEST_PAGES}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1},Y
    BNE     .retry          ; still have sectors to read
    DEY
    BPL     .check_done
    RTS                     ; all 16 sectors read

.timeout:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_ERROR_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JDMYI2CIEWSVQSNNRHDHKXBAEM000000-1} ; signal error
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}LOAD{\_}TRACK}}{BOOT1:unLOAD:unTRACK}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}LOAD{\_}TRACK}}{BOOT1:unLOAD:unTRACK}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}DEST{\_}PAGES}}{BOOT1:unDEST:unPAGES}}\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}ERROR{\_}FLAG}}{BOOT1:unERROR:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}FIND{\_}SECTOR}}{BOOT1:unFIND:unSECTOR}}\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}INTERLEAVE}}{BOOT1:unINTERLEAVE}}\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}READ{\_}SECTOR}}{BOOT1:unREAD:unSECTOR}}\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}SEEK{\_}TRACK}}{BOOT1:unSEEK:unTRACK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}DEST{\_}PAGES}}{BOOT1:unDEST:unPAGES}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}ERROR{\_}FLAG}}{BOOT1:unERROR:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}FIND{\_}SECTOR}}{BOOT1:unFIND:unSECTOR}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}INTERLEAVE}}{BOOT1:unINTERLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}READ{\_}SECTOR}}{BOOT1:unREAD:unSECTOR}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}SEEK{\_}TRACK}}{BOOT1:unSEEK:unTRACK}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{86}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{87}The interleave table maps physical sector numbers to page offsets
within the target region.  The destination page table is computed at
runtime by adding the base page to each interleave entry.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{88}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OWAIWBVITD6UW3YD3ZTXOIJFRE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OWAIWBVITD6UW3YD3ZTXOIJFRE000000-1}}}\moddef{boot1 interleave table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OWAIWBVITD6UW3YD3ZTXOIJFRE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NPXV2SIILUN2N4BMR22352XV7Q000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C48
\nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_INTERLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-OWAIWBVITD6UW3YD3ZTXOIJFRE000000-1}:
    HEX     0F 08 01 09 02 0A 03 0B 04 0C 05 0D 06 0E 07 00
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}INTERLEAVE}}{BOOT1:unINTERLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-OWAIWBVITD6UW3YD3ZTXOIJFRE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}INTERLEAVE}}{BOOT1:unINTERLEAVE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{89}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{90}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1}}}\moddef{boot1 dest pages~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NPXV2SIILUN2N4BMR22352XV7Q000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C58
\nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_DEST_PAGES}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1}:
    DS      16,$00          ; filled at runtime by \nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_LOAD_TRACK}{PYNWmai0-OGXEGRVE3WYS7NGYAC45RCKBF4000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}DEST{\_}PAGES}}{BOOT1:unDEST:unPAGES}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}DEST{\_}PAGES}}{BOOT1:unDEST:unPAGES}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}LOAD{\_}TRACK}}{BOOT1:unLOAD:unTRACK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}LOAD{\_}TRACK}}{BOOT1:unLOAD:unTRACK}{PYNWmai0-O2IBNREFJIYFQVKWHDUO6YQVPY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{91}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{92}The remainder of page {\Tt{}{\$}0C\nwendquote} contains a fragment of documentation
for the EA Loader system.  This is not crack-inserted text---it is
residual data left over from the original EA development tools.  The
text describes {\Tt{}LOADER.O\nwendquote}, a utility program distributed to EA
authors for writing the loader to disk.  The fragment begins mid-sentence
(``ll of the above.'') and is truncated at the end (``modifyin''),
indicating that the full documentation was longer and this region
preserves only the portion that happened to fall within {\Tt{}BOOT1\nwendquote}'s
5-sector footprint.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{93}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WBQNM24QRSZM34Q2XQNAYQ6SAU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WBQNM24QRSZM34Q2XQNAYQ6SAU000000-1}}}\moddef{boot1 loader doc~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WBQNM24QRSZM34Q2XQNAYQ6SAU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NPXV2SIILUN2N4BMR22352XV7Q000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C68
\nwlinkedidentc{BOOT1_LOADER_DOC}{PYNWmai0-WBQNM24QRSZM34Q2XQNAYQ6SAU000000-1}:
    DC      "ll of the above."
    HEX     0D 10 20 0D 10 20       ; CR, DLE, space, CR, DLE, space
    DC      "The authors all receive a program called LOADER.O, which writes the loader"
    HEX     0D 10 20                ; CR, DLE, space
    DC      "to disk.  To create a new LOADER.O after modifyin"
    HEX     0C 0C                   ; form feed, form feed
    DC      "an"
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}LOADER{\_}DOC}}{BOOT1:unLOADER:unDOC}{PYNWmai0-WBQNM24QRSZM34Q2XQNAYQ6SAU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BOOT1{\_}LOADER{\_}DOC}}{BOOT1:unLOADER:unDOC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{94}\nwdocspar

\chapter{EALDR: The Electronic Arts Loader}
\label{sec:ealdr}

{\Tt{}EALDR\nwendquote} is a mini virtual machine with 18 opcodes, whose purpose is to
load the game data from disk, decrypt a portion of it, and transfer control
to the main program at {\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote}.  It occupies {\Tt{}{\$}A000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}BFFF\nwendquote}, with
the entry point at {\Tt{}{\$}A806\nwendquote}.

\section{Entry point}

The entry code at {\Tt{}{\$}A806\nwendquote} fills the hi-res HGR1 screen ({\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote}) and beyond
({\Tt{}{\$}4000--{\$}7FFF\nwendquote}) with {\Tt{}{\$}FF\nwendquote}, copies the EA splash screen data from {\Tt{}{\$}B000\nwendquote}+ to
{\Tt{}{\$}202C\nwendquote}+, then jumps to the VM execution loop at {\Tt{}{\$}A849\nwendquote}.

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=\columnwidth]{images/ea_splash.png}
\end{center}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{95}{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}SRC\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}4C/{\$}4D\nwendquote}) is a 2-byte zero-page pointer used by the
VM as a general-purpose source address.  The entry code uses it to iterate
through the hi-res screen pages during the fill loop.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{96}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}}}\moddef{ealdr defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
EALDR_SRC           EQU     $4C     ; VM source pointer (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1}              EQU     $03F2   ; Apple II reset vector (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{PWREDUP}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1}             EQU     $03F4   ; power-up byte
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PWREDUP}}{PWREDUP}}\\{{\nwixident{SOFTEV}}{SOFTEV}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PWREDUP}}{PWREDUP}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOFTEV}}{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{97}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{98}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR entry~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A806
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}:
    LDY      #$00            ; Fill $2000-$7FFF with $FF
    STY      EALDR_SRC       ; ($4C) = pointer low
    LDA      #$20
    STA      EALDR_SRC+1     ; ($4D) = $20 (start page)
    LDA      #$FF
.fill:
    STA      (EALDR_SRC),Y
    INY
    BNE      .fill
    INC      EALDR_SRC+1
    BPL      .fill           ; loop until page $80 (sign bit set)

.copy_lo:
    LDX      #$00            ; Copy splash screen from $B000+
.copy_next:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_COPY_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1} ; copy byte, advance source
    INX
    BXNE     #$20,.copy_next ; X = $00..$1F (first 32 bytes)
    LDX      #$80
.copy_hi:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_COPY_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1} ; X = $80..$9F (next 32 bytes)
    INX
    BXNE     #$A0,.copy_hi
    INC      EALDR_COPY_DST  ; self-modify: advance dest page
    LDA      EALDR_COPY_DST
    BANE    #$40,.copy_lo    ; done when dest page reaches $40
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_EXEC}{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}   ; enter VM
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}ENTRY}}{EALDR:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}ENTRY}}{EALDR:unENTRY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}COPY{\_}BYTE}}{EALDR:unCOPY:unBYTE}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}EXEC}}{EALDR:unVM:unEXEC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}COPY{\_}BYTE}}{EALDR:unCOPY:unBYTE}{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}EXEC}}{EALDR:unVM:unEXEC}{PYNWmai0-OTUBKXG6AYXKRRP43MRXPLDVQU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{99}\nwdocspar

The copy subroutine is self-modifying: the source address at {\Tt{}{\$}A83B\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}A83C\nwendquote}
is incremented after each byte:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{100}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR copy subroutine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A83A
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_COPY_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}:
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1} = *+1
    LDA      $B000            ; self-modified source address
EALDR_COPY_DST = *+2
    STA      $202C,X          ; dest = HGR page + offset
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}   ; advance source (low byte)
    BNE      .done
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}+1 ; carry to high byte
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}COPY{\_}BYTE}}{EALDR:unCOPY:unBYTE}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}COPY{\_}SRC}}{EALDR:unCOPY:unSRC}{PYNWmai0-7ZTSVLEK6XOHYGNTN6WE5W7AYM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}COPY{\_}BYTE}}{EALDR:unCOPY:unBYTE}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}COPY{\_}SRC}}{EALDR:unCOPY:unSRC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{101}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{102}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM exec~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A849
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_EXEC}{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}:
    LDX      #$30            ; filler (skipped by Y=4)
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INTERP}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1} ; call interpreter
    DEX                      ; \\  these 3 bytes are skipped;
    BPL      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_EXEC}{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}   ; /  the VM never returns here
                                ; VM bytecodes begin at $A851
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}EXEC}}{EALDR:unVM:unEXEC}{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}EXEC}}{EALDR:unVM:unEXEC}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INTERP}}{EALDR:unVM:unINTERP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INTERP}}{EALDR:unVM:unINTERP}{PYNWmai0-KP7WDPWVK2XGOXOEZR2MUEKZVY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{103}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{104}The VM bytecode program occupies {\Tt{}{\$}A851\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A9F0\nwendquote}, interleaved with
the native 6502 subroutines that the VM calls.  The bytecodes are
XOR-encrypted (address low XOR~{\Tt{}{\$}03\nwendquote}, address high XOR~{\Tt{}{\$}D9\nwendquote},
immediate XOR~{\Tt{}{\$}4C\nwendquote}).  The {\Tt{}VM\nwendquote} macros emit the encrypted bytes
directly so the source reads like the decoded VM program.

Two data bytes at {\Tt{}{\$}A9F1\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A9F2\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TMP0\nwendquote} and
{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TMP1\nwendquote}) are variables used by the bytecode program, not
opcodes.

\subsection{Opcode table}

\begin{table}[h]
\begin{tabular}{clllp{7.5cm}}
\toprule
\thead{Byte} & \thead{Opcode} & \thead{Arg} & \thead{Handler} & \thead{Operation} \\
\midrule
00 & {\Tt{}GOTO\nwendquote}  & addr & \$AA72 & {\Tt{}IP\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}addr\nwendquote} \\
01 & {\Tt{}CALL1\nwendquote} & addr & \$AAAE & Call 6502 subroutine at {\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}; {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ result \\
02 & {\Tt{}BEQ\nwendquote}   & addr & \$AAC5 & If {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $= 0$: {\Tt{}IP\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}, else linear \\
03 & {\Tt{}LDI\nwendquote}   & val  & \$AACF & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}val\nwendquote} (1-byte immediate) \\
04 & {\Tt{}LD\nwendquote}    & addr & \$AADD & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ ({\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}) \\
05 & {\Tt{}CALL\nwendquote}  & addr & \$AAFA & Push return address; {\Tt{}IP\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}addr\nwendquote} \\
06 & {\Tt{}ST\nwendquote}    & addr & \$AB1D & ({\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}) $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} \\
07 & {\Tt{}SUBI\nwendquote}  & val  & \$AB2E & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $-$ {\Tt{}val\nwendquote} (1-byte immediate) \\
08 & {\Tt{}CALL0\nwendquote} & addr & \$AABF & Jump to 6502 code at {\Tt{}addr\nwendquote} (terminal, no return) \\
09 & {\Tt{}RET\nwendquote}   & none & \$AB12 & Pop return address; {\Tt{}IP\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ saved address \\
0A & {\Tt{}LDX\nwendquote}   & addr & \$AAE9 & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ ({\Tt{}addr\nwendquote} $+$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}) (indexed load) \\
0B & {\Tt{}ASL\nwendquote}   & none & \$AB29 & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\times 2$ \\
0C & {\Tt{}INC\nwendquote}   & addr & \$AB7B & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ $++$({\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}) (increment memory, result to~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}) \\
0D & {\Tt{}ADD\nwendquote}   & addr & \$AB8C & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $+$ ({\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}) \\
0E & {\Tt{}DXR\nwendquote}   & none & \$AB55 & ({\Tt{}src\nwendquote}) $\leftarrow$ ({\Tt{}src\nwendquote}) $\oplus$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}; {\Tt{}src\nwendquote} $+= 2$; {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}src\nwendquote}$_H$ $\oplus$ \$68 \\
0F & {\Tt{}BNE\nwendquote}   & addr & \$AB6E & If {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\neq 0$: {\Tt{}IP\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}, else linear \\
10 & {\Tt{}SUB\nwendquote}   & addr & \$AB9B & {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ {\Tt{}A\nwendquote} $-$ ({\Tt{}addr\nwendquote}) \\
11 & {\Tt{}COPY\nwendquote}  & none & \$ABAA & ({\Tt{}dest\nwendquote}$++$) $\leftarrow$ ({\Tt{}src\nwendquote}$++$) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\caption{EALDR VM opcodes. Opcodes 03 and 07 take a 1-byte XOR \$4C argument;
opcodes 0B, 0E, 09, and 11 take no arguments; all others take a 2-byte
XOR \$03/\$D9 address argument.}
\label{table:ealoadervm}
\end{table}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{105}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-HYUHJOJJYH5SKBIFHW4XAJIEKI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HYUHJOJJYH5SKBIFHW4XAJIEKI000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM macros~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HYUHJOJJYH5SKBIFHW4XAJIEKI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-HYUHJOJJYH5SKBIFHW4XAJIEKI000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ; --- EALDR VM bytecode macros ---
    ; Each macro emits the opcode byte followed by XOR-encrypted arguments.
    ; Address args: low ^ $03, high ^ $D9.  Immediate args: ^ $4C.
    MACRO VMGOTO  ;  $00 addr -- IP <- addr
        DC.B $00, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMCALL1 ;  $01 addr -- call 6502 subroutine, result -> acc
        DC.B $01, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMBEQ   ;  $02 addr -- branch if acc = 0
        DC.B $02, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMLDI   ;  $03 val  -- load immediate -> acc
        DC.B $03, [\{1\}] ^ $4C
    ENDM
    MACRO VMLD    ;  $04 addr -- acc <- (addr)
        DC.B $04, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMCALL  ;  $05 addr -- VM subroutine call
        DC.B $05, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMST    ;  $06 addr -- (addr) <- acc
        DC.B $06, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMSUBI  ;  $07 val  -- acc <- acc - val
        DC.B $07, [\{1\}] ^ $4C
    ENDM
    MACRO VMCALL0 ;  $08 addr -- terminal jump to 6502 code
        DC.B $08, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMRET   ;  $09      -- return from VM subroutine
        DC.B $09
    ENDM
    MACRO VMLDX   ;  $0A addr -- acc <- (addr + acc)
        DC.B $0A, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMASL   ;  $0B      -- acc <- acc << 1
        DC.B $0B
    ENDM
    MACRO VMINC   ;  $0C addr -- (addr)++, result -> acc
        DC.B $0C, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMADD   ;  $0D addr -- acc <- acc + (addr)
        DC.B $0D, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMDXR   ;  $0E      -- DXR decryption step
        DC.B $0E
    ENDM
    MACRO VMBNE   ;  $0F addr -- branch if acc != 0
        DC.B $0F, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMSUB   ;  $10 addr -- acc <- acc - (addr)
        DC.B $10, <[\{1\}] ^ $03, >[\{1\}] ^ $D9
    ENDM
    MACRO VMCOPY  ;  $11      -- (dest++) <- (src++)
        DC.B $11
    ENDM
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{106}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{107}Bytecode part~1 begins immediately after the {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}VM{\_}EXEC\nwendquote}
entry point.  It performs the initial display setup:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Switches the Apple~II to hi-res graphics mode (full screen, no text window).
  \item Sets the reset vector to {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}REBOOT\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}A948\nwendquote}) via {\Tt{}SOFTEV\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}PWREDUP\nwendquote}.
  \item Runs a splash screen delay loop (8~iterations of {\Tt{}WAIT\nwendquote}).
  \item Optionally loads Group~1 (tracks {\Tt{}{\$}03\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}{\$}04\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}{\$}21\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}{\$}22\nwendquote}) if the flag at {\Tt{}{\$}A805\nwendquote} is nonzero.
  \item Loads Group~2 (tracks {\Tt{}{\$}07\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}0C\nwendquote}) into {\Tt{}{\$}4000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}95FF\nwendquote} via {\Tt{}VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS\nwendquote}.
  \item Clears the text screen via {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}CLEAR{\_}TEXT\nwendquote}.
\end{enumerate}

The bytecode program sets {\Tt{}SOFTEV\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}A948\nwendquote} (the address of
{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}REBOOT\nwendquote} minus one, per the RTS convention) and {\Tt{}PWREDUP\nwendquote}
to {\Tt{}{\$}0C\nwendquote}.  The Apple~II reset check validates {\Tt{}PWREDUP\nwendquote} against
{\Tt{}SOFTEV\nwendquote} low~EOR~high~EOR~{\Tt{}{\$}A5\nwendquote}; the correct value would be
{\Tt{}{\$}48\nwendquote}~EOR~{\Tt{}{\$}A9\nwendquote}~EOR~{\Tt{}{\$}A5\nwendquote}~=~{\Tt{}{\$}44\nwendquote}, but the EALDR stores
{\Tt{}{\$}A9\nwendquote}~EOR~{\Tt{}{\$}A5\nwendquote}~=~{\Tt{}{\$}0C\nwendquote} instead, omitting the low byte.  This
deliberate mismatch means Ctrl-Reset will \emph{not} jump to
{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}REBOOT\nwendquote}---the monitor will detect a bad {\Tt{}PWREDUP\nwendquote} and
cold-start instead.  Compare with {\Tt{}BOOT1{\_}ENTRY\nwendquote}, which sets
{\Tt{}SOFTEV\nwendquote}~=~{\Tt{}{\$}C600\nwendquote} (low~=~{\Tt{}{\$}00\nwendquote}) where the omission is harmless.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{108}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM bytecode 1~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A851
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_BYTECODE}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}:
    ; --- Display setup ---
    VMLD    $C050              ; TXTCLR (show graphics)
    VMLD    $C052              ; MIXCLR (full screen)
    VMLD    $C057              ; HIRES (hi-res mode)
    VMLDI   $F8                ; \\
    VMST    EALDR_SRC          ; /  EALDR_SRC = $F8 (delay counter)
    VMLDI   $48                ; \\
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1}             ; /  \nwlinkedidentc{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1} lo = $48
    VMLDI   $A9                ; \\
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1}+1           ; /  \nwlinkedidentc{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1} hi = $A9 -> reset = \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_REBOOT}{PYNWmai0-CJ3GS7PRCFSFHUAA5NYLZSDWXI000000-1}
    VMLDI   $0C                ; \\
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{PWREDUP}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1}            ; /  \nwlinkedidentc{PWREDUP}{PYNWmai0-KLS3DI6SRFUHUGTNBDJPOY7TRU000000-1} = $A9 EOR $A5 = $0C

    ; --- Splash screen delay ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_SPLASH_DELAY}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}:
    VMLDI   $FF                ; \\
    VMCALL1 $FCA8              ;  | WAIT ($FF iterations)
    VMINC   EALDR_SRC          ;  | EALDR_SRC++
    VMBEQ   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_LOAD_GROUP1}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}     ;  | done when wraps to 0
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_SPLASH_DELAY}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}    ; /  loop

    ; --- Group 1: optional tracks $03,$04,$21,$22 ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_LOAD_GROUP1}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}:
    VMLD    $A805              ; flag byte (0 = skip Group 1)
    VMBEQ   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_LOAD_GROUP2}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}     ; skip if zero
    VMLDI   $00                ; \\
    VMCALL  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_TRACKS}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}     ;  | read_tracks(0) -> Group 1
    VMLD    $C0E8              ;  | IWM: motor off
    VMCALL1 $0000              ; /  ???

    ; --- Group 2: tracks $07-$0C -> $4000-$95FF ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_LOAD_GROUP2}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}:
    VMLDI   $05                ; \\
    VMCALL  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_TRACKS}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}     ;  | read_tracks(5) -> Group 2
    VMCALL1 \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_CLEAR_TEXT}{PYNWmai0-TJJEPPBX2LZ3UI53FAHZAHNNYY000000-1}   ; /  clear text screen
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_LOAD_GROUP3}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}     ; continue at bytecode part 2
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}BYTECODE}}{EALDR:unVM:unBYTECODE}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP1}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP1}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP2}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP2}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}SPLASH{\_}DELAY}}{VM:unSPLASH:unDELAY}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}BYTECODE}}{EALDR:unVM:unBYTECODE}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP1}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP1}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP2}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP2}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}SPLASH{\_}DELAY}}{VM:unSPLASH:unDELAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}CLEAR{\_}TEXT}}{EALDR:unCLEAR:unTEXT}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}REBOOT}}{EALDR:unREBOOT}}\\{{\nwixident{PWREDUP}}{PWREDUP}}\\{{\nwixident{SOFTEV}}{SOFTEV}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP3}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS}}{VM:unREAD:unTRACKS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}CLEAR{\_}TEXT}}{EALDR:unCLEAR:unTEXT}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}REBOOT}}{EALDR:unREBOOT}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PWREDUP}}{PWREDUP}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOFTEV}}{SOFTEV}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP3}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS}}{VM:unREAD:unTRACKS}{PYNWmai0-6SHRJ5ULJKVESLNHUCFMAIXN7A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{109}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{110}Bytecode part~2 continues after the native {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}CLEAR{\_}TEXT\nwendquote}
subroutine.  It performs the remaining loading, verification, and
decryption steps:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Loads Group~3 (tracks {\Tt{}{\$}0D\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}10\nwendquote}) into {\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} via {\Tt{}VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS\nwendquote}.
  \item Checksums {\Tt{}{\$}A000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A2DF\nwendquote} to verify the EALDR's own code; if the result is not {\Tt{}{\$}60\nwendquote}, branches to {\Tt{}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}SPLASH\nwendquote}.
  \item Seeks to track~5 and turns off the drive motor.
  \item Decrypts {\Tt{}{\$}4000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}67FF\nwendquote} using the {\Tt{}VMDXR\nwendquote} opcode with the ``funny increment'' key schedule ({\Tt{}EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC\nwendquote}).
  \item Copies {\Tt{}{\$}A300\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A5FF\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}0500\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}07FF\nwendquote} (the resident routines).
  \item Transfers control to the main program at {\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote} via {\Tt{}VMCALL0\nwendquote} (never returns).
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{111}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM bytecode 2~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A8B2
    ; --- Group 3: tracks $0D-$10 -> $0800-$3FFF ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_LOAD_GROUP3}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}:
    VMLD    $A800              ; flag byte (nonzero = show lo-res)
    VMBEQ   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_DO_GROUP3}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}       ; skip if zero
    VMLD    $C056              ; LORES (lo-res mode)
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_DO_GROUP3}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLDI   $0C                ; \\
    VMCALL  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_TRACKS}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}     ;  | read_tracks(12) -> Group 3
    VMLDI   $00                ; \\
    VMST    EALDR_SRC          ;  | EALDR_SRC = 0
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; /  checksum accumulator = 0

    ; --- Checksum verification ($A000-$A2E0) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_CHECKSUM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLD    EALDR_SRC          ; A = index
    VMLDX   $A000              ; \\
    VMSUB   \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ;  | checksum -= mem[$A000 + index]
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; /
    VMLD    EALDR_SRC          ; \\
    VMLDX   $A100              ;  | checksum -= mem[$A100 + index]
    VMSUB   \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ;  |
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; /
    VMINC   EALDR_SRC          ; index++
    VMBNE   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_CHECKSUM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}   ; loop until index wraps
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_CHECKSUM_A200}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLD    EALDR_SRC          ; \\
    VMLDX   $A200              ;  | checksum -= mem[$A200 + index]
    VMSUB   \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ;  |
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; /
    VMINC   EALDR_SRC          ; index++
    VMSUBI  $E0                ; \\
    VMBNE   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_CHECKSUM_A200}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}   ; /  loop until index = $E0
    VMLD    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; checksum result
    VMSUBI  $60                ; \\
    VMBNE   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_SPLASH}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}    ; /  if checksum != $60 -> error

    ; --- DXR decryption ($4000-$67FF) ---
    VMLDI   $05                ; \\
    VMCALL1 \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_MOVE_ARM_TRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-6JYY2SO57ZRYJR7W2OZS4RWYYQ000000-1}     ; /  move arm to track 5
    VMLD    $A000              ; (read value, discard)
    VMLDI   $00                ; \\
    VMLD    $C0E8              ; /  IWM: motor off
    VMLDI   $00                ; \\
    VMST    EALDR_SRC          ;  | src = $4000
    VMLDI   $40                ;  |
    VMST    EALDR_SRC+1        ; /
    VMLDI   $02                ; \\
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_BOT}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}          ;  | funny-inc counters: bot=2, top=3
    VMLDI   $03                ;  |
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TOP}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}          ; /
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_DXR_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMCALL1 \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_FUNNY_INC}{PYNWmai0-U7XPWEZLU7Y5X64P7BA7BNFASM000000-1}   ; advance key schedule
    VMDXR                      ; decrypt one byte
    VMBNE   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_DXR_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}        ; loop until acc = 0 (src high = $68)

    ; --- Copy $A300-$A5FF -> $0500-$07FF ---
    VMLDI   $00                ; \\
    VMST    EALDR_SRC          ;  | src = $A300
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}         ;  | dest = $0500
    VMLDI   $A3                ;  |
    VMST    EALDR_SRC+1        ;  |
    VMLDI   $05                ;  |
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}+1       ; /
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_COPY_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMCOPY                     ; copy one byte
    VMLD    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}+1       ; check if dest page reached $08
    VMSUBI  $08                ; \\
    VMBNE   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_COPY_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}       ; /  loop until done (3 pages)

    ; --- Enter main program ---
    VMCALL0 $0800              ; jump to main program (never returns)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP3}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}LOAD{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unLOAD:unGROUP3}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}BOT}}{EALDR:unBOT}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DEST}}{EALDR:unDEST}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC}}{EALDR:unFUNNY:unINC}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}MOVE{\_}ARM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{EALDR:unMOVE:unARM:unTRAMPOLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP1}}{EALDR:unTMP1}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TOP}}{EALDR:unTOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}A200}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unA200}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}COPY{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCOPY:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}DO{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unDO:unGROUP3}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}DXR{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unDXR:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}SPLASH}}{VM:unERROR:unSPLASH}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS}}{VM:unREAD:unTRACKS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}BOT}}{EALDR:unBOT}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DEST}}{EALDR:unDEST}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC}}{EALDR:unFUNNY:unINC}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}MOVE{\_}ARM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{EALDR:unMOVE:unARM:unTRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP1}}{EALDR:unTMP1}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TOP}}{EALDR:unTOP}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}A200}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unA200}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}COPY{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCOPY:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}DO{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unDO:unGROUP3}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}DXR{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unDXR:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}SPLASH}}{VM:unERROR:unSPLASH}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS}}{VM:unREAD:unTRACKS}{PYNWmai0-K3QCKSMVDZGQVQJ2I326L64VXM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{112}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{113}Bytecode part~3 is the entry point of the {\Tt{}VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS\nwendquote}
subroutine, located between the native {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}REBOOT\nwendquote} and
{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC\nwendquote} routines:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Saves the table index (passed in the VM accumulator) to {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TMP0\nwendquote}.
  \item Turns on the drive motor.
  \item Jumps to the subroutine body in part~4.
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{114}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM bytecode 3~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A967
    ; --- read_tracks subroutine (entry) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_TRACKS}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}:
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; save table index
    VMLD    $C0E9              ; IWM: motor on
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}       ; continue at bytecode part 4
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS}}{VM:unREAD:unTRACKS}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS}}{VM:unREAD:unTRACKS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP0}}{EALDR:unTMP0}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unREAD:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP0}}{EALDR:unTMP0}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unREAD:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-WZXCGKU2PWC7LNT2YLJMQUY654000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{115}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{116}Bytecode part~4 is the body of the {\Tt{}VM{\_}READ{\_}TRACKS\nwendquote} subroutine,
located after the native {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC\nwendquote} routine.  The track-loading
loop works as follows:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Reads {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TRACK{\_}PAGES\nwendquote} at the current index to get the destination page; a zero byte terminates the loop ({\Tt{}VM{\_}READ{\_}DONE\nwendquote}).
  \item Stores the destination page in {\Tt{}{\$}3E\nwendquote}.
  \item Reads {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TRACKS\nwendquote} at the same index to get the track number.
  \item Calls {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}READ{\_}TRACK{\_}TRAMPOLINE\nwendquote} to load the track; on failure, jumps to {\Tt{}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote}.
  \item Increments the index and loops.
\end{enumerate}

This chunk also contains two error handlers and two data bytes:
\begin{itemize}
  \item {\Tt{}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}SPLASH\nwendquote}: displays a~`?' and loops with beeping (entered on checksum failure).
  \item {\Tt{}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote}: shows ``ERR'' and halts (entered on disk read failure).
  \item {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TMP0\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TMP1\nwendquote}: runtime variables (table index and checksum accumulator), not bytecodes.
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{117}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM bytecode 4~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A985
    ; --- read_tracks subroutine (body) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLD    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; A = table index
    VMLDX   \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TRACK_PAGES}{PYNWmai0-IHL3JAUEITOY7NRQBJ3MQIEJFE000000-1}  ; A = track_pages[index]
    VMBEQ   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_DONE}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}       ; zero terminator -> return
    VMST    $003E              ; base page = track_pages[index]
    VMLD    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}                    ; \\
    VMLDX   \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TRACKS}{PYNWmai0-IHL3JAUEITOY7NRQBJ3MQIEJFE000000-1}                  ;  | A = tracks[index]
    VMCALL1 \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_TRACK_TRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-6JYY2SO57ZRYJR7W2OZS4RWYYQ000000-1}   ; /  read track
    VMBEQ   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_NEXT}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}                  ; success -> advance index
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}              ; error -> error handler

    ; --- advance to next track ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_NEXT}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLD    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ; \\
    VMSUBI  $FF                ;  | index++ (subtract $FF = add 1 mod 256)
    VMST    \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ;  |
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}       ; /  loop

    ; --- error: splash screen loop ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_SPLASH}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLD    $C0E9              ; IWM: motor on
    VMCALL1 $FC58              ; HOME (clear screen)
    VMLD    $C051              ; TXTSET (show text)
    VMLDI   $BF                ; \\
    VMST    $0400              ; /  '?' on screen
    VMLDI   $40                ; \\
    VMCALL1 $FCA8              ; /  WAIT ($40)
    VMLD    $C0E8              ; IWM: motor off
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_BEEP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMLDI   $60                ; \\
    VMCALL1 $FCA8              ;  | WAIT ($60)
    VMLDI   $08                ;  | WAIT ($08)
    VMCALL1 $FCA8              ;  |
    VMINC   \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}         ;  | increment counter
    VMBNE   \nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_BEEP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}      ; /  loop (beep pattern)
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_SPLASH}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}    ; restart splash loop

    ; --- error: display "EA" and reboot ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMCALL1 $FC58              ; HOME
    VMCALL1 $FBDD              ; BELL (beep)
    VMLD    $C051              ; TXTSET
    VMLDI   $C5                ; \\
    VMST    $0400              ;  | 'E' on screen
    VMLDI   $D2                ;  |
    VMST    $0401              ;  | 'R' on screen (error code)
    VMST    $0402              ; /  'R' again
    VMLD    $C0E8              ; IWM: motor off
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_HALT}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMGOTO  \nwlinkedidentc{VM_ERROR_HALT}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}      ; infinite loop

    ; --- data ---
\nwlinkedidentc{VM_READ_DONE}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    VMRET                      ; return from read_tracks
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                ; table index (runtime)
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                ; checksum accumulator (runtime)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP0}}{EALDR:unTMP0}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP1}}{EALDR:unTMP1}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}A200}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unA200}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}COPY{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCOPY:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}DO{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unDO:unGROUP3}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}DXR{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unDXR:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}BEEP}}{VM:unERROR:unBEEP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}DISPLAY}}{VM:unERROR:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}HALT}}{VM:unERROR:unHALT}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}SPLASH}}{VM:unERROR:unSPLASH}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}DONE}}{VM:unREAD:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unREAD:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}NEXT}}{VM:unREAD:unNEXT}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP0}}{EALDR:unTMP0}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TMP1}}{EALDR:unTMP1}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}A200}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unA200}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}CHECKSUM{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCHECKSUM:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}COPY{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unCOPY:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}DO{\_}GROUP3}}{VM:unDO:unGROUP3}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}DXR{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unDXR:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}BEEP}}{VM:unERROR:unBEEP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}DISPLAY}}{VM:unERROR:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}HALT}}{VM:unERROR:unHALT}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}ERROR{\_}SPLASH}}{VM:unERROR:unSPLASH}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}DONE}}{VM:unREAD:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}LOOP}}{VM:unREAD:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{VM{\_}READ{\_}NEXT}}{VM:unREAD:unNEXT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}TRACK{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{EALDR:unREAD:unTRACK:unTRAMPOLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TRACKS}}{EALDR:unTRACKS}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TRACK{\_}PAGES}}{EALDR:unTRACK:unPAGES}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}TRACK{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{EALDR:unREAD:unTRACK:unTRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TRACKS}}{EALDR:unTRACKS}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TRACK{\_}PAGES}}{EALDR:unTRACK:unPAGES}{PYNWmai0-7MWWXFEPWVDCQUTO3ZCLWAUMRM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{118}\nwdocspar

\section{VM architecture}

The VM has the following state:

\begin{itemize}
  \item \textbf{Accumulator} ({\Tt{}A\nwendquote}): One byte, stored at zero-page {\Tt{}{\$}48\nwendquote}.
  \item \textbf{Instruction pointer}: A two-byte pointer in {\Tt{}{\$}46\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}47\nwendquote} plus
        a {\Tt{}Y\nwendquote} register offset. The current bytecode address is {\Tt{}{\$}46\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}47\nwendquote} + {\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}.
  \item \textbf{Source pointer} ({\Tt{}src\nwendquote}): {\Tt{}{\$}4C\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}4D\nwendquote}, used by {\Tt{}DXR\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}COPY\nwendquote}.
  \item \textbf{Destination pointer} ({\Tt{}dest\nwendquote}): {\Tt{}{\$}4E\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}4F\nwendquote}, used by {\Tt{}COPY\nwendquote}.
  \item The 6502 hardware stack is used for VM subroutine return addresses.
\end{itemize}

The VM interpreter at {\Tt{}{\$}AA35\nwendquote} uses an RTS trick to obtain the bytecode
address: it pulls the JSR return address ({\Tt{}{\$}A84D\nwendquote}) from the stack into
{\Tt{}{\$}46\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}47\nwendquote}, then starts reading opcodes at offset {\Tt{}Y=4\nwendquote}, which lands on
{\Tt{}{\$}A851\nwendquote}---the first bytecode, just past the {\Tt{}DEX\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}BPL\nwendquote} bytes. The {\Tt{}DEX\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}BPL\nwendquote}
loop is never executed; it could serve as a retry mechanism, if {\Tt{}X\nwendquote} were actually
saved and restored, but would then just crash if retries run out, by trying to execute
VM bytecode as 6502 code.

\subsection{Opcode dispatch}

The interpreter reads one byte from the bytecode stream as an opcode index.
It looks up the index in a dispatch table at {\Tt{}{\$}AA60\nwendquote} and computes the handler
address as {\Tt{}{\$}AA72\nwendquote} + table[opcode]. The {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} instruction at {\Tt{}{\$}AA5D\nwendquote} is
self-modified to jump to the handler.

After a handler executes, control flow takes one of two paths:
\begin{itemize}
  \item \textbf{Linear}: The handler jumps to {\Tt{}{\$}AA45\nwendquote}, which reads the next
        opcode from the current stream position (Y was already advanced past
        the handler's arguments). Used by most opcodes.
  \item \textbf{Goto}: The handler falls through to {\Tt{}{\$}AA72\nwendquote}, which reads
        a 2-byte encoded address from the stream, loads it into {\Tt{}{\$}46\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}47\nwendquote},
        resets {\Tt{}Y=0\nwendquote}, and loops back to the dispatcher. Used by {\Tt{}GOTO\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BEQ\nwendquote},
        {\Tt{}BNE\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}CALL\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}RET\nwendquote}.
\end{itemize}

\subsection{Bytecode encryption}

Arguments in the bytecode stream are XOR-encrypted:
\begin{itemize}
  \item Address arguments (2 bytes): low byte XOR {\Tt{}{\$}03\nwendquote}, high byte XOR {\Tt{}{\$}D9\nwendquote}.
        The subroutine at {\Tt{}{\$}AA82\nwendquote} reads and decodes these into {\Tt{}{\$}42\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}43\nwendquote}.
  \item Immediate values (1 byte): XOR {\Tt{}{\$}4C\nwendquote}. Decoded inline by the handler.
\end{itemize}

\subsection{VM interpreter}

The interpreter at {\Tt{}{\$}AA35\nwendquote} saves the accumulator and {\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}, uses the
RTS trick to obtain the bytecode pointer from the caller's return
address, then enters the dispatch loop.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{119}{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}PTR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}46/{\$}47\nwendquote}) is the VM instruction pointer---the current
position in the bytecode stream.  {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}48\nwendquote}) is the VM's
single-byte accumulator register.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{120}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}}}\moddef{ealdr defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}           EQU     $46     ; VM instruction pointer (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}     EQU     $48     ; VM accumulator
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC}}{EALDR:unPSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC}}{EALDR:unPSUEDOACC}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{121}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{122}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM interpreter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $AA35
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INTERP}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INTERP}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}:
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}        ; save VM accumulator
    PHA
    TYA                             ; save Y
    PHA
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INIT}{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}          ; RTS trick: pull return addr -> $46/$47

    ; --- After RTS trick, execution resumes here ---
    PLA                             ; pull saved Y -> $46 (low byte of return addr)
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    PLA                             ; pull saved acc -> $47 (high byte)
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1

    ; Dispatch loop
    LDY      #$04                   ; skip 4 bytes (DEX/BPL/offset + JSR addr byte)
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}:                 ; $AA45
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}),Y          ; read opcode byte
    INY
    BNE      .no_carry
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
.no_carry:
    TAX                             ; opcode -> X
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DISPATCH_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-ACFGEB6AF6C6DX2VO2FQUHKCLM000000-1},X ; handler offset
    CLC
    ADC      #<\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}        ; handler = $AA72 + offset
    STA      EALDR_VM_JMP+1         ; self-modify JMP low byte
    LDA      #>\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}
    ADC      #$00                   ; carry
    STA      EALDR_VM_JMP+2         ; self-modify JMP high byte
EALDR_VM_JMP:
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}          ; self-modified: jump to handler
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INTERP}}{EALDR:unVM:unINTERP}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INTERP}}{EALDR:unVM:unINTERP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC}}{EALDR:unPSUEDOACC}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INIT}}{EALDR:unVM:unINIT}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{EALDR:unVM:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC}}{EALDR:unPSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INIT}}{EALDR:unVM:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{EALDR:unVM:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{123}\nwdocspar

The argument reader decodes a 2-byte address from the bytecode stream:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{124}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM arg reader~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $AA82
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}:
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}),Y ; read low byte
    EOR      #$03          ; decrypt
    INY
    BNE      .no_carry1
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
.no_carry1:
    STA      $42           ; decoded low byte
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}),Y ; read high byte
    INY
    BNE      .no_carry2
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
.no_carry2:
    EOR      #$D9          ; decrypt
    STA      $43           ; decoded high byte
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}ARG16}}{EALDR:unREAD:unARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}ARG16}}{EALDR:unREAD:unARG16}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{125}\nwdocspar

The RTS trick subroutine: pulls 4 values from the stack (JSR return address,
then the saved Y and accumulator), increments the return address, and jumps
back to the instruction after {\Tt{}JSR\ EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INIT\nwendquote}:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{126}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM init~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $AA99
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INIT}{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INIT}{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}:
    PLA
    STA      $42       ; return addr low
    PLA
    STA      $43       ; return addr high
    PLA
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2} ; saved Y -> $46 (overwritten later)
    PLA
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2} ; saved acc -> $46 (overwrites Y)
    INC      $42       ; return addr + 1
    BNE      .no_carry
    INC      $43
.no_carry:
    JMP      ($0042)   ; jump to instruction after JSR \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_INIT}{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INIT}}{EALDR:unVM:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}INIT}}{EALDR:unVM:unINIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-JVSHYFZ5LSJCRGOWKY22MRDYOQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{127}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Dispatch table}

The dispatch table at {\Tt{}{\$}AA60\nwendquote} holds 18 one-byte offsets.  The
handler address is {\Tt{}{\$}AA72\nwendquote} + offset.  Opcodes {\Tt{}0C\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}11\nwendquote} point
to three-byte {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} trampolines at {\Tt{}{\$}AB43\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}AB54\nwendquote} because
their handlers lie beyond the one-byte offset range.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{128}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ACFGEB6AF6C6DX2VO2FQUHKCLM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ACFGEB6AF6C6DX2VO2FQUHKCLM000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR dispatch table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ACFGEB6AF6C6DX2VO2FQUHKCLM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $AA60
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DISPATCH_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-ACFGEB6AF6C6DX2VO2FQUHKCLM000000-1}:
    HEX  00 3C 53 5D 6B 88 AB BC 4D A0 77 B7
    ;    GOTO CALL1 BEQ LDI LD CALL ST SUBI CALL0 RET LDX ASL
    HEX  D1 D4 D7 DA DD E0
    ;    INC  ADD  DXR  BNE  SUB  COPY (trampolines)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-ACFGEB6AF6C6DX2VO2FQUHKCLM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TABLE}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH:unTABLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{129}\nwdocspar

The goto path at {\Tt{}{\$}AA72\nwendquote} is entered when an opcode handler needs to
set the instruction pointer from a decoded address in {\Tt{}{\$}42\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}43\nwendquote}:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{130}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR VM goto path~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $AA72
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1} ; read 2-byte encoded address -> $42/$43
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}:                  ; $AA75 - entry when addr already in $42/$43
    LDA      $42
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}        ; update bytecode pointer
    LDA      $43
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
    LDY      #$00
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-3G6WMBQBT5TJNNRYHA3MYWVIUM000000-1}   ; read next opcode
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}GOTO}}{EALDR:unVM:unGOTO}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{EALDR:unVM:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}GOTO}}{EALDR:unVM:unGOTO}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}LOOP}}{EALDR:unVM:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}ARG16}}{EALDR:unREAD:unARG16}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}ARG16}}{EALDR:unREAD:unARG16}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{131}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Opcode handlers}

Each handler is reached via the self-modifying {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}AA5D\nwendquote}.
After execution, handlers jump to either {\Tt{}{\$}AA45\nwendquote} (linear: next
opcode from current stream position) or {\Tt{}{\$}AA75\nwendquote} (goto: set IP from
{\Tt{}{\$}42\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}{\$}43\nwendquote} and dispatch).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{132}{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}AA45\nwendquote}) is the dispatch loop entry point.
Opcode handlers jump here to continue with the next bytecode instruction.
{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}DEST\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}4E/{\$}4F\nwendquote}) is the VM's destination pointer, used by the
{\Tt{}COPY\nwendquote} opcode to write bytes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{133}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}}}\moddef{ealdr defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}   EQU     $AA45   ; dispatch loop entry (linear continuation)
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}          EQU     $4E     ; VM dest pointer (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DEST}}{EALDR:unDEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unVM:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DEST}}{EALDR:unDEST}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unVM:unDISPATCH}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{134}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{135}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR opcode handlers~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $AAAE
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_OP_CALL1}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}
; --- Opcode 01: CALL1 addr ---
; Call 6502 subroutine; result -> VM acc.  Handler at $AAAE.
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_OP_CALL1}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}  ; decode addr -> $42/$43
    TYA
    PHA                        ; save Y (subroutine may clobber it)
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JSR      EALDR_JMP_IND     ; JMP ($0042) -- enters subroutine
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}   ; return value -> VM acc
    PLA
    TAY                        ; restore Y
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3} ; linear

; --- Opcode 08: CALL0 addr ---
; Terminal jump to 6502 code (no return).  Handler at $AABF.
; Falls through into EALDR_JMP_IND.
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_OP_CALL0}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
; Helper: indirect jump through $42/$43.  Used by CALL1 and CALL0.
EALDR_JMP_IND:                  ; $AAC2
    JMP      ($0042)

; --- Opcode 02: BEQ addr ---
; Branch if VM acc = 0.  Handler at $AAC5.
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_OP_BEQ}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    BEQ      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}     ; zero -> goto path (IP = $42/$43)
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3} ; nonzero -> linear

    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_OP_LDI}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}
; --- Opcode 03: LDI val ---
; Load 1-byte immediate (XOR $4C) into VM acc.  Handler at $AACF.
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_OP_LDI}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}:
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}),Y     ; read encoded byte
    INY
    BNE      .nc
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
.nc:
    EOR      #$4C              ; decrypt
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Opcode 04: LD addr ---
; Load byte at addr into VM acc.  Handler at $AADD.
EALDR_OP_LD:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
EALDR_OP_LD_DO:                 ; $AAE0 (shared by LDX)
    LDX      #$00
    LDA      ($42,X)           ; load byte at decoded address
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

    SUBROUTINE EALDR_OP_LDX
; --- Opcode 0A: LDX addr ---
; Indexed load: A <- (addr + A).  Handler at $AAE9.
EALDR_OP_LDX:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}   ; add VM acc to address
    CLC
    ADC      $42
    STA      $42
    BCC      .nc
    INC      $43
.nc:
    JMP      EALDR_OP_LD_DO    ; fall into LD handler

    SUBROUTINE EALDR_OP_CALL
; --- Opcode 05: CALL addr ---
; VM subroutine call: push return IP, goto addr.  Handler at $AAFA.
EALDR_OP_CALL:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}  ; target -> $42/$43
    TYA                        ; compute return IP = $46 + Y
    CLC
    ADC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    BCC      .nc
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
.nc:
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}     \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}         ; push return addr (lo first, hi second)
    LDY      #$00
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}     ; goto path (IP = target)

; --- Opcode 09: RET ---
; Return from VM subroutine.  Handler at $AB12.
EALDR_OP_RET:
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}     \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}         ; pop return addr (hi first, lo second)
    LDY      #$00
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Opcode 06: ST addr ---
; Store VM acc at addr.  Handler at $AB1D.
EALDR_OP_ST:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    LDX      #$00
    STA      ($42,X)
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Opcode 0B: ASL ---
; Shift VM acc left.  Handler at $AB29.
EALDR_OP_ASL:
    ASL      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

    SUBROUTINE EALDR_OP_SUBI
; --- Opcode 07: SUBI val ---
; Subtract 1-byte immediate (XOR $4C) from VM acc.  Handler at $AB2E.
EALDR_OP_SUBI:
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}),Y     ; read encoded byte
    INY
    BNE      .nc
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}+1
.nc:
    EOR      #$4C              ; decrypt
    STA      $42               ; temp
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    SEC
    SBC      $42               ; acc - immediate
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Trampolines for opcodes 0C-11 ---
; These JMPs bridge the 1-byte dispatch offset limit.
EALDR_TRAMP_INC:                ; $AB43
    JMP      EALDR_OP_INC
EALDR_TRAMP_ADD:
    JMP      EALDR_OP_ADD
EALDR_TRAMP_DXR:
    JMP      EALDR_DXR_STEP
EALDR_TRAMP_BNE:
    JMP      EALDR_OP_BNE
EALDR_TRAMP_SUB:
    JMP      EALDR_OP_SUB
EALDR_TRAMP_COPY:
    JMP      EALDR_OP_COPY

; --- Opcode 0E: DXR ---
\LA{}EALDR DXR step~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5472SKOJUX4LJJGKKL3QAH35VE000000-1}}\RA{}

; --- Opcode 0F: BNE addr ---
; Branch if VM acc != 0.  Handler at $AB6E.
EALDR_OP_BNE:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    BEQ      .skip
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-WTMPUF5SHOYUG6J2PKG2ATOAKE000000-1}     ; nonzero -> goto path
.skip:
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3} ; zero -> linear

; --- Opcode 0C: INC addr ---
; Increment byte at addr; result also -> VM acc.  Handler at $AB7B.
EALDR_OP_INC:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDX      #$00
    LDA      ($42,X)
    CLC
    ADC      #$01
    STA      ($42,X)           ; store incremented value
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}   ; also update VM acc
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Opcode 0D: ADD addr ---
; A <- A + (addr).  Handler at $AB8C.
EALDR_OP_ADD:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDX      #$00
    LDA      ($42,X)
    CLC
    ADC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Opcode 10: SUB addr ---
; A <- A - (addr).  Handler at $AB9B.
EALDR_OP_SUB:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_READ_ARG16}{PYNWmai0-OC5ZBQJM5XGIB4PCY42Y43KEPA000000-1}
    LDX      #$00
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    SEC
    SBC      ($42,X)
    STA      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_PSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-2}
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}

; --- Opcode 11: COPY ---
; Copy one byte: (dest++) <- (src++).  Handler at $ABAA.
EALDR_OP_COPY:
    LDX      #$00
    LDA      (EALDR_SRC,X)     ; read from src
    STA      (\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3},X)    ; write to dest
    INC      EALDR_SRC         ; src++
    BNE      .nc1
    INC      EALDR_SRC+1
.nc1:
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}        ; dest++
    BNE      .nc2
    INC      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_DEST}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}+1
.nc2:
    JMP      \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_VM_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}BEQ}}{EALDR:unOP:unBEQ}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}CALL0}}{EALDR:unOP:unCALL0}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}CALL1}}{EALDR:unOP:unCALL1}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}LDI}}{EALDR:unOP:unLDI}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}BEQ}}{EALDR:unOP:unBEQ}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}CALL0}}{EALDR:unOP:unCALL0}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}CALL1}}{EALDR:unOP:unCALL1}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}OP{\_}LDI}}{EALDR:unOP:unLDI}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DEST}}{EALDR:unDEST}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC}}{EALDR:unPSUEDOACC}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}ARG16}}{EALDR:unREAD:unARG16}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unVM:unDISPATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}GOTO}}{EALDR:unVM:unGOTO}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}DEST}}{EALDR:unDEST}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PSUEDOACC}}{EALDR:unPSUEDOACC}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}PTR}}{EALDR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}READ{\_}ARG16}}{EALDR:unREAD:unARG16}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH}}{EALDR:unVM:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}VM{\_}GOTO}}{EALDR:unVM:unGOTO}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-2T6DGWJW5W5V7YAHVDFFWQCSSY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{136}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{137}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{138}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{139}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{140}\nwdocspar

\subsection{Machine language subroutines}

These are 6502 routines called by {\Tt{}CALL1\nwendquote} or {\Tt{}CALL0\nwendquote} from the VM:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{141}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TJJEPPBX2LZ3UI53FAHZAHNNYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TJJEPPBX2LZ3UI53FAHZAHNNYY000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR clear text screen~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TJJEPPBX2LZ3UI53FAHZAHNNYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A898
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_CLEAR_TEXT}{PYNWmai0-TJJEPPBX2LZ3UI53FAHZAHNNYY000000-1}:
    LDA      #$00
    STA      EALDR_SRC     ; $4C = 0
    LDA      #$04
    STA      EALDR_SRC+1   ; $4D = 4 -> pointer = $0400
    LDY      #$00
.loop:
    LDA      #$00
    STA      (EALDR_SRC),Y ; zero out
    INY
    BNE      .loop
    INC      EALDR_SRC+1
    LDA      EALDR_SRC+1
    BANE    #$08,.loop     ; done at $0800
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}CLEAR{\_}TEXT}}{EALDR:unCLEAR:unTEXT}{PYNWmai0-TJJEPPBX2LZ3UI53FAHZAHNNYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}CLEAR{\_}TEXT}}{EALDR:unCLEAR:unTEXT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{142}\nwdocspar


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{143}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CJ3GS7PRCFSFHUAA5NYLZSDWXI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CJ3GS7PRCFSFHUAA5NYLZSDWXI000000-1}}}\moddef{EALDR reboot handler~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CJ3GS7PRCFSFHUAA5NYLZSDWXI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $A948
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_REBOOT}{PYNWmai0-CJ3GS7PRCFSFHUAA5NYLZSDWXI000000-1}:
    JSR      $FC58 ; HOME (clear screen)
    LDA      #$FF
.delay:
    LDX      #$A0
.inner:
    DEX
    BNE      .inner
    BIT      $C030 ; click speaker
    SEC
    SBC      #$01
    BNE      .delay
    LDA      #$C5  ; 'E'
    STA      $0400
    LDA      #$C1  ; 'A'
    STA      $0401
    JMP      $C600 ; reboot from Disk II
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}REBOOT}}{EALDR:unREBOOT}{PYNWmai0-CJ3GS7PRCFSFHUAA5NYLZSDWXI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}REBOOT}}{EALDR:unREBOOT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{144}\nwdocspar


The ``funny increment'' routine manages the DXR key schedule.
{\Tt{}EALDR{\_}BOT\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}AC60\nwendquote}) holds the low counter and {\Tt{}EALDR{\_}TOP\nwendquote}
({\Tt{}{\$}AC61\nwendquote}) holds the high counter.  Bot increments each call; when it
reaches top, it resets to~1 and top increments:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{145}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}}}\moddef{ealdr defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-NFAQ7GXVG25LDEHMLE2D3NAUF4000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-3}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_BOT}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}           EQU     $AC60   ; funny-increment low counter
\nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_TOP}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}           EQU     $AC61   ; funny-increment high counter
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}BOT}}{EALDR:unBOT}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TOP}}{EALDR:unTOP}{PYNWmai0-ZKRKWSFVRL2UDWYQR5YVDOYFWU000000-4}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}BOT}}{EALDR:unBOT}}\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}TOP}}{EALDR:unTOP}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{146}\nwdocspar
