\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{229}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MZJYJ5MUFZ7EMDQDPN4KI5XYLM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MZJYJ5MUFZ7EMDQDPN4KI5XYLM000000-1}}}\moddef{extract main constants~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MZJYJ5MUFZ7EMDQDPN4KI5XYLM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-RGVLVC5IGJPHVEPOX4HNZV6GTY000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
DSK_FILE = "Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves (4am and san inc crack).dsk"
EALDR_FILE = "ealdr.bin"
OUTPUT_FILE = "main.bin"

BASE_ADDR = 0x0500
END_ADDR = 0x9600
SIZE = END_ADDR - BASE_ADDR  # $9100 = 37120

# DOS 3.3 physical-to-logical skew (physical sector -> file sector)
DOS_SKEW = [0, 7, 14, 6, 13, 5, 12, 4, 11, 3, 10, 2, 9, 1, 8, 15]

# Custom game loader interleave: physical sector -> page offset from base
LOADER_INTERLEAVE = [0xF, 0x8, 0x1, 0x9, 0x2, 0xA, 0x3, 0xB,
                     0x4, 0xC, 0x5, 0xD, 0x6, 0xE, 0x7, 0x0]

# Track loading tables (from EALDR $A9F3 and $AA04)
GROUP2 = [(0x07, 0x40), (0x08, 0x50), (0x09, 0x60),
          (0x0A, 0x70), (0x0B, 0x80), (0x0C, 0x86)]
GROUP3 = [(0x0D, 0x08), (0x0E, 0x10), (0x0F, 0x20), (0x10, 0x30)]
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{230}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{231}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2FEO3FHG25HEX65SIQMHD45YKU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2FEO3FHG25HEX65SIQMHD45YKU000000-1}}}\moddef{extract main read track~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2FEO3FHG25HEX65SIQMHD45YKU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-RGVLVC5IGJPHVEPOX4HNZV6GTY000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
def read_track(dsk, track, base_page, mem):
    """Read 16 sectors of a track into mem using the custom interleave.

    Each physical sector on disk maps to a page offset via
    LOADER_INTERLEAVE, so the data lands at (base_page + offset) * 256.
    """
    for phys in range(16):
        page_offset = LOADER_INTERLEAVE[phys]
        dos_logical = DOS_SKEW[phys]
        file_pos = (track * 16 + dos_logical) * 256
        dest = (base_page + page_offset) * 256 - BASE_ADDR
        if 0 <= dest and dest + 256 <= SIZE:
            mem[dest:dest + 256] = dsk[file_pos:file_pos + 256]
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{232}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{233}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WOGQTGII6OY62EQTCACGY5QX74000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WOGQTGII6OY62EQTCACGY5QX74000000-1}}}\moddef{extract main funny inc~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WOGQTGII6OY62EQTCACGY5QX74000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-RGVLVC5IGJPHVEPOX4HNZV6GTY000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
def funny_inc_gen(bot=2, top=3):
    """Yield the \nwlinkedidentc{EALDR_FUNNY_INC}{PYNWmai0-U7XPWEZLU7Y5X64P7BA7BNFASM000000-1} key sequence: 1,2,3, 1,2,3,4, ..."""
    while True:
        bot += 1
        if bot == top:
            bot = 1
            top += 1
            yield 1
        else:
            yield bot
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC}}{EALDR:unFUNNY:unINC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EALDR{\_}FUNNY{\_}INC}}{EALDR:unFUNNY:unINC}{PYNWmai0-WOGQTGII6OY62EQTCACGY5QX74000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{234}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{235}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XVUCSR35UMREDHTQ7MH653TZPQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XVUCSR35UMREDHTQ7MH653TZPQ000000-1}}}\moddef{extract main dxr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XVUCSR35UMREDHTQ7MH653TZPQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-RGVLVC5IGJPHVEPOX4HNZV6GTY000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
def dxr_decrypt(mem):
    """XOR every other byte from $4000 to $67FE with the funny_inc key."""
    keys = funny_inc_gen()
    src = 0x4000
    while True:
        key = next(keys)
        offset = src - BASE_ADDR
        if 0 <= offset < SIZE:
            mem[offset] ^= key
        src += 2
        if (src >> 8) == 0x68:  # src_hi ^ $68 == 0 -> done
            break
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{236}\nwdocspar


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{237}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BXR4QRQQDK5K4QIFIOQILVYUMM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BXR4QRQQDK5K4QIFIOQILVYUMM000000-1}}}\moddef{extract main entry~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BXR4QRQQDK5K4QIFIOQILVYUMM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-RGVLVC5IGJPHVEPOX4HNZV6GTY000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
def main():
    with open(DSK_FILE, "rb") as f:
        dsk = f.read()
    with open(EALDR_FILE, "rb") as f:
        ealdr = f.read()

    mem = bytearray(SIZE)

    # Group 2: tracks $07-$0C -> $4000-$95FF
    for track, base_page in GROUP2:
        read_track(dsk, track, base_page, mem)

    # Group 3: tracks $0D-$10 -> $0800-$3FFF
    for track, base_page in GROUP3:
        read_track(dsk, track, base_page, mem)

    # DXR decrypt $4000-$67FE
    dxr_decrypt(mem)

    # Copy EALDR $A300-$A5FF -> $0500-$07FF
    EALDR_SRC = 0xA300 - 0xA000  # offset in ealdr.bin
    mem_dest = 0x0500 - BASE_ADDR
    mem[mem_dest:mem_dest + 0x300] = ealdr[EALDR_SRC:EALDR_SRC + 0x300]

    with open(OUTPUT_FILE, "wb") as f:
        f.write(mem)
    print(f"Wrote \{len(mem)\} bytes to \{OUTPUT_FILE\}")
    print(f"Load in Ghidra at $0500, entry point $0800")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{238}\nwdocspar



\chapter{Initialization}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{239}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{240}{\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} sets up the Apple II for the game.  It runs once at startup,
before the main loop or attract screen.  The steps, in order:

\begin{enumerate}
\item Set the reset vector to {\Tt{}{\$}A56F\nwendquote} via the ROM routine at {\Tt{}{\$}FB6F\nwendquote}.
\item Disable the blink cursor by setting {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}20\nwendquote}.
\item Call {\Tt{}RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING\nwendquote} to copy the HRCG library and disk I/O
  routines from the staging area at {\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} to their runtime
  addresses ({\Tt{}{\$}9600+\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\$}B300+\nwendquote}), then clear the staging area to free
  the hi-res page for graphics.
\item Switch to hi-res graphics mode by setting the soft switches at
  {\Tt{}{\$}C050\nwendquote} (graphics), {\Tt{}{\$}C052\nwendquote} (full screen), {\Tt{}{\$}C054\nwendquote} (page~1), and
  {\Tt{}{\$}C057\nwendquote} (hi-res).
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB\nwendquote} to set up the disk I/O parameter block.
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}HRCG\nwendquote} to patch and initialize the {\Tt{}HRCG\nwendquote} text engine.
\item Call {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP\nwendquote} to enable text window wrap mode.
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}STUB\nwendquote} (a single RTS---likely a disabled hook point).
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE\nwendquote} to draw the game display (borders, labels,
  icons) and run the opening script.
\item Call {\Tt{}FILL{\_}MAP\nwendquote} to fill the map grid with default tiles.
\item Call {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM\nwendquote} to confine text output to the bottom
  three rows (the status/input area).
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}STUB2\nwendquote} (another no-op hook).
\item Clear state variables to zero:
  \begin{itemize}
  \item {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}POS\nwendquote}---the last-drawn location identifier.  The main
    loop compares this against the current character's location; when they
    differ, it triggers a full map redraw.  Zeroing it here forces the first
    {\Tt{}ENTER{\_}LOCATION\nwendquote} call to redraw unconditionally.
  \item {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}STYLE\nwendquote}---the current map tile style (which tile set to
    use when drawing the map).  Zeroing ensures it will be reloaded from the
    location record on the first scene entry.
  \item {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote}---the high byte of the entity record pointer
    ({\Tt{}{\$}F8/{\$}F9\nwendquote}).  Zeroing signals ``no entity selected,'' preventing stale
    pointer references before the first character is processed.
  \end{itemize}
\item Call {\Tt{}SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE\nwendquote} to detect keyboard or joystick.
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}WORLD\nwendquote} to initialize the game world from its data table.
\item Call {\Tt{}INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} to count all active mob groups.
\item Set {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}PLAYER\nwendquote} to~1.  The main loop walks the 62-entry
  record table once per round, using {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}PLAYER\nwendquote} as a 1-based
  index.  Initializing it to~1 starts the iteration at the first record.
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{241}The following state variables are referenced by {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}.
{\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote} is the cursor blink column; storing {\Tt{}{\$}14\nwendquote} disables the
blink.  {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}POS\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}STYLE\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}PLAYER\nwendquote} are
the three variables cleared to zero during step~13/17 (described above).
{\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}F8/{\$}F9\nwendquote}) is the 2-byte pointer to the entity record
currently being processed.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{242}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}       EQU     $5AA2   ; font column  (0-19; $14 = disabled)
\nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}        EQU     $5A55   ; current location position (triggers redraw when changed)
\nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}      EQU     $5A56   ; current map style (from record field 5, bits 0-6)
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}      EQU     $5A02   ; current player index (1-based)
\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}          EQU     $F8     ; entity record pointer (2 bytes, $F8/$F9)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{243}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{244}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}}}\moddef{game init~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $78C7
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}

    LDX     #$6F                   ; \\
    LDY     #$A5                   ;  | reset vector = $A56F
    STX     $03F2                  ;  |
    STY     $03F3                  ; /
    JSR     $FB6F                  ; ROM: set reset vector
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}              ; disable blink cursor
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RELOCATE_HIRES_STAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1} ; copy $2000+ to $9600+/$B300+
    LDA     $C050                  ; graphics mode
    LDA     $C052                  ; full screen (no text split)
    LDA     $C054                  ; page 1
    LDA     $C057                  ; hi-res
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_DISK_IOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_HRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB}{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_STATE}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FILL_MAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB2}{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00                   ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}           ;  | clear state variables
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1           ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}
    JSR     INIT_WORLD
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE}}{INIT:unGAME:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}}\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE}}{INIT:unGAME:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{245}\nwdocspar
During startup, tracks {\Tt{}{\$}0F\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\$}10\nwendquote} are loaded into the hi-res
page area {\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} as a staging area.  {\Tt{}RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING\nwendquote},
called from {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, copies the staged data to its runtime addresses
and clears the hi-res page:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{ccl}
\toprule
\thead{Source} & \thead{Destination} & \thead{Size} \\
\midrule
\$2000--\$32FF & \$9600--\$A8FF & 19 pages (HRCG code + standard font) \\
\$3300--\$3FFF & \$B300--\$BFFF & 13 pages (disk I/O routines) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

The copy loop at {\Tt{}.copy\nwendquote} also clears each source byte, leaving the
hi-res page zeroed for use as a graphics buffer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{246}{\Tt{}RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING\nwendquote} uses two zero-page pointer pairs for
its block copy: {\Tt{}COPY{\_}SRC\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}BC/{\$}BD\nwendquote}) points to the source
address in the staging area, and {\Tt{}COPY{\_}DEST\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}BA/{\$}BB\nwendquote}) points
to the runtime destination.  The loop copies one byte at a time,
zeroing the source as it goes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{247}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}                EQU     $BC     ; block copy source pointer (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}               EQU     $BA     ; block copy destination pointer (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}DEST}}{COPY:unDEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}SRC}}{COPY:unSRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}DEST}}{COPY:unDEST}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}SRC}}{COPY:unSRC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{248}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{249}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}}}\moddef{relocate hires staging~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6DA5
\nwlinkedidentc{RELOCATE_HIRES_STAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RELOCATE_HIRES_STAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}

    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}     ; \\  dest = $9600
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}      ; \\  src  = $2000
    LDA     #$20          ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}+1    ; /  src hi
    LDA     #$96          ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}+1   ; /  dest hi
    LDY     #$00
    LDX     #$13          ; 19 pages: $2000-$32FF -> $9600-$A8FF
    JSR     .copy
    LDX     #$0D          ; 13 pages: $3300-$3FFF -> $B300-$BFFF
    LDA     #$B3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}+1   ; dest hi = $B3
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}+1    ; src hi = $33 (was $32 after first pass)

.copy:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}),Y  ; load from source
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}),Y ; store to dest
    LDA     #$00
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}),Y  ; clear source byte
    DEY
    BNE     .copy         ; inner loop (256 bytes)
    DEX
    BNE     .next_page    ; more pages?
    RTS

.next_page:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_SRC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}+1    ; next source page
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_DEST}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}+1   ; next dest page
    JMP     .copy
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RELOCATE{\_}HIRES{\_}STAGING}}{RELOCATE:unHIRES:unSTAGING}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}DEST}}{COPY:unDEST}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}SRC}}{COPY:unSRC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}DEST}}{COPY:unDEST}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}SRC}}{COPY:unSRC}{PYNWmai0-2NL3TPDIV6BH32KNILRIC2G5ZE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{250}\nwdocspar
The plain text screen (using the standard Apple text characters) is 40
columns by 24 rows. The {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}COL\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} locations keep track
of the cursor position when ROM routines are used for printing text.

We can set the text window to start either from row 0 using {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT{\_}ALL\nwendquote},
or from row 21 using {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT{\_}LOW\nwendquote}. Using the bottom of the
screen allows us to use it as a status and input window while the map is displayed
above.

Initializes the Hi-Res Character Generator (HRCG) by patching two
locations in the HRCG code and then jumping to its entry point at
{\Tt{}{\$}92A8\nwendquote}.  The patches modify the HRCG initialization to work within
the game's environment:

\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\$}94B6\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ \texttt{RTS} (\$60): causes HRCG init to
  return early, skipping the remainder of its setup.
\item {\Tt{}{\$}92D5--{\$}92D7\nwendquote} $\leftarrow$ three \texttt{NOP}s (\$EA): patches
  out a {\Tt{}JSR\ {\$}03EA\nwendquote} that would reconnect DOS, which the game does not
  want.
\end{itemize}

After patching, the routine tail-calls the HRCG init via {\Tt{}JMP\ {\$}92A8\nwendquote},
which returns to {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} via the patched RTS.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{251}{\Tt{}INIT{\_}HRCG\nwendquote} patches two locations in the HRCG library before calling
its initialization entry point.  First, it writes an RTS opcode at~\$94B6,
causing the HRCG's internal initialization to return early---skipping
setup steps that the game handles differently.  Second, it writes three NOP
opcodes over the JSR at~\$92D5, disabling the HRCG's attempt to reconnect
DOS (which would conflict with the game's custom disk routines).  With these
patches in place, the routine jumps to {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}INIT\nwendquote} at~\$92A8 to
complete the HRCG startup.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{252}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}}}\moddef{init hrcg~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $791A
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_HRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_HRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}

    LDA     #$60      ; RTS opcode
    STA     $94B6     ; patch HRCG init to return early
    LDA     #$EA      ; NOP opcode
    STA     $92D5     ; \\ patch out JSR $03EA
    STA     $92D6     ;  | (skip DOS reconnect)
    STA     $92D7     ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1} ; enter HRCG initialization
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}HRCG}}{INIT:unHRCG}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT}}{HRCG:unINIT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT}}{HRCG:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-ZKKBW7IOFWPQONKCR23DIN7HAI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{253}\nwdocspar
A single {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}---a no-op stub called from {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}.  Likely a
hook point or a disabled feature from development.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{254}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}}}\moddef{init stub~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7919
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB}{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}{PYNWmai0-A5IDJFPW4YOQ5EAI2Y4LCAAB5U000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB}}{INIT:unSTUB}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{255}\nwdocspar
Called once from {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to set up the game display and run the
opening script.  Steps:

\begin{enumerate}
\item Calls {\Tt{}{\$}5C6D\nwendquote} to initialize the game display (draws borders,
  sets text windows).
\item Sets {\Tt{}DISPATCH{\_}VEC\nwendquote} to point to the game action handler at {\Tt{}{\$}5B2A\nwendquote},
  used by the script engine's indirect dispatch at {\Tt{}{\$}7A49\nwendquote}.
\item Clears {\Tt{}{\$}5A00\nwendquote} (game state flag).
\item Patches {\Tt{}{\$}80A6\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}B1\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}LDA\ (zp),Y\nwendquote} opcode), restoring
  the character renderer's indirect load.
\item Runs the opening script (index~6) via {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote}.
\item Patches {\Tt{}{\$}7A49--{\$}7A4B\nwendquote} from {\Tt{}JMP\ (DISPATCH{\_}VEC)\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}JMP\ {\$}7A4F\nwendquote},
  disabling the indirect action handler now that init is complete.
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{256}{\Tt{}INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE\nwendquote} stores {\Tt{}GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER\nwendquote} into the zero-page
vector {\Tt{}DISPATCH{\_}VEC\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}F6/{\$}F7\nwendquote}).  The script engine uses this vector
for indirect action dispatch; after the opening script finishes,
{\Tt{}INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE\nwendquote} patches the dispatch site to bypass the vector entirely.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{257}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_ACTION_HANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}     EQU     $5B2A   ; game action dispatch target
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{258}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{259}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}            EQU     $F6     ; script action dispatch vector (2 bytes, $F6/$F7)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{260}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{261}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}}}\moddef{init game state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5B00
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_STATE}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_STATE}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}     ; set up game display / UI
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_ACTION_HANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2} ; \\ $F6/\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1 = game action handler
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}          ;  |
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_ACTION_HANDLER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2} ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}+1        ; /
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $5A00                 ; clear game state flag
    LDX     #$B1                  ; LDA (zp),Y opcode
    STX     $80A6                 ; patch character renderer
    LDX     #$06                  ; script index 6 (opening)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}         ; run opening script
    LDA     #$4C                  ; \\ patch $7A49 to JMP $7A4F
    STA     $7A49                 ;  | (bypass indirect handler
    LDA     #$4F                  ;  |  after init script completes)
    STA     $7A4A                 ;  |
    LDA     #$7A                  ;  |
    STA     $7A4B                 ; /
    RTS

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE}}{INIT:unGAME:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}STATE}}{INIT:unGAME:unSTATE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}}\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}ACTION{\_}HANDLER}}{GAME:unACTION:unHANDLER}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-E3Y66EJZKZJGDUZ5YYIMTJODMQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{262}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{263}{\Tt{}INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote} draws the game's main screen layout.  It renders
the background from the text stream at {\Tt{}UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM\nwendquote}, draws
2$\times$2 border characters, places text labels via
{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS\nwendquote}, adds corner decorations via {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS\nwendquote},
and finishes with the copyright notice ({\Tt{}s{\_}COPYRIGHT\nwendquote}) and ``press
space bar'' prompt ({\Tt{}s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE\nwendquote}).  The decorative strings
{\Tt{}s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1\nwendquote} through {\Tt{}s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3\nwendquote} are drawn on the right panel.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{264}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{UI_TEXT_STREAM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}          EQU     $5E55   ; text stream data for game UI background
\nwlinkedidentc{s_COPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}            EQU     $5EC7   ; "COPYRIGHT 1982 STUART SMITH"
\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}          EQU     $5EE3   ; "PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE"
\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}           EQU     $5EFF   ; decorative right-side row 1
\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}           EQU     $5F07   ; decorative right-side row 2
\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}           EQU     $5F10   ; decorative right-side row 3
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{265}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{266}All character output in the game passes through {\Tt{}ROM{\_}COUT1\nwendquote}, the
Apple~II ROM's character output routine at {\Tt{}{\$}FDED\nwendquote}.  When the HRCG is
active, {\Tt{}ROM{\_}COUT1\nwendquote} is redirected through the CSW vector to
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}COUT\nwendquote}, which renders characters in hi-res graphics mode.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{267}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}            EQU     $FDED   ; Apple II ROM COUT1 (character output)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{268}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{269}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}         EQU     $06     ; text stream pointer for \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1} (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{270}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{271}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}                EQU     $25
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}                EQU     $24     ; Cursor position
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{272}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{273}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}}}\moddef{init game display~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5C6D
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_GAME_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}

    LDA     #$90                           ; HRCG control: clear hi-res screen
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{UI_TEXT_STREAM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3},\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3} ; point text stream at UI data
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}                  ; render game UI background

    ; Draw three 2x2 border characters across top (charset 2, row 3)
    LDA     #$01                           ; char 1
    LDX     #$10                           ; col 16
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}
    LDA     #$0E                           ; char 14
    LDX     #$12                           ; col 18
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}
    LDA     #$04                           ; char 4
    LDX     #$14                           ; col 20
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_LABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}             ; draw border text labels
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_ICONS}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}              ; draw corner decorations

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}                  ; reset HRCG block mode

    ; Print copyright at row 21, col 0
    LDA     #$15
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_COPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_COPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    ; Print "PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE" at row 23, col 0
    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    ; Switch to HRCG charset 5 for decorative chars
    LDA     #$81                           ; ctrl-A (select charset)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$B5                           ; '5' = charset 5
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}

    ; Print decorative strings at col 30, rows 21-23
    LDA     #$15
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW2}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    LDY     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_DECOR_ROW3}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-3}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY}}{INIT:unGAME:unDISPLAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UI{\_}TEXT{\_}STREAM}}{UI:unTEXT:unSTREAM}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}COPYRIGHT}}{s:unCOPYRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW1}}{s:unDECOR:unROW1}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW2}}{s:unDECOR:unROW2}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}DECOR{\_}ROW3}}{s:unDECOR:unROW3}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{s:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-Y2IVI3KJLL6OMNKNQ5NTIWMK5E000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{274}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{275}{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} is a helper for {\Tt{}INIT{\_}GAME{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote}.  It draws a
2$\times$2 font character from charset~2 at column~{\Tt{}X\nwendquote}, row~3.  The
character number is passed in~A.  It stores the character number into
{\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote} and the charset into {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote}, then calls
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote} to render it.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{276}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}        EQU     $5A0E   ; font character number to render
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}        EQU     $5A0F   ; font charset index (1-5)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{277}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{278}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}}}\moddef{draw border char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5CEC
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}:

    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    LDY     #$03
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$02
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR_AT_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-DEK4BXIA2537BOCNQO747FOMKY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{279}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{280}{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS\nwendquote} draws text labels around the game border.
Three loops iterate over tables of (column, row) pairs, printing a
border pattern string at each position.  It selects HRCG charset~2
before drawing.  The position tables ({\Tt{}BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R\nwendquote}) each contain pairs of
column/row bytes.  The pattern strings ({\Tt{}BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R\nwendquote}) are printed at each
position via {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}BC/{\$}BD\nwendquote}).  {\Tt{}BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR\nwendquote}
is a RAM counter used to track the loop iteration.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{281}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}       EQU     $BC     ; print string source pointer (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{282}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{283}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}       EQU     $5E7B   ; 6 col/row pairs for horizontal border labels
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}      EQU     $5E87   ; 10 col/row pairs for vertical border labels (left)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}      EQU     $5E9B   ; 10 col/row pairs for vertical border labels (right)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}       EQU     $5EAF   ; horizontal border pattern string
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}      EQU     $5EC1   ; vertical border pattern string (left)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}      EQU     $5EC4   ; vertical border pattern string (right)
\nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}        EQU     $5DC3   ; loop counter for border label drawing
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{284}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{285}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}}}\moddef{draw border labels~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5CFD
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_LABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_LABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}

    ; Select HRCG charset 2
    LDA     #$81 ; ctrl-A
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$B2 ; '2' = charset 2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}

    ; Loop 1: horizontal borders (6 positions from \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6})
    LDX     #$0A ; index 10 (5 pairs, counting down by 2)
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
.loop1:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    INX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_HORIZ}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    BPL     .loop1

    ; Loop 2: vertical borders left (10 positions from \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6})
    LDX     #$12 ; index 18 (9 pairs, counting down by 2)
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
.loop2:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    INX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_L}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    BPL     .loop2

    ; Loop 3: vertical borders right (10 positions from \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6})
    LDX     #$12
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    stow    \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_STR_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
.loop3:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    INX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_POS_VERT_R}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{BORDER_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}
    BPL     .loop3
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}LABELS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unLABELS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{BORDER:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unPOS:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}POS{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unPOS:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}HORIZ}}{BORDER:unSTR:unHORIZ}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}L}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unL}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BORDER{\_}STR{\_}VERT{\_}R}}{BORDER:unSTR:unVERT:unR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-V3RCIOSI37NOLC5Z2WMOOT4YL4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{286}\nwdocspar
Plots six decorative 2$\times$2 font characters at fixed positions
around the game border using {\Tt{}PLOT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{287}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}}}\moddef{draw border icons~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5D7A
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BORDER_ICONS}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}:

    LDA     #$02 ; char 2 at col 4, row 11
    LDX     #$04
    LDY     #$0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$01 ; char 1 at col 4, row 16
    LDX     #$04
    LDY     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$03 ; char 3 at col 34, row 16
    LDX     #$22
    LDY     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$04 ; char 4 at col 34, row 11
    LDX     #$22
    LDY     #$0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$1C ; char 28 at col 16, row 16
    LDX     #$10
    LDY     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    LDA     #$1C ; char 28 at col 22, row 11
    LDX     #$16
    LDY     #$0B
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BORDER{\_}ICONS}}{DRAW:unBORDER:unICONS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-E4CU47ONPS3CVETIWAZ2BG6UEU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{288}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{289}{\Tt{}INIT{\_}WORLD\nwendquote} is a thin wrapper that passes a pointer to the world
initialization data table ({\Tt{}WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}62B9\nwendquote}) to the game
setup routine {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}LOOP\nwendquote}.  Called once from {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to
initialize locations and scene state.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{290}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-6}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{WORLD_INIT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}         EQU     $62B9   ; world initialization data table
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{291}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{292}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}}}\moddef{init world~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $62E5
INIT_WORLD:
    SUBROUTINE INIT_WORLD

    LDX     #>\nwlinkedidentc{WORLD_INIT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7} ; \\ X/Y = pointer to init data
    LDY     #<\nwlinkedidentc{WORLD_INIT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7} ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}        ; initialize world from data table

\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WORLD{\_}INIT{\_}DATA}}{WORLD:unINIT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-KCDZMKWSK2V7SIS3PFUTBW2DJQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{293}A single {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}---another no-op stub called from {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, like
{\Tt{}INIT{\_}STUB\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}7919\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{294}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}}}\moddef{init stub2~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6B94
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_STUB2}{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}{PYNWmai0-IFY6XEMQGG4JTQ6TNKPP64CWGA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}STUB2}}{INIT:unSTUB2}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{295}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{296}{\Tt{}INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB\nwendquote} sets the zero-page pointer {\Tt{}RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
({\Tt{}{\$}08/{\$}09\nwendquote}) to the address of the RWTS Input/Output Block
({\Tt{}RWTS{\_}IOB\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}B7E8\nwendquote}).  This single-assignment call during
{\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} enables all subsequent disk operations to access the IOB
fields through indirect-indexed addressing (e.g.\ {\Tt{}LDA\ ({\$}08),Y\nwendquote}
with~Y selecting the field).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{297}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-7}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}                EQU     $B7E8   ; RWTS Input/Output Block (14 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{298}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{299}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}            EQU     $08     ; ZP pointer to RWTS IOB ($B7E8)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{300}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{301}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}}}\moddef{init disk iob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C2E
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_DISK_IOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_DISK_IOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}

    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}     ; \\ set RWTS IOB pointer
    LDY     #<\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}     ;  | $08/$09 = $B7E8
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}+1 ;  |
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_IOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}   ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}DISK{\_}IOB}}{INIT:unDISK:unIOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}}\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB}}{RWTS:unIOB}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}IOB{\_}PTR}}{RWTS:unIOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-MFXGDBBCK3Q7RVR5U57NVVC6RI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{302}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{303}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}          EQU     $5A00   ; 0 = keyboard, 1 = joystick
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{304}\nwdocspar

Prompts the player to choose keyboard or joystick input.  Displays
message~\$38 (the prompt), then polls the keyboard and paddle button~1
in a tight loop.  If the player presses the space bar, {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}MODE\nwendquote}
is set to~0 (keyboard).  If the paddle button state changes (pressed or
released), {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}MODE\nwendquote} is set to~1 (joystick), the cursor is
repositioned, and message~\$2F (joystick confirmation) is displayed.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{305}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}}}\moddef{select input mode~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $084E
\nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}

    LDA     #$38           ; message $38: input mode prompt
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     $C061          ; read paddle button 1
    AND     #$80           ; isolate bit 7 (pressed state)
    STA     $BA            ; save initial button state
.clear:
    STA     $C010          ; clear keyboard strobe
.poll:
    LDX     $C000          ; read keyboard
    BMI     .key           ; key pressed -> check it
    LDA     $C061          ; re-read paddle button
    EOR     $BA            ; compare with initial state
    BMI     .joystick      ; button state changed -> joystick
    BPL     .poll          ; keep polling
.key:
    BXEQ    #$A0,.keyboard ; yes -> keyboard mode
    BNE     .clear         ; other key -> ignore, clear strobe
.keyboard:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}     ; 0 = keyboard
    RTS
.joystick:
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}     ; 1 = joystick
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$2F           ; message $2F: joystick confirmation
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}INPUT{\_}MODE}}{SELECT:unINPUT:unMODE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-IJNWOWVOLMPQXWDRQGGDMX6BUI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{306}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{307}{\Tt{}INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} is called once during {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to initialize
{\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.  It walks all 9-byte character records using
{\Tt{}CHAR{\_}PTR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote}) starting from index~1 (skipping the group-0
header at {\Tt{}{\$}4000\nwendquote}), summing byte~8 (group member count) of each record
until the end sentinel (byte~1 = {\Tt{}{\$}FF\nwendquote}) is reached.

The result in {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} is the total number of mobs assigned to
groups~1 and above.  At startup, byte~8 contains only the group count in
bits~3--0 (the upper bits---pending XP and status flag---are zero), so the
sum is simply the total mob count.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{308}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-6}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}                EQU     $FA     ; character record pointer (2 bytes, $FA/$FB)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{309}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{310}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}     EQU     $5A01   ; total mobs across all groups (excl. group 0)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{311}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{312}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}}}\moddef{init mob count~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C51
\nwlinkedidentc{INIT_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INIT_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}

    LDA     #$00            ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10} ; / clear total
    LDA     #$09            ; \\ $FA/$FB = $4009 (record 1)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}        ;  |
    LDA     #$40            ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1      ; /
.loop:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y    ; byte 1 of record
    BANE    #$FF,.count     ; $FF = end sentinel
    RTS
.count:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y    ; byte 8 = group member count
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10} ; accumulate
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}
    LDA     #$09            ; \\ advance $FA by 9 (next record)
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}        ;  |
    BCC     .loop           ;  |
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1      ;  |
    BCS     .loop           ; / always taken
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INIT{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{INIT:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-FUVGEE5QFLBSHT5MZWRVT5CDCY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{313}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Apple II Hi-Res Graphics}

Hi-res graphics on the Apple II is odd. Graphics are memory-mapped, not exactly
consecutively, and bits don't always correspond to pixels. Color especially is
odd, compared to today's luxurious 32-bit per pixel RGBA.

The Apple II has two hi-res graphics pages, and maps the area from {\Tt{}{\$}2000-{\$}3FFF\nwendquote} to
high-res graphics page 1 (HGR1), and {\Tt{}{\$}4000-{\$}5FFF\nwendquote} to page 2 (HGR2).

First we'll talk about pixels. Nominally, the resolution of the hi-res graphics screen
is 280 pixels wide by 192 pixels tall. In the memory map, each row is represented
by 40 bytes. The high bit of each byte is not used for pixel data, but is used to
control color.

Here are some rules for how these bytes are turned into pixels:
\begin{itemize}
  \item Pixels are drawn to the screen from byte data least significant bit first.
        This means that for the first byte bit 0 is column 0, bit 1 is column 1,
        and so on.
  \item A pattern of {\Tt{}11\nwendquote} results in two white pixels at the {\Tt{}1\nwendquote} positions.
  \item A pattern of {\Tt{}010\nwendquote} results at least in a colored pixel at the {\Tt{}1\nwendquote} position.
  \item A pattern of {\Tt{}101\nwendquote} results at least in a colored pixel at the {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} position.
  \item So, a pattern of {\Tt{}01010\nwendquote} results in at least three consecutive colored
        pixels starting from the first {\Tt{}1\nwendquote} to the last {\Tt{}1\nwendquote}. The last {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} bit
        would also be colored if followed by a {\Tt{}1\nwendquote}.
  \item Likewise, a pattern of {\Tt{}11011\nwendquote} results in two white pixels, a colored pixel,
        and then two more white pixels.
  \item The color of a {\Tt{}010\nwendquote} pixel depends on the column that the {\Tt{}1\nwendquote} falls on, and
