        also whether the high bit of its byte was set or not.
  \item The color of a {\Tt{}11011\nwendquote} pixel depends on the column that the {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} falls on, and
        also whether the high bit of its byte was set or not.

        \begin{center}
        \begin{tabular}{@{}rcc@{}} \toprule
        & Odd & Even \\ \cmidrule(r){2-3}
        High bit clear & Green & Violet \\
        High bit set & Orange & Blue \\ \bottomrule
        \end{tabular}
        \end{center}

        The implication is that you can only select one pair of colors per byte.
\end{itemize}

An example would probably be good here. We will take one of the font characters from the game,
the lower-case {\Tt{}r\nwendquote}:

\begin{table}[h]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{@{}rccc@{}} \toprule
Bytes & Bits & Colorset & Pixel Data \\ \cmidrule{1-3}
{\Tt{}00\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}55\ 2A\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01010101\ 00101010\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}10101010101010\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}46\ 07\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01000110\ 00000111\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01100011110000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}76\ 08\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01110110\ 00001000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01101110001000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 1E\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00011110\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01111000011000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 06\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000110\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01100000010000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 06\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000110\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01100000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 06\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000110\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}01100000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}2A\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00101010\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}00\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}07\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000111\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}08\ 00\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00001000\ 00000000\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}0\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}00000000000000\nwendquote} \\ \bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\caption{Font character example}
\label{table:fontexample}
\end{table}

Assuming that the following bits are all zero, and we place the
character starting at column 0, we should see this:

\begin{center}
\scalebox{0.8}{
\begin{tabular}{@{}rcccccccccccccc@{}}
0 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
1 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
2 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
3 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
4 & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbv & \Cbk \\
5 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
6 & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
7 & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbv & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbv & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
8 & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
9 & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbg & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
10 & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
11 & \Cbk & \Cbw & \Cbw & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
12 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
13 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
14 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
15 & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk & \Cbk \\
\end{tabular}
}
\end{center}

Here is a screenshot of that character, cut from the splash screen:

\begin{center}
\includegraphics{images/font_r.png}
\end{center}

The violet line goes all the way across the character in that image because it is followed by another font
character with that line, so the lines connect according to the pixel color rules.

The Hi-Res Character Generator (HRCG) is a library provided by the Applesoft Toolkit
which allows a developer to display a custom font. Applesoft Toolkit also
contains Animatrix, which is a utility used to create fonts for the HRCG.

The \href{https://archive.org/details/applesoft-toolkit}{manual for the Applesoft Toolkit}
can be found on the Internet Archive.

The new output handler installed by the HRCG is called whenever {\Tt{}COUT\nwendquote} is called.
{\Tt{}A\nwendquote} contains the character to output.

The HRCG defines 96 characters as a character set. These characters are the
``printing'' characters, which are ASCII 32 (space) through 127 (delete).
Character set~0 is always the standard set of Apple text characters. The
font data for this standard set is stored at {\Tt{}{\$}97A5--{\$}9AA4\nwendquote}, consisting of
8~bytes per character. Each byte represents 7~consecutive pixels since the
high bit is used for color set selection.

Note: the standard font data and the HRCG code at {\Tt{}{\$}9600--{\$}97A4\nwendquote} are not
loaded directly to their final addresses by the EALDR\@.  Instead, the EALDR
loads them into the hi-res page area {\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}32FF\nwendquote} (tracks~{\Tt{}{\$}0F\nwendquote} and
{\Tt{}{\$}10\nwendquote}).  During {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, the routine at {\Tt{}{\$}6DA5\nwendquote} copies
{\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}32FF\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}9600--{\$}A8FF\nwendquote} and clears {\Tt{}{\$}2000--{\$}3FFF\nwendquote}.

The Ali Baba font data for HRCG is stored at {\Tt{}{\$}83A5-{\$}92A4\nwendquote}, starting with character set 1.
Each character is 32 bytes, broken
up into four blocks of eight bytes (7x8 blocks) each. The first block is the upper left of the character, the second block is
the upper right, the third is the lower left, and the fourth is the lower right.
Thus, each character is 14x16.

Here are the font characters. There are 120 defined: 96 for character set 1,
and 24 for character set 2. Characters 114-119 (character set 2, characters 18-23)
form the EA logo that is displayed on the splash screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{314}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4CWZL3QTPT6M6623ENDBZQ3P5E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4CWZL3QTPT6M6623ENDBZQ3P5E000000-1}}}\moddef{font data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4CWZL3QTPT6M6623ENDBZQ3P5E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $83A5
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4CWZL3QTPT6M6623ENDBZQ3P5E000000-1}:
    INCLUDE "fontdata.asm"
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}DATA}}{FONT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4CWZL3QTPT6M6623ENDBZQ3P5E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}DATA}}{FONT:unDATA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{315}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{316}The standard Apple II character set is also needed for fallback rendering and
for the text-mode status area.  The HRCG library stores this as 96 characters
(ASCII {\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}7F\nwendquote}), each 8~bytes tall and 7~pixels wide---the same
format as the Apple II ROM character generator, but stored in RAM where the
HRCG can access it directly.  This data lives at {\Tt{}{\$}97A5--{\$}9AA4\nwendquote}, just above
the HRCG code.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{317}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}}}\moddef{std font data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $97A5
\nwlinkedidentc{STD_FONT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}:
    INCLUDE "stdfontdata.asm"
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STD{\_}FONT{\_}DATA}}{STD:unFONT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STD{\_}FONT{\_}DATA}}{STD:unFONT:unDATA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{318}\nwdocspar

\chapter{The HRCG Text Engine}

\input{font_data.tex}

The Hi-Res Character Generator (HRCG) is a third-party Apple II library
(``HI-RES CHAR GEN VERSION 1.0'') that hooks the character output (CSW)
and keyboard input (KSW) vectors to render text on the hi-res graphics
screen.  The library is self-contained at \$92A8--\$97A4 and provides:
\begin{itemize}
\item Character rendering in multiple fonts (up to 10 charsets of 8-byte glyphs)
\item Video modes: replace, OR, AND, XOR with optional page-2 overlay
\item Inverse, lowercase-invert, and shifted-character support
\item A full set of control-character handlers for cursor movement,
      screen clearing, window management, and state save/restore
\item Cursor blinking in the keyboard input handler
\item Scrolling and line-wrap modes
\end{itemize}

The game's {\Tt{}INIT{\_}HRCG\nwendquote} routine patches out the DOS reconnect call
and injects an early RTS into {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}DISPLAY{\_}PAGE\nwendquote} before jumping
to {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}INIT\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{319}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg init~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $92A8
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
; --- HRCG entry jump table ---
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT_BODY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1} ; main init entry
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_NUM_CHARSETS}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $0A            ; 10 custom charsets
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_BASE}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4CWZL3QTPT6M6623ENDBZQ3P5E000000-1}      ; font base address ($83A5)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}       ; secondary entry (disabled)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}       ; secondary entry (disabled)
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PRINT_VERSION}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1} ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PRINT_VERSION}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PRINT_VERSION}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT_BODY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
.loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VERSION_STR}{PYNWmai0-L2VZHPJCTVBBBBG6L4BWNRCPFE000000-1},Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    INY
    CPY     #$1D           ; 29 chars
    BCC     .loop
    RTS
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT_BODY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1} ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT_BODY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INIT_BODY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_GETKEY}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}
    STA     $38            ; KSW low
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_GETKEY}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}
    STA     $39            ; KSW high
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_COUT}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}
    STA     $36            ; CSW low
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_COUT}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}
    STA     $37            ; CSW high
    JSR     $03EA          ; reconnect DOS (patched to NOPs by game)
    BIT     $C052          ; full-screen mode (no mixed)
    BIT     $C057          ; hi-res mode
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPLAY_PAGE}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}
    BIT     $C050          ; graphics mode on
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY2}}{HRCG:unENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY3}}{HRCG:unENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}BASE}}{HRCG:unFONT:unBASE}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT}}{HRCG:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT{\_}BODY}}{HRCG:unINIT:unBODY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}NUM{\_}CHARSETS}}{HRCG:unNUM:unCHARSETS}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PRINT{\_}VERSION}}{HRCG:unPRINT:unVERSION}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY2}}{HRCG:unENTRY2}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY3}}{HRCG:unENTRY3}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}BASE}}{HRCG:unFONT:unBASE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT}}{HRCG:unINIT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INIT{\_}BODY}}{HRCG:unINIT:unBODY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}NUM{\_}CHARSETS}}{HRCG:unNUM:unCHARSETS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PRINT{\_}VERSION}}{HRCG:unPRINT:unVERSION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}DATA}}{FONT:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}COUT}}{HRCG:unCOUT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPLAY{\_}PAGE}}{HRCG:unDISPLAY:unPAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}GETKEY}}{HRCG:unGETKEY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET}}{HRCG:unRESET}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VERSION{\_}STR}}{HRCG:unVERSION:unSTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}DATA}}{FONT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}COUT}}{HRCG:unCOUT}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPLAY{\_}PAGE}}{HRCG:unDISPLAY:unPAGE}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}GETKEY}}{HRCG:unGETKEY}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET}}{HRCG:unRESET}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VERSION{\_}STR}}{HRCG:unVERSION:unSTR}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{320}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{321}Immediately following the entry table is the HRCG version string.  The
string is stored in high-bit ASCII (the standard Apple II text encoding) and
is prefixed with a ctrl-P character, which triggers the HRCG's ``home cursor''
command.  A carriage return ({\Tt{}{\$}8D\nwendquote}) terminates the string.
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}PRINT{\_}VERSION\nwendquote} prints this string to the screen character by character
via {\Tt{}ROM{\_}COUT1\nwendquote}; it is not used during normal gameplay.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{322}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-L2VZHPJCTVBBBBG6L4BWNRCPFE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-L2VZHPJCTVBBBBG6L4BWNRCPFE000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg version string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-L2VZHPJCTVBBBBG6L4BWNRCPFE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $92E8
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VERSION_STR}{PYNWmai0-L2VZHPJCTVBBBBG6L4BWNRCPFE000000-1}:
; "HI-RES CHAR GEN VERSION 1.0" with ctrl-P prefix and CR suffix (high-bit ASCII)
    HEX     90 C8 C9 AD D2 C5 D3 A0 C3 C8 C1 D2 A0 C7 C5 CE
    HEX     A0 D6 C5 D2 D3 C9 CF CE A0 B1 AE B0 8D
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VERSION{\_}STR}}{HRCG:unVERSION:unSTR}{PYNWmai0-L2VZHPJCTVBBBBG6L4BWNRCPFE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VERSION{\_}STR}}{HRCG:unVERSION:unSTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{323}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{324}The HRCG maintains its state in a self-modifying parameter block at
{\Tt{}{\$}9305--{\$}9319\nwendquote}.  These 21~bytes control every aspect of text rendering:
which font is active, whether characters are drawn in replace, OR, AND, or
XOR mode, whether inverse video is enabled, and whether the cursor wraps or
scrolls at the bottom of the text window.

The parameter block is laid out so that it can be saved and restored in bulk
by the ctrl-B and ctrl-D handlers.  The first 8~bytes ({\Tt{}HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE\nwendquote}
through {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI\nwendquote}) are the saveable state; these are followed by
a saved copy, a ``saved'' flag byte, and the saved cursor position.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{325}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg params~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9305
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SHIFT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; $00=normal, $40=next-shifted, $80=charset-select
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; bit 7/6 shifted by ASL during dispatch
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $20                             ; $20=replace, $40=OR, $80=AND, $C0=XOR
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; $00=normal, $7F=inverse
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; video mode for drawing ($00/$80/$C0)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; $00=page1, $60=page2
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; $00=scroll, $FF=wrap
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $00                             ; $00=normal, $80=lowercase, $C0=XOR-invert
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $A5                             ; font data pointer low
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $97                             ; font data pointer high ($97A5 = standard font)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $20,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$A5,$97 ; saved copy of video mode..font ptr (8 bytes)
    DC.B    $FF                             ; HRCG_SAVED_FLAG ($00=not saved, $FF=saved)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $01                             ; saved cursor X
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}:
    DC.B    $17                             ; saved cursor Y (23)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SHIFT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unSHIFT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SHIFT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unSHIFT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{326}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{327}The HRCG replaces both the Apple II's character output vector (CSW at
{\Tt{}{\$}36/{\$}37\nwendquote}) and its keyboard input vector (KSW at {\Tt{}{\$}38/{\$}39\nwendquote}).
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}GETKEY\nwendquote} is the KSW handler.  Its primary job is to blink the cursor
while waiting for a keypress, but it also interprets ESC-key sequences for
cursor movement and screen editing---a miniature line editor built into the
input routine.

The blinking works by toggling the 7~pixel bits at the cursor's screen
position.  A countdown register ({\Tt{}X\nwendquote}) controls the blink rate: every time
the high byte of the blink timer overflows, {\Tt{}X\nwendquote} decrements, and when it
reaches zero the cursor pixels are inverted.  The blink timer at {\Tt{}{\$}4E/{\$}4F\nwendquote}
ticks continuously while the routine polls {\Tt{}{\$}C000\nwendquote} for a keypress.

When a key arrives, the routine checks whether it was called from the ROM
input routine at {\Tt{}{\$}F8xx\nwendquote} (by peeking at the return address on the stack).
If so, it processes ESC sequences---ESC followed by I/J/K/M for cursor
movement, or ESC-@/E/F/C for screen editing.  If the caller is not the ROM,
the raw keycode is returned immediately.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{328}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg getkey~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $931A
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_GETKEY}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_GETKEY}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}
; --- KSW handler: cursor blink + keyboard input ---
    STA     ($28),Y            ; save char at cursor pos (BASL)
    STX     $EB                ; save X
    LDA     $28                ; BASL
    STA     $2A                ; copy to $2A
    LDA     $29                ; BASH
    ORA     #$1C               ; set hi-res page offset bits
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}
    STA     $2B                ; store hi byte
    LDX     #$01               ; blink counter init
.blink_loop:
    LDA     ($2A),Y            ; read screen byte at cursor
    PHA                        ; save it
.blink_wait:
    INC     $4E                ; increment blink timer low
    BNE     .blink_check
    INC     $4F                ; increment blink timer high
    DEX                        ; decrement blink counter
    BNE     .blink_check
    EOR     #$7F               ; toggle cursor (invert bits 0-6)
    STA     ($2A),Y            ; write toggled cursor
    LDX     #$50               ; reset blink counter
.blink_check:
    BIT     $C000              ; check keyboard
    BPL     .blink_wait        ; no key -> keep blinking
    PLA                        ; restore original screen byte
    STA     ($2A),Y            ; restore cursor position
    TSX                        ; get stack pointer
    LDA     $0104,X            ; peek at return address high byte
    CMP     #$F8               ; called from ROM input ($F8xx)?
    LDA     $C000              ; read key
    BIT     $C010              ; clear keyboard strobe
    BCC     .return_direct     ; not from ROM -> return key directly
    PHA                        ; save key
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SHIFT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}    ; check shift flag
    BMI     .shifted           ; if set -> handle shifted key
    BANE    #$9B,.check_cr     ; ESC key?
    LDA     #$80               ; set shift flag
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SHIFT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}
    BNE     .discard_key       ; always branch -> return
.check_cr:
    BANE    #$8D,.discard_key  ; CR key?
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}        ; clear rest of line
.reload_ch:
    LDY     $24                ; reload cursor X
.discard_key:
    PLA                        ; discard saved key
.return_direct:
    LDX     $EB                ; restore X
    RTS
; --- Shifted key handling (ESC was pressed) ---
.shifted:
    CMP     #$C9               ; 'I' ?
    BCC     .try_other
    BAEQ    #$CD,.scroll_down  ; 'M' ?
    BCS     .try_other         ; > 'M' -> try as normal
    BAEQ    #$CB,.cursor_right ; 'K' ?
    BCC     .discard_key       ; < 'K' (='J') -> ignore
.try_other:
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SHIFT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}    ; clear shift flag
    BANE    #$C0,.try_e        ; '@' ?
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_HOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
    JMP     .reload_ch
.try_e:
    BANE    #$C5,.try_f        ; 'E' ?
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
    JMP     .reload_ch
.try_f:
    BANE    #$C6,.try_c        ; 'F' ?
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
    JMP     .reload_ch
.try_c:
    BAEQ    #$C3,.scroll_down  ; 'C' ?
    BANE    #$C1,.discard_key  ; not recognized -> return
.cursor_right:
    INY                        ; cursor right: Y++
    CPY     $21                ; past right edge (WNDWDTH)?
    BCC     .reload_ch
.scroll_down:
    LDY     $25                ; get cursor Y (CV)
    INY
    CPY     $23                ; past bottom (WNDBTM)?
    BCC     .reload_ch
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SCROLL_UP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}
    JMP     .reload_ch
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}GETKEY}}{HRCG:unGETKEY}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}GETKEY}}{HRCG:unGETKEY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SHIFT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unSHIFT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SHIFT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unSHIFT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-HQOLGXBPZEC4TB244DH3TYRJWQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{329}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{330}{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}COUT\nwendquote} is the CSW handler---the replacement for the Apple II's
standard character output routine.  Every {\Tt{}JSR\ ROM{\_}COUT1\nwendquote} in the game
ultimately lands here.  The handler is a thin wrapper: it saves the CPU
registers, calls {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, and restores them.

{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} strips the high bit from the character (Apple II text
uses high-bit ASCII) and decides what to do with it.  If the ``charset
select'' flag is set in {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS\nwendquote}, the character is treated as a
charset number and routed to {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}CHARSET{\_}SELECT\nwendquote}.  Otherwise, printable
characters ({\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote} and above) go to {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} for rendering, and
control characters (below {\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote}) are dispatched through a 27-entry
RTS-trick jump table.  The dispatch doubles the control code to form a
table index, pushes the handler address (minus one) onto the stack, and
falls through to {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}---the classic 6502 technique for computed jumps.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{331}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg cout~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $93BE
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_COUT}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_COUT}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}
; --- CSW handler: save regs, process char, restore ---
    STA     $FF                   ; save A
    STX     $EB                   ; save X
    STY     $35                   ; save Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PROCESS_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}
    LDY     $35                   ; restore Y
    LDX     $EB                   ; restore X
    LDA     $FF                   ; restore A
    RTS
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PROCESS_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1} ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PROCESS_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}:
    AND     #$7F                  ; strip high bit
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; shift mode bit 7 into carry
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CHARSET_SELECT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}   ; if set -> charset select
    CMP     #$20                  ; printable char (>= space)?
    BCC     .ctrl_dispatch        ; no -> control char dispatch
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}
.ctrl_dispatch:
    CMP     #$1B                  ; >= ESC ($1B)?
    BCS     .shift_and_rts        ; yes -> skip dispatch
    ASL                           ; char * 2 for table index
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPATCH_TBL}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}+1,X ; high byte of handler-1
    PHA
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPATCH_TBL}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1},X   ; low byte of handler-1
    PHA
.shift_and_rts:
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; shift mode bit 6 into carry
    RTS                           ; RTS-trick dispatch
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}COUT}}{HRCG:unCOUT}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unPROCESS:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}COUT}}{HRCG:unCOUT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unPROCESS:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CHARSET{\_}SELECT}}{HRCG:unCHARSET:unSELECT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TBL}}{HRCG:unDISPATCH:unTBL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CHARSET{\_}SELECT}}{HRCG:unCHARSET:unSELECT}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TBL}}{HRCG:unDISPATCH:unTBL}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{332}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{333}The dispatch table maps each control character (ctrl-@~through ctrl-Z)
to a handler address, stored as address-minus-one for the RTS trick.  The
HRCG supports a ``shifted'' variant of each control character: if the
previous character was ctrl-A or ctrl-O, a flag is set in
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS\nwendquote}, and when the next handler is entered, the carry flag
will be set (from the {\Tt{}ASL\ HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS\nwendquote} in {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}).
Each handler checks carry on entry to decide between its normal and shifted
behavior.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{334}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg dispatch table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $93EE
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPATCH_TBL}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}:
; Control character dispatch table (address-1 for RTS trick)
; ctrl-@: no-op
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-A: set shift/charset flag
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_A}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}-1
; ctrl-B: save state
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_B_SAVE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}-1
; ctrl-C: restore cursor / XOR mode
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_C}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}-1
; ctrl-D: restore state / display page
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_D}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}-1
; ctrl-E: clear EOL
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_E}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-F: clear to end of screen
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_F}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-G: bell
    DC.W    $FBDC
; ctrl-H: backspace
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_H}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-I: inverse video
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_I}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-J: line feed
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_LINE_FEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}-1
; ctrl-K: clear invert flag
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_K}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}-1
; ctrl-L: set invert flag
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_L}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}-1
; ctrl-M: carriage return
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_M}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}-1
; ctrl-N: normal video
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}-1
; ctrl-O: next-shifted / OR mode
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_O}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}-1
; ctrl-P: home / clear draw mode
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_P}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}-1
; ctrl-Q: goto saved cursor
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Q}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}-1
; ctrl-R: XOR draw mode
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_R}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}-1
; ctrl-S: XOR invert / clear wrap
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_S}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}-1
; ctrl-T: AND draw mode
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_T}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}-1
; ctrl-U: no-op
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-V: set text window
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_V}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-W: set margins
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_W}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-X: no-op
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}-1
; ctrl-Y: clear screen
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Y}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}-1
; ctrl-Z: reset
    DC.W    \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Z}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}-1
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TBL}}{HRCG:unDISPATCH:unTBL}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPATCH{\_}TBL}}{HRCG:unDISPATCH:unTBL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}A}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unA}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}B{\_}SAVE}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unB:unSAVE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}C}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unC}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}D}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unD}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}E}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}F}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unF}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}H}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}I}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unI}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}K}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}L}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}M}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unM}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unN}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}O}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unO}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}P}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Q}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unQ}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}R}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}S}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}T}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}V}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}W}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Y}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Z}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unZ}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}A}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unA}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}B{\_}SAVE}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unB:unSAVE}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}C}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unC}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}D}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unD}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}E}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unE}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}F}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unF}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}H}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unH}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}I}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unI}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}K}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unK}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}L}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unL}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}M}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unM}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}O}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unO}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}P}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unP}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Q}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unQ}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}R}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unR}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}S}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unS}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}T}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unT}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}V}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unV}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}W}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unW}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Y}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unY}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Z}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unZ}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}{PYNWmai0-XQBVB4RAQZ3JRBXZLIM7PQEFDA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{335}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{336}\subsubsection{Control character handlers}

The control character handlers follow.  Each one checks the carry flag on
entry to distinguish its normal behavior from its shifted variant.

Ctrl-A is the charset selector.  In normal mode, it sets {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS\nwendquote}
so that the \emph{next} character output will be interpreted as a charset
number (``1'' through ``9'') rather than printed.  In shifted mode (entered via
ctrl-A, ctrl-A, \emph{char}), it resets the video mode to replace.

When the charset-select path fires, the character is converted to a font
pointer by multiplying the charset index by 3~pages (768~bytes per charset of
96~characters at 8~bytes each) and adding the font base address.  Charset~0
always maps to the standard font at {\Tt{}{\$}97A5\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{337}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl a~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9424
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_A}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_A}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}
; --- ctrl-A handler: set shift flag ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_REPLACE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}  ; shifted -> set replace mode
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; set bit 7 (next char -> charset select)
    RTS
; --- Charset select (entered from \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PROCESS_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-OFJMC4I4LQC4O7W6VIW36ANFJU000000-1} BCS) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CHARSET_SELECT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}:
    SBC     #$31              ; A = char - '1' (carry set)
    CMP     #$09              ; valid charset 1-9?
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_STD_FONT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1} ; no -> use standard font
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_BASE}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}    ; font base low ($A5)
    STA     $EE               ; save index
    ASL                       ; A * 2
    ADC     $EE               ; A * 3 (3 pages per charset)
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_BASE}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+1  ; add font base high ($83)
    BNE     .store_font       ; always branches
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_STD_FONT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}:
    LDX     #<\nwlinkedidentc{STD_FONT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}   ; standard font low
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{STD_FONT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4GKD57O4UDC4T2RQHRJRRNKC7M000000-1}   ; standard font high ($97A5)
.store_font:
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; font pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; font pointer high
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CHARSET{\_}SELECT}}{HRCG:unCHARSET:unSELECT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}A}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unA}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}STD{\_}FONT}}{HRCG:unSET:unSTD:unFONT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CHARSET{\_}SELECT}}{HRCG:unCHARSET:unSELECT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}A}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unA}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}STD{\_}FONT}}{HRCG:unSET:unSTD:unFONT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}BASE}}{HRCG:unFONT:unBASE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unPROCESS:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}}\\{{\nwixident{STD{\_}FONT{\_}DATA}}{STD:unFONT:unDATA}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}BASE}}{HRCG:unFONT:unBASE}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PROCESS{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unPROCESS:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STD{\_}FONT{\_}DATA}}{STD:unFONT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{338}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{339}Ctrl-B saves the HRCG's rendering state---the 8-byte parameter block
(video mode through font pointer) plus the cursor position---so it can be
restored later with ctrl-D.  Only one level of save is supported; if the
state has already been saved, only the cursor position is updated.  The
shifted variant sets OR video mode instead.

This save/restore mechanism is used by the game to temporarily switch fonts
or video modes for status display, then return to the previous rendering
context.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{340}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl b~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $944A
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_REPLACE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}:
; --- ctrl-A shifted: set replace video mode ---
    LDA     #$20
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}     ; video mode = replace ($20)
    RTS
; --- ctrl-B: save params + cursor ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_B_SAVE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_B_SAVE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}
    BCS     .set_or             ; double-shifted -> set OR mode
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8 ; already saved?
    BMI     .save_cursor        ; yes -> just update cursor
    LDA     #$FF
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8 ; mark as saved
    LDY     #$07                ; 8 bytes to save
.save_loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1},Y   ; active params
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1},Y ; saved copy
    DEY
    BPL     .save_loop
.save_cursor:
    LDA     $24                 ; cursor X (CH)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}
    LDA     $25                 ; cursor Y (CV)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}
    RTS
; --- ctrl-B double-shifted: OR video mode ---
.set_or:
    LDA     #$40
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}     ; video mode = OR ($40)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}B{\_}SAVE}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unB:unSAVE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}B{\_}SAVE}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unB:unSAVE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{341}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{342}Ctrl-C restores the saved cursor position (from ctrl-B).  If the saved
column matches the current column, it also performs a line feed.  If the
saved column is to the right of the current column, it does nothing---this
prevents the cursor from jumping backwards unexpectedly.  The shifted
variant enables XOR draw mode on page~1.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{343}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl c~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9478
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_C}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_C}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}
; --- ctrl-C normal: restore cursor position ---
    BCS     .set_xor_draw  ; shifted -> XOR draw mode
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; saved CH
    CMP     $24            ; compare to current CH
    STA     $24            ; restore CH
    BEQ     .do_lf         ; same -> just do line feed
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}  ; saved > current -> RTS
.do_lf:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_LINE_FEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}
; --- ctrl-C shifted: XOR draw mode ---
.set_xor_draw:
    LDA     #$C0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; draw mode = XOR ($C0)
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; page mask = 0
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}C}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unC}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}C}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unC}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-NRF4FCNGBDW6VULDCLUMZTJXYU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{344}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{345}Ctrl-D is the companion to ctrl-B: it restores the full 8-byte parameter
block that was previously saved.  If nothing was saved, it does nothing.
The shifted variant calls {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}DISPLAY{\_}PAGE\nwendquote}, which selects hi-res page~1
or page~2 based on the current video mode---the game patches this to an
early {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}, effectively disabling page switching.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{346}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl d~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9493
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_D}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_D}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}
; --- ctrl-D normal: restore saved params ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPLAY_PAGE}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}   ; shifted -> display page
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8 ; params saved?
    BPL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}       ; no -> NOP return
    LDY     #$07                ; 8 bytes
.restore_loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1},Y ; saved params
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1},Y   ; restore to active
    DEY
    BPL     .restore_loop
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8 ; clear saved flag
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; clear saved CH
    LDA     $22                 ; WNDTOP
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; set saved CV = WNDTOP
    RTS
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPLAY_PAGE}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}: page flip based on video mode ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DISPLAY_PAGE}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}:
    BIT     $C054               ; select page 1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}     ; video mode
    BANE    #$40,\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}  ; no -> return (stay on page 1)
    BIT     $C055               ; yes -> select page 2
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}D}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unD}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPLAY{\_}PAGE}}{HRCG:unDISPLAY:unPAGE}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}D}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unD}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DISPLAY{\_}PAGE}}{HRCG:unDISPLAY:unPAGE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-OUX2RM6SCN3YNYCNJ2WRFRTHGQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{347}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{348}The next group of handlers covers screen clearing, cursor movement, and
inverse video.  Ctrl-E clears from the cursor to the end of the current
line.  Ctrl-F clears from the cursor to the end of the screen.  Both
delegate to the HRCG's own clear routines and then call the corresponding
ROM routine to update the text-page shadow.

Ctrl-H is backspace: it decrements the cursor column, and if it wraps past
column~0, it moves to the end of the previous row (provided the cursor is
not already at the top of the text window).  Ctrl-I enables inverse video by
setting {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MASK\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}7F\nwendquote}, which causes every font byte to be XORed
with {\Tt{}{\$}7F\nwendquote} before rendering---flipping all 7~pixel bits.

All shifted variants in this group are no-ops.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{349}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl efhi~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $94C1
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_E}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}:
; --- ctrl-E normal: clear to end of line ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1} ; shifted -> NOP
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
    JMP     $FC9C         ; ROM CLREOLZ
; --- ctrl-F normal: clear to end of screen ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_F}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}:
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1} ; shifted -> NOP
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
    JMP     $FC42         ; ROM CLREOP
; --- ctrl-H: backspace ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_H}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_H}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}
    DEC     $24           ; CH--
    BPL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1} ; still >= 0 -> done
    LDA     $21           ; WNDWDTH
    STA     $24           ; CH = WNDWDTH
    DEC     $24           ; CH = WNDWDTH - 1
    LDA     $22           ; WNDTOP
    CMP     $25           ; CV >= WNDTOP?
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1} ; at top -> can't go up
    DEC     $25           ; CV--
    JMP     $FC22         ; ROM VTAB
; --- ctrl-I: inverse video ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_I}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}:
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1} ; shifted -> NOP
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}     ; mask = $7F (invert all 7 pixels)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}:
    RTS                   ; shared NOP return
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}E}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unE}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}F}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unF}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}H}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unH}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}I}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unI}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}E}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}F}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unF}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}H}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}I}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unI}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{350}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{351}Ctrl-K and ctrl-L control the ``lowercase invert'' feature.
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} has three states: {\Tt{}{\$}00\nwendquote} (normal), {\Tt{}{\$}80\nwendquote} (invert
lowercase letters), and {\Tt{}{\$}C0\nwendquote} (XOR-invert, toggled by ctrl-S).  When set to
{\Tt{}{\$}80\nwendquote}, uppercase letters A--Z are rendered using the font data for their
lowercase counterparts without subtracting {\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote}---effectively swapping
case in the display.  Ctrl-K clears the flag; ctrl-L sets it to {\Tt{}{\$}80\nwendquote}.

Ctrl-M is carriage return.  Before moving the cursor, it checks the keyboard
for ctrl-S (the pause key, {\Tt{}{\$}93\nwendquote}).  If a pause is detected, the routine
waits for another keypress before continuing.  Ctrl-C ({\Tt{}{\$}83\nwendquote}) cancels the
pause.  After the pause check, the handler sets the cursor column to zero
and falls through to the line feed logic.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{352}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl klm~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $94EE
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_K}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}:
; --- ctrl-K: clear invert flag ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}    ; shifted -> NOP
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; clear invert flag
    RTS
; --- ctrl-L: set invert flag ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_L}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}:
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}    ; shifted -> NOP
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; invert flag = $80
    RTS
; --- ctrl-M: carriage return (with pause check) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_M}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_M}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}
    LDY     $C000            ; check keyboard
    BPL     .no_pause        ; no key -> skip pause
    \nwlinkedidentc{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-21}    #$93,.no_pause   ; ctrl-S (pause)?
    BIT     $C010            ; clear strobe
.wait_key:
    LDY     $C000            ; wait for key
    BPL     .wait_key
    BYEQ    #$83,.no_pause   ; ctrl-C (cancel)?
    BIT     $C010            ; clear strobe
.no_pause:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CR_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}    ; -> set CH=0, line feed
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}K}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unK}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}L}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unL}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}M}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unM}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}K}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}L}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}M}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY}}{HRCG:unCR:unENTRY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY}}{HRCG:unCR:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-EZTGX5OJG32O6FGPPYS4MUTKR4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{353}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{354}Ctrl-N returns to normal video by clearing the inverse mask.  Ctrl-O in
normal mode sets {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote}, which causes the \emph{next}
control character to enter its shifted variant (the ``next-shifted'' flag);
in shifted mode, it sets OR draw mode.  Ctrl-P homes the cursor and clears
the screen; its shifted variant clears the draw mode and page mask.

Ctrl-Q moves the cursor to the saved position (from ctrl-B) without
restoring any other state---a ``goto'' for the cursor.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{355}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl nopq~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9519
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}:
; --- ctrl-N: normal video ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}   ; shifted -> NOP
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; clear mask (normal video)
    RTS
; --- ctrl-O: set next-shifted / OR mode ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_O}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_O}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}
    BCS     .set_or_draw    ; shifted -> OR draw mode
    LDA     #$40
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; next ctrl -> shifted variant
    RTS
.set_or_draw:
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; draw mode = OR ($80)
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; page mask = 0
    RTS
; --- ctrl-P: home cursor ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_P}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_P}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}
    BCS     .clear_draw     ; shifted -> clear draw mode
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_HOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
    JMP     $FC58           ; ROM HOME (clear text screen)
.clear_draw:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; draw mode = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; page mask = 0
    RTS
; --- ctrl-Q: goto saved cursor ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Q}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}:
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_NOP}{PYNWmai0-RSW5LL327MSTVIWROJMVXMGUGM000000-1}   ; shifted -> NOP
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; saved CH
    STA     $24             ; CH = saved
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; saved CV
    STA     $25             ; CV = saved
    JMP     $FC24           ; ROM VTAB
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}O}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unO}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}P}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unP}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Q}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unQ}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unN}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}O}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unO}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}P}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Q}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unQ}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}NOP}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unNOP}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-XS5QIWIRC4T2NAUNHKZ3IJMJ7A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{356}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{357}Ctrl-R, ctrl-S, and ctrl-T configure the advanced draw modes.  These modes
control how new character pixels combine with existing screen content:

\begin{itemize}
\item \textbf{Replace} (the default): new pixels overwrite the screen.
\item \textbf{OR}: new pixels are ORed with existing screen content, allowing
      characters to overlay graphics without erasing the background.
\item \textbf{AND}: new pixels are ANDed with the screen, masking out areas.
\item \textbf{XOR}: new pixels are XORed with the screen, useful for
      flashing cursors or toggling sprites.
\end{itemize}

Ctrl-R (shifted only) sets XOR draw mode with page-2 overlay.  Ctrl-S sets
the XOR-invert flag (for character-level inversion); its shifted variant
clears the wrap flag, switching to scroll mode.  Ctrl-T (shifted only) sets
AND draw mode with page-2 overlay.  The normal variants of ctrl-R and ctrl-T
are no-ops.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{358}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl rst~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9554
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_R}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}:
; --- ctrl-R shifted: XOR draw + page2 ---
    BCC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}         ; normal -> RTS (no-op)
    LDA     #$C0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; draw mode = XOR ($C0)
    LDA     #$60
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; page mask = $60 (page 2)
    RTS
; --- ctrl-S: XOR invert / clear wrap ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_S}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_S}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}
    BCS     .clear_wrap      ; shifted -> clear wrap
    LDA     #$C0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; invert = XOR ($C0)
    RTS
.clear_wrap:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; wrap = 0 (scroll mode)
    RTS
; --- ctrl-T shifted: AND draw mode ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_T}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}:
    BCC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}         ; normal -> RTS (no-op)
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; draw mode = AND ($80)
    LDA     #$60
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}   ; page mask = $60
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}R}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unR}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}S}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unS}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}T}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unT}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}R}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}S}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}T}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-T4MUSM7WKBULLSVDL4PD3MCOKQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{359}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{360}Ctrl-V and ctrl-W together define the text window---a rectangular region
of the screen where text output is confined.  Ctrl-V sets the left edge and
top row: the current cursor column (relative to {\Tt{}WNDLFT\nwendquote}) becomes the new
left margin, and the current row becomes the new top.  Ctrl-W sets the right
edge and bottom row, and its shifted variant enables wrap mode (where the
cursor wraps to the top of the window instead of scrolling).

Ali Baba uses these extensively to confine status messages and input prompts
to the bottom portion of the screen, while the map occupies the upper area.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{361}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl vw~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $957C
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_V}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_V}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}
; --- ctrl-V: set text window ---
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}            ; shifted -> RTS
    LDA     $24                 ; CH
    ADC     $20                 ; + WNDLFT
    CMP     #$28                ; >= 40?
    BCC     .store_lft
    LDA     #$27                ; clamp to 39
.store_lft:
    STA     $20                 ; WNDLFT = CH + old WNDLFT
    SEC
    LDA     $21                 ; WNDWDTH
    SBC     $24                 ; - CH
    STA     $21                 ; new WNDWDTH
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $24                 ; CH = 0
    LDA     $25                 ; CV
    CMP     #$18                ; >= 24?
    BCC     .store_top
    LDA     #$17                ; clamp to 23
.store_top:
    STA     $22                 ; WNDTOP = CV
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8 ; params saved?
    BMI     .do_vtab            ; yes -> skip saving CV
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; saved CV = WNDTOP
.do_vtab:
    JMP     $FC22               ; ROM VTAB
; --- ctrl-W: set right margin + bottom ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_W}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_W}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}
    BCS     .set_wrap           ; shifted -> set wrap
    LDA     $24                 ; CH
    STA     $21                 ; WNDWDTH = CH
    ADC     $20                 ; + WNDLFT
    CMP     #$28                ; >= 40?
    BCC     .width_ok
    LDA     #$27                ; clamp to 39
    SBC     $20                 ; - WNDLFT
    STA     $21                 ; WNDWDTH = 39 - WNDLFT
.width_ok:
    INC     $21                 ; WNDWDTH + 1
    LDA     $25                 ; CV
    CMP     #$18                ; >= 24?
    BCC     .bottom_ok
    LDA     #$17                ; clamp to 23
.bottom_ok:
    STA     $23                 ; WNDBTM = CV
    INC     $23                 ; WNDBTM + 1
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}:
    RTS                         ; shared RTS
; --- ctrl-W shifted: set wrap mode ---
.set_wrap:
    LDA     #$FF
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; wrap flag = $FF (wrap mode)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}V}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unV}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}W}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unW}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}V}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}W}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{362}\nwdocspar
