\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{363}Ctrl-Y clears the entire screen by resetting the text window to full size
(40 columns by 24 rows) and filling it.  Its shifted variant jumps to
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}ENTRY2\nwendquote}, one of the secondary entry points in the jump table---which
the game patches to a simple {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}.

Ctrl-Z is the full reset:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Clears the entire parameter block (19~bytes).
  \item Resets the text window.
  \item Selects the standard font.
  \item Sets replace video mode.
  \item Patches both secondary entry points to {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}.
\end{enumerate}
This brings the HRCG back to its power-on state.  The shifted variant jumps to {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}ENTRY3\nwendquote}
(also patched to {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote}).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{364}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg ctrl yz~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $95D1
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Y}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Y}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}
; --- ctrl-Y normal: clear screen (reset window to full) ---
    BCS     .jump_entry2        ; shifted -> JMP \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
; --- shared: reset window to full screen ---
    LDA     $20                 ; WNDLFT
    ADC     $24                 ; + CH
    STA     $24                 ; CH = absolute column
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $20                 ; WNDLFT = 0
    STA     $22                 ; WNDTOP = 0
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_PARAMS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}+8 ; params saved?
    BMI     .set_dims           ; yes -> skip
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CH}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; saved CH = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SAVED_CV}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}       ; saved CV = 0
.set_dims:
    LDA     #$28                ; 40
    STA     $21                 ; WNDWDTH = 40
    LDA     #$18                ; 24
    STA     $23                 ; WNDBTM = 24
    JMP     $FC22               ; ROM VTAB
.jump_entry2:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}         ; -> secondary entry (disabled)
; --- ctrl-Z: full reset ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Z}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CTRL_Z}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}
    BCS     .jump_entry3        ; shifted -> JMP \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00
    LDY     #$12                ; 19 bytes (indices 0-18)
.clear_loop:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1},Y   ; clear param block
    DEY
    BPL     .clear_loop
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RESET_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}   ; reset window
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_STD_FONT}{PYNWmai0-DCTJPCOGFUBKNEAASOJNK6FRW4000000-1}   ; set standard font ($97A5)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SET_REPLACE}{PYNWmai0-W7YU5RCKPLTWEAYFWKSV2BZKKA000000-1}    ; set replace video mode ($20)
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+1       ; patch entry2 low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+1       ; patch entry3 low
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+2       ; patch entry2 high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}+2       ; patch entry3 high
    RTS
.jump_entry3:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-PKTDZPNNNWL2YX7YTMF57HFZLQ000000-1}         ; -> secondary entry (disabled)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Y}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unY}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Z}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unZ}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET}}{HRCG:unRESET}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET{\_}WINDOW}}{HRCG:unRESET:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Y}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CTRL{\_}Z}}{HRCG:unCTRL:unZ}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET}}{HRCG:unRESET}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RESET{\_}WINDOW}}{HRCG:unRESET:unWINDOW}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY2}}{HRCG:unENTRY2}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY3}}{HRCG:unENTRY3}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}STD{\_}FONT}}{HRCG:unSET:unSTD:unFONT}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY2}}{HRCG:unENTRY2}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ENTRY3}}{HRCG:unENTRY3}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CH}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCH}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}CV}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unCV}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SAVED{\_}PARAMS}}{HRCG:unSAVED:unPARAMS}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}REPLACE}}{HRCG:unSET:unREPLACE}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SET{\_}STD{\_}FONT}}{HRCG:unSET:unSTD:unFONT}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-INBSVHD5BO4NYEWGPCTAZCAYYY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{365}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{366}\subsubsection{Character rendering}

{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} is the heart of the HRCG: the routine that actually puts
pixels on the hi-res screen.  For each printable character, it computes a
pointer into the active font data, calculates the hi-res screen address for
the current cursor position, and renders 8~scan lines of font data.

The font address calculation multiplies the character index (character code
minus {\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote}) by~8 and adds the font pointer.  The multiplication is done
by three successive {\Tt{}ASL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}ROL\nwendquote} pairs, shifting the index left 3~bits
while propagating the carry into {\Tt{}{\$}EF\nwendquote} for the high byte.

The lowercase-invert feature adds a twist: when {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} is set
to {\Tt{}{\$}80\nwendquote}, letters A--Z skip the subtraction of {\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote}, so they index into
the lowercase range of the font instead.  The {\Tt{}{\$}C0\nwendquote} (XOR-invert) state
toggles only once and then reverts to {\Tt{}{\$}80\nwendquote}.

Once the font address is in {\Tt{}{\$}EE/{\$}EF\nwendquote} and the screen address is in
{\Tt{}{\$}2A/{\$}2B\nwendquote}, the render loop processes 8~bytes.  Each font byte is XORed
with {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MASK\nwendquote} (for inverse video), then combined with the screen
according to the draw mode: replace writes directly, OR combines with the
existing screen content, AND masks it, and XOR toggles it.  The screen
address advances by {\Tt{}{\$}0400\nwendquote} per scan line---the standard Apple II
hi-res interleaving within a character cell.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{367}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg draw char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9621
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}
; --- Main character rendering ---
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MODE_FLAGS}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}     ; shift mode flags
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_RTS}{PYNWmai0-CXJIB6KYYRTSWZAVW64CRVKTYM000000-1}            ; shifted -> RTS (ignore shifted printable)
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}    ; check invert flag
    BPL     .normal_char        ; not set -> normal
    BVC     .check_lower        ; bit 6 clear -> check lowercase
    ASL     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_INVERT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}    ; shift invert flag ($C0 -> $80)
    BCS     .normal_char        ; was $C0, now $80 -> treat as normal
.check_lower:
    CMP     #$41                ; 'A' ?
    BCC     .normal_char        ; < 'A' -> normal
    CMP     #$5B                ; '[' ?
    BCC     .calc_offset        ; < '[' -> lowercase (skip subtract)
.normal_char:
    SEC
    SBC     #$20                ; convert to font index (char - $20)
.calc_offset:
    ASL                         ; \\ index * 8 = byte offset in font
    ROL     $EF                 ;  |
    ASL                         ;  |
    ROL     $EF                 ;  |
    ASL                         ;  |
    ROL     $EF                 ; /
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}    ; + font pointer low
    STA     $EE                 ; font address low
    LDA     $EF
    AND     #$07                ; mask to 3 bits
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FONT_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}    ; + font pointer high
    STA     $EF                 ; font address high
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}
    ADC     $24                 ; + cursor X
    STA     $2A                 ; screen address low
    STA     $EC                 ; save copy
    LDA     $2B                 ; screen address high
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; XOR with page mask (0 or $60)
    STA     $ED                 ; alt-page address high
    LDY     $24                 ; cursor X
    LDA     $FF                 ; original character
    STA     ($28),Y             ; store char in text page
    LDX     #$00
    LDY     #$00
; --- Render loop: 8 scan lines ---
.render_loop:
    LDA     ($EE),Y             ; load font byte
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; apply mask (inverse)
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; check draw mode
    BPL     .store              ; $00 -> replace mode
    BVS     .xor_mode           ; $C0 -> XOR mode
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; check mask for AND vs OR
    BVS     .and_mode           ; mask $7F + draw $80 -> AND
    ORA     ($EC,X)             ; OR mode: combine with screen
    BVC     .store              ; always -> store
.and_mode:
    AND     ($EC,X)             ; AND mode: mask with screen
    BVS     .store              ; always -> store
.xor_mode:
    EOR     ($EC,X)             ; XOR mode: toggle screen bits
.store:
    STA     ($2A,X)             ; write to screen
    INY                         ; next font byte
    CPY     #$08                ; done 8 bytes?
    BCS     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ADVANCE_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1} ; yes -> advance cursor
    LDA     $2B                 ; screen high byte
    ADC     #$04                ; next scan line group (+$0400)
    STA     $2B
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; update alt-page address
    STA     $ED
    BCC     .render_loop        ; loop (always, carry clear)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}CHAR}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FONT{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{HRCG:unFONT:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}INVERT{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unINVERT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MODE{\_}FLAGS}}{HRCG:unMODE:unFLAGS}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}RTS}}{HRCG:unRTS}{PYNWmai0-S4ZCZXMOYKECRTEF5BT4KDNUQM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{368}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{369}After rendering a character, {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR\nwendquote} moves the cursor one
column to the right.  If the cursor reaches the right edge of the text
window ({\Tt{}WNDWDTH\nwendquote}), it wraps to column~0 and performs a line feed.

The line feed logic increments {\Tt{}CV\nwendquote} (cursor row).  If the cursor passes
the bottom of the text window ({\Tt{}WNDBTM\nwendquote}), the behavior depends on the
wrap flag: in scroll mode, the window scrolls up one line (via
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP\nwendquote}) and the cursor stays at the bottom row; in wrap mode,
the cursor jumps back to the top of the window.

This chunk also contains {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY\nwendquote}, which the carriage return handler
(ctrl-M) uses to set the column to zero and fall through into the line feed.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{370}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg advance cursor~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $969E
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ADVANCE_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ADVANCE_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}
; --- Advance cursor after character ---
    INC     $24            ; CH++
    LDA     $24
    CMP     $21            ; >= WNDWDTH?
    BCC     .done          ; no -> done
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CR_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00           ; (CR entry point: set CH=0)
    STA     $24
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_LINE_FEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1} ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_LINE_FEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}:
    INC     $25            ; CV++
    LDA     $25
    CMP     $23            ; >= WNDBTM?
    BCC     .update_cursor ; no -> just update cursor
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_WRAP_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1} ; check wrap flag
    BVS     .wrap          ; wrap mode -> wrap to top
    DEC     $25            ; CV-- (stay at bottom)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SCROLL_UP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}
    JMP     $FC70          ; ROM SCROLL
.wrap:
    LDA     $22            ; WNDTOP
    STA     $25            ; CV = WNDTOP (wrap)
.update_cursor:
    JSR     $FC24          ; ROM VTAB
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY}}{HRCG:unCR:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ADVANCE{\_}CURSOR}}{HRCG:unADVANCE:unCURSOR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CR{\_}ENTRY}}{HRCG:unCR:unENTRY}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}LINE{\_}FEED}}{HRCG:unLINE:unFEED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}WRAP{\_}FLAG}}{HRCG:unWRAP:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-XYC67JB4UOSMD2VWUP2J26LSUY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{371}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{372}{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP\nwendquote} shifts the entire text window up by one character row.
Since each text row occupies 8~hi-res scan lines, the routine must copy
8~rows of pixel data for every text row in the window.  It walks from the
top of the window downward, using {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW\nwendquote} to compute the
hi-res address for both the source (row below) and destination (current row),
then copies all columns across all 8~scan lines.

After all rows have been shifted up, the bottom row is cleared using
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE\nwendquote} with the draw mode temporarily forced to replace.  This
ensures the last row is erased cleanly regardless of the current video mode.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{373}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg scroll up~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $96C7
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SCROLL_UP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_SCROLL_UP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}
    LDA     $22                 ; WNDTOP (top row)
    PHA                         ; save for later
.next_row:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1} ; calc hi-res addr for row A
.copy_row:
    LDA     $2A                 ; dest address low
    STA     $EC
    LDA     $2B                 ; dest address high
    AND     #$E3                ; mask off scan line bits
    STA     $ED
    PLA                         ; restore source row
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; source = dest + 1
    CMP     $23                 ; >= WNDBTM?
    BCS     .clear_last         ; yes -> done copying, clear last line
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1} ; calc hi-res addr for source row
    LDX     #$07                ; 8 scan lines
.copy_scanline:
    LDY     $21                 ; WNDWDTH
    DEY                         ; index = WNDWDTH - 1
.copy_byte:
    LDA     ($2A),Y             ; read source
    STA     ($EC),Y             ; write dest
    DEY
    BPL     .copy_byte          ; next column
    DEX
    BMI     .copy_row           ; all 8 lines done -> next row
    CLC
    LDA     $2B                 ; advance source
    ADC     #$04
    STA     $2B
    LDA     $ED                 ; advance dest
    ADC     #$04
    STA     $ED
    BNE     .copy_scanline      ; always -> continue
.clear_last:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; save draw mode
    PHA
    LDA     $23                 ; WNDBTM
    SBC     #$01                ; last row index
    LDY     #$00
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; draw mode = 0 (replace)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}      ; clear last row
    PLA
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; restore draw mode
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}SCROLL{\_}UP}}{HRCG:unSCROLL:unUP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-3BFU66GGK7UPL2BKGUKUAF772A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{374}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{375}This chunk contains the screen-clearing family of routines, all built on
top of {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE\nwendquote}.  {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}HOME\nwendquote} sets the cursor to the top-left
corner of the text window and clears the entire window.
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}CLRLINE\nwendquote} clears from the current row to the bottom of the window.
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}CLREOL\nwendquote} clears from the cursor position to the end of the current
line.

{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE\nwendquote} is the shared workhorse: it fills a single text row
(8~scan lines) starting at a given column.  The fill value is
{\Tt{}HRCG{\_}MASK\nwendquote}---normally {\Tt{}{\$}00\nwendquote} (black), but {\Tt{}{\$}7F\nwendquote} when inverse video is
active, producing a white bar.  In OR or XOR draw modes, the fill
operation reads the existing screen content and combines it with the mask,
allowing selective clearing without disturbing the other hi-res page.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{376}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg home clr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9716
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_HOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_HOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}
; --- Set cursor to top-left and clear screen ---
    LDA     $22                 ; WNDTOP
    STA     $25                 ; CV = WNDTOP
    LDY     #$00
    STY     $24                 ; CH = 0
    BEQ     .clear_entry        ; always -> fall into clear loop
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}: clear from current row to bottom ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    LDY     $24                 ; preserve CH for fill start column
    LDA     $25                 ; CV = starting row
.clear_entry:
    PHA                         ; save row
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}      ; clear this row
    PLA
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; next row
    CMP     $23                 ; >= WNDBTM?
    LDY     #$00                ; fill from column 0 for next rows
    BCC     .clear_entry        ; continue loop
    RTS
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}: clear from cursor to end of line ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    LDY     $24                 ; start column = CH
    LDA     $25                 ; current row = CV
; --- \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}: fill one row ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_FILL_LINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}:
    STY     $EE                 ; save start column
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1} ; calc hi-res addr for row A
    LDX     #$07                ; 8 scan lines
.fill_byte:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; fill byte (mask value)
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; check draw mode
    BPL     .write              ; replace mode -> write directly
    LDA     $2A                 ; compute alt-page address
    STA     $EC
    LDA     $2B
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_PAGE_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}
    STA     $ED
    LDA     ($EC),Y             ; read existing screen byte
    BIT     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_DRAW_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}      ; check draw mode again
    BVC     .write              ; OR mode -> skip XOR
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}           ; XOR with mask
.write:
    STA     ($2A),Y             ; write to screen
    INY                         ; next column
    CPY     $21                 ; >= WNDWDTH?
    BCC     .fill_byte          ; no -> continue
    DEX                         ; next scan line
    BMI     .fill_done          ; all 8 done -> return
    LDY     $EE                 ; reset column to start
    LDA     $2B                 ; advance to next scan line
    CLC
    ADC     #$04
    STA     $2B
    BNE     .fill_byte          ; always -> continue
.fill_done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLREOL}}{HRCG:unCLREOL}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CLRLINE}}{HRCG:unCLRLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}FILL{\_}LINE}}{HRCG:unFILL:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}HOME}}{HRCG:unHOME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}DRAW{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unDRAW:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}PAGE{\_}MASK}}{HRCG:unPAGE:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-UZQ5C7OALHECO5ZDT3D4CLGANE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{377}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{378}Every character rendering and screen clearing operation needs to convert a
text row number into a hi-res screen address.  {\Tt{}HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}
performs this conversion.  The Apple II hi-res screen has a notoriously
non-linear address layout---consecutive text rows do not map to consecutive
memory addresses.  The HRCG solves this with a 12-entry lookup table
({\Tt{}HRCG{\_}ROW{\_}TABLE\nwendquote}) indexed by row/2, combined with bit manipulation to
encode the row's position within the hi-res page.

The computation works as follows: the row is divided by~2 (the carry from the
{\Tt{}LSR\nwendquote} is preserved for later), the quotient mod~4 selects which {\Tt{}{\$}0400\nwendquote}
group the row falls in, and the table provides the base offset ({\Tt{}{\$}00\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}{\$}50\nwendquote}, or {\Tt{}{\$}A0\nwendquote}).  The saved carry bit (odd vs.\ even row) is rotated
back in via {\Tt{}ROR\nwendquote} to set bit~7 of the low byte, and {\Tt{}WNDLFT\nwendquote} is added
to account for the left margin.

The 20~trailing bytes after the table are of unknown purpose---they may be
residual data from the HRCG development environment or unused padding.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{379}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}}}\moddef{hrcg calc addr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $9771
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
; --- Compute hi-res screen address from CV ---
; Input: ZP $25 (CV)   Output: $2A/$2B
    LDA     $25              ; CV (cursor Y)
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_CALC_HIRES_ROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
; --- Alternate entry: row in A ---
    LSR                      ; A = row / 2
    TAX                      ; X = row / 2 (table index)
    AND     #$03             ; A = (row/2) % 4
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_VIDEO_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JWX7CT4WOB5LYHFYYVPU6PLTRQ000000-1}  ; combine with page base ($20/$40)
    STA     $2B              ; screen high byte
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ROW_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1},X ; row base from table
    ROR                      ; rotate carry from LSR into bit 7
    ADC     $20              ; + WNDLFT
    STA     $2A              ; screen low byte
    RTS
; --- Row address table (12 entries) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_ROW_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
    HEX     00 00 00 00 50 50 50 50 A0 A0 A0 A0
; --- Trailing data (20 bytes, purpose unknown) ---
\nwlinkedidentc{HRCG_TRAILING_DATA}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}:
    HEX     B9 A2 A0 D2 E9 A0 F2 A0 A5 B9 C1 80 C4 CD A0 8C
    HEX     A0 AC A0 A0
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ROW{\_}TABLE}}{HRCG:unROW:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}TRAILING{\_}DATA}}{HRCG:unTRAILING:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ADDR}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}CALC{\_}HIRES{\_}ROW}}{HRCG:unCALC:unHIRES:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}ROW{\_}TABLE}}{HRCG:unROW:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}TRAILING{\_}DATA}}{HRCG:unTRAILING:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HRCG{\_}VIDEO{\_}MODE}}{HRCG:unVIDEO:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-IDZMYRN5PEIYMKJEGBTYVO3UN4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{380}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Text and Display Primitives}

The {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} routine prints a Pascal-style string (length first),
from an address stored in {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}, at the current cursor
position.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{381}{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} stores the X and Y registers into
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} as a 16-bit string pointer, then falls through to
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote}.  This provides a convenient entry point for callers that
pass the string address in registers rather than pre-loading the zero-page
pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{382}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}}}\moddef{print string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7758
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_AT_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}

    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1

    ; falls through to \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2} at $775C
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unAT:unADDR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{383}\nwdocspar
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} prints a length-prefixed string from
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote} via COUT.
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}AT{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}7758\nwendquote} stores {\Tt{}X/Y\nwendquote} into
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote} first, then falls through.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{384}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}}}\moddef{print string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-1}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $775C
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}

    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y ; first byte = length
    TAX
.loop:
    DEX
    BPL     .next
    RTS                           ; done

.next:
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y ; read next char
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    JMP     .loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{385}\nwdocspar
Sends Ctrl-A and {\Tt{}'0'\nwendquote} to COUT (selects character set~0 in the HRCG):

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{386}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}}}\moddef{print ctrl ab~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $774E
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}

    LDA     #$81 ; Ctrl-A with high bit
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$B0 ; '0' with high bit
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{387}\nwdocspar
Outputs Ctrl-N (normal video mode) to the Apple~II character output
routine via {\Tt{}COUT1\nwendquote}.  {\Tt{}{\$}8E\nwendquote} is {\Tt{}Ctrl-N\nwendquote} with the high bit set.
This is distinct from {\Tt{}SET{\_}NORMAL{\_}VIDEO\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}75F9\nwendquote} which uses
{\Tt{}COUT\nwendquote} instead.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{388}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}}}\moddef{print ctrl n~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7735
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}

    LDA     #$8E      ; Ctrl-N with high bit
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4} ; output via COUT1
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{389}\nwdocspar
Ali Baba provides several convenience routines which translate to HRCG control codes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{390}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}}}\moddef{control routines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7730
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_INVERSE_VIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_INVERSE_VIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}

    LDA     #$89        ; ctrl-I
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO}}{SET:unINVERSE:unVIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO}}{SET:unINVERSE:unVIDEO}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{391}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{392}Two more convenience wrappers set the text window behavior.
{\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP\nwendquote} sends ctrl-O (next-shifted) followed by ctrl-W
(shifted: enable wrap mode), so that text reaching the bottom of the window
wraps to the top instead of scrolling.  {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL\nwendquote} sends
ctrl-O followed by ctrl-S (shifted: clear wrap flag), restoring normal scroll
behavior.  These are used when switching between the status area (which
scrolls) and the map area (which wraps or is managed manually).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{393}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}}}\moddef{text window routines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $773A
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}

    LDA     #$8F ; ctrl-O
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$97 ; ctrl-W
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}

\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_SCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_SCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}

    LDA     #$8F ; ctrl-O
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDA     #$93 ; ctrl-S
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}

; \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1} (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}) follows at $774E, defined in its own chunk

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{394}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{395}The game screen is divided into an upper map area and a lower status/input
area.  These routines set the text window's top-left corner via the HRCG's
ctrl-V command.  {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT{\_}ALL\nwendquote} sets the window to start
at row~0, giving access to the full screen.
{\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT{\_}LOW\nwendquote} sets it to row~21, confining output to the
bottom three rows used for status messages and player input.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{396}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}}}\moddef{set text window upper left~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $792D
SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_ALL:
    SUBROUTINE SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_ALL

    LDA     #0
    JMP     SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT

SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_LOW:
    LDA     #21

    ; fall through

SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT:

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$96        ; ctrl-V (set text window upper left)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-OXIPRPQDVXIXW2PIGG6KVKJHQM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{397}\nwdocspar
\label{sec:set_text_window}

These two routines share the same code; they differ only in the
window-bottom value loaded in~A.  The BNE at {\Tt{}{\$}76C0\nwendquote} forms a
``stretchy branch'' that skips the {\Tt{}LDA\ {\textbackslash}{\#}{\$}14\nwendquote}, so both entry points
share all code from {\Tt{}{\$}76C4\nwendquote} onward.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{398}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}}}\moddef{set text window bottom~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $76BE
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}

    LDA     #$15     ; WNDBTM = 21
    BNE     .shared  ; always taken (stretchy branch)

\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}:
    LDA     #$14     ; WNDBTM = 20

.shared:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4} ; WNDLFT = 0
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    LDA     #$86     ; Ctrl-F with high bit
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{399}\nwdocspar
Since text on the lower part always starts at row 21, and the column number only
needs 6 bits, we can specify a compressed 8-bit version of the cursor, where the
row number can be specified by upper two bits (so 20 through 23).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{400}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}}}\moddef{set cursor compressed~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $776E
SET_CURSOR_COMPRESSED:
    SUBROUTINE SET_CURSOR_COMPRESSED

    PHA
    AND     #$3F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    PLA
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    LSR
    CLC
    ADC     #20
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    RTS
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-BKMVQ6YHAC7PH5XKRWHNWGIJPU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{401}\nwdocspar
The {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote} centers text on row 23, which is the bottom of
the screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{402}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}}}\moddef{print bottom centered~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7705
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}

    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CENTERED_PLUS_COL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{403}\nwdocspar
The {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL\nwendquote} centers text, but moves it right by the
current cursor's column. If the column is zero, the routine would center the text on the screen.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{404}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}}}\moddef{print centered plus col~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7710
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CENTERED_PLUS_COL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CENTERED_PLUS_COL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}

    LDA     #40
    SEC
    LDY     #$00
    SBC     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y
    CLC
    LSR                             ; accumulator
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CENTERED{\_}PLUS{\_}COL}}{PRINT:unCENTERED:unPLUS:unCOL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-FABDTMIXI4WKO6TJCYFWWW4P4U000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{405}\nwdocspar
Converts a 16-bit unsigned value in~{\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE\nwendquote} to up to 5~ASCII
decimal digits, stored sequentially at {\Tt{}{\$}(DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR),Y{\$}\nwendquote} (with Y incrementing).
Leading zeros are suppressed unless the value is exactly zero (prints
``0'').  The output uses Apple~II high-ASCII ($\$B0$--$\$B9$).

The driver at~\$0DA1 calls the digit-extraction helper at~\$0DE1 five
times with divisors 10000, 1000, 100, 10, and~1.  The helper performs
repeated subtraction of {\Tt{}{\$}5A1C/{\$}5A1D\nwendquote} from {\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE\nwendquote}, counting
iterations as the digit value.

A second entry point at~{\Tt{}{\$}0DA4\nwendquote} (1~caller) skips the initialization
of~Y and the leading-zero flag, allowing the caller to control the
starting output position and suppression behavior.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{406}{\Tt{}NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL\nwendquote} converts a 16-bit value in {\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}BC/{\$}BD\nwendquote})
to a decimal ASCII string stored at {\Tt{}DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}BA/{\$}BB\nwendquote}).  It
divides repeatedly by powers of ten (10000, 1000, 100, 10, 1), accumulating
each digit in {\Tt{}NUM{\_}DIGIT\nwendquote} and writing it to the output buffer.
{\Tt{}NUM{\_}LEADING\nwendquote} suppresses leading zeros: it starts at~0 (suppress) and
flips to~1 after the first nonzero digit.  {\Tt{}NUM{\_}DIVISOR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}5A1C/{\$}5A1D\nwendquote})
holds the current power-of-ten divisor.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{407}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         EQU     $5A1E   ; leading-zero suppress flag (0=suppress, 1=print)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         EQU     $5A1C   ; 16-bit divisor for decimal conversion (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}           EQU     $5A1B   ; current digit accumulator (ASCII $B0-$B9)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{408}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{409}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DECIMAL_OUT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}         EQU     $BA     ; num-to-decimal output buffer pointer (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}               EQU     $BC     ; 16-bit numeric value for division (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR}}{DECIMAL:unOUT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR}}{DECIMAL:unOUT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{410}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{411}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}}}\moddef{num to decimal~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0DA1
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}

    LDY     #$00                ; output index = 0
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ; leading-zero flag = 0 (suppress)
\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL_CONT}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}:
    LDA     #$10                ; \\  divisor = $2710 = 10000
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ;  |
    LDA     #$27                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1       ; /
    JSR     .extract_digit      ; ten-thousands digit
    LDA     #$E8                ; \\  divisor = $03E8 = 1000
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ;  |
    LDA     #$03                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1       ; /
    JSR     .extract_digit      ; thousands digit
    LDA     #$64                ; \\  divisor = $0064 = 100
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ;  |
    LDA     #$00                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1       ; /
    JSR     .extract_digit      ; hundreds digit
    LDA     #$0A                ; \\  divisor = $000A = 10
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ; /  (high byte already 0)
    JSR     .extract_digit      ; tens digit
    LDA     #$01                ; \\  divisor = $0001 = 1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ; /  force output (no suppress)
    JSR     .extract_digit      ; ones digit
    RTS

; --- Digit extraction helper ($0DE1) ---
; Divides \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1 by $5A1C/$5A1D via repeated subtraction.
; Stores ASCII digit at (\nwlinkedidentc{DECIMAL_OUT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}),Y. Suppresses leading zeros.
.extract_digit:
    LDA     #$B0                ; digit = '0' (high ASCII)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}
.cmp_loop:
    LDX     #$01                ; start comparing high byte
.cmp_x:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8},X         ; \\
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11},X       ;  | compare \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1 with divisor
    BCC     .output             ;  | if less, done (digit found)
    BNE     .subtract           ; /  if greater, subtract
    DEX                         ; \\  high bytes equal: check low
    BNE     .subtract           ; /  (if X was 1, now 0 -> recompare)
    JMP     .cmp_x              ;    compare low byte (X=0)
.subtract:
    SEC                         ; \\
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}           ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1 -= divisor
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}           ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1         ;  |
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}+1       ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1         ; /
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}           ; digit++
    JMP     .cmp_loop           ; try again (reset X=1)
.output:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_DIGIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}           ; \\
    BANE    #$B0,.store         ; |   and leading-zero suppress active
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ;  |   skip output
    BANE    #$01,.skip          ; /
    LDA     #$B0                ; (reload '0' for final digit)
.store:
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{DECIMAL_OUT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}),Y ; store digit at output buffer
    LDA     #$01                ; \\  clear leading-zero suppress
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_LEADING}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}         ; /  (first nonzero digit seen)
.skip:
    INY                         ; advance output index
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL{\_}CONT}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL:unCONT}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL{\_}CONT}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL:unCONT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR}}{DECIMAL:unOUT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DECIMAL{\_}OUT{\_}PTR}}{DECIMAL:unOUT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIGIT}}{NUM:unDIGIT}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}DIVISOR}}{NUM:unDIVISOR}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}LEADING}}{NUM:unLEADING}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{412}\nwdocspar
Displays a message from the game's message table.  Takes the message
index in~A.  The message table base address is stored at
{\Tt{}{\$}4005/{\$}4006\nwendquote}; each entry is a length-prefixed string.  The routine
walks the table to find the Xth entry, then displays up to three lines
in the status window.

The display behavior depends on the line number:
\begin{itemize}
  \item Line~1 ({\Tt{}MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}~=~0): calls {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote}, then scrolls.
  \item Line~2 ({\Tt{}MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}~=~1): scrolls first, then prints.
  \item Line~3+: scrolls, prints, then calls {\Tt{}{\$}0D10\nwendquote} (delay) and {\Tt{}{\$}774E\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB\nwendquote}) before looping back.
\end{itemize}

An entry with a zero length byte terminates the message.  If exactly
two lines were printed, a final scroll is performed on exit.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{413}{\Tt{}DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE\nwendquote} indexes into the message table at {\Tt{}MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
({\Tt{}{\$}4005/{\$}4006\nwendquote}) to find the string for message number~A.  It walks the
table by skipping length-prefixed entries until the desired index is
reached.  {\Tt{}MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} tracks how many lines have been printed so
far, which controls whether the routine scrolls before or after printing.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{414}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-11}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MSG_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}           EQU     $4005   ; message table base (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}          EQU     $5A57   ; lines printed so far
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{415}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{416}The routine below implements the message display.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{417}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}}}\moddef{display message~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $761E
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}

    TAX                           ; X = message index
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}         ; load table base into \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}        ; reset line counter

    JMP     .check_index          ; skip to index check

.skip_entry:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y ; get string length
    TAY
    SEC                           ; +1 for length byte itself
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}     ; advance pointer past this entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    ADC     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    \nwlinkedidentc{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-21}    #$00,.skip_entry      ; no -- keep skipping within group
.next_index:
    DEX
.check_index:
    BXNE    #$00,.skip_entry      ; more entries to skip

\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}:
.print_loop:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y ; get length of current string
    BNE     .has_text             ; nonzero -- print it

    ; length is zero -- message is done
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}
    BAEQ    #$02,.final_scroll    ; printed exactly 2 lines?
    RTS                           ; otherwise just return
.final_scroll:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}    ; scroll once more and return

.has_text:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}
    CMP     #$01
    BMI     .first_line           ; line_count < 1: first line
    BEQ     .second_line          ; line_count == 1: second line

    ; third+ line: scroll, then print
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}    ; scroll status window
.second_line:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1} ; print centered on row 23
    JMP     .advance

.first_line:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1} ; print centered on row 23
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}    ; scroll status window

.advance:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    SEC
    ADC     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y ; add length + 1 (SEC sets carry)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    ADC     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    LDA     #$01
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MSG_LINE_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}        ; printed <= 1 lines?
    BCC     .pause                ; no -- need to pause
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y ; peek at next entry
    BNE     .print_loop           ; more text -- keep printing

.pause:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}  ; delay
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}         ; reset character set
    JMP     .print_loop           ; continue with next line
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MSG{\_}LINE{\_}COUNT}}{MSG:unLINE:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MSG{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{MSG:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{418}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{419}{\Tt{}SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE\nwendquote} restores the HRCG text window to its default
configuration after a status message.  It sets the window to scroll mode,
positions the cursor at row~23, outputs control character~\$83 (which
triggers a scroll-up in the HRCG handler), and then resets the window
boundaries.  This sequence effectively clears the bottom status area while
preserving the rest of the display.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{420}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}}}\moddef{scroll status line~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $769B
\nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    ; Text display: init HRCG, set window bottom, output char $83, reset
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_SCROLL}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}
    JSR     SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_LOW
    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}             ; cursor to row 23
    LDA     #$83
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    JSR     SET_TEXT_WINDOW_UPPER_LEFT_ALL
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_WRAP}{PYNWmai0-EHZCOCB645ZK3OSTF2WDCACMRM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}SCROLL}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unSCROLL}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}WRAP}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unWRAP}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{421}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Sound}

The {\Tt{}TONE{\_}RANDOMIZE{\_}MASK\nwendquote} is initially set to 1 to apply a little bit of
randomness to the song notes. However, this can be set to {\Tt{}00\nwendquote} via opcode {\Tt{}NORAND\nwendquote}
to play exact notes, or set to {\Tt{}0F\nwendquote} via opcode {\Tt{}HIRAND\nwendquote} to provide high
randomness.

\begin{table}[]
\begin{tabular}{llll}
\multicolumn{1}{c}{Byte} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{Opcode} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{Argument} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{Operation} \\
{\Tt{}1F\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}MARK2\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR\ <-\ IP+1\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}20\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}MARK1\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR\ <-\ IP+1\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}21\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}GOTO1\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}IP\ <-\ SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}22\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}LOW\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}ROUTINE{\_}ADDR\ <-\ tone\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}23\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}HIGH\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}ROUTINE{\_}ADDR\ <-\ high{\_}tone\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}24\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}END\nwendquote} & none & Ends the song routine \\
{\Tt{}25\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}HIRAND\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}RANDOMIZE{\_}MASK\ <-\ 0F\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}26\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}NORAND\nwendquote} & none & {\Tt{}TONE{\_}RANDOMIZE{\_}MASK\ <-\ 00\nwendquote} \\
{\Tt{}27-FF\nwendquote} & {\Tt{}NOTE\nwendquote} & duration & Plays note \\
\end{tabular}
\caption{Song program opcodes}
\label{table:song}
\end{table}

Playing a tone involves accessing the speaker address twice per audio cycle.
The {\Tt{}tone\nwendquote} routine delays {\Tt{}10X+31\nwendquote} cycles between speaker accesses, and
based on an average Apple II cycle time of {\Tt{}0.98\nwendquote} microseconds, this means
that the frequency of the note played will be equal to {\Tt{}510204\ /\ (10X+31)\nwendquote} Hz.
See \href{https://6502disassembly.com/a2-rom/}{The Oft Misunderstood WAIT} for a derivation of average cycle time.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{422}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}}}\moddef{tone~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}

    LDY      #$0A          ; 2 cycles

.outer_loop:
    LDA      SPKR          ; 4 cycles

.inner_loop:
    ROL      DAT_00e3      ; 5 cycles
    DEX                    ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .inner_loop   ; 3 cycles

    LDX      note_freq     ; 3 cycles
    ROL      DAT_00e3      ; 5 cycles
    ROR      DAT_00e3      ; 5 cycles
    NOP                    ; 3 cycles
    NOP                    ; 3 cycles
    NOP                    ; 3 cycles
    DEY                    ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .outer_loop   ; 3 cycles

    DEC      note_duration ; 5 cycles
    BNE      \nwlinkedidentc{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}          ; 3 cycles
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{tone}}{tone}{PYNWmai0-6MB7TIK43W7I5YBJMUI2RMCLGA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{tone}}{tone}}}\nwnotused{tone}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{423}\nwdocspar
The {\Tt{}high{\_}tone\nwendquote} routine does the same thing, but with shorter delays.
The frequency of the note played by {\Tt{}high{\_}tone\nwendquote} will be equal to
{\Tt{}510204\ /\ (5X+12)\nwendquote} Hz.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{424}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}}}\moddef{high tone~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{high_tone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{high_tone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}

    LDY      #$0A          ; 2 cycles

.outer_loop:
    LDA      SPKR          ; 4 cycles

.inner_loop:
    DEX                    ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .inner_loop   ; 3 cycles

    LDX      note_freq     ; 3 cycles
    DEY                    ; 2 cycles
    BNE      .outer_loop   ; 3 cycles

    DEC      note_duration ; 5 cycles
    BNE      \nwlinkedidentc{high_tone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}     ; 3 cycles
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{high{\_}tone}}{high:untone}{PYNWmai0-UIZGU6YNKDK4XWBDBMWRAWBZIY000000-1}\eatline
