\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{high{\_}tone}}{high:untone}}}\nwnotused{high tone}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{425}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{426}{\Tt{}PLAY{\_}TONE\nwendquote} generates a square wave tone by toggling the Apple~II
speaker at {\Tt{}{\$}C030\nwendquote}.  The outer loop runs 10~iterations (Y), each toggling
the speaker then delaying by~X cycles.  After all 10~toggles, the whole
sequence repeats {\Tt{}SOUND{\_}DURATION\nwendquote} times.  {\Tt{}SOUND{\_}FREQ\nwendquote} controls the
pitch (higher value = lower frequency).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{427}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_FREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}              EQU     $E1     ; sound frequency / script modified action
\nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}          EQU     $E2     ; sound duration / script parameter byte
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{428}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{429}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}}}\moddef{play tone~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7A7F
\nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}

.outer:
    LDY     #$0A           ; 10 speaker toggles per cycle
.toggle:
    LDA     $C030          ; toggle speaker
    DEX
    BNE     .toggle        ; inner delay loop
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_FREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}     ; reload pitch counter
    DEY
    BNE     .toggle        ; next toggle
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9} ; repeat whole cycle
    BNE     .outer
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{430}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{431}{\Tt{}PLAY{\_}NOISE\nwendquote} generates noise by toggling the speaker while rotating
{\Tt{}NOISE{\_}SHIFT\nwendquote}, a zero-page shift register.  The ROL/ROR pair with the
speaker read creates pseudo-random bit patterns that produce a ``hiss''
or explosion-like sound.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{432}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{NOISE_SHIFT}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}             EQU     $E3     ; noise generator shift register
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NOISE{\_}SHIFT}}{NOISE:unSHIFT}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{NOISE{\_}SHIFT}}{NOISE:unSHIFT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{433}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{434}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}}}\moddef{play noise~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7A91
\nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}

.outer:
    LDY     #$0A           ; 10 toggles per cycle
.toggle:
    LDA     $C030          ; toggle speaker
    ROL     \nwlinkedidentc{NOISE_SHIFT}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}    ; rotate shift register left
    DEX
    BNE     .toggle        ; inner delay loop
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_FREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}     ; reload pitch counter
    ROL     \nwlinkedidentc{NOISE_SHIFT}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}    ; \\ rotate left then right =
    ROR     \nwlinkedidentc{NOISE_SHIFT}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}    ; / feedback from carry bit
    NOP                    ; \\
    NOP                    ;  | timing padding
    NOP                    ; /
    DEY
    BNE     .toggle        ; next toggle
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9} ; repeat whole cycle
    BNE     .outer
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{NOISE{\_}SHIFT}}{NOISE:unSHIFT}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NOISE{\_}SHIFT}}{NOISE:unSHIFT}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{435}\nwdocspar

frequencies, the values get so low that they differ only by one, which means the
notes aren't very accurate.

\label{table:tones}

We run into an issue when we look at the song table for the splash screen. The
very first note played is low {\Tt{}3F\nwendquote}. This is closest to {\Tt{}G5\nwendquote}, although it
results in a frequency of {\Tt{}771.9\nwendquote} Hz, which is less accurate than the {\Tt{}783.7\nwendquote} Hz
that would be given by {\Tt{}3F\nwendquote}. In fact, all the low tones are off by a bit,
unless we assume that the programmer erred, thinking that the low tones were
just one octave below the high tones. In that case, we should just use the high
tone table and subtract one octave for the low tones.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{436}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}}}\moddef{song table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2J5GFOS7BQMCUPTS3GOLUMOYEM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup

    TONE 50, 0C ; Eb5 @  97ms

\chapter{Utility Routines}


\section{Random number generation}

The pseudo-random number generator computes:
$$\texttt{val}_{n+1} = 69 \cdot \texttt{val}_n + \$53 \pmod{256}$$
and stores both the full result and a shifted copy.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{438}{\Tt{}STEP{\_}PRNG\nwendquote} maintains three state variables: {\Tt{}PRNG{\_}STATE\nwendquote} holds the
full LCG state, {\Tt{}PRNG{\_}TEMP\nwendquote} is a scratch byte used during the $69\times$
multiplication, and {\Tt{}PRNG{\_}OUTPUT\nwendquote} receives the state shifted right by one
bit---this is the value most callers test for random decisions.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{439}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-12}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}          EQU     $5A19   ; PRNG full state: val = 69*val + $53 (mod 256)
\nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_TEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}           EQU     $5A1A   ; PRNG temporary for multiplication
\nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}         EQU     $5A18   ; PRNG output (state >> 1), used for random tests
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{440}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{441}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}}}\moddef{step prng~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $78A8
\nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}  ; val
    ASL                 ; val*2
    ASL                 ; val*4
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_TEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}   ; temp = val*4
    ASL                 ; val*8
    ASL                 ; val*16
    ASL                 ; val*32
    ASL                 ; val*64
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_TEMP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}   ; val*64 + val*4 = val*68
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}  ; val*68 + val = val*69
    CLC
    ADC     #$53        ; + $53
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}  ; store full result
    LSR                 ; val >> 1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13} ; shifted copy (used for random tests)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}STATE}}{PRNG:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}TEMP}}{PRNG:unTEMP}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{442}\nwdocspar
Two shifts produce {\Tt{}val*4\nwendquote}, saved to {\Tt{}PRNG{\_}TEMP\nwendquote}.  Four more shifts give
{\Tt{}val*64\nwendquote}.  Adding {\Tt{}val*4\nwendquote} gives {\Tt{}val*68\nwendquote}, then adding {\Tt{}val\nwendquote} gives
{\Tt{}val*69\nwendquote}.  Adding {\Tt{}{\$}53\nwendquote} completes the LCG step.  This is a linear
congruential generator with multiplier 69, increment \$53, and modulus 256.

Returns a uniform random integer in {\Tt{}0..A{\$}-{\$}1\nwendquote} using rejection sampling.
The routine finds the smallest bitmask that covers the range, then repeatedly
calls {\Tt{}STEP{\_}PRNG\nwendquote} and masks {\Tt{}PRNG{\_}OUTPUT\nwendquote} until the result is less than
or equal to the shifted limit.  This avoids modulo bias.

Input: A~=~range limit (1--127).  If A~=~0, returns~0 immediately.
Output: A~=~random value in {\Tt{}0..limit{\$}-{\$}1\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{443}{\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} saves the limit in {\Tt{}RNG{\_}LIMIT\nwendquote} and computes a
bitmask in {\Tt{}RNG{\_}MASK\nwendquote} that covers the range.  It then loops, calling
{\Tt{}STEP{\_}PRNG\nwendquote} and masking {\Tt{}PRNG{\_}OUTPUT\nwendquote} with {\Tt{}RNG{\_}MASK\nwendquote}, rejecting
values that exceed the limit.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{444}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}           EQU     $5A11   ; random_in_range temporary (limit/shift count)
\nwlinkedidentc{RNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}            EQU     $5A12   ; random_in_range bit mask
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}}\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{445}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{446}The implementation below uses bit-mask tables for each power-of-two range
bracket to minimize the number of PRNG calls.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{447}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}}}\moddef{random in range~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1317
\nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; save range limit
    BANE    #$00,.nonzero
    RTS                       ; range=0 -> return 0

.nonzero:
    CMP     #$02              ; \\
    BPL     .ge2              ;  |
    LDY     #$06              ;  | range 1: mask=$40, shift=6
    LDA     #$40              ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask        ; /
.ge2:
    CMP     #$04              ; \\
    BPL     .ge4              ;  |
    LDY     #$05              ;  | range 2-3: mask=$60, shift=5
    LDA     #$60              ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask        ; /
.ge4:
    CMP     #$08              ; \\
    BPL     .ge8              ;  |
    LDY     #$04              ;  | range 4-7: mask=$70, shift=4
    LDA     #$70              ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask        ; /
.ge8:
    CMP     #$10              ; \\
    BPL     .ge16             ;  |
    LDY     #$03              ;  | range 8-15: mask=$78, shift=3
    LDA     #$78              ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask        ; /
.ge16:
    CMP     #$20              ; \\
    BPL     .ge32             ;  |
    LDY     #$02              ;  | range 16-31: mask=$7C, shift=2
    LDA     #$7C              ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask        ; /
.ge32:
    CMP     #$40              ; \\
    BPL     .ge64             ;  |
    LDY     #$01              ;  | range 32-63: mask=$7E, shift=1
    LDA     #$7E              ;  |
    BNE     .have_mask        ; /
.ge64:
    LDY     #$00              ; range 64-127: mask=$7F, shift=0
    LDA     #$7F

.have_mask:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ; save bit mask
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; reload range limit
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; save shift count in \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}
.shift_loop:
    DEY                       ; \\
    BMI     .shifted          ;  | shift limit left by (shift count)
    CLC                       ;  | positions so it aligns with the
    ROL                       ;  | mask bits
    BNE     .shift_loop       ; /
.shifted:
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; Y = shift count
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}         ; save shifted limit

.sample:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}         ; get next random byte
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    AND     \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}          ; mask to relevant bits
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{RNG_LIMIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14},.accept ; equal -> accept
    BPL     .sample           ; greater -> reject, retry

.accept:
    DEY                       ; \\
    BPL     .shift_right      ;  | shift result right by (shift count)
    RTS                       ;  | to recover the final value
.shift_right:
    CLC                       ;  |
    ROR                       ;  |
    BCC     .accept           ; / (always taken: masked bit is 0)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}}\\{{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RNG{\_}LIMIT}}{RNG:unLIMIT}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RNG{\_}MASK}}{RNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{448}\nwdocspar

\section{Coordinate conversion}

Converts a packed map position (0--199) into separate column and row
values by dividing by~20.  The map is 20~columns wide, so
{\Tt{}column\ =\ pos\ mod\ 20\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}row\ =\ pos\ /\ 20\nwendquote}.

The loop repeatedly subtracts~20 (via {\Tt{}ADC\ {\textbackslash}{\#}{\$}EC\nwendquote} with carry clear,
since {\Tt{}{\$}EC\ =\ 256\ {\$}-{\$}\ 20\nwendquote}), counting iterations in~{\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}.  When the
subtraction underflows (carry clear on exit), it adds~20 back to recover
the remainder.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{449}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}}}\moddef{pos to colrow~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C25
\nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}

    LDY      #$00  ; row = 0
.loop:
    CLC
    ADC      #$EC  ; A -= 20 (unsigned)
    BCC      .done ; underflow -> remainder is negative
    INY            ; row++
    BCS      .loop ; always taken (carry set)
.done:
    ADC      #$14  ; add 20 back -> A = column (remainder)
    RTS            ; A = column (0-19), Y = row (0-9)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{450}\nwdocspar
The inverse of {\Tt{}POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}: converts a column in~A and row in~Y
to a linear map position {\Tt{}A\ =\ col\ +\ row\ *\ 20\nwendquote}.  The carry is cleared
once on entry; thereafter the loop adds~20 per row and exits early if
carry occurs (overflow past 255).


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{451}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}}}\moddef{colrow to pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D98
\nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}

    CLC
.loop:
    DEY           ; row--
    BPL     .add  ; still >= 0 -> add another 20
    RTS           ; Y exhausted, A = result
.add:
    ADC     #$14  ; A += 20
    BCC     .loop ; no overflow -> continue
                                ; carry set -> return (overflow)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{452}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{453}{\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} computes a pointer into the game data from a 1-based
index in~A.  Each record is 16~bytes.  The result {\Tt{}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
({\Tt{}{\$}BA/{\$}BB\nwendquote}) = {\Tt{}{\$}4000/{\$}4001\nwendquote} base + (index$-$1)$\times$16.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{454}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-10}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}            EQU     $BA     ; mob data record pointer (2 bytes, $BA/$BB)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{455}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{456}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}}}\moddef{get mob data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C32
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}

    CLC
    ADC     #$FF           ; A = index - 1
    ROL                    ; \\
    ROL                    ;  | rotate left 4 times
    ROL                    ;  | = multiply by 16 (with carry)
    ROL                    ; /
    TAY                    ; save intermediate
    ROL                    ; one more rotate
    AND     #$0F           ; high nybble -> page offset
    CLC
    ADC     $4001          ; add base page
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1 ; high byte
    TYA
    AND     #$F0           ; low nybble -> byte offset
    CLC
    ADC     $4000          ; add base offset
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}   ; low byte
    BCC     .done
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1 ; carry
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{457}\nwdocspar

\section{Timing and animation}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{458}{\Tt{}DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION\nwendquote} delays for a configurable duration while keeping
the status window animation running.  It loads an iteration count from
{\Tt{}DELAY{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} and calls {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} that many times.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{459}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-14}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}             EQU     $7ABF   ; number of delay iterations
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{460}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{461}The routine below implements the delay loop.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{462}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}}}\moddef{delay with animation~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D10
\nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}        ; load iteration count
.loop:
    PHA                        ; save counter
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1} ; tick animation + timed wait
    PLA                        ; restore counter
    TAY
    DEY                        ; decrement
    TYA
    BNE     .loop              ; loop until zero
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}COUNT}}{DELAY:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{463}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{464}{\Tt{}TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote} decrements {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR\nwendquote}.  When it reaches
zero, it calls {\Tt{}{\$}74CB\nwendquote} to advance the animation frame, then reloads the
wait loop count from {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE\nwendquote} (indexed by {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}INDEX\nwendquote}) into
{\Tt{}WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{465}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-15}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}          EQU     $7AAF   ; animation frame countdown
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}              EQU     $7ABD   ; current animation table index
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_WAIT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}         EQU     $7AB0   ; per-frame wait counts (indexed)
\nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}         EQU     $5A8C   ; inner wait loop counter
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{466}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{467}The routine below implements the animation tick.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{468}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}}}\moddef{tick anim counter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D1E
\nwlinkedidentc{TICK_ANIM_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{TICK_ANIM_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}

    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}    ; tick frame counter
    BNE     .reload           ; not zero -> just reload wait count
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}    ; counter hit zero -> draw alt char
.reload:
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}        ; current animation index
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_WAIT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16},X ; look up wait count for this frame
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}   ; store for timed_wait to use
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}WAIT{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unWAIT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{469}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{470}{\Tt{}ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} combines an animation tick and a timed wait.
It calls {\Tt{}TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote}, then {\Tt{}TIMED{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} to burn time.  If
the frame counter has reached zero, it calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL\nwendquote} to
restore the display and reloads {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR\nwendquote} from the frame
duration table {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE\nwendquote} (indexed by {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}INDEX\nwendquote}).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{471}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}        EQU     $7AB6   ; per-frame frame counts (indexed)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{472}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{473}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}}}\moddef{anim tick and wait~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D30
\nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TICK_ANIM_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-252H4ITL77INYHCEW5TFC3PMYE000000-1}  ; tick counter, reload wait count
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}         ; burn time
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}     ; did frame counter expire?
    BEQ     .advance           ; yes -> advance animation
    RTS                        ; no -> return

.advance:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_NORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}  ; redraw blink char in normal video
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}         ; reload animation index
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17},X ; look up frame duration
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_FRAME_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}     ; reset frame counter
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}CTR}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}FRAME{\_}TABLE}}{ANIM:unFRAME:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}INDEX}}{ANIM:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER}}{TICK:unANIM:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{474}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{475}{\Tt{}TIMED{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} calls the ROM {\Tt{}WAIT\nwendquote} wrapper {\Tt{}CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT\nwendquote}
repeatedly, decrementing {\Tt{}WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} until it reaches zero.
If the count is already zero on entry, it returns immediately.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{476}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}}}\moddef{timed wait~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D49
\nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16} ; anything to wait for?
    BNE     .wait           ; yes -> enter wait loop
    RTS                     ; no -> return immediately

.wait:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALL_ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}   ; delay one unit
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16} ; decrement counter
    BNE     .wait           ; loop until zero
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{477}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{478}{\Tt{}CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} loads the wait duration from {\Tt{}WAIT{\_}DURATION\nwendquote} and
tail-calls the Apple~II ROM {\Tt{}WAIT\nwendquote} routine ({\Tt{}ROM{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}FCA8\nwendquote}),
which delays for approximately $A \times 2.5 + 13.5$ microseconds.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{479}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-17}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}                EQU     $FCA8   ; Apple II ROM WAIT routine
\nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}           EQU     $7AAD   ; ROM WAIT duration parameter
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{480}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{481}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{call rom wait~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D58
\nwlinkedidentc{CALL_ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CALL_ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18} ; load duration parameter
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}      ; tail-call ROM WAIT
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CALL{\_}ROM{\_}WAIT}}{CALL:unROM:unWAIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}WAIT}}{ROM:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}DURATION}}{WAIT:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-NSI5UN2SREUW3YMCOFD6FHUKNQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{482}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{483}{\Tt{}DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE\nwendquote} provides a timing delay appropriate to the current
display mode.  It checks {\Tt{}PLAY{\_}TONE\nwendquote}: if the byte is~\$60 (an RTS opcode,
used as a ``sound disabled'' sentinel), it calls {\Tt{}DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION\nwendquote} for
a longer pause with blinking; otherwise it calls {\Tt{}ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} for a
shorter animation step.  This keeps the game's pacing consistent whether sound
is enabled or not.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{484}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}}}\moddef{dispatch on mode~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1F0C
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
; Dispatches on \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}: if $60 (RTS) then \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1} else \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$60,.mode_60
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
.mode_60:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{485}\nwdocspar

\section{Field utilities}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{486}{\Tt{}CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD\nwendquote} ensures that byte~6 of the record at {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
({\Tt{}{\$}F4/{\$}F5\nwendquote}) has its lower 6~bits at least as large as byte~5's lower
5~bits.  If byte~6 is smaller, its low bits are replaced with byte~5's
value (preserving byte~6's top 2~bits).  This clamps a stat floor---
likely ensuring current HP does not fall below a minimum derived from
another field.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{487}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}                 EQU     $F4     ; mob data pointer (2 bytes, $F4/$F5)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{488}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{489}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}}}\moddef{clamp char field~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0A93
\nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}

    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y ; byte 5 of record
    AND     #$1F        ; low 5 bits = minimum
    STA     $BA
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y ; byte 6 of record
    AND     #$3F        ; low 6 bits = current value
    CMP     $BA
    BCC     .clamp      ; current < minimum -> clamp
    RTS                 ; current >= minimum -> done
.clamp:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y ; reload byte 6
    AND     #$C0        ; preserve top 2 bits
    ORA     $BA         ; set low bits to minimum
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{490}\nwdocspar
The scene loop calls {\Tt{}{\$}A478\nwendquote} (a resident routine from EALDR, still in
memory at {\Tt{}{\$}A000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}BFFF\nwendquote}) each iteration to check for user input.
If carry is set (key pressed), the loop exits.  Otherwise, it displays
the status bar, renders the scene text from {\Tt{}{\$}5C00\nwendquote}, runs script \#3
(the attract animation at {\Tt{}{\$}A300\nwendquote}), and checks {\Tt{}{\$}5CFF\nwendquote} for a scene
transition.

The {\Tt{}{\$}5C00\nwendquote} region is populated dynamically by {\Tt{}LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA\nwendquote}
from disk.  Its contents change with each scene.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{491}{\Tt{}SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS\nwendquote} save and restore four
zero-page pointer pairs to/from fixed addresses in the {\Tt{}{\$}5A00\nwendquote} page.
The saved pairs are {\Tt{}{\$}BC/{\$}BD\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}TARGET{\_}REC\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}),
{\Tt{}{\$}F8/{\$}F9\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}), {\Tt{}{\$}BE/{\$}BF\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote}), and
{\Tt{}{\$}F4/{\$}F5\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}).  These pointers are heavily aliased---the same
zero-page bytes serve different roles in different routines---so saving
and restoring them is necessary when entering nested operations like
scene loading or disk I/O.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{492}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-18}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}            EQU     $5A9A   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5} (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}            EQU     $5A9C   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1} pointer (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}            EQU     $5A9E   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16} (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}            EQU     $5AA0   ; saved \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12} pointer (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{493}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{494}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}\nwenddeflinemarkup

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{498}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}}}\moddef{save zp pointers~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6D53
\nwlinkedidentc{SAVE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SAVE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F4}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{499}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{500}{\Tt{}RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS\nwendquote} is the inverse: it copies the saved values back
into zero page, restoring the caller's pointer context after a scene loop
or other operation that may have clobbered them.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{501}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}}}\moddef{restore zp pointers~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6D7C
\nwlinkedidentc{RESTORE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RESTORE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_F8}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVED_BE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BC}}{SAVED:unBC}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}BE}}{SAVED:unBE}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F4}}{SAVED:unF4}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVED{\_}F8}}{SAVED:unF8}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{502}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Game Data}


\section{Character and location records}

Computes a pointer to a character record from a 1-based index in~A.
Each character record is 9~bytes, stored sequentially starting at {\Tt{}{\$}4000\nwendquote}.
Returns {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC+1\ =\ {\$}4000\ +\ A\ {\$}{\textbackslash}times{\$}\ 9\nwendquote}.  If A~=~0, returns
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC+1\ =\ {\$}4000\nwendquote} immediately (index 0 is the base/header record).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{503}{\Tt{}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote} is a 2-byte zero-page pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}BE/{\$}BF\nwendquote} that holds the
result of {\Tt{}GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD\nwendquote}.  The routine below computes
$4000 + \text{index} \times 9$ and stores the address in {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote},
giving the caller a pointer to the selected character's 9-byte record.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{504}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}                EQU     $BE     ; character record pointer from \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1} (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{505}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{506}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}}}\moddef{get char record~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1053
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}

    TAX                ; X = index (loop counter)
    LDA     #$00       ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}   ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}/\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1 = $4000 (base)
    LDA     #$40       ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1 ; /
.loop:
    DEX
    BPL     .advance   ; more records to skip
    RTS                ; done: \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}/\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1 points to record
.advance:
    CLC                ; \\
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}   ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}/\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1 += 9
    ADC     #$09       ;  | (9 bytes per record)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}   ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1 ;  |
    ADC     #$00       ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1 ; /
    BNE     .loop      ; always taken ($BF >= $40)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{507}\nwdocspar
Location data and character data share the same 9-byte record table at
{\Tt{}{\$}4000\nwendquote}.  {\Tt{}GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD\nwendquote} indexes into this table (index~$\times$~9
+ \$4000).  Record~0 at \$4000 is a header; records~1--62 are the actual
entries.  {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}DATA\nwendquote} points to record~1 (\$4009).

Each record is 9~bytes:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{cll}
\textbf{Offset} & \textbf{Name}     & \textbf{Description} \\
\hline
0--1 & name\_ptr   & 16-bit pointer to length-prefixed location name \\
2    & mob\_head   & Head of mob linked list (character index, 0~=~none) \\
3    & min\_pos    & Top-left bounding box (row $\times$ 20 + col) \\
4    & max\_pos    & Bottom-right bounding box (row $\times$ 20 + col) \\
5    & map\_id     & Bits 0--6: map scene ID.  Bit~7: visited flag (set at runtime) \\
6--7 & event\_ptr  & 16-bit pointer to event/object list (3-byte entries) \\
8    & mob\_count  & Number of mobs (summed into {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote})
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

The event list at {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PTR\nwendquote} consists of 3-byte entries (see
\S\ref{sec:event-format} for the full format).  Byte~0 is a map position
(\$FE~=~empty slot, \$FF~=~end-of-list); byte~1 encodes the event type
and status; byte~2 is type-dependent action data.

The map scene~ID (field~5, bits~0--6) is compared with {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}FLAG2\nwendquote}
(\$5A56); when it changes, {\Tt{}FILL{\_}MAP\nwendquote} is called to redraw the map.
Bit~7 is set on first entry via {\Tt{}ORA\ {\textbackslash}{\#}{\$}80\nwendquote} and tested with {\Tt{}BMI\nwendquote} to
skip first-visit logic on subsequent entries.

The sentinel {\Tt{}FFFF\nwendquote} in the name pointer marks the end of the table.

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}NAMES}}{LOCATION:unNAMES}{PYNWmai0-SYU42WHLTH62BE4UW6NQDZ3FAY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}NAMES}}{LOCATION:unNAMES}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{512}\nwdocspar
\label{sec:event-format}

Each location has a variable-length event list pointed to by
{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PTR\nwendquote} (location record fields~6--7).  Entries are 3~bytes each,
terminated by {\Tt{}{\$}FF\nwendquote} followed by two {\Tt{}{\$}FF\nwendquote} padding bytes.  Each
location's first entry is normally an empty slot ({\Tt{}{\$}FE\nwendquote}) reserved for
runtime use (e.g.\ dropped treasure after combat).

\paragraph{Byte~0: map position.}
A value 0--199 encodes a grid position (row~$\times$~20~+~col).
{\Tt{}{\$}FE\nwendquote} marks an empty slot that can be filled at runtime.
{\Tt{}{\$}FF\nwendquote} marks the end of the list.

\paragraph{Byte~1: event type.}
The top two bits select the category:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{lll}
\textbf{Byte~1 range} & \textbf{Category} & \textbf{Details} \\
\hline
\$00--\$3F & Random encounter & Probability check vs.\ character stat; \\
           &                  & on fail, bit~6 is set $\to$ becomes specific encounter \\
\$40--\$BF & Specific encounter & bits~5--0 = mob index $\to$ {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} \\
\$C0--\$D1 & Dropped treasure & gold = ((\texttt{byte1} $-$ \$C0) $\times$ 256) + \texttt{byte2} \\
\$D2       & Persistent scene & \texttt{byte2} = scene ID; not cleared after trigger \\
\$D3       & One-time scene   & \texttt{byte2} = scene ID; slot cleared to \$FE \\
\$D4       & Scene + item drop & like \$D3 but also spawns 1--4 bonus items \\
\$D5--\$DA & Map/area event   & indexed from table at \$7EDD \\
\$DB--\$FD & (unknown)        & \\
\$FE       & Empty-slot data  & \texttt{byte2} has sub-encoding
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\paragraph{Byte~2: action data} (meaning depends on byte~1).
For encounters (\$40--\$BF), this is the map position where the mob
appears.  For treasure (\$C0--\$D1), the gold amount low byte.
For scene events (\$D2--\$D4), a scene/event~ID.

\paragraph{Key routines.}
\begin{itemize}
\item \$0B62 --- searches a position for mobs first, then events;
      returns {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC\nwendquote} pointing to the found entry.
\item {\Tt{}FUN{\_}138D\nwendquote} (\$138D) --- finds the nearest non-activated event
      (byte~1~$<$~\$C0) using Manhattan distance; used for AI
      pathfinding.
\item \$1260 --- fills empty {\Tt{}{\$}FE\nwendquote} slots with combat loot, or
      accumulates value in \$C0--\$D0 entries (treasure drops).
      Entries saturate at byte~1~=~\$D1.
\item {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} (\$1C01) --- encounter handler: dispatches
      random vs.\ specific encounters based on byte~1~$<$~\$40.
\end{itemize}
