\label{sec:a478}

The scene loop calls {\Tt{}JSR\ {\$}A478\nwendquote} every iteration to check for user
input.  This address is in the EALDR region ({\Tt{}{\$}A000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}BFFF\nwendquote}),
which remains in memory after the main program starts.

The bytes at {\Tt{}{\$}A478\nwendquote} include the undocumented NMOS 6502 opcode {\Tt{}{\$}04\nwendquote}
(a 2-byte NOP).  This could mean the code legitimately uses undocumented
instructions, or that the region is modified at runtime before being called.

Partial decode:

\begin{verbatim}
    A478: 04 E5         ; NOP $E5 (DOP: 2-byte NOP, reads zp $E5)
    A47A: 19 03 64      ; ORA $6403,Y
    ...
    A483: CA            ; DEX
    A484: D0 FD         ; BNE $A483   (inner delay loop)
    A486: 38            ; SEC
    A487: E9 01         ; SBC #$01
    A489: D0 F6         ; BNE $A481   (outer delay loop)
    A48B: 60            ; RTS
\end{verbatim}

The inner loop at {\Tt{}{\$}A483\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A484\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}DEX;\ BNE\nwendquote}) is a standard
delay loop.  The outer loop decrements A and repeats, making this a
nested delay.  The carry flag state on exit likely indicates whether a
key was pressed (C=1) or the timer expired (C=0).  Further analysis
requires an emulator that supports undocumented 6502 opcodes.

The attract screen call flow:

\begin{itemize}
  \item {\Tt{}MAIN{\_}ENTRY\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote}): calls {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, then
        {\Tt{}ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN\nwendquote} if {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} is zero.
  \item {\Tt{}ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}09F4\nwendquote}): sets scene index 1, calls
        {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote}, tail-calls {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} with scene \$26.
  \item {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}6C37\nwendquote}): saves ZP pointers, steps PRNG,
        conditionally loads scene data from disk.  In a loop: checks
        keyboard/timer via {\Tt{}{\$}A478\nwendquote}, displays status bar, renders scene
        text via {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}RENDERER\nwendquote}, runs {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} with script \#3.
        Exits when user presses a key or scene sequence ends.
\end{itemize}

Key subsystems:
\begin{itemize}
  \item \textbf{Text renderer} ({\Tt{}TEXT{\_}RENDERER\nwendquote}): Reads byte streams with
        position commands, pause/reset control codes, and character data
        for the HRCG font.
  \item \textbf{Script engine} ({\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote}): Runs short bytecode
        programs from {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}TABLE\nwendquote}.  Supports loops, gosub, action
        dispatch with PRNG randomization.
  \item \textbf{Resident interpreter} ({\Tt{}{\$}0500\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}07FF\nwendquote}): A
        secondary VM copied from EALDR, using context-swapped zero-page
        state and XOR-encrypted addresses.
  \item \textbf{PRNG} ({\Tt{}STEP{\_}PRNG\nwendquote}): Linear congruential generator with
        formula $\texttt{val}_{n+1} = 69 \cdot \texttt{val}_n + \$53
        \pmod{256}$.
\end{itemize}


The {\Tt{}start{\_}splash{\_}screen\nwendquote} routine first loads up the initial splash screen,
sets {\Tt{}indirect{\_}routine\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}note{\_}played\nwendquote}, and begins the sound routine by
calling {\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote}.

{\Tt{}note{\_}played\nwendquote} plots a mob, then sets {\Tt{}indirect{\_}routine\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}splash{\_}routine{\_}2\nwendquote}
and jumps to {\Tt{}next{\_}table{\_}entry\nwendquote}.

{\Tt{}splash{\_}routine{\_}2\nwendquote} calls a routine first with {\Tt{}{\$}5E1F\nwendquote} then with {\Tt{}{\$}5E3A\nwendquote},
then jumps to {\Tt{}splash{\_}screen{\_}step\nwendquote}.

{\Tt{}splash{\_}screen{\_}step\nwendquote} then sets {\Tt{}indirect{\_}routine\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}splash{\_}routine{\_}1\nwendquote}
then {\Tt{}splash{\_}routine{\_}0\nwendquote} and calls {\Tt{}set{\_}splash{\_}routine\nwendquote} within {\Tt{}note{\_}played\nwendquote}.
After that, {\Tt{}splash{\_}screen{\_}step\nwendquote} presumably moves mobs around.


When the user ends the splash screen, the {\Tt{}start{\_}splash{\_}screen\nwendquote} routine
replaces the indirect jump to {\Tt{}indirect{\_}routine\nwendquote} in {\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} to an
absolute jump to {\Tt{}next{\_}table{\_}entry\nwendquote}, since there is no further need to
animate while playing sound.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{515}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MA3WDYAYUKINVQ6W4447HHOCBE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MA3WDYAYUKINVQ6W4447HHOCBE000000-1}}}\moddef{Message data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MA3WDYAYUKINVQ6W4447HHOCBE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MESSAGE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-MA3WDYAYUKINVQ6W4447HHOCBE000000-1}:
    APSTR ""
    APSTR "GOLD EATING ROCK SLIME GOBBLES THE CASH."
    APSTR ""
    APSTR "YOUR USED ARMOR IS WORTHLESS."
    APSTR ""
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MESSAGE{\_}DATA}}{MESSAGE:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-MA3WDYAYUKINVQ6W4447HHOCBE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MESSAGE{\_}DATA}}{MESSAGE:unDATA}}}\nwnotused{Message data}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{516}\nwdocspar
Immediately after the event lists, the region {\Tt{}{\$}4C80--{\$}5AFF\nwendquote} holds
the mob data table and associated name strings.

\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\$}4C80--{\$}547F\nwendquote}: 128 mob data records, 16~bytes each.  Bytes
  0--1 are a pointer to the mob's name string; the remaining 14~bytes
  encode combat stats, group linkage, position, appearance, and level.
  {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} indexes into this table via the base pointer
  at~{\Tt{}{\$}4000/{\$}4001\nwendquote}.
\item {\Tt{}{\$}5480--{\$}59C8\nwendquote}: Length-prefixed high-bit ASCII name strings
  for all 128 mobs (``ALI BABA'', ``SCHEHERAZADE'', ``MINOTAUR'',~etc.).
\item {\Tt{}{\$}59C9--{\$}5AFF\nwendquote}: Residual debug/diagnostic text (unused at
  runtime).
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{517}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VPOO52OIRD524SSEQQE3WA6GUA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VPOO52OIRD524SSEQQE3WA6GUA000000-1}}}\moddef{mob data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VPOO52OIRD524SSEQQE3WA6GUA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $4C80
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-VPOO52OIRD524SSEQQE3WA6GUA000000-1}:
    INCLUDE "mobdata.asm"
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}TABLE}}{MOB:unDATA:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-VPOO52OIRD524SSEQQE3WA6GUA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}TABLE}}{MOB:unDATA:unTABLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{518}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{519}\nwdocspar

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{cl}
\toprule
\thead{Byte} & \thead{Meaning} \\
\midrule
\$7D & Reset to full-screen mode (col=0, row=0, width=20) \\
\$7E & Pause: run script engine and status bar, then resume \\
\$7F & End of stream \\
\$80--\$FE & Set row (byte \& \$7F), next byte = column \\
Other & Character code for HRCG font \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

The text renderer data at {\Tt{}STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA\nwendquote} draws a decorative
border for the status bar.  Characters \$33--\$41 are box-drawing glyphs
in the HRCG font.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{520}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}}}\moddef{status border data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7E2F
\nwlinkedidentc{STATUS_BORDER_DATA}{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}:
    HEX     7D                      ; $7D: reset to full-screen
    HEX     80 00                   ; row 0, col 0
    HEX     33 3C                   ; top-left corner, left tee
    HEX     34 34 34 34 34 34 34 34 ; horizontal bar (x16)
    HEX     34 34 34 34 34 34 34 34
    HEX     3D 35                   ; right tee, top-right corner
    HEX     3A 3F                   ; decorative
    HEX     81 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 1, col 18, right edge
    HEX     82 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 2
    HEX     83 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 3
    HEX     84 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 4
    HEX     85 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 5
    HEX     86 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 6
    HEX     87 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 7
    HEX     88 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 8
    HEX     89 12 3E 36 3A 3F       ; row 9
    HEX     8A 12 3E 36             ; row 10
    HEX     39 40                   ; bottom-left corner, left tee
    HEX     38 38 38 38 38 38 38 38 ; horizontal bar (x16)
    HEX     38 38 38 38 38 38 38 38
    HEX     41 37                   ; right tee, bottom-right corner
    HEX     7F                      ; end of stream
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{521}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{522}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}}}\moddef{status bar strings~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7E97
\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}:
    APSTR   "  PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE   "

\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_BUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}:
    APSTR   "  PRESS THE BUTTON TO CONTINUE  "
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}}\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{523}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{524}{\Tt{}s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}80A4\nwendquote} is the 10-byte self-modifying HRCG
control string that {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} patches with character-set and
glyph codes before passing to {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote}.  It is a 9-byte
self-modifying string: the routine patches {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT\nwendquote}, and
{\Tt{}CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT\nwendquote} in place before each call.  The HRCG control codes
embedded in the string switch charset (ctrl-A), enter block mode (ctrl-B),
move to the lower half (ctrl-C), and finish the block (ctrl-D), so that a
single {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} call renders an entire $2\times2$ font character.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{525}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-19}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_LOWER_LEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}     EQU     $80AB
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_LOWER_RIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}    EQU     $80AC
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_UPPER_RIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}    EQU     $80A9
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}        EQU     $80A6
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_UPPER_LEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}     EQU     $80A8
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}CHARSET}}{CHAR:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unLEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unLEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}CHARSET}}{CHAR:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unLEFT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unLEFT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unRIGHT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{526}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{527}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}}}\moddef{print font char data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $80A4
\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRINT_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}:
    HEX     09 ; num chars in this string
    HEX     81 ; ctrl-A (set character set)
    HEX     B1 ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20} (self-modified)
    HEX     82 ; ctrl-B (block display mode)
    HEX     A0 ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_UPPER_LEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20} (self-modified)
    HEX     A0 ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_UPPER_RIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20} (self-modified)
    HEX     83 ; ctrl-C (move to lower left of block)
    HEX     A0 ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_LOWER_LEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20} (self-modified)
    HEX     A0 ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_LOWER_RIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20} (self-modified)
    HEX     84 ; ctrl-D (complete block data)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{s:unPRINT:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{s:unPRINT:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}CHARSET}}{CHAR:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unLEFT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unLEFT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unRIGHT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}CHARSET}}{CHAR:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unLEFT}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unLEFT}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{528}\nwdocspar

The {\Tt{}PLOT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} routine prints the character number in {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}, at the text
coordinate in {\Tt{}X\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{529}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}}}\moddef{plot char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5DB0
\nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PLOT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR_AT_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PLOT{\_}CHAR}}{PLOT:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-GKJMRCHOW2FWSNTGL6NTUR7XCE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{530}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Map and Scene}

Initializes a scene for display:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Loads the character record for index {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.
  \item Reads the character's bounding box from bytes~3--4 of the record at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote}.
  \item Converts to column/row ranges.
  \item Picks a random position within those bounds.
  \item Sets the font cursor there.
  \item Performs additional character-record bookkeeping.
\end{enumerate}

The bounding box bytes are packed map positions decoded by
{\Tt{}POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}.  The routine increments the minimums (so the range
is exclusive of the border), then calls {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} twice to
pick a random column and row within the bounds.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{531}{\Tt{}SOURCE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} records which character is being reordered.
{\Tt{}BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}COL\nwendquote}, and
{\Tt{}BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}ROW\nwendquote} hold the scene's bounding box after unpacking.
{\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote} is the font column coordinate, used here to store the
randomly chosen column.  {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}SETUP\nwendquote} initializes all of these from
the character record and calls {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} for placement.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{532}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}         EQU     $5A28   ; source character for reorder
\nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}      EQU     $5A52   ; scene setup: right column boundary
\nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}      EQU     $5A54   ; scene setup: bottom row boundary
\nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}      EQU     $5A51   ; scene setup: left column boundary
\nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}      EQU     $5A53   ; scene setup: top row boundary
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}        EQU     $5A0C
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{533}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{534}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}         EQU     $5A29   ; character index being processed
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{535}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{536}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}}}\moddef{scene setup~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0A17
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}       ; character/scene index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}   ; index -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15} = char record
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y      ; byte 3: min position (packed)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}     ; -> A=min_col, Y=min_row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; min_col
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; min_row
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y      ; byte 4: max position (packed)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}     ; -> A=max_col, Y=max_row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; max_col
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; max_row
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; min_col++ (exclusive border)
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; min_row++
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; \\
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ;  | col_range = max_col - min_col
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}   ;  | random column offset
    CLC                       ;  |
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ;  | col = min_col + offset
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}          ; / set font column
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; \\
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ;  | row_range = max_row - min_row
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}   ;  | random row offset
    CLC                       ;  |
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{BOUNDS_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}    ; / row = min_row + offset
    TAY                       ; Y = row
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}          ; A = col
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}     ; -> A = linear position
    LDY     #$03
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y       ; store position in record byte 3
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}           ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}        ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1      ; /
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}       ; clear source char index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}      ; reorder character in linked list
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     #$00              ; \\
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y       ;  | clear bytes 13-14 of record
    INY                       ;  |
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y       ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}  ; ensure byte 6 >= byte 5 minimum
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}    ; current player index
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22},.done ; not current player -> skip
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y       ; load position from record
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}  ; draw character at position
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BOUNDS{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{BOUNDS:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{537}\nwdocspar
\label{sec:scene_loop}

This is the main scene display loop.  It is called with the scene number
in~A.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{538}{\Tt{}SCENE{\_}NUMBER\nwendquote} holds the current scene index.  {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}TEXT{\_}DATA\nwendquote} is
the base address of the scene's text byte stream, loaded from disk by
{\Tt{}LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA\nwendquote}.  {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}TRANSITION\nwendquote} is a flag byte: when nonzero,
{\Tt{}SCENE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} treats its value as a new scene number and restarts the
display cycle.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{539}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_TRANSITION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}    EQU     $5CFF   ; scene transition flag (nonzero = new scene number)
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_TEXT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}     EQU     $5C00   ; base address of scene text data (loaded by \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_SCENE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1})
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_NUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}        EQU     $5A99   ; current scene number
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TEXT{\_}DATA}}{SCENE:unTEXT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TRANSITION}}{SCENE:unTRANSITION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TEXT{\_}DATA}}{SCENE:unTEXT:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TRANSITION}}{SCENE:unTRANSITION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{540}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{541}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}}}\moddef{scene loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C37
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_NUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}                    ; store scene number
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}                       ; disable blink cursor

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SAVE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-XTFMNQODSGOW3IGUAVI6HJU56I000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}                     ; PRNG output
    AND     #$0A                            ; test bits 1 and 3
    BNE     .display                        ; if any set, skip disk load
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_SCENE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}

.display:
    JSR     $A478                           ; keyboard/timing check (EALDR resident)
    BCS     .exit                           ; carry set = user pressed key

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_TEXT_DATA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23},\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3} ; scene text data -> $06/$07
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}

    LDX     #$06                            ; script index 6
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}                   ; run script #3 ($A300)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_TRANSITION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}                ; scene transition flag
    BEQ     .done                           ; zero = no transition
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_NUMBER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}                    ; set new scene number
    JMP     .display                        ; continue

.exit:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$1B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}                 ; display message (mode off)
                                    ; fall through to .done

.done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW_BOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$00                            ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}                    ;  | clear location flags
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}                  ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_LOCATION}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}                  ; redraw map if location changed
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESTORE_ZP_POINTERS}{PYNWmai0-34VA5T5PRGU2LZRT6RKWJJ2FQI000000-1}             ; restore and return
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}}\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}\\{{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TEXT{\_}DATA}}{SCENE:unTEXT:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TRANSITION}}{SCENE:unTRANSITION}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESTORE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{RESTORE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAVE{\_}ZP{\_}POINTERS}}{SAVE:unZP:unPOINTERS}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}NUMBER}}{SCENE:unNUMBER}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TEXT{\_}DATA}}{SCENE:unTEXT:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}TRANSITION}}{SCENE:unTRANSITION}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW{\_}BOTTOM}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW:unBOTTOM}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{542}\nwdocspar
Loads scene-specific data from disk into the {\Tt{}{\$}5C00\nwendquote} region.  The disk
read calls {\Tt{}DISK{\_}READ{\_}FIELD\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}B300\nwendquote}, which enters the disk~VM
interpreter to perform the multi-sector read.  If the read fails, the
routine fills a byte with PRNG output (a graceful degradation rather than
crashing).


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{543}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}}}\moddef{load scene data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6DD8
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_SCENE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_SCENE_DATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}

    BIT     $C0E9           ; check disk controller
    LDA     #$05            ; \\
    LDY     #$04            ;  | ($08)+4 = 5 (track configuration)
    STA     ($08),Y         ; /
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_DISK_READ}{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1} ; prepare disk parameters
    CLC
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_READ_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-7Q6U2HMH7OODAMFYNQVO4GCSAA000000-1} ; read sector data from disk
    BCS     .error
    RTS

.error:
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}     ; on error: fill with PRNG data
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    STA     $9AA6,Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}SCENE{\_}DATA}}{LOAD:unSCENE:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}READ{\_}FIELD}}{DISK:unREAD:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}DISK{\_}READ}}{SETUP:unDISK:unREAD}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}READ{\_}FIELD}}{DISK:unREAD:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}DISK{\_}READ}}{SETUP:unDISK:unREAD}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-3XMQPOG4ARI455O23BBDT5GCTE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{544}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{545}{\Tt{}TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB\nwendquote} are
three 4-entry lookup tables indexed by the 2-bit style code from
{\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}STYLE\nwendquote} bits 6--5.  {\Tt{}LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES\nwendquote} reads all three tables
to set {\Tt{}DEFAULT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} for
the current location.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{546}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-23}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TILE_DEFAULT_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}        EQU     $7AD0   ; 4-byte table: default char per style
\nwlinkedidentc{TILE_FILL_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}           EQU     $7AD4   ; 4-byte table: fill char per style
\nwlinkedidentc{TILE_BLINK_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}          EQU     $7AD8   ; 4-byte table: blink alt char per style
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{547}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{548}The routine below implements this tile-set selection.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{549}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}          EQU     $7AC3   ; alternate blink character
\nwlinkedidentc{DEFAULT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}            EQU     $7AC2   ; default entity character ($2C)
\nwlinkedidentc{MAP_FILL_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}           EQU     $7AC1   ; character used to fill the map grid
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{550}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{551}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}}}\moddef{load map tiles~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $746C
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_MAP_TILES}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_MAP_TILES}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1} ; location style byte
    ROL                    ; \\ rotate bits 7-6 down to bits 1-0
    ROL                    ;  | (4 ROLs through carry)
    ROL                    ;  |
    ROL                    ; /
    AND     #$03           ; mask to 2-bit style index
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TILE_BLINK_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TILE_FILL_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_FILL_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TILE_DEFAULT_TAB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-24},X
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DEFAULT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}}\\{{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TILE{\_}BLINK{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unBLINK:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TILE{\_}DEFAULT{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unDEFAULT:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TILE{\_}FILL{\_}TAB}}{TILE:unFILL:unTAB}{PYNWmai0-4ARRO6NLVQKDWQZ3NKEXOMOPYQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{552}\nwdocspar
Two basic routines print the font character stored in {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}.
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote} converts the font position to a text position
before calling {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}. A stored control string at {\Tt{}s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}
has slots for the character set and the four character blocks that
{\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} fills in before printing.

When printing using the 2x2 font characters, we can set up the HRCG's
"block display mode". This takes four characters and plots them in a 2x2
array with the upper left at the text cursor position.

Because our font table consists of 4 "normal" characters, we need to be able
to map a font character onto its character set and character. The font table
contains 120 font characters, or 480 "normal" characters. Since each
character set is 96 characters, the entire font table spans five character
sets, with character set 1 starting off the table.

Not only that, but the first character in the character set is ASCII 32
(space), so we have to take that into account also.

This is what the {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote}, and
{\Tt{}PLOT{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote} routines do.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{553}The blink cursor is a saved font position used to flash a character on the
hi-res screen.  Three bytes at {\Tt{}{\$}5AA2\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}5AA4\nwendquote} mirror {\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}: they record which character to blink and
where.  The rendering path (\$74E0) copies them into the {\Tt{}FONT{\_}\nwendquote} variables
before calling {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

A {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote} value of {\Tt{}{\$}14\nwendquote} (20) acts as a sentinel meaning ``no active
blink position,'' since valid font--column values are 0--19.  Both
{\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} store {\Tt{}{\$}14\nwendquote} here to disable the blink
cursor at startup and at each new scene.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{554}Draws the ``alternate'' blink character (the blink-off frame).
Temporarily replaces {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} with the alternate character from
{\Tt{}{\$}7AC3\nwendquote}, calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to render it, then restores
the original {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.  Called by {\Tt{}TICK{\_}ANIM{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote} when
the animation frame counter reaches zero.

Renders a custom font character at the current font position:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Converts {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote} into four block-character indices (upper-left, upper-right, lower-left, lower-right) for a $2\times2$ character cell.
  \item Patches the {\Tt{}s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} control string with the glyph indices.
  \item Calls {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} to output the character.
\end{enumerate}

Each charset holds 24~characters (\$18).  Characters beyond~\$18 bump the
charset index.  The four glyph indices are consecutive starting at
{\Tt{}charnum\ *\ 4\ +\ {\$}20\nwendquote}.

Called when entering a new scene.  Initialises the AI wait delay:
if {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE\nwendquote} is non-zero (AI-controlled character), sets
{\Tt{}AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} to~\$0A and calls {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} with index~\$10;
otherwise clears the flag.  Then draws the character, sets
{\Tt{}WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} to twice the wait flag (via ROL), and jumps to
{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}SPRITE\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{555}{\Tt{}CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE\nwendquote} distinguishes player-controlled characters (0) from
AI-controlled mobs (modes 2--5).  {\Tt{}AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} is set to {\Tt{}{\$}0A\nwendquote} when
entering a scene with an AI character and cleared otherwise.
{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote} tests both values to decide whether to invoke the
{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} and how long to delay before drawing the sprite.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{556}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}    EQU     $5A05   ; 0 = player, 2-5 = AI behavior modes
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}    EQU     $5A06   ; wait delay for AI moves (0 or $0A)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{557}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{558}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}}}\moddef{setup scene display~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0901
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_SCENE_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_SCENE_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}

    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26},.not_ai
    LDA     #$0A
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_WAIT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    LDX     #$10

\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}WAIT{\_}FLAG}}{AI:unWAIT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{559}\nwdocspar
Called from {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} to set up the viewport when the player
enters a new location.  Compares {\Tt{}{\$}FA\nwendquote} with {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}POS\nwendquote}; if
unchanged, returns immediately.  Otherwise:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Stores the new position.
  \item Calls {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW\nwendquote} / {\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}MAP\nwendquote}.
  \item Computes the event position via {\Tt{}MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE\nwendquote}.
  \item Extracts the location style from record field~5; if changed, reloads the map tile set.
  \item Reads fields~3 and~4 of the location record (via {\Tt{}{\$}FA\nwendquote} indirect) to obtain the viewport bounds (min/max column and row).
  \item Iterates a nested loop: for each row, for each column, calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL\nwendquote} to render that cell.
  \item If bit~7 of field~5 is clear, calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES\nwendquote} to overlay entity icons on the map.
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{560}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}POS\nwendquote} stores the event position computed by {\Tt{}MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE\nwendquote}.
{\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW\nwendquote}
define the visible map rectangle, extracted from fields 3 and 4 of the
location record.  {\Tt{}ENTER{\_}LOCATION\nwendquote} uses these bounds to drive a nested
column/row loop that redraws the entire viewport.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{561}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}           EQU     $5A5E   ; event position (from \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1})
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}    EQU     $5A0B   ; viewport min row
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}    EQU     $5A0A   ; viewport min column (from location field 3)
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}    EQU     $5A09   ; viewport max row
\nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}    EQU     $5A08   ; viewport max column (from location field 4)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{562}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{563}{\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} is the current font row coordinate, and {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW\nwendquote}
is the routine at {\Tt{}{\$}76C2\nwendquote} that configures the HRCG text window parameters.
{\Tt{}ENTER{\_}LOCATION\nwendquote} uses {\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} as the row iterator in the map redraw
loop and calls {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW\nwendquote} during viewport setup.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{564}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}        EQU     $5A0D
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28} EQU     $76C2   ; set text window parameters
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{565}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{566}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}}}\moddef{enter location~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
