dent{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}MAP{\_}TILES}}{LOAD:unMAP:unTILES}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{567}\nwdocspar
Checks whether the current location position lies on the viewport
boundary.  Converts {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}ID\nwendquote} to column/row via
{\Tt{}POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}, then compares against all four viewport edges
({\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW\nwendquote}).  If any match, sets {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote}=1 and {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote}=0
(``at edge''); otherwise sets both to~0 (``interior'').

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{568}{\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}ID\nwendquote} stores the current map position index.
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY\nwendquote} converts it to column/row coordinates and compares
against each viewport edge to determine whether the character is standing
on the map boundary.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{569}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_ID}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}     EQU     $5A17   ; current location/position index
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{570}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{571}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}}}\moddef{check at boundary~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0BFA
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AT_BOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AT_BOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_ID}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27},.at_edge
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27},.at_edge
    TYA
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27},.at_edge
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27},.at_edge
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1
    RTS
.at_edge:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}ID}}{LOCATION:unID}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{572}\nwdocspar
Fills the entire 20$\times$10 map grid with a single character.  The fill
character is read from {\Tt{}MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}7AC1\nwendquote}, default {\Tt{}{\$}25\nwendquote}).
The routine renders the glyph once via {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to build the
HRCG control string, then loops over all 200 grid positions (from
bottom-right to top-left), re-printing the same string at each position
via {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{573}{\Tt{}FILL{\_}MAP\nwendquote} fills the entire 20$\times$10 map grid with a single tile
character:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Starts at column~19, row~9 (bottom-right corner).
  \item Renders the fill character once via {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to build the HRCG control string.
  \item Loops through all 200 positions by decrementing the column and wrapping to the next row up when it goes negative.
  \item For each position after the first, calls {\Tt{}FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} to repeat the same pre-built glyph.
\end{enumerate}
This avoids recalculating the font data 199 additional times.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{574}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}}}\moddef{fill map~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $743B
\nwlinkedidentc{FILL_MAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FILL_MAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}

    LDA     #$13                 ; \\ start at column 19, row 9
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}             ;  | (bottom-right corner)
    LDA     #$09                 ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}             ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_FILL_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}        ; fill character (default $25)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    LDA     #$01                 ; charset 1 (custom font)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}     ; render glyph once (builds control string)
.loop:
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}             ; next column left
    BPL     .draw                ; still >= 0 -> draw
    LDA     #$13                 ; \\ wrap to column 19
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}             ; /
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}             ; next row up
    BPL     .draw                ; still >= 0 -> draw
    RTS                          ; all 200 positions filled
.draw:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1} ; set text cursor to font position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}         ; re-print the same glyph string
    JMP     .loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FILL{\_}MAP}}{FILL:unMAP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAP{\_}FILL{\_}CHAR}}{MAP:unFILL:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GLAMCDF6RJVWAHNXVLZP2YDB7M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{575}\nwdocspar
Loads the first two bytes of the record at {\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote} (CHAR\_PTR)
into {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} and tail-calls {\Tt{}SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote}.
Used before map redraw to set the text window from the current
character's record.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{576}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}}}\moddef{clear map~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $76B0
\nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_MAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}:

    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y ; record byte 0 -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5} low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y ; record byte 1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5} high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{577}\nwdocspar
Draws a single map cell at the current {\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}.
Computes the linear position inline (col + row$\times$20) rather than
calling {\Tt{}COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS\nwendquote}, then calls {\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}GET{\_}MAP{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to draw the tile.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{578}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}}}\moddef{draw map col~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7323
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_COL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_COL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    CLC
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
.mult_loop:
    DEY
    BMI     .mult_done
    ADC     #$14                    ; +20 per row
    BCC     .mult_loop
.mult_done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL}}{DRAW:unMAP:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}COL}}{DRAW:unMAP:unCOL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-N6X5IMMWQPH5AZWE2ASBOMJUAM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{579}\nwdocspar
Draws entity icons on the map.  Three modes:

\begin{enumerate}
\item If {\Tt{}MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} is set, skip straight to drawing mobs.
\item If {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}STYLE\nwendquote} bits 5--6 are set, scroll the map and
      set the redraw flag.
\item Otherwise, scan the full grid cell by cell: for each cell that
      contains a non-\$FE entity in the drawable range, draw its icon
      via {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B\nwendquote}.
\end{enumerate}

After the grid scan (or redraw), iterates the mob group via
{\Tt{}FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}, drawing each mob's
icon using {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} (or {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} if the
mob has no blink animation).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{580}{\Tt{}MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}7AC4\nwendquote} is a nonzero/zero flag.  When set,
{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES\nwendquote} skips the cell-by-cell grid scan and jumps directly
to the mob-drawing phase, avoiding redundant work when the entire map has
already been redrawn by a scroll operation.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{581}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-29}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{MAP_REDRAW_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}         EQU     $7AC4   ; non-zero = full map redraw needed
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG}}{MAP:unREDRAW:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG}}{MAP:unREDRAW:unFLAG}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{582}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{583}{\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC\nwendquote} is a 2-byte zero-page pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}BE/{\$}BF\nwendquote} that
receives the result of {\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote}: a pointer to the entity
record occupying a given map position.  Bit 7 of the high byte
distinguishes mobs (set) from player characters (clear).
{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES\nwendquote} uses it during the cell-by-cell grid scan.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{584}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}              EQU     $BE     ; entity lookup result from \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1} (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{585}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{586}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}}}\moddef{draw map entities~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $733B
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}

    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y
    ORA     #$80
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y   ; mark entities drawn (set bit 7)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_REDRAW_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BEQ     .no_redraw
    JMP     .draw_mobs
.no_redraw:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    AND     #$60           ; check style bits 5-6
    BEQ     .scan_grid
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$0F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$FF
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_REDRAW_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}
    BNE     .draw_mobs     ; always taken
.scan_grid:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y
    PHA                    ; save record byte 2
    LDA     #$00
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y   ; clear it during scan
.cell_check:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    BEQ     .next_col      ; no entity here
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    BAEQ    #$FE,.next_col ; $FE = skip
    CMP     #$80
    BCC     .draw_it       ; $00-$7F = draw
    CMP     #$C0
    BCC     .next_col      ; $80-\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1 = skip
.draw_it:                           ; $C0-$FF = draw
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLASSIFY_ENTITY_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}
.next_col:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    BPL     .cell_check    ; inner: next column
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MIN_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{VIEW_MAX_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    BPL     .cell_check    ; outer: next row
    LDY     #$02
    PLA
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y   ; restore record byte 2
    BNE     .draw_mobs
    RTS
.draw_mobs:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.mob_loop:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}   ; custom font
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    BYEQ    #$00,.mob_blink
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    AND     #$0F
    BEQ     .mob_anim
.mob_blink:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}
    JMP     .mob_done
.mob_anim:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
.mob_done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    BNE     .mob_loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ENTITIES}}{DRAW:unMAP:unENTITIES}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\eatline

ident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAP{\_}REDRAW{\_}FLAG}}{MAP:unREDRAW:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMAX:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MAX{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMAX:unROW}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}COL}}{VIEW:unMIN:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VIEW{\_}MIN{\_}ROW}}{VIEW:unMIN:unROW}{PYNWmai0-MTBUSVUJUGJJ6DU23IWQESXGRY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{587}\nwdocspar
After drawing a map entity, {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B\nwendquote} copies the current font
position ({\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}) into the
blink cursor variables ({\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ROW\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}),
then calls {\Tt{}TIMED{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} with the delay from {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}DELAY\nwendquote}.
It finishes by resetting {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote} to~\$14 (disabled).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{588}{\Tt{}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}DELAY\nwendquote} are the blink-cursor
state variables.  {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B\nwendquote} copies the current font position into
{\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ROW\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, then uses {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}DELAY\nwendquote} as the
argument to {\Tt{}TIMED{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} so the icon flashes briefly on screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{589}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-30}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}      EQU     $5AA4   ; font character number
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_DELAY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}             EQU     $7AAC   ; delay value loaded into \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16} by \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}       EQU     $5AA3   ; font row
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{590}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{591}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}}}\moddef{draw map icon b~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $740B
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_MAP_ICON_B}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_DELAY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_NORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}               ; disable blink cursor
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}MAP{\_}ICON{\_}B}}{DRAW:unMAP:unICON:unB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}DELAY}}{BLINK:unDELAY}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-QLN7KL7VLBYXRE6FTY5XLURKFM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{592}\nwdocspar
Prepares disk I/O parameters for the disk routines.  Stores
the track number (A) at offset~\$0C of the parameter block at~(\$08),
clears the sector offset at~(\$08)+3, then calls {\Tt{}RWTS{\_}ENTRY\nwendquote}
at~{\Tt{}{\$}B7B5\nwendquote} with the IOB address from~\$08/\$09.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{593}{\Tt{}RWTS{\_}ENTRY\nwendquote} is the standard DOS 3.3 RWTS entry point at {\Tt{}{\$}B7B5\nwendquote}.
{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}DISK{\_}READ\nwendquote} calls it after storing the track number and clearing
the sector offset in the IOB parameter block.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{594}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}              EQU     $B7B5   ; RWTS entry: PHP/SEI, JSR \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_CORE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-72}, CLC/SEC
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}ENTRY}}{RWTS:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}ENTRY}}{RWTS:unENTRY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}CORE}}{RWTS:unCORE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}CORE}}{RWTS:unCORE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{595}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{596}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}}}\moddef{setup disk read~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C18
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_DISK_READ}{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_DISK_READ}{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}

    LDY     #$0C
    STA     ($08),Y    ; ($08)+$0C = track number (A)
    LDA     #$00
    LDY     #$03
    STA     ($08),Y    ; ($08)+$03 = 0 (sector offset)
    LDA     $09        ; \\ A/Y = slot parameter block
    LDY     $08        ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RWTS_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32} ; seek to track
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $48        ; clear disk status
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}DISK{\_}READ}}{SETUP:unDISK:unREAD}{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}DISK{\_}READ}}{SETUP:unDISK:unREAD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}ENTRY}}{RWTS:unENTRY}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RWTS{\_}ENTRY}}{RWTS:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-3U33XUD5TOMNWRAM7IHRXHS7HA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{597}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Entities}


\section{Entity classification}

{\Tt{}CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE\nwendquote} examines the entity record at {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC\nwendquote} and sets
{\Tt{}HANDLER{\_}PTR\nwendquote} to the address of an appropriate handler routine.  The
classification tree checks {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} first: a zero high byte means the
entity is in zero page, and the low byte further distinguishes two handler
addresses.  For entities in regular memory, byte~1 of the record determines
the category: values below~\$80 get one handler, values in \$80--\$BF get
another, \$C0--\$D1 map to a third, \$D2--\$D4 to a fourth, and \$D5--\$FD
to a fifth.  The special value~\$FE triggers a deeper check on byte~2: its
low 5~bits and upper 2~bits select among three more handler addresses, with
sub-values below~\$1B, at~\$1D, and above~\$1D each routed differently.
Nine distinct handler addresses are used in total, covering the full range
of entity types from empty slots to treasure, mobs, shops, and map features.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{598}{\Tt{}HANDLER{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is a 2-byte zero-page pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}BC/{\$}BD\nwendquote} that
{\Tt{}CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE\nwendquote} sets to the address of the handler routine matching
the entity's type.  Callers use this pointer to dispatch entity-specific
behavior after classification.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{599}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}             EQU     $BC     ; entity type handler address (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HANDLER{\_}PTR}}{HANDLER:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HANDLER{\_}PTR}}{HANDLER:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{600}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{601}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}}}\moddef{classify entity type~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $116B
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CLASSIFY_ENTITY_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}
; Sets \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}/\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1 to handler address based on entity type at (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16})
\nwlinkedidentc{CLASSIFY_ENTITY_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1,.not_zero_page
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16},.type_C3
.type_E4:                      ; $1175 - reused by backward BMI from $1198
    LDA     #$E4
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.type_C3:                      ; $117E - reused by JMP from $11F9
    LDA     #$C3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.not_zero_page:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    BMI     .check_ranges
.type_FC:                      ; $118D - reused by backward BMI from $11F5
    LDA     #$FC
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.check_ranges:
    CMP     #$C0
    BMI     .type_E4
    CMP     #$D2
    BPL     .check_d5
    LDA     #$D3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.check_d5:
    CMP     #$D5
    BPL     .check_fe
    LDA     #$16
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.check_fe:
    BAEQ    #$FE,.type_fe_entry
    LDA     #$28
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.type_fe_entry:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$1F
    BNE     .check_c0_bits
    LDA     #$03
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.check_c0_bits:
    TXA
    AND     #$C0
    BANE    #$C0,.check_1b
.type_F0:                      ; $11DA - reused by backward BEQ from $11F7
    LDA     #$F0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.check_1b:
    TXA
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1B
    BPL     .check_1d
    LDA     #$CA
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}
    LDA     #$7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLER_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}+1
    RTS
.check_1d:
    CMP     #$1D
    BMI     .type_FC
    BEQ     .type_F0
    JMP     .type_C3
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE}}{CLASSIFY:unENTITY:unTYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLASSIFY{\_}ENTITY{\_}TYPE}}{CLASSIFY:unENTITY:unTYPE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLER{\_}PTR}}{HANDLER:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLER{\_}PTR}}{HANDLER:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{602}\nwdocspar
Converts a mob appearance index (byte~4 of mob data) into a font
character number.  The custom font has 120 characters in groups of~32,
but only 21~mob glyphs occupy each group (characters 1--21 and 33--36).
Characters 5--21 repeat cyclically for higher appearance values.

The routine divides the appearance value by~21 (via repeated subtraction
of~21), producing a quotient in~{\Tt{}Y\nwendquote} and a 1-based remainder in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}.
If the remainder is~$\ge5$, it is returned directly.  If~$<5$ and the
quotient is nonzero, 32 is added to index into the next font group.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{603}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{appearance to fontchar~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0CF7
\nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}

    LDY      #$00     ; Y = quotient (font group)
.loop:
    CLC
    ADC      #$EB     ; A -= 21 (unsigned: $EB = 256-21)
    BCC      .done    ; underflow -> done dividing
    INY               ; group++
    BCS      .loop    ; always taken
.done:
    ADC      #$16     ; restore remainder+1 (carry clear, so +22)
    CMP      #$05     ; remainder >= 5?
    BCC      .low     ; no -> check group
    RTS               ; yes -> return as-is (chars 5-21)
.low:
    BYEQ    #$00,.ret ; yes -> return as-is (chars 1-4)
    CLC
    ADC      #$20     ; add 32 -> next font group (chars 33-36)
.ret:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{604}\nwdocspar
Determines the font character number for an entity whose record pointer
is in {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}.  Sets {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote} to~1 (custom font) and
stores the result in {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}.

Three cases based on the pointer value:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC\ =\ {\$}0000\nwendquote}: empty cell --- uses {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}
\item Bit~7 of {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} set: mob --- reads byte~4 (appearance) from the
      mob record and calls {\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote}
\item Otherwise: character record --- decodes the top~2 bits of byte~1
      to select from characters {\Tt{}{\$}18--{\$}1D\nwendquote}, with further subdivision
      based on the full byte~1 value
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{605}The routine below implements the font-character lookup.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{606}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}}}\moddef{get entity fontchar~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0C7E
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}

    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}             ; custom font
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1,.has_entity ; non-zero -> entity exists
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16},.low_only     ; low != 0 -> partial pointer
.empty:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}           ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}             ;  | empty cell -> blink char
    RTS                              ; /
.low_only:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DEFAULT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}             ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}             ;  | $BE!=0, \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1=0 -> default char
    RTS                              ; /
.has_entity:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    CMP     #$80                     ; bit 7 set?
    BPL     .mob                     ; yes -> mob record
    ; --- character record ---
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y           ; byte 1 of character record
    AND     #$C0                     ; top 2 bits
    BAEQ    #$C0,.both_bits          ; -> detailed check
    BAEQ    #$40,.bit6               ; bit 6 only -> char $1C
    BPL     .empty                   ; bit 7 only -> blink alt char
    LDA     #$1B                     ; neither bit -> char $1B
    BNE     .store
.bit6:
    LDA     #$1C
.store:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    RTS
.both_bits:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y           ; reload byte 1
    BAEQ    #$FE,.check_byte2        ; $FE -> check byte 2
    CMP     #$D5
    BMI     .lt_d5
    LDA     #$1D                     ; >= $D5 -> char $1D
    JMP     .store
.lt_d5:
    CMP     #$D2
    BMI     .lt_d2
    LDA     #$18                     ; $D2-$D4 -> char $18
    JMP     .store
.lt_d2:
    LDA     #$1A                     ; < $D2 -> char $1A
    JMP     .store
.check_byte2:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y           ; byte 2
    AND     #$1F                     ; low 5 bits
    BEQ     .empty                   ; zero -> blink alt char
    JMP     .store                   ; non-zero -> use as charnum
.mob:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}               ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}             ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11} = \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16} with bit 7 cleared
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1             ;  |
    AND     #$7F                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1           ; /
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}),Y         ; byte 4 = appearance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}
    JMP     .store
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DEFAULT{\_}CHAR}}{DEFAULT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{607}\nwdocspar

\section{Entity rendering}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{608}{\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} is the main entry
point for drawing a 2$\times$2 custom font character on the hi-res screen.
It converts the font position to a text position, then computes which HRCG
character set and base character code correspond to the font index in
{\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}.  The font table spans five character sets (each holding
96~characters starting at ASCII~32), so the routine divides the four-glyph
index ({\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}$\times$4 + \$20) by~96 to get the set number and
remainder.  These values are patched into a pre-built HRCG control string
that sets block-display mode, selects the character set, and emits the four
character codes.  {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote} then sends this string to HRCG, which
renders the 2$\times$2 block at the cursor position.
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote} is an alternate entry point that skips the
position conversion, useful when the caller has already set {\Tt{}{\$}24/{\$}25\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{609}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}}}\moddef{render font char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7489
\nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1} ; set \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}/\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4} from font pos
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_FONTCHAR_AT_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}:
    LDX     #$B1                 ; base charset page
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    BANE    #$02,.charset_ok
    INX                          ; charset 2 -> page $B3
    INX
.charset_ok:
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}         ; patch charset in control string
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
.check_range:
    CMP     #$18                 ; fits in current charset page?
    BCC     .compute_glyphs      ; yes -> compute glyph indices
    INX                          ; no -> next charset page
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    SEC
    SBC     #$18                 ; charnum -= 24
    JMP     .check_range
.compute_glyphs:
    ASL                          ; charnum * 4
    ASL
    CLC
    ADC     #$20                 ; + $20 = base glyph code
    TAY
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_UPPER_LEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    INY
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_UPPER_RIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    INY
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_LOWER_LEFT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    INY
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_LOWER_RIGHT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-20}
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRINT_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}  ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}    ;  | $BC/$BD -> control string
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{s_PRINT_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-BWJF2T5X4CKI3UKG5DZILVVURI000000-1}  ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1  ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}         ; output the 2x2 character
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}FONTCHAR{\_}AT{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{PRINT:unFONTCHAR:unAT:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}CHARSET}}{CHAR:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unLEFT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unLEFT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unRIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{s:unPRINT:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}CHARSET}}{CHAR:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unLEFT}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}LOWER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unLOWER:unRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}LEFT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unLEFT}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}UPPER{\_}RIGHT}}{CHAR:unUPPER:unRIGHT}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{s{\_}PRINT{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{s:unPRINT:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{610}\nwdocspar
Since each HRCG font character is effectively two by two "normal" characters,
there is a routine to convert from font coordinate to text cursor coordinate
so that the HRCG can locate the font character at the text coordinate (at
the upper left of the font character).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{611}{\Tt{}FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote} converts the game's logical font position
({\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}) to HRCG text cursor coordinates.  Since the
custom font uses 2$\times$2 character cells, each font position occupies two
text columns and two text rows, so both values are doubled (ASL) and stored
into the Apple~II cursor bytes {\Tt{}{\$}24\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\$}25\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{612}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}}}\moddef{font pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7723
\nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_POS_TO_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    ASL
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    ASL
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}POS{\_}TO{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{FONT:unPOS:unTO:unTEXT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-RYW3JHATWASGD7OSRVNXJ325E4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{613}\nwdocspar
Searches for the entity (mob or player character) that occupies a given
map position.  Input: A~=~position (0--199), {\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote}~=~base address
of the character table.  Output: {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}~=~pointer to entity record
(bit~7 of {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}ENTITY{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} set if mob, clear if character).

The routine first walks the mob linked list.  For each record, byte~2
is the mob index; if nonzero, {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} retrieves the mob's data
and byte~3 (position) is compared.  If no mob matches, the player
character table is searched: bytes~6--7 of the base record give the
start of a 3-byte-entry table whose first byte is a position.

Uses heavy self-modifying code to patch absolute address operands for
the indexed loads and table walks.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{614}{\Tt{}DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}5A17\nwendquote} temporarily holds the target map position
during {\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote}.  The routine stores the search position
here on entry, then compares each mob's byte-3 position and each player
table entry against this saved value.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{615}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-32}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}        EQU     $5A17   ; saved position for room search
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{616}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{617}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}}}\moddef{find entity at pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0B62
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}               ; save target position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1                 ; \\ patch base address into
    STA     .load3+2                   ;  | player search (high byte)
    STA     .load2+2                   ;  | mob search (high byte)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}                   ;  |
    STA     .load3+1                   ;  | player search (low byte)
    STA     .load2+1                   ; / mob search (low byte)
    JMP     .mob_search

    ; --- Player character search ---
.player_search:
    LDX     #$06                       ; copy bytes 6-7 of record
.load3:
    LDA     $0B7B,X                    ; (self-modified base address)
    STA     .load4-5,X                 ; patch .load4 operand (+6->low, +7->high)
    INX
    BXNE    #$08,.load3
.load4:
    LDY     $0B86                      ; (self-modified: read position from table)
    \nwlinkedidentc{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-21}    #$FF,.check_player
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AT_BOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-OPE2YXCVW6B2XBCROQP75PNQMM000000-1}          ; $FF = end of table
.check_player:
    BYEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33},.found_player ; matches target?
    INC     .load4+1                   ; \\
    BNE     .no_carry1                 ;  |
    INC     .load4+2                   ;  | advance address by 3
.no_carry1:                         ;  | (3-byte table entries)
    INC     .load4+1                   ;  |
    BNE     .no_carry2                 ;  |
    INC     .load4+2                   ;  |
.no_carry2:                         ;  |
    INC     .load4+1                   ;  |
    BNE     .load4                     ;  |
    INC     .load4+2                   ; /
    JMP     .load4
.found_player:
    LDA     .load4+1                   ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1 = table entry address
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}                 ;  |
    LDA     .load4+2                   ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1               ; /
    RTS

    ; --- Mob linked-list search ---
.mob_search:
    LDX     #$02                       ; byte 2 = mob index
.load2:
    LDA     $0BBD,X                    ; (self-modified base address)
    BAEQ    #$00,.player_search        ; zero -> no more mobs, try players
    JSR     .get_mob                   ; get mob data -> patch .load1
    LDX     #$03                       ; byte 3 = position
.load1:
    LDY     $0BC9,X                    ; (self-modified: read from mob record)
    BYEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{DAT_5a17_pos}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33},.found_mob    ; position matches!
    LDA     .load1+1                   ; \\ copy mob link address
    STA     .load2+1                   ;  | back to .load2 for next iteration
    LDA     .load1+2                   ;  |
    STA     .load2+2                   ; /
    JMP     .mob_search
.found_mob:
    LDA     #$80                       ; \\ set bit 7 = mob flag
    ORA     .load1+2                   ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1               ;  |
    LDA     .load1+1                   ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}                 ; / \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1 = mob pointer | $80
    RTS

    ; --- Helper: get mob data and patch .load1 ---
.get_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}               ; A = mob index -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1 = data ptr
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}               ; \\
    STA     .load1+1                   ;  | patch .load1 operand
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1             ;  |
    STA     .load1+2                   ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}}\\{{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AT{\_}BOUNDARY}}{CHECK:unAT:unBOUNDARY}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DAT{\_}5a17{\_}pos}}{DAT:un5a17:unpos}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{618}\nwdocspar
Given a map position in~A, sets the font cursor to the corresponding
column and row, looks up what character or mob occupies that position,
determines its font character, and draws it.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{619}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}}}\moddef{draw char at pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1156
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}       ; A=pos -> A=col, Y=row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            ; set font column
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}            ; set font row
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}       ; re-linearize (A = col + row*20)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}  ; look up entity at position -> \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1} ; determine font char from entity data
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}    ; render the font character
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{620}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{621}{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT\nwendquote} temporarily swaps the blink character for the alternate
character ({\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}), draws it at the blink position via
{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, and restores the original.  This produces the
``blinking'' effect on the map: the animation alternates between the entity's
sprite and the location's default tile character.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{622}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}}}\moddef{draw blink alt~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $74CB
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_ALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}      ; save current blink char
    PHA
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ALT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-25}  ; load alternate char
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}      ; swap it in
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1} ; draw at blink position
    PLA
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}      ; restore original char
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}ALT}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unALT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ALT{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unALT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D5AO3JLSN7XCTR2JDD26LFVLVU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{623}\nwdocspar
{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL\nwendquote} sets normal video mode (via {\Tt{}SET{\_}NORMAL{\_}VIDEO\nwendquote})
then falls through into {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.  Called by
{\Tt{}ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT\nwendquote} when the animation frame expires.

{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} copies the blink state ({\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}) into {\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARNUM\nwendquote}, sets {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote}~=~1, and calls
{\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to render the character.  If {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote}~$\ge$~20
(the disabled sentinel), it returns immediately.  Saves and restores
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote} since {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} uses that pointer.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{624}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}}}\moddef{draw blink char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $74DD
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_NORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}      ; Ctrl-N -> normal video

\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}         ; load blink column
    CMP     #$14              ; >= 20? (disabled sentinel)
    BCC     .draw
    RTS                       ; disabled -- do nothing

.draw:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}          ; copy blink state to font vars
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}      ; charset 1
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5} ; save \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5} (used by \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1})
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}  ; render the character
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5} ; restore \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\eatline
