\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}BLINK{\_}NORMAL}}{DRAW:unBLINK:unNORMAL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-CUGO4OOCVBOXMS5VIR3B3MURQE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{625}\nwdocspar
Sets up the blink cursor from the current combatant.  On the mob's turn,
the mob's packed position (byte 3 of mob data) is split into column and row,
and its appearance (byte 4) is converted to a font character number.
On the player's turn, the player's column and row are taken directly from
{\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}, and the font character is looked up via {\Tt{}{\$}0C7E\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{626}{\Tt{}IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN\nwendquote} is 0 on a mob's turn and 1 on the player's turn.
{\Tt{}SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} tests it to choose between unpacking the mob's
packed position or reading {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}COL\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} directly.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{627}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-33}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}  EQU     $5A74   ; 0 = mob's turn, 1 = player's turn
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{628}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{629}The routine checks {\Tt{}IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN\nwendquote} to decide which source to use for the blink cursor's position and character.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{630}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}     EQU     $5A64   ; current row during turn
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}     EQU     $5A63   ; current column during turn
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{631}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{632}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}}}\moddef{set blink target~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $16A3
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}

    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BAEQ    #$01,.player

    ; --- mob path: convert packed position to col/row ---
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y            ; mob data[3] = packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}          ; A=col, Y=row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y            ; mob data[4] = appearance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1} ; appearance -> font char number
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    RTS

    ; --- player path: col/row already separate ---
.player:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}            ; player font column
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}            ; player font row
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}                ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}             ;  | copy pointer \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12} -> \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1              ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1           ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}    ; look up player's font char
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}FONTCHAR}}{GET:unENTITY:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{633}\nwdocspar

\section{Entity management}

Performs one step of an insertion-sort on a linked list of characters,
ordered by byte~11 (level, masked to 5~bits).  It unlinks the character
at index~{\Tt{}SOURCE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} from the list and re-inserts it in sorted order
relative to index~{\Tt{}ACTIVE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

The linked-list ``next'' pointer is byte~2 of each character record.
{\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} (\$0C32) resolves a byte-2 value into a record pointer
at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR/{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote}.

Phase~1 (removal):
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Walks the chain from {\Tt{}SOURCE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}'s record, following byte-2 links via {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} until {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR/{\textbackslash}MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR+1\nwendquote} equals {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote} (found the predecessor).
  \item Patches the predecessor's byte~2 to skip the removed node.
  \item Decrements the source group's member count via {\Tt{}DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.
\end{enumerate}

Phase~2 (insertion):
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Walks the chain from {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}'s record, comparing byte~11 (level) values.
  \item Inserts the removed character before the first node with a lower level, or at the end if none found.
  \item Increments the destination group's member count via {\Tt{}INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}.
  \item Adjusts {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} to track list membership changes.
\end{enumerate}

When {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} is zero, a random decision (via {\Tt{}STEP{\_}PRNG\nwendquote}) determines
the insertion point instead of the level comparison.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{634}{\Tt{}REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY\nwendquote} temporarily holds byte 11 (level) of the node being
compared during the insertion phase.  {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}LINK\nwendquote} saves the removed
node's next-link so it can be spliced back in.  {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}ROOM\nwendquote} records
which room is being processed.  {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} uses all three during
the two-phase unlink-and-reinsert operation.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{635}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}    EQU     $5A2B   ; temp: byte 11 of node for sorted insert
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}        EQU     $5A03   ; current room/location being processed
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}        EQU     $5A2A   ; temp: saved next-link during reorder
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{636}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{637}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}}}\moddef{reorder char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0F84
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}

; --- Phase 1: unlink character \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21} from its current chain ---
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            ; source character index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}        ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15} = record pointer
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DECR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}       ; source group lost a member
.walk1:
    LDY     #$02                   ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y           ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36} = byte 2 of current record
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}           ; /  (the "next" link we're removing)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}           ; \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1 = resolve link; \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = mob data
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}           ; \\
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14},.advance1   ; | if different, keep walking
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1         ;  |
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1,.advance1 ; /
    ; Found predecessor: \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 points to the node being removed
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}           ; \\  if removed node's link == \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36},
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36},.patch1   ; /
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y         ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}           ; /  \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36} = (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14})[2] (successor's link)
.patch1:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y         ; \\  predecessor.byte2 = removed.byte2
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y           ; /  (skip over removed node)
    JMP     .phase2
.advance1:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}           ; \\  \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15} = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}               ;  | (advance to next record)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1             ; /
    JMP     .walk1

; --- Phase 2: re-insert at correct sorted position in \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}'s chain ---
.phase2:
    LDY     #$0B                   ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y         ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36} = byte 11 of removed node
    AND     #$1F                   ;  |   (level, 5-bit)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}       ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}            ; destination character index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}        ; \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15} = dest record pointer
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INCR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}       ; dest group gained a member
.walk2:
    LDY     #$02                   ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y           ;  | check byte 2 of current record
    BAEQ    #$00,.insert           ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}           ; resolve link
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}            ; \\
    BEQ     .random                ; /  if dest index = 0, use random decision
    LDY     #$0B                   ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}),Y       ;  | compare candidate's level
    AND     #$1F                   ;  | with removed node's level
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_SORT_KEY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}       ;  |
    BPL     .advance2              ; /  if >= , keep walking (insert later)
.insert:
    LDY     #$02                   ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y           ;  | (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14})[2] = (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15})[2]  (link successor)
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y         ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}           ;  | (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15})[2] = saved link (insert node)
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}),Y           ; /
    LDY     #$04                   ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y         ;  | if byte 4 of ($BC) >= $15, done
    CMP     #$15                   ;  |
    BCC     .adjust                ;  |
    RTS                            ; /
.adjust:
    LDA     #$00                   ; \\
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22},.chk28     ; |   decrement \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}        ; /
.chk28:
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21},.done      ; |   increment \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}        ; /
.done:
    RTS
.advance2:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}           ; \\  \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15} = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}               ;  | (advance to next record)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1         ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15}+1             ; /
    JMP     .walk2
.random:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}              ; \\  random decision
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}            ;  | if PRNG < 1 (i.e., == 0) -> insert
    CMP     #$01                   ;  |
    BMI     .insert                ;  | else keep walking
    BPL     .advance2              ; /
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}LINK}}{REORDER:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}SORT{\_}KEY}}{REORDER:unSORT:unKEY}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{638}\nwdocspar
The attract screen starts with scene index 1 (the first story character
setup) and begins playing scene \$26.

Characters are organized into groups via linked lists threaded through
byte~2 of each 16-byte mob data record (accessed via {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote}).
Byte~8 of the \emph{group head}'s mob data record is a packed field:
\begin{itemize}
\item bits 3--0: \textbf{group member count} --- how many characters
      are in this group's chain (0--4 in initial data)
\item bits 6--4: \textbf{pending XP} --- experience points accumulated
      but not yet applied to the character's level (0--7).
      The XP award routine at~\$7248 writes new values here; the
      flush routine at~\$6EE9 adds pending XP to byte~11's level
      field and clears it.
\item bit~7: \textbf{status flag} --- always zero in initial data;
      set during gameplay (controls message selection at~\$18AB).
      Preserved across XP flush.
\end{itemize}

These two entry points adjust the group member count (low nibble of
byte~8) on the head record pointed to by~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\$}102F\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}): decrements by~1 (source group lost a member)
\item {\Tt{}{\$}1033\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}): increments by~1 (destination group gained a member)
\end{itemize}
Guards: bails out if {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}CHAR{\_}REC\nwendquote} is zero (null pointer) or if byte~4 of the
record at~{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}REC\nwendquote} is~$\ge$~\$15 (inactive/dead character).
Called exclusively from {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} (\$0F84).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{639}{\Tt{}GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA\nwendquote} holds +1 or $-$1, set by the two entry points
{\Tt{}INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} respectively.  The shared
body adds this delta to the low nibble of byte 8 of the group head record.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{640}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{GROUP_COUNT_DELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37}   EQU     $5A2C   ; +1 or -1 delta for group count adjustment
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{641}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{642}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}}}\moddef{adjust char byte8~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $102F
\nwlinkedidentc{DECR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DECR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}

    LDA     #$FF              ; delta = -1
    BNE     .apply            ; always taken
\nwlinkedidentc{INCR_GROUP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}:
    LDA     #$01              ; delta = +1
.apply:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GROUP_COUNT_DELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37} ; save delta for later
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}          ; \\
    BANE    #$00,.not_null    ; |
    RTS                       ; /
.not_null:
    LDY     #$04              ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y    ;  | bail if byte 4 of (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}) >= $15
    CMP     #$15              ;  |   ($15+ = inactive/dead)
    BCC     .ok               ;  |
    RTS                       ; /
.ok:
    LDY     #$08              ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}),Y      ;  | group count (low nibble) += delta
    CLC                       ;  |
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{GROUP_COUNT_DELTA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37} ;  |
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}),Y      ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DECR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{DECR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{INCR{\_}GROUP{\_}COUNT}}{INCR:unGROUP:unCOUNT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GROUP{\_}COUNT{\_}DELTA}}{GROUP:unCOUNT:unDELTA}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-54W2OTUWX7KPVKAUABQU6MTVVE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{643}\nwdocspar
Group iteration uses two zero-page pointer pairs: {\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote} points
to the group head (or the member currently being processed), and
{\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is the iteration cursor that advances through the chain.
Both routines follow the ``next'' link in byte~2 of a mob data record,
resolve it via {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote}, and store the result in~{\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.
If the link is zero (end of chain), {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is set to null.

\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\$}12FA\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}): begins iteration by following
      byte~2 of the group head at~{\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote}.  If that link is zero,
      falls through to check {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} as a fallback.
\item {\Tt{}{\$}1300\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}): continues iteration by following
      byte~2 of the current cursor at~{\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.
\end{itemize}


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{644}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}}}\moddef{advance group link~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $12FA
\nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}

    LDY     #$02           ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y   ;  | check byte 2 of group head ($FA)
    BNE     .resolve       ; /  if nonzero, follow it
\nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}:
    LDY     #$02           ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y    ;  | check byte 2 of cursor ($F4)
    BNE     .resolve       ; /  if nonzero, follow it
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}        ; \\  end of chain:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1      ; /  null out \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    RTS
.resolve:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}   ; resolve link -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}   ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}        ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1 ;  | (advance cursor to next record)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1      ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{645}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{646}{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME\nwendquote} positions the cursor at row~21, loads the name string
pointer from bytes~0--1 of the record at {\Tt{}EFFECT{\_}REC\nwendquote}, prints it centered at
the bottom of the screen via {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote}, and resets the text
window.  This is the standard way to identify which character is being affected
in damage, death, and status messages.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{647}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-17}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}              EQU     $F6     ; target entity record for damage/stats (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{648}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{649}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}}}\moddef{print entity name~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1142
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    ; Print entity name: cursor to row 21, load name ptr from (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18})[0..1],
    ; print centered at bottom, then reset text window.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y ; name pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y ; name pointer high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{650}\nwdocspar
Loads the name pointer from bytes~0--1 of the mob record at~{\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
into~{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR/{\textbackslash}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR+1\nwendquote}, then tail-calls the text centering routine
at~\$7705, which centers and prints the name on screen row~23.
Used by 13~callers throughout the combat and interaction code.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{651}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}}}\moddef{print mob name~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0D8A
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}

    LDY     #$00                  ; \\
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y        ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1 = bytes 0-1 of ($F8)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}     ;  | (name string pointer)
    INY                           ;  |
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1   ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1} ; center and print on row 23
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{652}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{653}{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME\nwendquote} is a thin wrapper that copies the first two bytes of
the record at {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}---which hold a pointer to the member's name
string---into {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}, then tail-calls {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote}
to display the name centered on the status line.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{654}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}}}\moddef{print member name~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1406
\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}
    ; Copy (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12})[0..1] -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}/\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1, then JMP $7705
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{655}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{656}{\Tt{}LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}NAME{\_}PTR\nwendquote} loads the name string pointer from the first two
bytes of the entity record at {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR\nwendquote}, then
tail-calls {\Tt{}SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20\nwendquote} to position the text cursor in column~20
(the right-side status panel).  This prepares the display for printing the
current character's name during the status display.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{657}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}}}\moddef{load char name ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0925
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_NAME_PTR}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_NAME_PTR}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS_COL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}NAME{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unNAME:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}NAME{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unNAME:unPTR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS:unCOL20}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS:unCOL20}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{658}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{659}{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE\nwendquote} reads the current entity's packed position from
byte~3 of {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}, unpacks it to column and row, and stores the
coordinates in both the font parameters ({\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote}) and the
blink-cursor parameters ({\Tt{}BLINK{\_}COL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}BLINK{\_}ROW\nwendquote}).  It then loads the
character's sprite index from {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}SPRITE\nwendquote}, sets {\Tt{}FONT{\_}CHARSET\nwendquote} to~1
(custom font), and tail-calls {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to draw the sprite at the
entity's position.  This is the standard way to draw or redraw a character's
map icon.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{660}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-37}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}         EQU     $5A04   ; character's font char number for display
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{661}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{662}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}}}\moddef{setup char sprite~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0933
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{663}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{664}{\Tt{}LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA\nwendquote} is a thin wrapper: it calls {\Tt{}GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD\nwendquote} and
copies the result from {\Tt{}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}PTR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote}).  Several
callers use this as a shortcut to both look up a character and set the
main iteration pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{665}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}}}\moddef{load char to fa~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6EC9
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}
    ; Wrapper: \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1} then copy \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-15} -> $FA/$FB.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}REC}}{CHAR:unREC}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{666}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{667}{\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} is a convenience wrapper that copies {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
into {\Tt{}TARGET{\_}REC\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}PLAYER\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}SOURCE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, then
tail-calls {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to re-sort the current character within its group's
linked list.  This is used after stat changes that might affect the character's
position in the sorted order.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{668}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}}}\moddef{reorder current char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1414
\nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CURRENT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CURRENT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}
    ; Copy \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1, store \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1} -> \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}, JMP $0F84
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCURRENT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCURRENT:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{669}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Game Display}

Draws the ``PRESS SPACE BAR TO CONTINUE'' (or ``PRESS THE BUTTON TO
CONTINUE'') message in the text window at the bottom of the screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{670}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}}}\moddef{display status bar~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6D1F
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}

    LDA     #$90                               ; ctrl-P with high bit (toggle inverse)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{STATUS_BORDER_DATA}{PYNWmai0-R3POTCM34ETXX727UT3NU4FP2A000000-1},\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3} ; status bar border data -> $06/$07
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}                      ; draw border box
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}                      ; Ctrl-A, '0'
    LDA     #$17
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}                           ; WNDBTM = 23

    LDA     $5A00                              ; joystick/keyboard flag
    BNE     .joystick

    ; Keyboard path:
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_SPACE}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
.store_hi_and_print:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
.set_margin:
    LDA     #$04
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_COL}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-4}                           ; WNDLFT = 4
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}                       ; print string, return

.joystick:
    LDA     #<\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_BUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     #>\nwlinkedidentc{S_PRESS_BUTTON}{PYNWmai0-NF2SMQY52FAUY37ISHEQH2XRMI000000-1}
    JMP     .store_hi_and_print                ; reuse STA \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1 from keyboard path
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}}\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}}\\{{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STATUS{\_}BORDER{\_}DATA}}{STATUS:unBORDER:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}BUTTON}}{S:unPRESS:unBUTTON}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{S{\_}PRESS{\_}SPACE}}{S:unPRESS:unSPACE}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}COL}}{TEXT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}ROW}}{TEXT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{671}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{672}{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20\nwendquote} configure the HRCG text
window for the status panel.  The first entry point sets column~0 (left side);
the second sets column~20 (right side).  Both set the cursor to row~20, send
HRCG control codes A/B, output a carriage return (\$8C) to position the
cursor, fill 20~columns with spaces, then configure the text window width
via {\Tt{}SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW\nwendquote} and output ctrl-K (\$8B) to finalize.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{673}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}}}\moddef{setup text pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $76D2
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}
; Two entry points: $76D2 (col 0) and $76D8 (col 20)
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $24
    BEQ     .set_row
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS_COL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}:          ; $76D8 - original \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_TEXT_POS_COL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1} entry
    LDA     #$14
    STA     $24
.set_row:
    LDA     #$14
    STA     $25
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    LDA     #$8C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDX     #$14
.space_loop:
    LDA     #$A0
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    DEX
    BNE     .space_loop
    LDA     #$14
    STA     $25
    LDA     #$0A
    SEC
    SBC     $24
    STA     $24
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TEXT_WINDOW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    LDA     #$8B
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS:unCOL20}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}TEXT{\_}POS{\_}COL20}}{SETUP:unTEXT:unPOS:unCOL20}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TEXT{\_}WINDOW}}{SET:unTEXT:unWINDOW}{PYNWmai0-OIYBNFBWGB35GOP3IW3GLKVWSA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{674}\nwdocspar
\label{sec:text_renderer}

Reads a byte stream from the pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}06/{\$}07\nwendquote} and renders
characters on the hi-res screen.  It maintains column/row state and
supports several control codes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{675}{\Tt{}TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN\nwendquote} define the column bounds
for text wrapping.  {\Tt{}TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX\nwendquote} saves the Y index into the byte
stream across {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} calls, since rendering may clobber~Y.
{\Tt{}TEXT{\_}RENDERER\nwendquote} initializes the margins (2 and 18) and row, then loops
through bytes, advancing the column and wrapping to the next row when it
passes the right margin.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{676}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}        EQU     $5A96   ; right margin column for text wrap
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}         EQU     $5A97   ; left margin column for text wrap
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}          EQU     $5A98   ; saved Y index into byte stream
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{677}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{678}The routine below processes the byte stream.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{679}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}}}\moddef{text renderer~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6C8E
\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}

    LDY     #$00
.init:
    LDA     #$02
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}    ; left margin = 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            ; current column = 2
    LDA     #$12
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}   ; right margin = $12 (18)
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}            ; current row = 1

    ; --- Main byte-reading loop ---
.fetch:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}),Y ; read byte from stream
    BMI     .set_pos            ; bit 7 set -> position command
    BANE    #$7F,.not_end
    RTS                         ; $7F = end of stream

.not_end:
    BAEQ    #$7E,.pause         ; $7E = pause
    BAEQ    #$7D,.reset         ; $7D = reset to full-screen mode

    ; --- Character output ---
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}     ; save stream index
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}        ; character code
    LDA     #$02
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}        ; character width = 2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}    ; draw at current position
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            ; advance column
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}   ; past right margin?
    BCC     .next               ; no -> continue
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}            ; yes -> next row
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}    ;   reset column to left margin
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
.next:
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}     ; restore stream index
    INY                         ; advance to next byte
    BNE     .fetch              ; loop (max 256 per page)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}           ; overflow handler

    ; --- Position command ($80-$FE) ---
.set_pos:
    AND     #$7F                ; row = byte & $7F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}),Y ; next byte = column
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    INY
    JMP     .fetch

    ; --- Pause ($7E): run script engine, show status bar ---
.pause:
    TYA                         ; \\
    PHA                         ;  | save stream index
    NOP
    LDX     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}       ; run attract script
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}     ; save stream pointer
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR}{PYNWmai0-CAQTAAOHJTMFOSJ452F3J7I5JQ000000-1}  ; (clobbers \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3})
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_STREAM_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-3}     ; restore stream pointer
    PLA                         ; restore stream index
    TAY
    NOP
    INY                         ; advance past $7E
    JMP     .init               ; reinit margins/position

    ; --- Reset ($7D): full-screen text mode ---
.reset:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_LEFT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}    ; left margin = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}            ; column = 0
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}            ; row = 0
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TEXT_RIGHT_MARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}   ; right margin = $14 (20)
    INY                         ; advance past $7D
    JMP     .fetch
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RENDERER}}{TEXT:unRENDERER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}STATUS{\_}BAR}}{DISPLAY:unSTATUS:unBAR}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}LEFT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unLEFT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}RIGHT{\_}MARGIN}}{TEXT:unRIGHT:unMARGIN}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}IDX}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEXT{\_}STREAM{\_}PTR}}{TEXT:unSTREAM:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4PQFNHIY4HEZD756HZHHCIBVCA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{680}\nwdocspar

\chapter{The Main Loop}

The {\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} routine goes through a sound table, executing each
instruction until it encounters a {\Tt{}TONE\nwendquote} instruction. It then
plays that tone, and then jumps to a routine given by {\Tt{}indirect{\_}routine\nwendquote}. This
routine should do something, and then return to the song-playing loop by
jumping to {\Tt{}next{\_}table{\_}entry\nwendquote}. This allows the game to play a sound while doing
something else, for example, animating the splash screen at the beginning of the
game, and also interrupts the sound on keypress or joystick button press.

If {\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} encounters an {\Tt{}END\nwendquote} instruction, it returns, and that ends
the song.

{\Tt{}start{\_}sound\nwendquote} also checks for a keypress or a joystick button press, and this
is the same as an {\Tt{}END\nwendquote} instruction.

\label{ch:attract}

When the main program starts at {\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote}, it calls {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote} to set up
hardware and graphics, then checks {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}. If zero (first run), it enters
the \emph{attract screen}---the title sequence that cycles through story scenes
until the player presses a key.

The entry point at {\Tt{}{\$}0800\nwendquote} is where the EALDR transfers control after loading
and decrypting the game data.  On entry:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Calls {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, which initializes the Apple~II hardware, sets up hi-res graphics mode, and relocates the HRCG library and disk I/O routines to their runtime addresses.
  \item Sets {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}PTR\nwendquote} ({\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote}) to {\Tt{}{\$}4009\nwendquote}, the base of the character record array.
  \item Inspects {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote}---a count of all active mob groups in the game world.  On the very first run this count is zero, so the code branches into {\Tt{}ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN\nwendquote}, the title sequence that plays until the player presses a key.
\end{enumerate}

Once the attract screen exits (or is skipped on subsequent rounds), the main
loop begins.  It iterates through each character record in sequence, nine
bytes at a time.  For each active character (record byte~8 nonzero), it calls
{\Tt{}ENTER{\_}LOCATION\nwendquote} to redraw the map if the player has moved to a new
location, dispatches scene events for players~1 and~3, and then hands off to
{\Tt{}PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS\nwendquote} to run AI turns for all mob groups attached to this
character.  After all characters have been processed, {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote} runs
the between-round event system, and the loop restarts.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{681}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}}}\moddef{main entry~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0800
\nwlinkedidentc{MAIN_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{MAIN_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INIT}{PYNWmai0-XR5IMSHLGD4AKOBGLQGCQ6POTY000000-1}
.restart:
    LDA     #$09               ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}           ;  | $FA/$FB = $4009 (character record base)
    LDA     #$40               ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1         ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}    ; zero on first run (no mobs yet)
    BNE     .has_mobs          ; nonzero = game in progress
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_SCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}
.has_mobs:
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}     ; start with player 1
.char_loop:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y       ; char record byte 8 (status/group)
    BEQ     .next_char         ; zero = inactive, skip
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_LOCATION}{PYNWmai0-D6ZOQ25SLLU5RJRDGDDWC72R24000000-1}     ; draw map if location changed
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$01,.run_scene    ; player 1?
    BANE    #$03,.process_mobs ; player 3?
.run_scene:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_SCENE_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1} ; scene event dispatch (players 1 & 3)
.process_mobs:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_MOB_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1} ; walk mob list, run turns
.next_char:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    CLC
    LDA     #$09               ; advance to next 9-byte record
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1
.no_carry:
    LDY     #$01
