    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y       ; byte 1 of next record
    BANE    #$FF,.char_loop    ; more characters -> loop
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}      ; between-round random event dispatch
    JMP     .restart           ; restart the game loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}LOCATION}}{ENTER:unLOCATION}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INIT}}{GAME:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{682}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{683}Each character in the game world owns a linked list of mob groups, threaded
through byte~2 of the character record.  {\Tt{}PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS\nwendquote} walks this
list, resolving each link through {\Tt{}GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA\nwendquote} to obtain a pointer to the
16-byte mob data record.

The routine classifies each group by its type field (bits~5--0 of mob data
byte~6).  Types below~3 are \emph{inactive}---friendly NPCs or party members
not currently in a scene.  For these, the game displays a brief status message
via {\Tt{}SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS\nwendquote} and runs {\Tt{}AUTO{\_}HEAL\nwendquote} to gradually restore hit
points.  Types~3 and above are \emph{active}: the routine sets up the
character sprite, checks whether the group actually needs a turn, and if so
enters {\Tt{}GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP\nwendquote}.

There is also a 1-in-24 chance (based on a PRNG roll masked with {\Tt{}{\$}17\nwendquote}) of
calling a periodic disk checkpoint at {\Tt{}{\$}A508\nwendquote} in the resident area.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{684}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}}}\moddef{process mob groups~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0884
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_MOB_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_MOB_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}
    ; Walk the mob linked list for the current character.
    ; For each group: inactive (type < 3) -> display message + auto-heal;
    ; active (type >= 3) -> set up scene and enter \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}.
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y     ; char record byte 2 = first group link
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}     ; save as current link
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_MAP}{PYNWmai0-EOHKNJEDS3DWBV2X225BNUTVAM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    AND     #$17             ; 1-in-24 chance (bits 0-2,4)
    BNE     .walk_list
    JSR     $A508            ; periodic disk checkpoint (resident)
.walk_list:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}     ; current link in chain
    BNE     .has_mob
    RTS                      ; zero = end of list
.has_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}     ; resolve link -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}     ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}       ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1   ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1     ; /
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y   ; mob data byte 2 = next link
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36}     ; save for next iteration
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y   ; mob data byte 6
    AND     #$3F             ; bits 5-0 = mob type
    CMP     #$03             ; type >= 3?
    BPL     .active_mob
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_IDLE_STATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1} ; inactive: print name + message
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}        ; heal party members
    JMP     .walk_list
.active_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{START_MOB_TURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}   ; active: set up sprite, enter turn loop
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}        ; reset blink column to 20
    JMP     .walk_list
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}MOB{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unMOB:unGROUPS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}}\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}MAP}}{CLEAR:unMAP}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-W2LVFLVSOQSVUZQAE4BYND3TNQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{685}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{686}When an inactive mob group is encountered during the list walk,
{\Tt{}SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS\nwendquote} prints a quick status line.  It scrolls the status area,
prints the mob's name, scrolls again, and displays message {\Tt{}{\$}20\nwendquote}---the idle
status text.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{687}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}}}\moddef{show idle status~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $08D1
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_IDLE_STATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_IDLE_STATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}
    ; Display a status message for an inactive mob group.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$20                    ; message $20: idle status text
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}IDLE{\_}STATUS}}{SHOW:unIDLE:unSTATUS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-BXFGZVLATG4QAGP5OVCCOUIMLI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{688}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{689}For active mob groups (type $\geq$~3), {\Tt{}START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN\nwendquote} prepares the
display and enters the turn loop.  It reads the mob's appearance byte (mob
data byte~4), converts it to a font character number via
{\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote}, and stores the result in {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}SPRITE\nwendquote}.  The
Y~register after this conversion holds the font group, which doubles as the
AI behavior mode---this determines whether the mob is player-controlled, a
friendly NPC, or a hostile creature.

The routine then calls {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN\nwendquote} to decide whether this group
actually requires a turn.  If the carry flag comes back clear, the mob is
skipped.  Otherwise, the cursor is positioned to row~21, the scene display is
set up, and control falls through to {\Tt{}GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{690}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}}}\moddef{start mob turn~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $08DF
\nwlinkedidentc{START_MOB_TURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{START_MOB_TURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}
    ; Set up the character sprite and enter the game turn loop
    ; for an active mob group (type >= 3).
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y       ; mob data byte 4 = appearance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}          ; save font character
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}         ; Y = font group -> AI behavior mode
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_MOB_NEEDS_TURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1} ; carry set = needs a turn
    BCS     .enter_turn
    RTS                          ; carry clear = skip this mob
.enter_turn:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_SCENE_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-Z4H4ET7VENUTTDJTBO2MJCGUYY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    STA     $5AA6                ; save AI mode (unused in main.bin)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}MOB{\_}TURN}}{START:unMOB:unTURN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}SCENE{\_}DISPLAY}}{SETUP:unSCENE:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-RTOCRDZRIYEBS6CCCATVPAMROA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{691}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{692}Not every mob group needs to act every round.  {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN\nwendquote}
applies three filters, returning with carry set if the mob should take a turn
and carry clear if it can be skipped.

Player-controlled characters (AI mode~0) always get a turn.  For
AI-controlled mobs, the routine checks mob data byte~12's low nibble: if
nonzero, the mob has a pending action queued from a previous round.  Failing
that, it checks the mob's current position for encounters (via
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}) and adjacent threats (via {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS\nwendquote}).
If neither is found, the mob has nothing to react to, so
{\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED\nwendquote} is called and the turn is skipped.  This keeps the game
moving briskly---mobs in empty corridors don't waste time.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{693}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-39}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}         EQU     $5A26   ; accumulated adjacent threat level
\nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}        EQU     $5A1F   ; 0/1/2 from \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{694}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{695}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}}}\moddef{check mob needs turn~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0958
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_MOB_NEEDS_TURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_MOB_NEEDS_TURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}
    ; Check whether a mob group needs a game turn.
    ; Returns: carry set = needs turn, carry clear = skip.
    ; Skips if: AI mode is player (0), or record byte 12 low nibble
    ; is nonzero, or no encounter and no adjacent threats.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BEQ     .needs_turn      ; player-controlled always gets a turn
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y   ; mob data byte 12
    AND     #$0F             ; low nibble
    BNE     .needs_turn      ; nonzero = pending action -> turn
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y   ; mob data byte 3 = position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}  ; check for encounter at this position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BNE     .needs_turn      ; encounter found -> turn
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y   ; position again
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BNE     .needs_turn      ; threats nearby -> turn
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1} ; no action needed -> clear restricted flag
    CLC                      ; carry clear = skip
    RTS
.needs_turn:
    SEC                      ; carry set = needs turn
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}MOB{\_}NEEDS{\_}TURN}}{CHECK:unMOB:unNEEDS:unTURN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OSUQDA7G4VYGSIWN2PFJ4XPN5Q000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{696}\nwdocspar

\chapter{The Game Turn}

According to the original manual:

Strike probability

Whenever any character tries to strike another character, the game will
compute his chance of success. Any character's base chance of striking
his victim is 3.125% times their dexterity. Thus, a player with a dexterity of
11 has a 34.375% chance of striking his victim. However, the base chance is
adjusted by several factors:

If the victim is:

particularly difficult to hit

(halflings and elves have this ability to dodge) . . .. .. . ... subtract 12.5%
particularly easy to hit. . . . . . ....... . .. . .. .. .. .. . .. . . . .. . add 12.5%
extremely easy to hit ....... . . ... . . .. . . .. .. .. . .. . . . .. ... . add 25%
down (unconscious, in hand to hand combat, or resting) .. . . add 18.75%
currently resting (this is in
addition to the adjustment for being down) . . . .. .. . . . . . .. . add 9.375 %
defending . .. .. ..... .. .. . ... . . . ... . ........ . ..... subtract 9.375%
attacking ..... . ... . ... . ..... . ... ... ..... .... . . ... . no adjustment
running . . .... . .. . ..... .. .... . ... . .. .. .. . ..... . .. subtract 3.125 %
on the same space with attacker, the stronger character is
is given an advantage .. . .. . add 1.5625% times attackers strength and
subtract 1.5625% times victim's strength

The chance of striking the victim is then adjusted, if necessary, so that it
is never less than 3.125% nor greater than 96.875%.

The probabilities are in increments of 1/32. In the code, 1/32 is represented by
a single count in 6 bits, so the maximum count is 31 (96.875%).

DATA[0,1] = name
DATA[4] = creature type:
  0x00: Human
  0x01: Elf
  0x02: Dwarf
  0x03: Halfling
  0x15: Human
  0x23: Human (Morgiana, Princess Buddir)
  0x3C: Owl
  0x3F: Statue, Sultan, Right guard, Left guard, small zombie, big zombie
  0x41: Dwarf
  0x43: Thief
  0x44: Bear
  0x45: Rat
  0x46: Wolf
  0x47: Dragon
  0x48: Greasy
  0x4A: Sword
  0x4B: Ram
  0x4C: Scorpion
  0x4D: Succubus
  0x4E: Tiger, Leo, Jackal
  0x4F: Crab
  0x50: Bull
  0x54: Zombie (Witless)
  0x58: Thief
  0x59: Brown Bear
  0x5E: Wanderer
  0x5F: Mechanical Sword
  0x61: Scorpion (Giant)
  0x65: Sonny Boy Minotaur
  0x93: Statue (Gemini I, Gemini II)
  0x93: Aladdin
  0x94: Elf
  0x9B: White Dragon
  0x9E: Bane of Thieves
  0xA6: Unicorn

DATA[5] = STR
DATA[6] = CON/HP 0-3F
DATA[7] = MEL-1
DATA[9] = HTH-1
DATA[B] =
  7: Extremely easy to hit
  6: Particularly difficult to hit
  5: ? Incredibly easy to hit?
  4: DEX-1
  3: DEX-1
  2: DEX-1
  1: DEX-1
  0: DEX-1

DATA[C] = SPD
DATA[F] =
  7:
  6:
  5:
  4:
  3:
  2: Unconscious/Down
  1: State
  0: State

State:
  0:
  1:
  2:
  3: Defending

\label{sec:game-turn-loop}

Handles one character's complete turn---movement, input, encounters,
and event dispatch.  Called once per character per game tick.

\paragraph{Setup.}
The character's current position (field~3 of the record at {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote})
is split into column and row.  Movement flags are cleared, and the
number of movement points is read from field~12 (low nibble).
If the character's constitution (field~6, bits~0--5) is below~3,
or if {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} returns~2 (hostile territory), a
``restricted'' flag is set (bit~2 of field~15).

\paragraph{Input.}
For the player ({\Tt{}{\$}5A05\nwendquote}~=~0), keyboard input is read via the
resident dispatch at {\Tt{}{\$}A44C\nwendquote}.  For NPCs, {\Tt{}AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET\nwendquote}
selects a destination and {\Tt{}FUN{\_}6742\nwendquote} computes a direction.
The direction value encodes both movement and commands:

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{cl}
\textbf{Value} & \textbf{Action} \\
\hline
1 & North (row$-$) \\
2 & South (row$+$) \\
3 & West (col$-$) \\
4 & East (col$+$) \\
5 & Pass (skip turn) \\
6 & Action 6 $\to$ \$14CD \\
7 & Action 7 $\to$ \$14B7 \\
8 & Action 8 $\to$ set state~1 \\
9 & Fight/attack $\to$ \$143F
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\paragraph{Movement.}
After applying the direction, the new position is converted via
{\Tt{}COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS\nwendquote} and checked with {\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote}.
If the cell is empty, the move is committed (position updated, sprite
redrawn) and adjacent threats are re-checked.  Finding no threats
ends the turn early.

\paragraph{Encounter dispatch.}
If something occupies the destination cell, the result from
{\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote} determines the handler:
\begin{itemize}
\item {\Tt{}{\$}BF\nwendquote} $\geq$ \$80 --- mob encounter $\to$ \$1E5A
\item Event byte~1 bits~7--6 $\neq$ \$C0 --- {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}
\item \$C0--\$D1 --- {\Tt{}PICKUP{\_}TREASURE\nwendquote}
\item \$D2--\$D4 --- {\Tt{}TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT\nwendquote}
\item \$D5--\$DA --- map/area event $\to$ \$70DF
\item \$FE --- empty-slot interaction $\to$ \$1D4D
\end{itemize}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{697}{\Tt{}TURN{\_}START{\_}COL\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW\nwendquote} record the character's
position at the start of the turn (for restoring the old cell after a
move).  {\Tt{}MOVE{\_}POINTS\nwendquote} is the movement budget; {\Tt{}STEPS{\_}TAKEN\nwendquote} counts
steps consumed so far.  {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}DIR\nwendquote} holds the direction or command
code (1--9) from the player or AI.  {\Tt{}TURN{\_}ACTIVE\nwendquote} is set to 1 while
the turn loop is running.  All six variables are initialized by
{\Tt{}GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} at the start of each character's turn.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{698}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}  EQU     $5A61   ; column at start of turn
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}  EQU     $5A62   ; row at start of turn
\nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}     EQU     $5A65   ; movement points remaining
\nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}     EQU     $5A66   ; steps taken this turn
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}       EQU     $5A67   ; direction/command from input (1-9)
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}     EQU     $5B27   ; 1 while turn is in progress
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{699}\nwdocspar

{\Tt{}GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} is the central routine that executes a single character's
turn.  It handles both player-controlled characters (where input comes from
the keyboard or joystick) and AI-controlled mobs (where
{\Tt{}AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} selects a destination and {\Tt{}NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI\nwendquote} picks
directions).

The routine begins by recording the character's starting position and
clearing movement state.  It checks constitution (field~6): characters with
fewer than~3 HP are restricted from moving.  It also checks for hostile
encounters at the current position and restricts movement if found.

For AI characters, {\Tt{}AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} runs first to pick a target
position.  Then the movement point budget is computed from field~12's low
nibble, biased by one extra point if the character's level exceeds its
steps taken.

The main loop reads directional input (from the player or the AI), applies
it to the current position, and checks what occupies the destination cell.
Empty cells allow movement; occupied cells trigger the encounter dispatch
table described above.  The loop continues until movement points are
exhausted, the character enters combat, or a special event fires.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{700}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}}}\moddef{game turn loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $19AD
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_TURN_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}

    ; --- setup: save position, clear flags ---
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y           ; char field 3 = packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}         ; clear restricted flag (bit 2 of field 15)

    ; --- check constitution and encounters ---
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y           ; char field 6 (constitution/HP)
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$03
    BPL     .con_ok
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}           ; set restricted (too weak)
.con_ok:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BANE    #$02,.enc_ok
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}           ; set restricted (hostile territory)
.enc_ok:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BEQ     .get_speed
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}         ; NPC: pick a destination

    ; --- determine movement points ---
.get_speed:
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y           ; char field 12
    AND     #$0F                     ; low nibble = speed
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}

    ; --- adjust points based on threats ---
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BAEQ    #$02,.chk_limit          ; hostile -> check if enough to limit
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}       ; check adjacent threats
    BAEQ    #$01,.move_loop          ; exactly 1 threat -> keep full
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    CMP     #$02
    BCC     .move_loop               ; < 2 points -> keep as is
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}          ; random(move_points)
    BAEQ    #$00,.do_limit           ; random == 0 -> force limit
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}              ; reduce randomly
    BNE     .move_loop
.chk_limit:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    CMP     #$02
    BCC     .move_loop               ; < 2 -> use as is
.do_limit:
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}          ; random(1) -> 0 or 1
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                     ; 1 or 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BNE     .move_loop               ; always

    ; === MOVEMENT LOOP ===
\nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}:                     ; $1A31 - external entry point
.move_loop:
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41},.has_points
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41},.end_turn    ; out of points, took steps -> done
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26},.has_points ; player with 0 points, 0 steps -> still prompt
.end_turn:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}                 ; end turn

.has_points:
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26},.player_input
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NPC_MOVE_AI}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}              ; NPC movement AI
    JMP     .dispatch_cmd

    ; --- player input ---
.player_input:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}          ; set up input UI
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+4       ; check if movement enabled
    BNE     .have_input
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}           ; no input -> exit
.have_input:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_INPUT_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}
    JSR     $A44C                    ; resident: read keyboard
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BANE    #$00,.do_move            ; player goes straight to movement
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}           ; cancelled

    ; --- NPC command dispatch (player skips this) ---
.dispatch_cmd:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    CMP     #$05
    BCC     .do_move                 ; 1-4: movement direction
    BNE     .not_pass
    JMP     .move_loop               ; 5: pass
.not_pass:
    BANE    #$09,.not_fight
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}           ; 9: fight -> set restricted
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}
.not_fight:
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}       ; re-check encounter
    PLA
    BANE    #$07,.not_cmd7
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}       ; 7: action
.not_cmd7:
    BCS     .cmd8
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{START_COMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}             ; 6: action
.cmd8:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_STATE_FIGHT}{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}          ; 8: set state 1

    ; --- apply movement direction ---
.do_move:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    CMP     #$02
    BMI     .move_ok
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_CAN_LEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}          ; can we leave hostile zone?
    BAEQ    #$01,.move_ok
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}                 ; blocked -> end turn
.move_ok:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .not_north
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}              ; 1: north
    JMP     .check_dest
.not_north:
    BNE     .not_south
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}              ; 2: south
    JMP     .check_dest
.not_south:
    BANE    #$03,.go_east
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}              ; 3: west
    JMP     .check_dest
.go_east:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}              ; 4: east

    ; --- check what's at the destination ---
.check_dest:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}       ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1,.something  ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1 != 0 -> occupied
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16},.empty        ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16} == 0 -> empty cell
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}            ; display blocked message?
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_LOCKED_MSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}

.empty:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}              ; commit move (update pos, draw sprite)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}       ; check adjacent threats
    BANE    #$00,.keep_moving        ; threats remain -> continue
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}              ; no threats -> stop
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
.keep_moving:
    JMP     .move_loop

    ; --- destination occupied: dispatch by type ---
.something:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    CMP     #$80
    BMI     .event                   ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1 < $80 -> event entry
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}     ; \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1 >= $80 -> mob encounter

.event:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y           ; event byte 1
    TAX
    AND     #$C0
    BAEQ    #$C0,.activated
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}         ; non-activated -> encounter

.activated:
    TXA
    CMP     #$D2
    BPL     .not_treasure
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PICKUP_TREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}          ; $C0-$D1: treasure

.not_treasure:
    CMP     #$D5
    BPL     .not_scene
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TRIGGER_SCENE_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}      ; $D2-$D4: scene event

.not_scene:
    CMP     #$DB
    BPL     .not_map_event
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}               ; $D5-$DA: save \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}              ; commit move first
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}               ; restore \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_SHOP}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}

.not_map_event:
    BAEQ    #$FE,.empty_slot
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}           ; $DB-$FD: unknown

.empty_slot:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_EVENT_SLOT}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}        ; $FE: empty slot interaction
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}TURN{\_}LOOP}}{GAME:unTURN:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}}\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}SHOP}}{DISPLAY:unSHOP}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}EVENT{\_}SLOT}}{HANDLE:unEVENT:unSLOT}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI}}{NPC:unMOVE:unAI}}\\{{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT}}{SET:unSTATE:unFIGHT}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}}\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}SHOP}}{DISPLAY:unSHOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}EVENT{\_}SLOT}}{HANDLE:unEVENT:unSLOT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}DIR}}{INPUT:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI}}{NPC:unMOVE:unAI}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT}}{SET:unSTATE:unFIGHT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{701}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{702}{\Tt{}TURN{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote} is the decision point after a character finishes moving.
If {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE\nwendquote} is zero, the character is under player control and
execution jumps to {\Tt{}TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} to present the action menu.  Otherwise,
the character is AI-controlled: {\Tt{}SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} evaluates the
situation and returns a status code.  A return of~2 means a hostile is present
at the same position, so execution enters {\Tt{}ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE\nwendquote}.  A negative
value means the AI has committed to an attack, jumping to {\Tt{}START{\_}COMBAT\nwendquote}.
Any other value means the area is safe, so the character attempts
{\Tt{}AUTO{\_}HEAL\nwendquote} to recover between fights.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{703}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}}}\moddef{turn dispatch~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $14A3
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BEQ     .no_combat
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_COMBAT_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$02,\nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}
    BMI     \nwlinkedidentc{START_COMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}
.no_combat:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}DISPATCH}}{TURN:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}DISPATCH}}{TURN:unDISPATCH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET}}{SELECT:unCOMBAT:unTARGET}}\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}}\\{{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET}}{SELECT:unCOMBAT:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{704}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{705}{\Tt{}COMMIT{\_}MOVE\nwendquote} finalizes a character's movement on the map:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Writes {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}COL\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} into the font and blink-cursor parameters.
  \item Packs them into a single byte with {\Tt{}COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS\nwendquote}.
  \item Stores the result in the entity's position field (byte~3 of {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}).
  \item Draws the character's sprite at the new location via {\Tt{}RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.
  \item Sets {\Tt{}TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD\nwendquote} to~\$16.
\end{enumerate}
Execution falls through into {\Tt{}RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS\nwendquote}, which:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Converts the turn's starting position back into a packed byte.
  \item Calls {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote} to restore whatever was underneath the character's old location.
  \item Updates the starting position to the new current position.
\end{enumerate}
If {\Tt{}TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD\nwendquote} is exactly~\$16---meaning this is the
first call since {\Tt{}COMMIT{\_}MOVE\nwendquote} set it---the guard is decremented and the
{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} is invoked to process any movement-triggered scripts.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{706}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}   EQU     $5AA9   ; turn reset: guards one-shot script execution
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD}}{TURN:unSCRIPT:unGUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD}}{TURN:unSCRIPT:unGUARD}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{707}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{708}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}}}\moddef{commit move~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1B52
\nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    ; Commit move: store \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}/ROW, convert to packed pos,
    ; update char field 3, set font char, draw sprite
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y   ; update char packed position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-38}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1} ; draw sprite
    LDX     #$16
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}
    ; falls through to \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}:
    ; Reset to turn start: convert start col/row to packed pos,
    ; call $1156, update current->start, conditionally run script
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}
    BXEQ    #$16,.run_script
    RTS
.run_script:
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_SCRIPT_GUARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD}}{TURN:unSCRIPT:unGUARD}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{CHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARSET}}{FONT:unCHARSET}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}FONT{\_}CHAR}}{RENDER:unFONT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}SCRIPT{\_}GUARD}}{TURN:unSCRIPT:unGUARD}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{709}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{710}{\Tt{}END{\_}TURN\nwendquote} wraps up a character's turn:
\begin{enumerate}
  \item Clears {\Tt{}TURN{\_}ACTIVE\nwendquote}.
  \item Calls {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT\nwendquote} to update the restricted flag based on the encounter at the character's final position.
  \item Checks whether the character has enough steps remaining for another action: if {\Tt{}STEPS{\_}TAKEN\nwendquote} is zero, loops back to {\Tt{}TURN{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote}; otherwise compares the character's level (field~\$0C, bits~2--0 after ROR) against {\Tt{}STEPS{\_}TAKEN\nwendquote}, and if the level is high enough, the character gets another turn via {\Tt{}TURN{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote}.
\end{enumerate}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{711}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}}}\moddef{end turn~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1BA7
\nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}
    ; End turn: clear \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}, check encounter, compare level vs \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BNE     .check_level
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}
.check_level:
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$07
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BMI     .too_low
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_DISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-JHFEVAMUPKDCY3L64TRD56UQBI000000-1}
.too_low:
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}DISPATCH}}{TURN:unDISPATCH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}DISPATCH}}{TURN:unDISPATCH}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{712}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{713}{\Tt{}SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE\nwendquote} writes a new value into the low two bits of byte~15 of
the current entity record, preserving the upper six bits.  The two-bit field
encodes the character's turn phase: 0~for idle, 1~for fighting, 2~for
entering combat, and 3~for actively attacking.  Multiple routines call this
to advance or reset the character through the turn state machine.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{714}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}}}\moddef{set char state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1BE0
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    ; Set char field 15 low 2 bits to A
    STA     $5A60
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$FC  ; clear low 2 bits
    ORA     $5A60 ; set to new value
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{715}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{716}{\Tt{}SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT\nwendquote} sets the character's turn state to~1 (fighting) by
loading~\$01 and tail-calling {\Tt{}SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE\nwendquote}.  This state indicates the
character is engaged in combat but has not yet committed to an attack.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{717}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}}}\moddef{set state fight~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1BC6
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_STATE_FIGHT}{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_STATE_FIGHT}{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}
    ; Set char field 15 state to 1
    LDA     #$01
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT}}{SET:unSTATE:unFIGHT}{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}STATE{\_}FIGHT}}{SET:unSTATE:unFIGHT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-VXXGYZ4VDZ4FHS3E2VXVMVMFFU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{718}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{719}{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT\nwendquote} evaluates the encounter at the character's current
position and updates the restricted flag accordingly.  It reads byte~3 of
{\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote} (the packed position), calls {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}, clears the
restricted flag, and then re-sets it only if the encounter result is~2
(hostile present).  This ensures characters at hostile positions cannot
freely move away without the flee mechanic.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{720}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}}}\moddef{check and restrict~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1BCB
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_AND_RESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}
    ; Check encounter at char position, clear restricted flag,
    ; set it if encounter type is 2.
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BANE    #$02,.done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}AND{\_}RESTRICT}}{CHECK:unAND:unRESTRICT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-ZTWWSZTSEW7EMG3FKA6FNJGCIE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{721}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{722}{\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED\nwendquote} clears bit~2 of the entity's field~15, removing the
restricted-movement flag.  This is typically called at the start of encounter
evaluation before conditionally re-setting the flag.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{723}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}}}\moddef{clear restricted~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1BEF
\nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}
    ; Clear restricted flag (bit 2 of char field 15)
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$FB
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{724}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{725}{\Tt{}SET{\_}RESTRICTED\nwendquote} sets bit~2 of the entity's field~15, marking the
character as movement-restricted.  Restricted characters cannot freely walk
away from their current position---they must either fight or attempt a
flee check.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{726}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}}}\moddef{set restricted~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1BF8
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}
    ; Set restricted flag (bit 2 of char field 15)
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    ORA     #$04
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{727}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Input System}

The game's menu-driven input system uses a table-based architecture.  Each
menu is defined by a descriptor block pointed to by {\Tt{}{\$}C0/{\$}C1\nwendquote}: byte~0 is
the number of options, byte~1 is the default selection, bytes~2--3 hold a
pointer to an initialization routine, and each option record contains display
data and an exit handler.  {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} drives the cycle: it calls
{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} to initialize the menu, then enters a loop that calculates the
record pointer for the current selection, sets up the cursor highlight, and
waits for keyboard input.  If the player presses return (indicated by a zero
return from {\Tt{}READ{\_}KEYBOARD\nwendquote}), the exit handler address is loaded from bytes
8--9 of the option record and executed via an indirect jump.  Any other
keypress is validated by {\Tt{}VALIDATE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote}; if it changes the selection, the
cursor is repositioned and the loop continues; if the selection stays the
same, the script engine is called with script type~\$12 to handle the
in-place action.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{728}{\Tt{}INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}5F5E\nwendquote} is a 2-byte indirect jump vector used by
{\Tt{}INPUT{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} to dispatch exit handlers and initialization callbacks.
{\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}SELECTION\nwendquote} tracks which menu option is currently highlighted.
{\Tt{}INPUT{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} writes the exit handler address from the selected record
into {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC\nwendquote} and executes it via {\Tt{}JMP\ (INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC)\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{729}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-42}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}   EQU     $5F5E   ; indirect jump vector for input callbacks
\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43} EQU   $5AAB   ; current menu selection index
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{730}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{731}{\Tt{}READ{\_}KEYBOARD\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}A44C\nwendquote} is the resident keyboard input routine
in the EALDR region.  {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} calls it to wait for a keypress; a
zero return indicates the player pressed return (select), while any other
value is passed to {\Tt{}VALIDATE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{732}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{READ_KEYBOARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}                EQU     $A44C   ; resident: read keyboard input
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{READ{\_}KEYBOARD}}{READ:unKEYBOARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}KEYBOARD}}{READ:unKEYBOARD}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{733}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{734}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}}}\moddef{input loop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5F19
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     ($C0),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}
.loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_RECORD_PTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}
