    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR_EXT}{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{READ_KEYBOARD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}
    BEQ     .exit
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{VALIDATE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43},.run_script
    BAEQ    #$00,.run_script
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}
    JMP     .loop
.run_script:
    LDX     #$12
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    JMP     .loop
.exit:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}
    INY
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}+1
    JMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43})
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}KEYBOARD}}{READ:unKEYBOARD}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR}}{SETUP:unCURSOR}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR{\_}EXT}}{SETUP:unCURSOR:unEXT}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{VALIDATE{\_}INPUT}}{VALIDATE:unINPUT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{READ{\_}KEYBOARD}}{READ:unKEYBOARD}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR}}{SETUP:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR{\_}EXT}}{SETUP:unCURSOR:unEXT}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{VALIDATE{\_}INPUT}}{VALIDATE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{735}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{736}{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} initializes a menu interaction.  It stores the X and~Y
register values as the high and low bytes of the menu descriptor pointer
({\Tt{}{\$}C1\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\$}C0\nwendquote}), calls the menu's initialization routine through
{\Tt{}CALL{\_}INPUT{\_}INIT\nwendquote}, clears the 120-byte input display buffer, draws all menu
options with {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}INPUT{\_}OPTIONS\nwendquote}, and renders the buffer to the screen.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{737}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}}}\moddef{setup input~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5F60
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}
    ; Set up input: store X/Y in $C1/$C0, call setup routines.
    STX     $C1
    STY     $C0
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALL_INPUT_INIT}{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_INPUT_OPTIONS}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}INPUT}}{SETUP:unINPUT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALL{\_}INPUT{\_}INIT}}{CALL:unINPUT:unINIT}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{CLEAR:unINPUT:unBUFFER}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}INPUT{\_}OPTIONS}}{DRAW:unINPUT:unOPTIONS}}\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{RENDER:unINPUT:unBUFFER}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALL{\_}INPUT{\_}INIT}}{CALL:unINPUT:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{CLEAR:unINPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}INPUT{\_}OPTIONS}}{DRAW:unINPUT:unOPTIONS}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{RENDER:unINPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-NCBMDHGVFAZAQQB6HOEC3V7SMM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{738}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{739}{\Tt{}DRAW{\_}INPUT{\_}OPTIONS\nwendquote} iterates through all menu options in reverse order
(from the count stored in byte~0 of the menu descriptor down to~1).  For each
option, it calls {\Tt{}CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR\nwendquote} to locate the option's data record, checks
whether byte~0 of the record is non-zero (enabled), and if so copies the
record's display data into the input buffer with {\Tt{}COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{740}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-44}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_OPTION_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45} EQU  $5AAA   ; number of input options to draw
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}OPTION{\_}COUNT}}{INPUT:unOPTION:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}OPTION{\_}COUNT}}{INPUT:unOPTION:unCOUNT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{741}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{742}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}}}\moddef{draw input options~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5F70
\nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_INPUT_OPTIONS}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_INPUT_OPTIONS}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     ($C0),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_OPTION_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}
.loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_OPTION_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_RECORD_PTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    BEQ     .skip
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_RECORD_DATA}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}
.skip:
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_OPTION_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}
    BNE     .loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}INPUT{\_}OPTIONS}}{DRAW:unINPUT:unOPTIONS}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}INPUT{\_}OPTIONS}}{DRAW:unINPUT:unOPTIONS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA}}{COPY:unRECORD:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}OPTION{\_}COUNT}}{INPUT:unOPTION:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA}}{COPY:unRECORD:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}OPTION{\_}COUNT}}{INPUT:unOPTION:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-DPL7QG73K4D6AQOMLKFG45TGS4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{743}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{744}{\Tt{}CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR\nwendquote} translates a 1-based option index in~A to a pointer to
that option's 10-byte record.  The formula is {\Tt{}{\$}C2/{\$}C3\nwendquote} =
{\Tt{}{\$}C0/{\$}C1\nwendquote} + A$\times$10 $-$ 6, which accounts for the 4-byte table
header (so option~1 maps to the first record after the header).  The
resulting pointer in {\Tt{}{\$}C2/{\$}C3\nwendquote} is used by {\Tt{}SETUP{\_}CURSOR\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}VALIDATE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote}, and other input routines to access the selected option's
data.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{745}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}}}\moddef{calc record ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5F8C
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_RECORD_PTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}
; $C2/$C3 = $C0/$C1 + A*10 - 6
\nwlinkedidentc{CALC_RECORD_PTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}:
    ASL
    STA     $BA
    ASL
    ASL
    CLC
    ADC     $BA
    ADC     #$FA
    CLC
    ADC     $C0
    STA     $C2
    LDA     $C1
    ADC     #$00
    STA     $C3
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{746}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{747}{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}CURSOR{\_}EXT\nwendquote} extends {\Tt{}SETUP{\_}CURSOR\nwendquote} by first calling
{\Tt{}SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO\nwendquote} to enable inverse-video mode, then falling through into
{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}CURSOR\nwendquote}.  This highlights the currently selected menu option.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{748}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}}}\moddef{setup cursor ext~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5FA2
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR_EXT}{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}
; JSR \nwlinkedidentc{SET_INVERSE_VIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1} then falls through to \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR_EXT}{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_INVERSE_VIDEO}{PYNWmai0-GPDXH5KV66ADU2Z2YB5ZFVWGM4000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR{\_}EXT}}{SETUP:unCURSOR:unEXT}{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR{\_}EXT}}{SETUP:unCURSOR:unEXT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR}}{SETUP:unCURSOR}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO}}{SET:unINVERSE:unVIDEO}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR}}{SETUP:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}INVERSE{\_}VIDEO}}{SET:unINVERSE:unVIDEO}{PYNWmai0-C2WVX7U2VKS2SCHIYVX2NGG5SY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{749}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{750}{\Tt{}SETUP{\_}CURSOR\nwendquote} positions the cursor at the location specified by the
current option record, sends HRCG control codes A/B via {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB\nwendquote}
to enter character output mode, loads the option's display string pointer
from bytes~6--7 of the record at {\Tt{}{\$}C2\nwendquote}, prints it with
{\Tt{}PRINT{\_}STRING\nwendquote}, and finishes with ctrl-N to restore normal video.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{751}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}}}\moddef{setup cursor~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5FA5
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}
; Sets up cursor: calls $5FBC, positions, loads ptr from ($C2)+6/7, prints
\nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CURSOR}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_POS}{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING}{PYNWmai0-RHBNV2D53ZNTBAEZE24PUXKEWI000000-2}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_N}{PYNWmai0-RGTFW4EP4BOQ3NW4HSWPGFKDAU000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR}}{SETUP:unCURSOR}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CURSOR}}{SETUP:unCURSOR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS}}{SET:unCURSOR:unPOS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}N}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unN}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING}}{PRINT:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS}}{SET:unCURSOR:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-CBZBIR5OXKOAWODTCFCFIXJC7I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{752}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{753}{\Tt{}SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS\nwendquote} converts the linear position stored in byte~1 of the
option record at {\Tt{}{\$}C2\nwendquote} into screen coordinates.  Positions 0--39 map to
row~21, 40--79 to row~22, and 80+ to row~23.  The column within each row is
the remainder after subtracting the row offset.  The result is written to
the Apple~II cursor position bytes {\Tt{}{\$}24\nwendquote} (HTAB) and {\Tt{}{\$}25\nwendquote} (VTAB).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{754}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}}}\moddef{set cursor pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5FBC
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_POS}{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}
; Maps linear position at ($C2)+1 to VTAB ($25) and HTAB ($24)
; Positions 0-39 -> row 21, 40-79 -> row 22, 80+ -> row 23
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_POS}{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    CMP     #$28
    BCS     .row2
    LDY     #$15 ; row 21
    BNE     .set_pos
.row2:
    SEC
    SBC     #$28
    CMP     #$28
    BCS     .row3
    LDY     #$16 ; row 22
    BNE     .set_pos
.row3:
    LDY     #$17 ; row 23
    SEC
    SBC     #$28
.set_pos:
    STY     $25
    STA     $24
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS}}{SET:unCURSOR:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-5LVLMTUS4H3FNMLGJOVUKMZFXY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}POS}}{SET:unCURSOR:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{755}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{756}{\Tt{}VALIDATE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} saves the current record pointer and repeatedly calls
{\Tt{}READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} until a valid (enabled) option is found.  For each
candidate, it calls {\Tt{}CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR\nwendquote} and checks byte~0 of the record:
if non-zero, the option is valid and its index is returned in~A.  Zero or
the current selection are returned directly (indicating ``no change'' or
``same selection'').  The saved {\Tt{}{\$}C2/{\$}C3\nwendquote} pointer is restored before
returning so the caller's record context is preserved.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{757}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}}}\moddef{validate input~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $5FDD
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{VALIDATE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}
; Validates input: saves $C2/$C3, loops reading input until valid record found
\nwlinkedidentc{VALIDATE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}:
    STA     $5B24
    \nwlinkedidentc{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-5}    $C2 ; save $C2/$C3
.retry:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{READ_INPUT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$00,.done
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_SELECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43},.done
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_RECORD_PTR}{PYNWmai0-7EUG7CO33OEBTT34NP4BWDV3J4000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    BNE     .found
    PLA
    JMP     .retry
.found:
    PLA
.done:
    TAY
    \nwlinkedidentc{PULW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-7}    $C2 ; restore $C2/$C3
    TYA
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{VALIDATE{\_}INPUT}}{VALIDATE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{VALIDATE{\_}INPUT}}{VALIDATE:unINPUT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}}\\{{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}}\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}RECORD{\_}PTR}}{CALC:unRECORD:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}SELECTION}}{CURRENT:unSELECTION}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PSHW}}{PSHW}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PULW}}{PULW}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EZRVGGNNVSNZAPYZLOQ7EISCNI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{758}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{759}{\Tt{}READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} reads a character code from the option record by
indexing into the record at {\Tt{}{\$}C2\nwendquote} using the offset stored at~\$5B24 plus~1.
This returns the key code that would select the option one position after the
stored offset, used by {\Tt{}VALIDATE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} to scan through valid inputs.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{760}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}}}\moddef{read input char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $600A
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{READ_INPUT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}
; Returns character at ($C2) + $5B24 + 1
\nwlinkedidentc{READ_INPUT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}:
    CLC
    LDA     $5B24
    ADC     #$01
    TAY
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-NJKTNAHFCRYCRVDBACZOIBQD24000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}INPUT{\_}CHAR}}{READ:unINPUT:unCHAR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{761}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{762}{\Tt{}CALL{\_}INPUT{\_}INIT\nwendquote} reads the initialization routine address from bytes~2--3
of the menu descriptor at {\Tt{}{\$}C0\nwendquote} and executes it via an indirect jump through
{\Tt{}INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC\nwendquote}.  This allows each menu to run custom setup code---for
example, enabling or disabling options based on the current game state---before
the input loop begins.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{763}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}}}\moddef{call input init~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6014
\nwlinkedidentc{CALL_INPUT_INIT}{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CALL_INPUT_INIT}{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     ($C0),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}
    INY
    LDA     ($C0),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43}+1
    JMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_JMP_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-43})
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CALL{\_}INPUT{\_}INIT}}{CALL:unINPUT:unINIT}{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CALL{\_}INPUT{\_}INIT}}{CALL:unINPUT:unINIT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}JMP{\_}VEC}}{INPUT:unJMP:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ZBOIPAZHRCP7LCIQEHWBTZDUT4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{764}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{765}{\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER\nwendquote} fills the 120-byte input display buffer
({\Tt{}INPUT{\_}BUFFER\nwendquote} through {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}BUFFER\nwendquote}+\$77) with high-bit spaces (\$A0).
This provides a clean slate before menu options are drawn into the buffer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{766}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-45}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}    EQU     $5AAC   ; 120-byte input text display buffer
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{767}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{768}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}}}\moddef{clear input buffer~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6024
\nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}
    LDY     #$77
    LDA     #$A0
.loop:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46},Y
    DEY
    BPL     .loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{CLEAR:unINPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{CLEAR:unINPUT:unBUFFER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-JR46VKN75B4RVQQQF4QQ2VNN7M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{769}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{770}{\Tt{}RENDER{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER\nwendquote} copies the 120-byte input display buffer to the
screen.  It positions the cursor at row~\$15 (21), column~0, issues a ctrl-A/B
sequence via {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB\nwendquote} to configure HRCG display mode, then outputs
each byte of the buffer through {\Tt{}ROM{\_}COUT1\nwendquote}.  The Y~register serves as the
loop index and is saved/restored around each COUT call (since COUT may clobber
it).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{771}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}}}\moddef{render input buffer~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $602F
\nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}
    LDA     #$15
    STA     $25
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $24
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_CTRL_AB}{PYNWmai0-UD4UC22WSFS3NXK2ZFCXIN73PU000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
.loop:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46},Y
    STY     $BA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ROM_COUT1}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-4}
    LDY     $BA
    INY
    \nwlinkedidentc{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-21}    #$78,.loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{RENDER:unINPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RENDER{\_}INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{RENDER:unINPUT:unBUFFER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}}\\{{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}CTRL{\_}AB}}{PRINT:unCTRL:unAB}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ROM{\_}COUT1}}{ROM:unCOUT1}{PYNWmai0-RSHMOQOCPDKRT4BUTXBS36IJQQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{772}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{773}{\Tt{}COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA\nwendquote} copies an option's display string into the input
display buffer.  It loads the string pointer from bytes~6--7 of the record
at {\Tt{}{\$}C2\nwendquote}, reads the string length from byte~0 of the string, uses byte~1
of the record as a column offset, and copies the string's characters into
{\Tt{}INPUT{\_}BUFFER\nwendquote} at the computed position.  The copy runs backwards (from
last character to first) to avoid needing a separate length counter.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{774}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}}}\moddef{copy record data~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $604C
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_RECORD_DATA}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}
; Copies data from pointer at ($C2)+6/7 into \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_RECORD_DATA}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}:
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     ($C2),Y
    STA     $BA
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y
    TAY
    DEC     $BA
    CLC
    ADC     $BA
    TAX
.copy_loop:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_BUFFER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46},X
    DEX
    DEY
    BNE     .copy_loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA}}{COPY:unRECORD:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}RECORD{\_}DATA}}{COPY:unRECORD:unDATA}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}BUFFER}}{INPUT:unBUFFER}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-QAFLGM36KP7VDGVEYKRTTGIIV4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{775}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{776}{\Tt{}GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE\nwendquote} is the 74-byte data block at~\$607D that defines the
player's main action menu.  It has a 4-byte header (option count, max movement
range, and a pointer to {\Tt{}CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} as the initialization routine)
followed by seven 10-byte option records.  Each record contains an enable flag
(byte~0, patched at runtime by {\Tt{}CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote}), a column offset (byte~1),
a key code (byte~2), a display string pointer (bytes~6--7), and an exit
handler address (bytes~8--9).  The seven options correspond to movement,
two combat choices, flee, and three additional actions (one of which is rest).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{777}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-46}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}    EQU     $5B26   ; 1 if no adjacent threats or encounters
\nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}     EQU     $5B25   ; 1 if char level < steps taken
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{778}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{779}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}}}\moddef{game input table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $607D
; Game input option table (7 records x 10 bytes + 4-byte header).
; Record format: [enable, col_offset, key, ?, ?, ?, str_ptr_lo, str_ptr_hi, ?, ?]
; Byte 0 of records 1-6 is patched by \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1} based on combat state.
; Header: option count, max_range (patched), init_ptr lo/hi
\nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}:
.header:
    HEX 07   ; 7 options
.max_range = *
    HEX 03   ; max movement range (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}*3+3)
    HEX D260 ; init function pointer ($60D2 = \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1})
.rec1:                  ; record 1 ($6081) - movement
.rec1_enable = *
    HEX 01   ; enable (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41} or 0)
    HEX 07040207
    HEX 05537D311A
.rec2:                  ; record 2 ($608B) - combat option
.rec2_enable = *
    HEX 01   ; enable (patched: ~\nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47})
    HEX 2F0103
    HEX 05063E7D0761
.rec3:                  ; record 3 ($6095) - combat option
.rec3_enable = *
    HEX 01   ; enable (patched: ~\nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47})
    HEX 570204
    HEX 0604787BB714
.rec4:                  ; record 4 ($609F) - flee option
.rec4_enable = *
    HEX 01   ; enable (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47})
    HEX 570301
    HEX 03077F7BC61B
.rec5:                  ; record 5 ($60A9)
    HEX 01140706
    HEX 0102457D8C61
.rec6:                  ; record 6 ($60B3) - rest option
.rec6_enable = *
    HEX 01   ; enable (patched: \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47})
    HEX 3C0507
    HEX 0203737B3F14
.rec7:                  ; record 7 ($60BD)
    HEX 01640605
    HEX 0401667B0161
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{780}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{781}{\Tt{}TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} bridges the turn system and the input system: it calls
{\Tt{}GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR\nwendquote} to load the default game input table pointer, then
jumps to {\Tt{}INPUT{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} to present the player with the standard action menu.
This is the entry point used by {\Tt{}TURN{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote} when the current character
is under player control.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{782}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}}}\moddef{teardown input~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $60C7
\nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{TEARDOWN_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}
    ; Teardown input and jump to $5F19.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_INPUT_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TEARDOWN{\_}INPUT}}{TEARDOWN:unINPUT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-PTQNWATBJWLX7ZUVREWS2PLG5A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{783}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{784}{\Tt{}GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR\nwendquote} simply returns the address of the game's main input
table in X (high byte~\$60) and Y (low byte~\$7D).  Callers pass these
registers to {\Tt{}SETUP{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} to initialize the standard action menu.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{785}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}}}\moddef{get input table ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $60CD
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_INPUT_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GET_INPUT_TABLE_PTR}{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}
    ; Return X=$60, Y=$7D (pointer to input table).
    LDX     #$60
    LDY     #$7D
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-3RA2OIAJFACDAQH65ZFX5CGBNA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE{\_}PTR}}{GET:unINPUT:unTABLE:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{786}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{787}{\Tt{}CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} patches the game's main input table to enable or disable
menu options based on the current turn state.  It first calls
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY\nwendquote}, then writes the values of {\Tt{}SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}UNDER{\_}LEVEL\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}MOVE{\_}POINTS\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}TURN{\_}ACTIVE\nwendquote} into specific byte
offsets within {\Tt{}GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE\nwendquote}.  The logic is straightforward: if the
character has an active encounter ({\Tt{}UNDER{\_}LEVEL\nwendquote} is set), the combat options
(records~2 and~3) are enabled and the flee option (record~4) is disabled;
otherwise the reverse.  The maximum movement range in the table is set to~3
or~4 depending on the encounter state.  If {\Tt{}TURN{\_}ACTIVE\nwendquote} is zero, the
movement option (record~1) is also disabled.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{788}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}}}\moddef{configure input~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $60D2
\nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CONFIGURE_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}
    ; Configure input handler: patch game input table enable flags
    ; from \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}/\nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}/\nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_COMBAT_ELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+54 ; rec6 byte 0 (rest option)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+34 ; rec4 byte 0 (flee option)
    EOR     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+14 ; rec2 byte 0 (combat option)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+24 ; rec3 byte 0 (combat option)
    EOR     #$01
    CLC
    ADC     #$03
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+1  ; max movement range
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+4  ; rec1 byte 0 (movement)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_ACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BEQ     .clear
    RTS
.clear:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{GAME_INPUT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-JWHEBQWZETT3LWQMKFNPACR75Y000000-1}+4  ; rec1 byte 0 (movement)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CONFIGURE{\_}INPUT}}{CONFIGURE:unINPUT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY}}{CHECK:unCOMBAT:unELIGIBILITY}}\\{{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}}\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY}}{CHECK:unCOMBAT:unELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GAME{\_}INPUT{\_}TABLE}}{GAME:unINPUT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}POINTS}}{MOVE:unPOINTS}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}ACTIVE}}{TURN:unACTIVE}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-KGWNMRC5I3MPQ3LWPWAI4BWHHU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{789}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{790}{\Tt{}START{\_}GAME{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} enters the input loop with a pointer to the alternative
input table at~\$6436 (X=\$64, Y=\$36).  This is used when the game needs to
present a different set of options than the standard action menu---for example,
during shop interactions or special scenes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{791}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}}}\moddef{start game input~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6458
\nwlinkedidentc{START_GAME_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{START_GAME_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}
    LDX     #$64
    LDY     #$36
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PQJIDEY4EAVEJRR5WH2VKRCPNA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{START{\_}GAME{\_}INPUT}}{START:unGAME:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}GAME{\_}INPUT}}{START:unGAME:unINPUT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}LOOP}}{INPUT:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{792}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{793}{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY\nwendquote} determines which turn options are available to
the current entity.  It clears {\Tt{}SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}UNDER{\_}LEVEL\nwendquote}, then
checks the entity's level (field~\$0C, bits~2--0 after ROR) against
{\Tt{}STEPS{\_}TAKEN\nwendquote}.  If the level is below the step count, {\Tt{}UNDER{\_}LEVEL\nwendquote} is
set, which enables the flee menu option and disables combat options.  If
{\Tt{}STEPS{\_}TAKEN\nwendquote} is zero, the routine performs a deeper check: it compares
offense (field~5) against defense (field~6), and if offense exceeds defense
and there are no adjacent threats or hostile encounters at the entity's
position, it sets {\Tt{}SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST\nwendquote} to enable the rest option.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{794}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}}}\moddef{check combat eligibility~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $750C
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_COMBAT_ELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_COMBAT_ELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$07
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BMI     .under_level
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    BNE     .done
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    STA     $BA
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     $BA
    BPL     .done
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BNE     .done
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BAEQ    #$02,.done
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SAFE_TO_REST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}
    JMP     .done
.under_level:
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{UNDER_LEVEL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY}}{CHECK:unCOMBAT:unELIGIBILITY}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}COMBAT{\_}ELIGIBILITY}}{CHECK:unCOMBAT:unELIGIBILITY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SAFE{\_}TO{\_}REST}}{SAFE:unTO:unREST}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UNDER{\_}LEVEL}}{UNDER:unLEVEL}{PYNWmai0-FJPM6WJPE4PW4GWDY3FF7UQEVU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{795}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Combat}


\section{Encounter detection}

Checks whether a given character (by char index in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}) is co-located
with a mob from an opposing faction.  Calls {\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote} to
resolve the character to a mob pointer, then walks the group chain via
{\Tt{}FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS\nwendquote} looking for another mob at the same map
position.  Candidate mobs must have byte~6 bits~5--0~$\ge3$ (active mob
type) and be from a different faction (checked via {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote}).

Result stored in {\Tt{}{\$}5A1F\nwendquote}:
\begin{itemize}
\item 0 --- no mob found at same position (or character is not a mob)
\item 1 --- found co-located mob but same faction (wrapped search)
\item 2 --- found co-located mob from opposing faction (enemy encounter)
\end{itemize}

Callers use the result to set or clear bit~2 of byte~\$0F of the
character's record, which appears to be a ``combat engaged'' flag.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{796}The routine below implements the encounter check.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{797}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}}}\moddef{check encounter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0E25
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}   ; look up char -> \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    BAEQ    #$00,.none           ; null pointer -> return 0
    CMP     #$80
    BMI     .none                ; not a mob (bit 7 clear) -> return 0
    AND     #$7F                 ; clear mob flag
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1            ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}           ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}              ; /
.search:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}              ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = current mob pointer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}           ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1            ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1         ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1} ; find next mob at same position
    CMP     #$01
    BMI     .none                ; 0 = no co-located mob -> return 0
    BEQ     .friendly            ; 1 = found (wrapped) -> return 1
    LDY     #$06                 ; result >= 2: found ahead
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y          ; byte 6 of found mob
    AND     #$3F                 ; bits 5-0
    CMP     #$03                 ; active mob type?
    BCC     .search              ; no -> skip, keep searching
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}        ; compare factions
    BAEQ    #$00,.search         ; same faction -> skip
    LDA     #$02                 ; enemy found -> return 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    RTS
.none:
    LDA     #$00
    BEQ     .store
.friendly:
    LDA     #$01
.store:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{798}\nwdocspar
Walks the group chain starting from the current mob ({\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}),
looking for another mob at the same map position (byte~3 of mob data).
If the current mob is the last in the chain (byte~2 = 0), the search
wraps around to the first mob via the group head ({\Tt{}{\$}FA/{\$}FB\nwendquote}).

Returns in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote}:
\begin{itemize}
\item 0 --- no other mob at same position (full circle)
\item 1 --- found co-located mob (search wrapped past end of chain)
\item 2 --- found co-located mob ahead in the chain
\end{itemize}

On success, {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is updated to point to the found mob.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{799}{\Tt{}COLOCATE{\_}POS\nwendquote} saves the current mob's position (byte 3) as the
comparison target.  {\Tt{}COLOCATE{\_}LINK\nwendquote} saves the starting mob's next-link
(byte 2) as a stop condition to detect a full circle.  {\Tt{}COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED\nwendquote}
is set to 2 initially (found ahead in chain) and changed to 1 if the search
wraps past the end.  {\Tt{}FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS\nwendquote} returns this value on success.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{800}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-47}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}            EQU     $5A21   ; saved position for co-location search
\nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}           EQU     $5A20   ; saved next-link (stop condition)
\nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}        EQU     $5A22   ; 1 if wrapped, 2 if ahead
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{801}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{802}The routine below implements the co-location search.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{803}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}}}\moddef{find mob at same pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0E6C
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}

    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y             ; byte 3 = position of current mob
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y             ; byte 2 = next link of current mob
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}        ; $5A22 = 2 (found ahead)
.check_link:
    BANE    #$00,.resolve           ; has next -> follow it
    LDY     #$01
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}        ; wrapped to start
    INY                             ; Y = 2
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y            ; byte 2 of group head = first mob
.resolve:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}            ; A = mob index -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}),Y        ; byte 2 of resolved mob
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_LINK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48},.not_self ; same next-link as original?
    LDA     #$00                    ; full circle -> not found
    RTS
.not_self:
    INY                             ; Y = 3
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}),Y        ; byte 3 = position
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48},.found     ; same position as original?
    DEY                             ; Y = 2
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}),Y        ; follow next link
    JMP     .check_link
.found:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}            ; \\ update \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 to found mob
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}                 ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1          ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1               ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COLOCATE_WRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}        ; return 1 (wrapped) or 2 (ahead)
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}LINK}}{COLOCATE:unLINK}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}POS}}{COLOCATE:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLOCATE{\_}WRAPPED}}{COLOCATE:unWRAPPED}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{804}\nwdocspar
Determines whether two mobs are hostile to each other by comparing their
faction classifications.  Reads byte~4 (appearance index) from the mob
at {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} and the mob at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}, converts each via
{\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote} to get the font group (quotient of dividing
by~21), then classifies via {\Tt{}GET{\_}HOSTILITY\nwendquote}: groups 0--2 and~7 are
``friendly'' (Y=0), groups 3--6 are ``hostile'' (Y=1).

Returns {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=1 if the two mobs are on different sides, {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=0 if same.
When both are hostile (Y=1), they are still hostile to each other if
their font-char remainders differ (different hostile sub-factions).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{805}{\Tt{}HOSTILE{\_}APP\nwendquote} saves the appearance byte of the second mob so
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote} can classify both mobs without losing state.
{\Tt{}HOSTILE{\_}A\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}HOSTILE{\_}Y\nwendquote} save the return values (remainder and
faction flag) from the first {\Tt{}GET{\_}HOSTILITY\nwendquote} call, allowing the routine
to compare both factions after the second call completes.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{806}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-48}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_APP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}             EQU     $5A23   ; saved appearance for hostility check
\nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_A}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}               EQU     $5A24   ; saved A from first \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_Y}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}               EQU     $5A25   ; saved Y from first \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{807}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{808}The routine below implements the hostility comparison.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{809}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}}}\moddef{check hostile~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0EB1
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}

    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y            ; byte 4 of found mob (appearance)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_APP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}),Y         ; byte 4 of original mob (appearance)
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1} ; -> A=remainder, Y=group
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}          ; -> Y=0 (friendly) or 1 (hostile)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_A}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_Y}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_APP}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}            ; appearance of found mob
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPEARANCE_TO_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-ZV3SLJLMHDXQXGXKZHHC4ROVNQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-21}    \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_Y}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49},.different   ; different sides -> hostile
    BYEQ    #$00,.same             ; both friendly -> same side
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{HOSTILE_A}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49},.different   ; different -> hostile to each other
.same:
    LDA     #$00
    RTS
.different:
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}}\\{{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR}}{APPEARANCE:unTO:unFONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BYNE}}{BYNE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}A}}{HOSTILE:unA}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}APP}}{HOSTILE:unAPP}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HOSTILE{\_}Y}}{HOSTILE:unY}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{810}\nwdocspar
Classifies a font group number (in~{\Tt{}Y\nwendquote}, from {\Tt{}APPEARANCE{\_}TO{\_}FONTCHAR\nwendquote})
as friendly or hostile.  Groups 0--2 and~7 are friendly (Y$\leftarrow$0),
groups 3--6 are hostile (Y$\leftarrow$1).  The value in~{\Tt{}A\nwendquote} is preserved.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{811}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}}}\moddef{get hostility~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0EE3
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{GET_HOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}

    CPY     #$03           ; factions 0-2 = friendly
    BCC     .friendly
    BYEQ    #$07,.friendly ; faction 7 = friendly
    LDY     #$01           ; factions 3-6 = hostile
    RTS
.friendly:
    LDY     #$00
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}{PYNWmai0-K464VGCUY2CZLM74XVNPX3KPKM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}HOSTILITY}}{GET:unHOSTILITY}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{812}\nwdocspar
Checks the four cardinal neighbors of a map position for hostile mobs
and accumulates their combined threat level.  Input: {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}~= position
(0--199), {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}~= character record pointer,
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}~= character's mob data pointer.

For each adjacent position (left, right, up, down), calls
{\Tt{}SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote} to find hostile mobs not already in combat and
sum their strength (byte~5 bits~4--0) into {\Tt{}{\$}5A26\nwendquote}.  After checking
all neighbors, compares the accumulated threat against the character's
defense value (byte~5 bits~4--1 of the {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote} record).

Returns {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=1 if defense~$\ge$~threat (safe), {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=0 if overwhelmed.
The threat total remains in {\Tt{}{\$}5A26\nwendquote} for callers that check it directly.

Boundary checks prevent wrapping: position~0 has no left neighbor,
position~199 no right, positions~0--19 no up, positions~180--199 no down.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{813}{\Tt{}ADJACENT{\_}POS\nwendquote} saves the target map position on entry to
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS\nwendquote}.  The routine adds and subtracts offsets (1 for
left/right, 20 for up/down) from this saved position to compute the four
cardinal neighbors, passing each to {\Tt{}SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{814}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-49}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}            EQU     $5A27   ; saved position for adjacency check
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{815}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{816}The routine below implements the four-direction threat scan.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{817}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}}}\moddef{check adjacent threats~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0EF1
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}

    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}       ; save target position
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}    ; clear threat accumulator
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}         ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = character record pointer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}         ;  |
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1       ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1       ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}       ; reload position
    BEQ     .skip_left         ; position 0 -> no left neighbor
    SEC
    SBC     #$01               ; position - 1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1} ; check left
.skip_left:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}
    BAEQ    #$C7,.skip_right   ; -> no right neighbor
    CLC
    ADC     #$01               ; position + 1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1} ; check right
.skip_right:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}
    BMI     .do_up             ; >= 128 -> always has up neighbor
    CMP     #$14               ; < 20?
    BMI     .skip_up           ; -> no up neighbor
.do_up:
    SEC
    SBC     #$14               ; position - 20
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1} ; check up
.skip_up:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}
    BPL     .do_down           ; < 128 -> always has down neighbor
    CMP     #$B4               ; >= 180?
    BPL     .skip_down         ; -> no down neighbor
.do_down:
    CLC
    ADC     #$14               ; position + 20
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1} ; check down
.skip_down:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y     ; byte 5 of character record
    ROR                        ; \\ bits 4-1 -> defense value
    AND     #$0F               ; /
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}    ; compare with threat total
    BPL     .safe              ; defense >= threat -> safe
    LDA     #$00
    RTS                        ; return 0 = overwhelmed
.safe:
    LDA     #$01
    RTS                        ; return 1 = safe
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}POS}}{ADJACENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{818}\nwdocspar
Finds all hostile mobs at a given map position and adds their strength
to the threat accumulator {\Tt{}{\$}5A26\nwendquote}.  Input: {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}~= position,
{\Tt{}{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC/{\textbackslash}TARGET{\_}REC+1\nwendquote}~= reference mob for faction comparison.

For each mob found at the position, checks hostility via
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote} and skips mobs that are already combat-engaged
(bit~2 of byte~\$0F set).  Hostile mobs contribute their strength
(byte~5 bits~4--0) to the running total, clamped at~127.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{819}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}}}\moddef{sum hostile at pos~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $0F49
\nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}   ; A = position -> \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    BEQ     .done                ; null -> nothing here
    CMP     #$80
    BMI     .done                ; not a mob -> skip
    AND     #$7F                 ; clear mob flag
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1            ; \\ \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}           ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}              ; /
.check_mob:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}        ; is this mob hostile to (\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14})?
    BAEQ    #$00,.next           ; not hostile -> skip
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y          ; byte $0F of mob
    AND     #$04                 ; bit 2 = combat engaged flag
    BNE     .next                ; already in combat -> skip
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y          ; byte 5 of mob
    AND     #$1F                 ; bits 4-0 = strength
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}      ; accumulate threat
    BPL     .store
    LDA     #$7F                 ; clamp to 127
.store:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
.next:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_AT_SAME_POS}{PYNWmai0-W6IHVD5ZPEGW5W37XACEDHSWVY000000-1} ; find next mob at same position
    BAEQ    #$02,.check_mob      ; more mobs -> check them too
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\eatline
