\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}AT{\_}SAME{\_}POS}}{FIND:unMOB:unAT:unSAME:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{820}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{821}{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE\nwendquote} is a convenience wrapper that packs {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}COL\nwendquote}
and {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} into a single position byte via {\Tt{}COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS\nwendquote} and
tail-calls {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS\nwendquote} to evaluate whether hostile entities are
present at that position.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{822}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}}}\moddef{check threats here~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $645F
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    ; Check adjacent threats at current col/row position.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ADJACENT_THREATS}{PYNWmai0-M2GJAYSU46D74HRO2UCFKPPZIQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ADJACENT{\_}THREATS}}{CHECK:unADJACENT:unTHREATS}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{823}\nwdocspar

\section{Combat resolution}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{824}{\Tt{}CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH\nwendquote} computes the effective attack power for the current
combatant.  If the attacker is the player or is at a different position from
the target, field~7 (ranged attack) is used; if attacker and target share a
position, field~9 (melee attack) is used instead.  The chosen field's low
nibble becomes the base: two calls to {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} produce a value
between 0 and twice the base (with a carry add), stored in
{\Tt{}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH\nwendquote}.  For player-controlled characters (AI mode~0) when it is
not the player's turn, there is an additional critical-hit/fumble check:
depending on the high bit of the chosen field, a random roll against either
\$0D or \$50 determines whether a special event triggers.  On a roll of zero,
the field is marked~\$81, scene~1 is displayed, and a bonus of 0--9 is added
to the combat strength (capped at~\$1F).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{825}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-50}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51} EQU     $5A78   ; result of \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{826}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{827}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}}}\moddef{calc combat strength~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $16E0
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}
; Calculates combat strength using \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BAEQ    #$01,.use_y7
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    BNE     .use_y7
    LDY     #$09
    BNE     .got_y
.use_y7:
    LDY     #$07
.got_y:
    TYA
    PHA
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$0F
    TAX
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    TXA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    SEC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BEQ     .check_5a74
.exit_pla:                     ; $1712 - reused by backward BNE from $1717
    PLA
    RTS
.check_5a74:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BNE     .exit_pla
    PLA
    TAY
    TAX
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$80
    BNE     .use_50
    LDA     #$0D
    BNE     .do_random
.use_50:
    LDA     #$50
.do_random:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$00,.missed
    RTS
.missed:
    TXA
    TAY
    LDA     #$81
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
    LDA     #$0A
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    SEC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    CMP     #$1F
    BCC     .cap_ok
    LDA     #$1F
.cap_ok:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{828}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{829}{\Tt{}ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE\nwendquote} transitions the character to combat readiness (state
2).  It first calls {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} to evaluate what is at the character's
position, then clears the restricted flag.  If the encounter result is not~2
(meaning the character is not co-located with a hostile), the restricted flag
is re-set to limit the character's options.  Finally, {\Tt{}SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE\nwendquote} is
called with~2 to record the new state.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{830}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}}}\moddef{enter combat state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $14B7
\nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{ENTER_COMBAT_STATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}
    ; Check encounter, clear restricted flag, conditionally set it,
    ; then set char state to 2.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-S55TCKULURSW5KNUC4U7E2IHMY000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40},.skip
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}
.skip:
    LDA     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ENTER{\_}COMBAT{\_}STATE}}{ENTER:unCOMBAT:unSTATE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}RESTRICTED}}{CLEAR:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-4CO4NMTRTF3UMYK5ZFBL4RMSAE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{831}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{832}{\Tt{}START{\_}COMBAT\nwendquote} advances the character to active attack state (state~3),
loads the combat target pointer from {\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI\nwendquote} via
{\Tt{}LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR\nwendquote}, and jumps to {\Tt{}RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} where the actual
willingness check and damage calculation take place.


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{833}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}}}\moddef{start combat~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $14CD
\nwlinkedidentc{START_COMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{START_COMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}
    ; Set char state to 3, call $199D, jump to combat logic at $15AB.
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_TARGET_PTR}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESOLVE_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}COMBAT}}{START:unCOMBAT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unTARGET:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unTARGET:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-IZWZTFUSUJLMEBFHN62T6YZBZE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{834}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{835}{\Tt{}RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} is the core combat resolution routine.  It first sets the
blink cursor to the target's position, then computes a ``willingness to fight''
score in {\Tt{}COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS\nwendquote}.  For player characters the score is fixed
at~\$1C (28), but for AI-controlled entities it accumulates modifiers from
several sources: the entity's base level (field~11 low 5~bits), flag bits in
fields~11 and~15 of both attacker and target (bit~5 adds +24, bit~6 subtracts
4, bit~7 adds +8), the target's combat state (idle +3, state~1 $-$1, state~3
$-$3), critically low HP on the target (+24), and a same-position defense
differential from field~5.  These modifiers are accumulated through
{\Tt{}ADD{\_}WILLINGNESS\nwendquote} and clamped to 0--30.  The game then rolls
{\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} with limit~\$1F (31): if the roll is at or below the
willingness score, the attack proceeds; otherwise the attacker hesitates and a
``holds back'' message is printed.  Successful attacks branch to
{\Tt{}PLAYER{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} or {\Tt{}MOB{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} depending on {\Tt{}IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{836}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52} EQU  $5A76   ; accumulated willingness-to-fight score
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{837}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{838}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}}}\moddef{resolve attack~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $15AB
\nwlinkedidentc{RESOLVE_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RESOLVE_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}
    ; Combat willingness calculation and attack resolution.
    ; Computes willingness score in \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52} based on char/target stats,
    ; then rolls random to determine if attack occurs.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BANE    #$01,.not_player
    LDA     #$1C
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
    JMP     .clamp_done
.not_player:
    LDY     #$0B
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$1F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
    TXA
    AND     #$20
    BEQ     .no_bit5
    TXA
    AND     #$EF
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    LDA     #$18
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_bit5:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    TAY
    AND     #$40
    BEQ     .no_bit6
    LDA     #$FC
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_bit6:
    TYA
    AND     #$80
    BEQ     .no_bit7
    LDA     #$08
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_bit7:
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$04
    BEQ     .no_restrict
    LDA     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.no_restrict:
    TXA
    AND     #$03
    CMP     #$01
    BPL     .ge1
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
    JMP     .state_done
.ge1:
    BNE     .ne1
    LDA     #$FF
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
    JMP     .state_done
.ne1:
    BANE    #$03,.state_done
    LDA     #$FD
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.state_done:
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$03
    BCS     .hp_ok
    LDA     #$18
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.hp_ok:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    BNE     .diff_pos
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$0F
    STA     $5A77
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    ROR
    AND     #$0F
    SEC
    SBC     $5A77
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
.diff_pos:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
    BPL     .not_neg
    LDA     #$00

    JMP     .clamp_done
.not_neg:
    CMP     #$1F
    BMI     .clamp_done
    LDA     #$1E
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
.clamp_done:
    LDA     #$1F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
    BMI     .attack
    BEQ     .attack
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$D2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     #$7C
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34},.is_player
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}
.is_player:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
    RTS
.attack:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BEQ     .mob_attack
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PLAYER_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}
.mob_attack:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK}}{RESOLVE:unATTACK}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADD{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{ADD:unWILLINGNESS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}ATTACK}}{MOB:unATTACK}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAYER{\_}ATTACK}}{PLAYER:unATTACK}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADD{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{ADD:unWILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}ATTACK}}{MOB:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAYER{\_}ATTACK}}{PLAYER:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-CUGGKDWDWBNMCH3BGUBFKX3CXI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{839}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{840}{\Tt{}PLAYER{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} resolves an attack initiated by the player character.  It
first computes the combat strength via {\Tt{}CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH\nwendquote}, displays the
attacker's name and a strength-based descriptor through {\Tt{}MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING\nwendquote},
then copies {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}REC\nwendquote} and classifies the target entity.
The script engine is invoked with script type~2 and the combat strength as a
parameter.  If the target's byte~1 is~\$FE (marked dead/empty), the routine
falls through to event-slot processing.  Otherwise it checks whether the
target's byte~2 flags indicate an activated event: if the high bits are~\$C0,
the low sub-type determines how to handle it---small values trigger a scene,
larger values result in the slot being cleared.  For non-event targets, a
hit roll compares a random number (0--12) against the combat strength; if the
roll is at or above the strength, the attack is ``immune'' (blocked).  A
successful hit sets bit~6 of the target's byte~1 (marking damage taken),
redraws the entity at its position, runs script type~\$0C, and displays a
hit confirmation.  The routine also handles locked containers: if the target
has a type flag and the player's strength is below the required threshold,
the attack is blocked with message~\$10.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{841}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}}}\moddef{player attack~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1751
\nwlinkedidentc{PLAYER_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PLAYER_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_VALUE_TO_STRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLASSIFY_ENTITY_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-RHVE55DTLORPU3N7RRZLGYYK5A000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    LDX     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    BAEQ    #$FE,.check_event
    CMP     #$40
    BCC     .roll_hit
.immune:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$14
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
.roll_hit:
    LDA     #$0D
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    BCS     .immune
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    ORA     #$40
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_FONTCHAR}{PYNWmai0-KWRR7HOSUHEUTDUYCEFKKXY7QE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RENDER_FONT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-X3D3646XM7VEHJGRKDML2UKINQ000000-1}
    LDX     #$0C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
.check_event:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$C0
    BANE    #$C0,.check_type
    TXA
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1D
    BPL     .immune
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_ENTITY_SCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
.check_type:
    BAEQ    #$00,.immune
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    CMP     #$0A
    BPL     .strong_enough
    TXA
    CMP     #$80
    BPL     .blocked
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    CMP     #$04
    BMI     .blocked
.strong_enough:
    TXA
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1F
    BMI     .take_item
    STX     $BA
    DEC     $BA
    LDA     $BA
    LDY     #$02
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
.show_found:
    LDA     #$12
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PRNG_CHECK}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}
.take_item:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_ENTITY_SCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1B
    BPL     .show_found
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PRNG_CHECK}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}
.blocked:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$10
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PLAYER{\_}ATTACK}}{PLAYER:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-KCI6OHVG6G5YDI3BXT725RQZWE000000-1}\eatline
