ocs{842}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{843}{\Tt{}MOB{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} resolves an attack from a mob against the current character.
The structure mirrors {\Tt{}PLAYER{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote}: compute combat strength, display the
attacker name and strength descriptor, print the target's name, run script
type~2 with the strength value, and call {\Tt{}DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE\nwendquote} for any
mode-specific behavior.  The key difference is in the defense calculation: the
routine reads byte~8 of the target ({\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}) and uses its low 4~bits as a
defense value.  If defense is zero, the full combat strength is applied via
{\Tt{}COPY{\_}F4{\_}TO{\_}F6{\_}AND{\_}SET\nwendquote}.  Otherwise, the routine subtracts defense from
strength: a negative or zero result means the attack is absorbed, with message
indices \$19/\$1A (``blocked'' variants) or~\$34 for critical blocks when HP is
below~3.  A positive remainder after subtraction becomes the effective damage,
displayed with message \$17 or \$18 depending on whether byte~8's sign bit is
set.  For player characters (field~4 below~\$15), the scene combat flag is
cleared to signal that the player is under attack.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{844}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_COMBAT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}       EQU     $423A   ; nonzero = combat pending
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}     EQU     $5A79   ; mob defense value (low 4 bits of mob byte 8)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DEFENSE}}{MOB:unDEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DEFENSE}}{MOB:unDEFENSE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{845}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{846}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}}}\moddef{mob attack~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1860
\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_ATTACK}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CALC_COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4F7RGWPVP5L7UVBAJJPFGT7N7Y000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_VALUE_TO_STRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    LDX     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    CMP     #$15
    BCS     .npc
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_COMBAT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
.npc:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
    AND     #$0F
    BANE    #$00,.has_strength
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_F4_TO_F6_AND_SET}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}
.has_strength:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDX     #$17
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
    BMI     .negative
    LDX     #$18
.negative:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
    AND     #$0F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
    BEQ     .weak_hit
    BPL     .partial
.weak_hit:
    INX
    INX
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$03
    BMI     .critical
    TXA
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
.critical:
    LDA     #$34
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
.partial:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    TXA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_STRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-51}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_F4_TO_F6_AND_SET}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MOB{\_}ATTACK}}{MOB:unATTACK}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}ATTACK}}{MOB:unATTACK}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}F4{\_}TO{\_}F6{\_}AND{\_}SET}}{COPY:unF4:unTO:unF6:unAND:unSET}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING}}{MAP:unVALUE:unTO:unSTRING}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DEFENSE}}{MOB:unDEFENSE}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CALC{\_}COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{CALC:unCOMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}STRENGTH}}{COMBAT:unSTRENGTH}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}F4{\_}TO{\_}F6{\_}AND{\_}SET}}{COPY:unF4:unTO:unF6:unAND:unSET}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING}}{MAP:unVALUE:unTO:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DEFENSE}}{MOB:unDEFENSE}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-7EICTP7W6LBWLQVWCXMBL5ALWE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{847}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{848}{\Tt{}APPLY{\_}DAMAGE\nwendquote} is the central damage-resolution routine.  It takes a
damage amount in~A and the target character's record pointer in {\Tt{}EFFECT{\_}REC\nwendquote}.
The routine first computes a message index by counting the leading zero bits of
the damage value (using repeated ROR), which maps larger damage to lower
message indices---producing increasingly alarming descriptions as damage rises.
It then invokes the {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} with script type~4 to run any
damage-response scripts.  The actual HP reduction follows: field~6 of the
target record holds hit points in its low six bits (with flags in the upper
two), and the damage is subtracted.  If HP drops to zero or below, execution
falls into the death handler, which sets a death flag in field~15, re-sorts
the character out of its group with {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}, zeroes the character's
gold via {\Tt{}MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS\nwendquote}, calls {\Tt{}UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST\nwendquote} to process any
death-triggered events, and redraws the map position.  The death message itself
is chosen randomly: a 1-in-3 chance of one message, otherwise a coin flip
between two alternatives.  If the character survives, the routine checks the
remaining HP and displays a status message: ``badly hurt'' below~3, ``wounded''
below~8, or ``scratched'' at~8 or above.  Characters below~3~HP also get the
restricted flag set in field~15, limiting their actions on subsequent turns.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{849}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}       EQU     $5A10   ; damage to apply / new HP after subtraction
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{850}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{851}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}}}\moddef{apply damage~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $106F
\nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}
    ; Apply damage A to char at (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}).
    ; Subtracts from field 6 (HP). Displays damage message,
    ; runs script. If HP drops to 0: death handling.
    AND     #$1F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}     ; damage amount
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}
    LDX     #$03
.ror_loop:
    INX
    CLC
    ROR
    BNE     .ror_loop         ; count leading zeros -> message index
    TXA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}   ; show damage message
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}
    LDX     #$04
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}     ; run damage script
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y    ; field 6 (HP + flags)
    TAX
    AND     #$3F              ; HP only
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}     ; HP - damage
    BCC     .dead             ; underflow -> dead
    BEQ     .dead             ; zero -> dead
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}     ; new HP
    TXA
    AND     #$C0              ; preserve high bits
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y    ; store updated field 6
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DAMAGE_AMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}
    CMP     #$03
    BPL     .check8
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y    ; field 15
    AND     #$F8
    ORA     #$04              ; set restricted flag
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$09
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}   ; "badly hurt" message
    RTS
.check8:
    CMP     #$08
    BPL     .ge8
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$0A
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}   ; "wounded" message
.ge8:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$0B
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}   ; "scratched" message

    ; --- character dies ---
.dead:
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y    ; field 4
    LDX     #$08              ; default script
    CMP     #$15
    BCC     .skip_flag
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    ORA     #$10              ; set death flag
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    LDX     #$0A              ; NPC death script
.skip_flag:
    TXA
    PHA
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_ENTITY_NAME}{PYNWmai0-2VUHUU2IACXQVPJ55EJPFVXH6A000000-1}
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}   ; random(3)
    BAEQ    #$00,.rand0
    LDA     #$0E
    BNE     .show_death
.rand0:
    LDA     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}   ; random(2)
    CLC
    ADC     #$27              ; message $27 or $28
.show_death:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}   ; death message
    PLA
    TAX
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}     ; death script
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}      ; cleanup
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y    ; gold low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y    ; gold high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    LDY     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CHAR_STATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1} ; subtract gold (Y=0 -> subtract)
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{UPDATE_EVENT_LIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1} ; handle death at position
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}  ; redraw position
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DAMAGE{\_}AMOUNT}}{DAMAGE:unAMOUNT}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}ENTITY{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unENTITY:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{852}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{853}{\Tt{}APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT\nwendquote} is a convenience wrapper that copies
{\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}EFFECT{\_}REC\nwendquote} and tail-calls {\Tt{}APPLY{\_}DAMAGE\nwendquote} with the
damage amount in~A.  It saves and restores~A across the pointer setup using
the X~register as a temporary.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{854}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}}}\moddef{apply damage to current~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1425
\nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
    ; Apply effect: copy \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}/\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1, JMP $106F with A
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1
    TXA
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{855}\nwdocspar
When the player steps onto an occupied cell, {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} determines
what happens.  The event type (byte~1 of the event entry) splits the logic
into two paths.

For random encounters (type below {\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote}), the character's avoidance stat
(low 5~bits of field~5) is compared against a random roll out of~20.  If the
stat is high enough, the encounter is avoided: the event is marked as
activated and the character returns to its starting position.  Otherwise a
second PRNG roll decides whether this is a normal encounter (script {\Tt{}{\$}14\nwendquote})
or a rare special encounter (scene~9, which deals 1~damage).

For specific encounters (type {\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote} and above), the routine extracts a
6-bit encounter ID and a destination position from the event entry, commits
the move, reorders the character into the appropriate group, and updates the
character's position.  If the encounter ID is zero, it is derived from the
PRNG.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{856}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS\nwendquote} holds the destination position from event byte 2
during specific encounters (type {\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote} and above).  {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}
writes the character's updated position from this variable after committing
the move and reordering the character.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{857}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-54}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}      EQU     $5A5F   ; event handler: destination position
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{858}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{859}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PTR\nwendquote} is a 2-byte zero-page pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}BE/{\$}BF\nwendquote} that points
to the current event list entry.  {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} reads the event
type from byte 1 and the destination from byte 2 through this pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{860}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}               EQU     $BE     ; event list entry pointer (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{861}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{862}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}}}\moddef{handle encounter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1C01
\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}

    ; --- random encounter path (event type $00-$3F) ---
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}             ; set char field 15 state to 0
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y              ; event byte 1 = type
    CMP     #$40
    BPL     .specific                  ; type >= $40 -> specific encounter
    LDA     #$14
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}            ; random(20)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y             ; char field 5
    AND     #$1F                       ; low 5 bits = avoidance stat
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BMI     .roll_type                 ; stat < random -> encounter happens
    JMP     .avoided                   ; stat >= random -> avoid encounter
.roll_type:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     #$74
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BPL     .normal                    ; $74 >= random -> normal encounter
    JMP     .special                   ; rare: special encounter
.normal:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}            ; "encounter" message
    LDX     #$14
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}              ; run encounter script

    ; --- specific encounter path (type >= $40) ---
.specific:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y              ; event byte 0 = position
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}             ; set state 1
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    AND     #$3F                       ; low 6 bits = encounter ID
    BNE     .have_id
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}                  ; ID 0 -> derive from PRNG
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    ROR
    ROR
    AND     #$1C
    ORA     #$01
.have_id:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}                ; store encounter ID
    ROR
    BCC     .no_clear
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y             ; char field 4
    BMI     .no_clear
    CMP     #$2A
    BMI     .no_clear
    CMP     #$3F
    BPL     .no_clear
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}                ; clear ID if char in range $2A-$3E
.no_clear:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y              ; event byte 2 = destination pos
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}                ; commit move
    LDA     $7ABE
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CURRENT_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-6ROATOGYK2M6UYTG4WOGXXD7HQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{TIMED_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-TTL3BS3ZNAOH4GH5O7EQQ2NYYQ000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y             ; update char packed position
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1},.same_scene ; compare encounter ID with current scene
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}             ; different -> reset position
.same_scene:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_DEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}                ; commit to new position

    ; --- encounter avoided ---
.avoided:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    ORA     #$40                       ; mark event as activated
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}             ; reset to turn start
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_CHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-5}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BLINK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-31}
    LDX     #$0C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}              ; run "avoided" script
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}            ; "avoided encounter" message

    ; --- special encounter (rare) ---
.special:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$09
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}                 ; trigger scene 9
    LDA     #$01
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCURRENT:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}CHAR}}{BLINK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}COL}}{BLINK:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BLINK{\_}ROW}}{BLINK:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}DEST{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unDEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}CHARNUM}}{FONT:unCHARNUM}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CURRENT{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCURRENT:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RESET{\_}TURN{\_}POS}}{RESET:unTURN:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TIMED{\_}WAIT}}{TIMED:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-Y47L2JLEGWPQ32PCM5VXV43OQI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{863}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{864}{\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} is called when a character's movement brings it
into contact with another entity.  It first evaluates the threat level at the
destination by calling {\Tt{}SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote}: if any hostiles are present,
the routine computes a flee probability based on the character's strength
(field~5, low 5~bits) plus a base of~\$10, minus the total adjacent threat,
clamped to 4--\$1C.  This value is doubled twice (ASL, ASL) and OR'd with~3 to
produce a threshold; the PRNG is compared against it, and if the random value
exceeds the threshold, the character flees---the position is reset to the
turn's starting location and {\Tt{}END{\_}TURN\nwendquote} is called.  If the character does
not flee (or there was no threat), {\Tt{}COMMIT{\_}MOVE\nwendquote} updates the position.
The routine then calls {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}: if the result is below~2 (no
hostile), it checks {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE\nwendquote} and either continues the movement
loop or ends the turn.  If hostiles are present (result $\geq$ 2), it walks
the target group's linked list and sets the restricted flag on every member
at the same position, displays an encounter message (\$1F), and ends the turn.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{865}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}}}\moddef{handle mob encounter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1E5A
\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}
    ; Mob encounter on movement: check flee chance, commit move,
    ; check encounter type, walk group for combat.
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BEQ     .no_flee
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CLC
    ADC     #$10
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BMI     .clamp_low
    CMP     #$1D
    BMI     .in_range
    LDA     #$1C
    BNE     .in_range
.clamp_low:
    LDA     #$04
.in_range:
    ASL
    ASL
    ORA     #$03
    TAX
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    TXA
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BPL     .no_flee
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$1E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}
.no_flee:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .hostile
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$01,.one_threat
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}
.one_threat:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}
.hostile:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.walk_group:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    BEQ     .group_done
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    BNE     .next_member
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TARGET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}
.next_member:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    JMP     .walk_group
.group_done:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$1F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TARGET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unTARGET:unRESTRICTED}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}TARGET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unTARGET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{866}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{867}{\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}EVENT{\_}SLOT\nwendquote} is the main interaction handler when a character steps
onto an event tile.  It resets the character to idle state, then reads byte~2
of the event entry and branches on its top two bits.  If the high bits
are~\$C0 (activated event), the low 5~bits give a sub-type: values below~\$1D
clear the event slot and optionally trigger scene~\$0A, then the character
commits the move, checks for adjacent threats, and continues the movement
loop.  If the event is not activated, the routine runs script type~\$0E, then
dispatches on the event's high-nibble type.  Type~\$00 (no special flag) with
a small sub-value displays a message and deals~1 damage; sub-values at~\$1B
or above trigger {\Tt{}SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG\nwendquote}.  Type~\$40 or above represents a
treasure chest: a strength check (field~5 vs.\ a random threshold) determines
whether the character can open it.  Failure displays a ``can't open'' message
and converts the event to type~\$40 for the next attempt, followed by a
trap-damage check at {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PRNG{\_}CHECK\nwendquote}.  Success with a small sub-value
triggers scene~\$13; larger sub-values show message~\$12 (``found treasure'')
and either clear the event slot or decrement a counter for multi-use
containers.  {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PRNG{\_}CHECK\nwendquote} itself rolls the PRNG and, if the result is
below~\$14, applies 1--2 points of trap damage with the restricted flag set.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{868}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-55}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56} EQU     $5A5A   ; lower 5 bits of event slot byte 2
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56} EQU     $5A59   ; saved byte 2 of event slot (type+value)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{869}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{870}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}}}\moddef{handle event slot~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1D4D
\nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_EVENT_SLOT}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_EVENT_SLOT}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}
    ; Handle empty slot interaction: treasure pickup, traps,
    ; and event activation.
    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    AND     #$C0
    BANE    #$C0,.not_active
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    TAX
    CMP     #$1D
    BPL     .no_remove
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    TXA
    BAEQ    #$00,.no_remove
    LDA     #$0A
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
.no_remove:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    BANE    #$00,.has_threat
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_POINTS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
.has_threat:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}
.not_active:
    PHA
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    PLA
    BANE    #$00,.has_type
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     #$1B
    BMI     .small_val
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_LOCKED_MSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}
.small_val:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$0D
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
.has_type:
    BAEQ    #$40,.type40
    LDA     #$19
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BPL     .type40
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$10
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    AND     #$3F
    ORA     #$40
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PRNG_CHECK}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}:              ; $1DDC - external entry point
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     #$14
    BMI     .trap_damage
    RTS
.trap_damage:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$11
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-L4RDKMKKE7XS4LJ76V5LSAHTFI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    ROL
    ROL
    LDA     #$01
    ADC     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
.type40:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    AND     #$1F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    CMP     #$1B
    BPL     .big_treasure
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$13
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
    JMP     .clear_slot
.big_treasure:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$12
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    CMP     #$1F
    BMI     .clear_slot
    DEC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    AND     #$E0
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}
    LDY     #$02
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    JMP     .update_pos
.clear_slot:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
.update_pos:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RESET_TURN_POS}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PRNG_CHECK}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PRNG{\_}CHECK}}{EVENT:unPRNG:unCHECK}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}EVENT{\_}SLOT}}{HANDLE:unEVENT:unSLOT}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\eatline

_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-CDBCGMX3KEACFNA4UHPLIQKCUI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{871}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{872}{\Tt{}SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG\nwendquote} displays message~\$0C (a ``locked'' or ``blocked''
notification), prints the mob's name for context, and resets the character's
turn state to~0 (idle).  This is called when a character attempts to interact
with an event slot that requires a higher strength or special item.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{873}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}}}\moddef{show locked msg~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1CF1
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_LOCKED_MSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SHOW_LOCKED_MSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}
    ; Display message $0C and set char state to 0.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$0C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SHOW{\_}LOCKED{\_}MSG}}{SHOW:unLOCKED:unMSG}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-P3BYFIYSOQCLR3U5AABD62SIFQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{874}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{875}{\Tt{}SET{\_}TARGET{\_}RESTRICTED\nwendquote} sets bit~2 of field~15 on the mob record at
{\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}, marking that mob as movement-restricted.  This is used by
{\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} to pin down every hostile at the encounter position
so they cannot simply walk away.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{876}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}}}\moddef{set target restricted~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1F03
\nwlinkedidentc{SET_TARGET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SET_TARGET_RESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    ORA     #$04
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SET{\_}TARGET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unTARGET:unRESTRICTED}{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}TARGET{\_}RESTRICTED}}{SET:unTARGET:unRESTRICTED}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-X6R76MOH2TJMSMNIB74Y4XDL4E000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{877}\nwdocspar
\medskip
The 231 bytes from {\Tt{}{\$}1F19\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}{\$}1FFF\nwendquote} contain an orphaned earlier
version of {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote}.  No external JSR, JMP, branch,
pointer, or RTS-trick reference reaches any address in
{\Tt{}{\$}1F19--{\$}1FFD\nwendquote}; the code is unreachable during gameplay.

The logic mirrors the current {\Tt{}HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER\nwendquote} almost exactly:
threat assessment (strength~$+$~16~$-$~threats, clamped 4\ldots28,
randomised), flee with message~\#\$1E, encounter dispatch, and a combat
flag loop with message~\#\$1F.  However, all JSR/JMP targets point to
addresses from an earlier build where every routine had shifted by a
small offset (e.g.\ {\Tt{}STEP{\_}PRNG\nwendquote} was at {\Tt{}{\$}764A\nwendquote} instead of
{\Tt{}{\$}78A8\nwendquote}).  The first five bytes are garbled---an {\Tt{}ORA\ {\$}CE12\nwendquote}
into expansion-ROM space followed by two undocumented NMOS~6502
{\Tt{}{\$}5A\nwendquote} NOPs---suggesting the entry point was partially overwritten.

The only live byte is the {\Tt{}RTS\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}1FFE\nwendquote}, which serves as a
no-op stub for external callers at {\Tt{}{\$}4A1F\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\$}4BE4\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{878}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}}}\moddef{orphaned encounter handler~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1F19
    SUBROUTINE orphaned_encounter_handler
; ---------------------------------------------------------------
; DEAD CODE -- orphaned encounter handler ($1F19-$1FFF)
;
; Earlier version of \nwlinkedidentc{HANDLE_MOB_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-BQ2BC5SCGY6MOAW5UUTBFYYMWQ000000-1}.  Unreachable: no
; external reference to any address in $1F19-$1FFD.
;
; Call targets reference an earlier build's routine layout:
;   $0DDF -> \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1} (now $0D98)
;   $0F90 -> \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1} (now $0F49)
;   $764A -> \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1} (now $78A8)
;   $7444 -> \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1} (now $76BE)
;   $0DD1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1} (now $0D8A)
;   $7421 -> \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1} (now $769B)
;   $739F -> \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1} (now $761E)
;   $0E6C -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1} (now $0E25)
;   $1C3C -> \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1} (now $1B52)
;   $1C91 -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1} (now $1BA7)
;   $5F19 -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1} (now $645F)
;   $1AD8 -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1} (now $1A31)
;   $1341 -> \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1} (now $12FA)
;   $1347 -> \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1} (now $1300)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------

; Garbled entry: ORA $CE12 + two undocumented $5A NOPs
    HEX     0d12ce5a5a

; Event record update (earlier build's entry path?)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SLOT_BYTE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56} ; $5A59
    AND     #$E0
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SUB_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56} ; $5A5A
    LDY     #$02
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; store into event record byte 2
    JMP     .save_pos

; Alternate entry: mark record as deleted
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y

.save_pos:                              ; $1F33
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    JSR     $1C6B           ; setup (unknown)
    LDA     #$14
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}
    JSR     $0DA4           ; unknown
    JMP     $1EC5           ; unknown (return path?)

; Threat assessment
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JSR     $0DDF           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{COLROW_TO_POS}{PYNWmai0-YXZOC7KQXOV5OPKZ6P7KWNTLUM000000-1}
    JSR     $0F90           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SUM_HOSTILE_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-EVL7KQK3LF5HDEEDTHSJTZIQAM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BEQ     .no_flee

    ; Compute flee probability from strength vs threats
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y  ; strength field
    AND     #$1F
    CLC
    ADC     #$10            ; base 16
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{ADJACENT_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    BMI     .clamp_low
    CMP     #$1D
    BMI     .in_range
    LDA     #$1C            ; cap at 28
    BNE     .in_range
.clamp_low:
    LDA     #$04            ; minimum 4
.in_range:
    ASL
    ASL
    ORA     #$03            ; form PRNG mask
    TAX
    JSR     $764A           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    TXA
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    BPL     .no_flee        ; survived -- skip flee

    ; Entity overwhelmed -- flee, restore position
    JSR     $7444           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     $0DD1           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     $7421           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$1E            ; message: flee
    JSR     $739F           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TURN_START_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-35}
    JMP     $1C91           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}

.no_flee:                               ; $1FAF
    JSR     $1C3C           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y  ; entity position
    JSR     $0E6C           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .hostile
    JSR     $5F19           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$01,.one_threat
    JMP     $1C91           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}
.one_threat:
    JMP     $1AD8           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOVE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5SXQOZOU4UJBYWY65C5UO66FXM000000-1}

.hostile:                               ; $1FCD
    JSR     $1341           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.walk_group:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    BEQ     .group_done
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y  ; entity position
    CMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y     ; mob position
    BNE     .next_member
    JSR     .set_combat_flag
.next_member:
    JSR     $1347           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    JMP     .walk_group

.group_done:                            ; $1FE5
    JSR     $7444           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     $0DD1           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     $7421           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$1F            ; message: engage combat
    JSR     $739F           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    JMP     $1C91           ; -> \nwlinkedidentc{END_TURN}{PYNWmai0-YK37CBMYWN72MINVDJFMB7UPQ4000000-1}

.set_combat_flag:                       ; $1FF6
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y     ; mob byte $0F
    ORA     #$04            ; set bit 2 = combat engaged
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
; $1FFE: RTS -- also serves as no-op stub for callers at $4A1F/$4BE4
    RTS

; Trailing orphan byte
    HEX     61
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}\\{{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADJACENT{\_}THREAT}}{ADJACENT:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COLROW{\_}TO{\_}POS}}{COLROW:unTO:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}COL}}{CURRENT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROW}}{CURRENT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{END{\_}TURN}}{END:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SLOT{\_}BYTE}}{EVENT:unSLOT:unBYTE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SUB{\_}VALUE}}{EVENT:unSUB:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HANDLE{\_}MOB{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{HANDLE:unMOB:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOVE{\_}LOOP}}{MOVE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SUM{\_}HOSTILE{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{SUM:unHOSTILE:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}COL}}{TURN:unSTART:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TURN{\_}START{\_}ROW}}{TURN:unSTART:unROW}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-7JMQKEJVEIKL7YUOFBN36Y7XWI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{879}\nwdocspar

\section{Target selection}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{880}{\Tt{}SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} evaluates the battlefield to decide what the
current entity should fight.  It dispatches on {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE\nwendquote} into three
paths.  For modes below~3 (``path low''), the routine checks {\Tt{}STEPS{\_}TAKEN\nwendquote},
the encounter result, and adjacent threats; if any of these indicate combat,
it returns~2, otherwise it returns~4 (safe).  For modes 3--4 (``path mid''),
the routine walks the group's linked list looking for the hostile mob with the
highest threat score (via {\Tt{}GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT\nwendquote}), saving its pointer in
{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI\nwendquote}; if a target is found, it returns~1
(attack ready).  For mode~5 and above (``path high''), it performs the same
walk but ranks targets by field~5 strength instead of threat score, again
returning~1 if a valid target is found.  If no hostile is found in the mid or
high paths, execution falls through to the low path for a final check.
