\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{881}{\Tt{}BEST{\_}THREAT\nwendquote} accumulates the highest threat or strength score seen
so far while {\Tt{}SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} iterates through group members.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{882}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-56}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}     EQU     $5A88   ; best threat level during target selection
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{883}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{884}{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI\nwendquote} record the pointer to the
mob with the best score.  When {\Tt{}SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} finishes and
returns 1 (attack ready), the caller uses these to load the target.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{885}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}   EQU     $5A86   ; selected combat target pointer (low byte)
\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}   EQU     $5A87   ; selected combat target pointer (high byte)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{886}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{887}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}}}\moddef{select combat target~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $18E4
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_COMBAT_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}
; Selects combat target based on \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26} (3 paths: <3, 3-4, >=5)
\nwlinkedidentc{SELECT_COMBAT_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    CMP     #$03
    BMI     .path_low
    CMP     #$05
    BMI     .path_mid
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}
.loop_high:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$00,.skip_high
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    AND     #$1F
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}
    BMI     .skip_high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}
.skip_high:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1,.loop_high
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57},.path_low
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
.path_low:
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{STEPS_TAKEN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-41},.ret_2
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_ENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-PIBYNYNPF7BMUKCGA5W4VJAN7E000000-1}
    LDA     #$02
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{ENCOUNTER_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-40},.ret_2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_THREATS_HERE}{PYNWmai0-M3Z3S2X2SWFRY4GRWPO6KFUE4I000000-1}
    BANE    #$01,.ret_2
    LDA     #$04
    RTS
.ret_2:
    LDA     #$02
    RTS
.path_mid:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.loop_mid:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57},.skip_mid
    BMI     .skip_mid
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}
.skip_mid:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1,.loop_mid
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{BEST_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-57},.path_low
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET}}{SELECT:unCOMBAT:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SELECT{\_}COMBAT{\_}TARGET}}{SELECT:unCOMBAT:unTARGET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{BEST{\_}THREAT}}{BEST:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}ENCOUNTER}}{CHECK:unENCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}THREATS{\_}HERE}}{CHECK:unTHREATS:unHERE}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENCOUNTER{\_}RESULT}}{ENCOUNTER:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEPS{\_}TAKEN}}{STEPS:unTAKEN}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-6KDZQUTB2ST3NYFRT7XVP4FCSI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{888}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{889}{\Tt{}GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT\nwendquote} evaluates the threat level of the mob at {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
relative to the current entity.  This is a stub---the full implementation has
not yet been disassembled.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{890}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}}}\moddef{get entity threat~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1979
\nwlinkedidentc{GET_ENTITY_THREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}:
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}{PYNWmai0-A45UBXB4GHNPJITGSLH4DQKEGE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}ENTITY{\_}THREAT}}{GET:unENTITY:unTHREAT}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{891}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{892}{\Tt{}LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR\nwendquote} copies the pre-selected combat target address from
{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} and clears
{\Tt{}IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN\nwendquote} to zero, indicating that the next attack sequence is from
the AI's perspective.  {\Tt{}START{\_}COMBAT\nwendquote} calls this to set up {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}
before entering {\Tt{}RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{893}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}}}\moddef{load target ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $199D
\nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_TARGET_PTR}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_TARGET_PTR}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_LO}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_PTR_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unTARGET:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}TARGET{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unTARGET:unPTR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}HI}}{TARGET:unPTR:unHI}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}PTR{\_}LO}}{TARGET:unPTR:unLO}{PYNWmai0-TMW7BNSHSB7S5CA2EWFUHI57Y4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{894}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{895}{\Tt{}PROCESS{\_}ENTITY{\_}SCRIPT\nwendquote} temporarily removes an entity from the map, runs
a script, and restores it.  The routine saves the entity's byte~0 (position
character) from {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}, overwrites it with~\$FE (marking the slot empty),
runs script type~\$0E via {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote}, calls {\Tt{}DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE\nwendquote} for
timing/animation, and then redraws the original character at the entity's
position with {\Tt{}DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote}.  This is used during event interactions
where the entity needs to be temporarily invisible---for example, when opening
a chest.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{896}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}}}\moddef{process entity script~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1849
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_ENTITY_SCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}
; Saves entity char, marks as $FE, runs script $0E, dispatches, restores
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_ENTITY_SCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$FE
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    LDX     #$0E
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_ON_MODE}{PYNWmai0-JKIRIHK5BBUUQKW62F6RWOUO6M000000-1}
    LDA     $BA
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DRAW_CHAR_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-RAACK23HC5EFMXFBXXME6ZKJTE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}ENTITY{\_}SCRIPT}}{PROCESS:unENTITY:unSCRIPT}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}ENTITY{\_}SCRIPT}}{PROCESS:unENTITY:unSCRIPT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}ON{\_}MODE}}{DISPATCH:unON:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DRAW{\_}CHAR{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{DRAW:unCHAR:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-Q3AHCFQFAYHI5ZDCFHGADKUUBU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{897}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{898}{\Tt{}COPY{\_}F4{\_}TO{\_}F6{\_}AND{\_}SET\nwendquote} copies {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}EFFECT{\_}REC\nwendquote} and
tail-calls {\Tt{}APPLY{\_}DAMAGE\nwendquote} with the damage amount in~A.  This is the
counterpart to {\Tt{}APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT\nwendquote}: where that routine applies
damage to the entity at {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}, this one applies damage to the
mob at {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}---used during mob-on-player combat.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{899}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}}}\moddef{copy f4 to f6 and set~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1432
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_F4_TO_F6_AND_SET}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}
; Copies \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}/\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1, then JMP \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1} with A
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_F4_TO_F6_AND_SET}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}:
    TAX
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1
    TXA
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-D256HFDGQETTIDZ7NPNYN7IAEQ000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}F4{\_}TO{\_}F6{\_}AND{\_}SET}}{COPY:unF4:unTO:unF6:unAND:unSET}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}F4{\_}TO{\_}F6{\_}AND{\_}SET}}{COPY:unF4:unTO:unF6:unAND:unSET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-FB3FXIHOCR64AM3V6TSDVUG32Q000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{900}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{901}{\Tt{}ADD{\_}WILLINGNESS\nwendquote} is a tiny helper that adds~A (signed) to the
{\Tt{}COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS\nwendquote} accumulator.  It exists as a separate routine because
{\Tt{}RESOLVE{\_}ATTACK\nwendquote} calls it from many points during the willingness
calculation and inlining each addition would waste significant code space.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{902}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}}}\moddef{add willingness~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $169B
\nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{COMBAT_WILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-52}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADD{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{ADD:unWILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ADD{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{ADD:unWILLINGNESS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMBAT{\_}WILLINGNESS}}{COMBAT:unWILLINGNESS}{PYNWmai0-F2RBQZVGPDGPEQK2JKDZOJNL5Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{903}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{904}{\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote} selects a random eligible member from the current
character's group.  It reads the group size from byte~8 of the record at
{\Tt{}{\$}FA\nwendquote}, calls {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} to pick a random index, and then walks
the group's linked list with {\Tt{}FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote},
counting down to the Nth member whose field~4 falls in the valid range
(\$00--\$14).  Members with negative field~4 values or values at~\$15 or above
are skipped.  If the random roll returns zero, the routine retries.  On
success, {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} points to the selected member's record; if the group is
empty, both bytes of {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} are zeroed as a ``not found'' sentinel.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{905}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}}}\moddef{pick random member~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $12D0
\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}
    ; Pick a random eligible group member (field 4 in $00-$14 range)
    ; Uses ($FA)[8] as group size, calls \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1} to pick Nth
.loop:
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y    ; group size
    BEQ     .zero           ; empty group
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1} ; random(size)
    BAEQ    #$00,.loop      ; 0 -> retry
    TAX                     ; X = count down to Nth member
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.check:
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y     ; member field 4
    BMI     .next           ; negative -> skip
    CMP     #$15
    BPL     .next           ; >= $15 -> skip
    DEX
    BNE     .next           ; not Nth yet
    RTS                     ; found: \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 points to member
.next:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
    JMP     .check
.zero:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}         ; clear pointer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMEMBER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{906}\nwdocspar

\section{Combat utilities}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{907}{\Tt{}MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING\nwendquote} converts a numeric value in~A into a descriptive
string for display.  Values 0--7 map directly to string indices; values
8--15 are compressed (ROR, AND~\$03, ORA~\$08) into indices 8--11; and
values 16+ are further compressed into indices 12--15.  The routine then
walks a linked list of length-prefixed strings starting at~\$803A, advancing
by each string's length byte until the target index is reached, and
tail-calls {\Tt{}PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED\nwendquote} to display it.  This provides combat
messages that scale with the magnitude of the value---for example, mapping
low damage to ``scratches'' and high damage to ``devastating blow.''


\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{908}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}}}\moddef{map value to string~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $11FC
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{MAP_VALUE_TO_STRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}
; Maps A to string table index, walks linked list from $803A
\nwlinkedidentc{MAP_VALUE_TO_STRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}:
    CMP     #$08
    BMI     .use_as_is
    CMP     #$10
    BPL     .high_range
    ROR
    AND     #$03
    ORA     #$08
    BNE     .use_as_is
.high_range:
    ROR
    ROR
    AND     #$03
    ORA     #$0C
.use_as_is:
    TAX
    LDA     #$3A
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    LDY     #$00
.loop:
    DEX
    BNE     .next
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_BOTTOM_CENTERED}{PYNWmai0-7N4O63INZLB3AXK5ETC5T7GMII000000-1}
.next:
    SEC
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     #$00
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    BNE     .loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING}}{MAP:unVALUE:unTO:unSTRING}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MAP{\_}VALUE{\_}TO{\_}STRING}}{MAP:unVALUE:unTO:unSTRING}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}BOTTOM{\_}CENTERED}}{PRINT:unBOTTOM:unCENTERED}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-VCP3XJIUS2E3NQ4UV5QNKHPQPA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{909}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{910}{\Tt{}AUTO{\_}HEAL\nwendquote} provides passive healing for characters between combat turns.
If the entity's HP (field~6, low 6~bits) is below~\$28 (40~decimal), there is
a random chance of healing: {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote} with argument~1 gives a 50\%
chance of initiating the process.  Once started, the routine enters a loop
that increments HP via {\Tt{}INCREMENT{\_}HP\nwendquote} and continues as long as the PRNG
output is at or above~\$50---so healing stops probabilistically, with each
additional point becoming less likely.  For player characters (field~4 below
\$15), the routine displays a ``healed'' message the first time, controlled by
the {\Tt{}HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED\nwendquote} flag to avoid repeating the notification on subsequent
HP increments.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{911}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-58}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}       EQU     $5A16   ; auto heal: nonzero = already printed heal message
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{912}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{913}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}}}\moddef{auto heal~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $143F
\nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{AUTO_HEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}
    ; Auto-heal: if HP < $28, randomly attempt healing via $1482.
    ; Loops while \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13} >= $50 (still injured). Shows message $21
    ; if player heals for the first time.
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     #$28
    BMI     .do_heal
    RTS
.do_heal:
    LDA     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    BANE    #$00,.start_heal
    RTS
.start_heal:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}
.heal_loop:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INCREMENT_HP}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     #$50
    BPL     .heal_loop
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    CMP     #$15
    BCC     .player
.done:
    RTS
.player:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}
    BNE     .done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$21
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AUTO{\_}HEAL}}{AUTO:unHEAL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}}\\{{\nwixident{INCREMENT{\_}HP}}{INCREMENT:unHP}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INCREMENT{\_}HP}}{INCREMENT:unHP}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-HPP2QGGDYADH6JTGFVEHK37G3M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{914}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{915}{\Tt{}INCREMENT{\_}HP\nwendquote} adds~1 to the entity's field~6 (which holds HP in its low
6~bits along with flags in the upper 2).  Since the HP value is less than~63,
a simple ADC~\$01 on the full byte works without disturbing the flag bits.
When the masked HP reaches exactly~3---the threshold at which a character is
no longer ``badly hurt''---the routine notifies the player by printing the
mob's name and displaying message~\$22, and sets {\Tt{}HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED\nwendquote} to prevent
{\Tt{}AUTO{\_}HEAL\nwendquote} from showing its own separate notification.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{916}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}}}\moddef{increment hp~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1482
\nwlinkedidentc{INCREMENT_HP}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INCREMENT_HP}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    CLC
    ADC     #$01
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    AND     #$3F
    BAEQ    #$03,.notify
    RTS
.notify:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$22
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{HEAL_NOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INCREMENT{\_}HP}}{INCREMENT:unHP}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INCREMENT{\_}HP}}{INCREMENT:unHP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{HEAL{\_}NOTIFIED}}{HEAL:unNOTIFIED}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-JWJRZUW5VW4CCWGREFVC5USWX4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{917}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{918}{\Tt{}MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS\nwendquote} is the low-level gold modification routine.  It
operates on the character record at {\Tt{}EFFECT{\_}REC\nwendquote}, adding or subtracting the
16-bit value in {\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE+1\nwendquote} to fields~13--14 (the gold
counter).  The direction is controlled by~Y on entry: Y=0 subtracts,
Y$\neq$0 adds.  After modifying gold, the routine recomputes field~\$0C,
which encodes a derived level/XP value.  The recomputation uses field~5
(shifted left 3~bits) as a scaling factor and iterates through a level
progression, comparing accumulated thresholds against the character's gold
(fields~13--14) to determine the appropriate level encoding.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{919}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-59}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60} EQU     $5A7F   ; level bits during stat modification
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{920}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{921}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}}}\moddef{modify char stats~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $704D
\nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CHAR_STATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CHAR_STATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}
    ; Add or subtract gold from char record at (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}).
    ; Y=0: subtract \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1 from field 13/14
    ; Y!=0: add \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1 to field 13/14
    ; Then recompute field 12 (level/XP encoding).
    BYEQ    #$00,.subtract
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    JMP     .aftermath
.subtract:
    LDY     #$0D
    SEC
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
.aftermath:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    ROL
    ROL
    ROL
    AND     #$F8
    STA     $5A7E
    LDY     #$0C
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    PHA
    AND     #$0F
    TAX
    PLA
    ROR
    ROR
    ROR
    ROR
    AND     #$0F
    TAY
.decy:
    DEY
    BMI     .done_cnt
    INX
    BPL     .decy
.done_cnt:
    INY
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}
    STY     $BA
    STY     $BB
.outer_loop:
    LDY     #$0E
    BXEQ    #$00,.store_final
    CLC
    LDA     $BA
    ADC     $5A7E
    STA     $BA
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     $BB
.no_carry:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    CMP     $BB
    BCC     .store_final
    BNE     .next_iter
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    CMP     $BA
    BCC     .store_final
.next_iter:
    DEX
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}
    ADC     #$10
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}
    BNE     .outer_loop
.store_final:
    TXA
    ORA     \nwlinkedidentc{STAT_LEVEL_BITS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}
    LDY     #$0C
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STAT{\_}LEVEL{\_}BITS}}{STAT:unLEVEL:unBITS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{922}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{923}{\Tt{}MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS\nwendquote} copies {\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote} into {\Tt{}EFFECT{\_}REC\nwendquote} and
tail-calls {\Tt{}MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS\nwendquote}, which performs a treasure table lookup and
applies the stat modification to the target character.  This wrapper allows
callers to apply treasure effects to the current entity without manually
setting up the effect record pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{924}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}}}\moddef{modify current stats~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $70D4
\nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CURRENT_STATS}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    ; Copy \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}/\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}/\nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1, JMP $704D (treasure lookup)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EFFECT_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-18}+1
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CHAR_STATS}{PYNWmai0-W2S7TFAFFY4T25H25UZBFJ5Y5M000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EFFECT{\_}REC}}{EFFECT:unREC}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CHAR{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCHAR:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{925}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{926}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}}}\moddef{Hit chance~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwenddeflinemarkup
(15AB)
.compute_to_hit:
    JSR      \nwlinkedidentc{SET_BLINK_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-2VA524SVP6PHW44TQJEWTMYFGE000000-1}
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BANE    #$01,.mob
    LDA      #$1C
    STA      TO_HIT
    JMP      .roll

.mob:
    ; Base chance = dexterity (-1)
    LDY      #$0B
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}?),Y
    TAX
    AND      #$1F
    STA      TO_HIT
    TXA

    ; If DEX bit 5 set, clear DEX bit 4
    ; and add 75% to chance.
    AND      #$20
    BEQ      LAB_15d6
    TXA
    AND      #$EF
    STA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}?),Y
    LDA      #$18
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_15d6:
    ; If opponent DEX bit 6 set,
    ; subtract 12.5% (particularly difficult
    ; to hit).
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    TAY
    AND      #$40
    BEQ      LAB_15e2
    LDA      #$FC
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_15e2:
    ; If opponent DEX bit 7 set,
    ; add 25% (extremely easy to hit).
    TYA
    AND      #$80
    BEQ      .check_thing_f
    LDA      #$08
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

.check_thing_f:
    ; If opponent F bit 2 set,
    ; add 18.75% (down: unconscious, in hand to hand combat,
    ; or resting)
    LDY      #$0F
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    TAX
    AND      #$04
    BEQ      LAB_15fa
    LDA      #$06
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_15fa:
    ; If opponent F bits 1,0 < 1
    ; add 9.375% (currently resting)
    TXA
    AND      #$03
    CMP      #$01
    BPL      LAB_1609
    LDA      #$03
    JSR      add_to_to_hit
    JMP      .check_thing_6

LAB_1609:
    ; subtract 3.125% ("running" -- bugged?)
    BNE      LAB_1613
    LDA      #$FF
    JSR      add_to_to_hit
    JMP      .check_thing_6

LAB_1613:
    ; If opponent F bits 1,0 == 3
    ; subtract 9.375% (opponent is defending)
    BANE    #$03,.check_thing_6
    LDA      #$FD
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

.check_thing_6:
    ; If opponent CON <= 3
    ; add 75%.
    LDY      #$06
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    AND      #$3F
    CMP      #$03
    BCS      LAB_162b
    LDA      #$18
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

LAB_162b:
    ; If mob[3] == thing[3]...
    LDY      #$03
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}?),Y
    CMP     (THING_PTR?),Y
    BNE     .limit_to_hit

    ; add Thing[STR]/2 & 0x0F - Mob[STR]/2 & 0x0F
    LDY      #$05
    LDA      (THING_PTR?),Y
    ROR
    AND      #$0F
    STA      DAT_5a77
    LDA      (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}?),Y
    ROR
    AND      #$0F
    SEC
    SBC      DAT_5a77
    JSR      add_to_to_hit

.limit_to_hit:
    LDA      TO_HIT
    BPL      .adjust_for_automatic_fail
    LDA      #$00
    STA      TO_HIT
    JMP      .roll

.adjust_for_automatic_fail:
    CMP      #$1F
    BMI      .roll
    LDA      #$1E
    STA      TO_HIT

.roll:
    LDA      #$1F
    JSR      get_random
    CMP      TO_HIT
    BMI      .do_hit
    BEQ      .do_hit
    JSR      clear_row_21
    JSR      print_name_of_actor
    JSR      scroll_status_window_up
    LDA      #$D2
    STA      DATA_PTR2
    LDA      #$7C
    STA      DATA_PTR2+1
    JSR      print_centered_row_23
    JSR      scroll_status_window_up
    LDA      #$01
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34},.do_blink
    JSR      print_thing_name_centered_row_23
.do_blink:
    JSR      blink
    RTS
.do_hit:
    LDA      \nwlinkedidentc{IS_PLAYER_TURN}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-34}
    BEQ      .hit_mob
    JMP      hit_nonmob?
.hit_mob:
    JMP      hit_mob?
\nwnotused{Hit chance}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{IS{\_}PLAYER{\_}TURN}}{IS:unPLAYER:unTURN}{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}BLINK{\_}TARGET}}{SET:unBLINK:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-X4FLZFQK2PJN7VH3YTA5N5PTO4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{927}\nwdocspar

\chapter{NPC AI}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{928}{\Tt{}AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} is the decision-making hub for NPC and mob turns.  It
selects a map position for the entity to move toward, based on the AI mode
stored in {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE\nwendquote}.  Six modes are supported.  Modes~0 and~1 check
whether an NPC should join the player's party: {\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER\nwendquote} selects
a candidate, and if one is found, the game displays a ``joins party'' message,
merges the NPC's status flags into the party record, increments the group
count, and switches the character to player control (mode~0).  Mode~2 compares
the entity's offense and defense stats; if offense dominates, it calls
{\Tt{}FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT\nwendquote} to locate the closest event on the map and targets that
position.  Mode~3 searches for the nearest hostile mob by iterating through
group members with {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE\nwendquote}, keeping track
of the closest one found; if none are hostile, it falls back to a default
position.  Mode~4 produces no target at all---the entity stays put.  Mode~5
and above seek the \emph{strongest} hostile instead of the nearest, iterating
the group and tracking the highest strength value in {\Tt{}AI{\_}BEST{\_}STR\nwendquote}.  After
target selection, all modes converge at a common exit that unpacks the target
position into column and row via {\Tt{}POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{929}{\Tt{}AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR\nwendquote} stores the last direction the NPC moved, used by
{\Tt{}NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI\nwendquote} as a bias to encourage straight-line travel.
{\Tt{}AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS\nwendquote} is the packed map position that {\Tt{}AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET\nwendquote}
selects as the destination, and {\Tt{}AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL\nwendquote} holds the column
component after unpacking.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{930}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-60}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_PREV_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}         EQU     $5A5D   ; NPC AI: previous move direction (bias avoidance)
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}   EQU     $5A72   ; AI target column / min distance temp
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}   EQU     $5A71   ; AI target position (set by \nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1})
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL}}{AI:unTARGET:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL}}{AI:unTARGET:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{931}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{932}{\Tt{}AI{\_}BEST{\_}POS\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}AI{\_}BEST{\_}STR\nwendquote} are zero-page temporaries at
{\Tt{}{\$}BE\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}{\$}BF\nwendquote} that {\Tt{}AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET\nwendquote} uses in mode 5 to track
the strongest hostile mob found during the group iteration.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{933}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}             EQU     $BE     ; best hostile position in ai_choose_target
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unBEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unBEST:unPOS}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{934}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{935}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}             EQU     $BF     ; best hostile strength in ai_choose_target
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}STR}}{AI:unBEST:unSTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}STR}}{AI:unBEST:unSTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{936}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{937}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}}}\moddef{ai choose target~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $68AB
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{AI_CHOOSE_TARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}

    ; --- dispatch by AI mode ---
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_PREV_DIR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    CMP     #$02
    BPL     .mode_ge2

    ; --- mode 0/1: check if NPC should join party ---
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-WOR3NSTQYE2E5QDYPYB4LG3HRQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    BAEQ    #$00,.simple_target ; no match -> simple target
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$24
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}     ; "joins party" message
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MEMBER_NAME}{PYNWmai0-5HT5O3J4MAUXACC3LBXLGKOCGA000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DELAY_WITH_ANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-GR34WPZFUFAWF4EEF55HS6PMUU000000-1}
    LDA     #$25
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}        ; switch to player control
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    SEC
    SBC     #$15                ; adjust char field 4
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y         ; source field 15 high bits
    AND     #$C0
    STA     $BA
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y      ; target field 15 low bits
    AND     #$3F
    ORA     $BA                 ; merge high bits from source
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y        ; group field 8
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                ; increment party size
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y
    INC     $5A01               ; increment global party count
    RTS

    ; --- mode 2: compare stats for target ---
.mode_ge2:
    BNE     .mode_ge3
.simple_target:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y      ; char field 5
    AND     #$1F
    STA     $BA
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y      ; char field 6
    AND     #$3F
    CMP     $BA
    BPL     .use_encounter
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}       ; no target
    JMP     .done
.use_encounter:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_NEAREST_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}  ; find encounter position
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    JMP     .done

    ; --- mode 3: find nearest hostile ---
.mode_ge3:
    CMP     #$04
    BPL     .mode_ge4
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    LDA     #$3C                ; initial min distance
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.loop3:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$00,.skip3
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y         ; mob packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}  ; compute distance
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    BCS     .skip3              ; not closer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}       ; new minimum
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}       ; target = this mob's position
.skip3:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}   ; next group member
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    BNE     .loop3
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    BANE    #$3C,.found3
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}           ; no hostile found -> use default
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
.found3:
    JMP     .done

    ; --- mode 4: no target ---
.mode_ge4:
    BNE     .mode_gt4
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    JMP     .done

    ; --- mode 5+: find strongest hostile ---
.mode_gt4:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}         ; max strength seen
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIRST_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}
.loop5:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}
    BAEQ    #$00,.skip5
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y         ; mob field 5
    AND     #$1F                ; strength stat
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}
    BMI     .skip5              ; not stronger
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}         ; new max
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}         ; target position
.skip5:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NEXT_GROUP_MEMBER}{PYNWmai0-N5WF7CLBP626OQIPH6GSP4CDCA000000-1}   ; next group member
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    BNE     .loop5
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_STR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}
    BEQ     .no_target5
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_BEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-20}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}       ; strongest mob's position
    JMP     .done
.no_target5:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-27}           ; no hostile -> use default
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    JMP     .done

    ; --- convert target position to col/row ---
.done:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}       ; target column
    STY     $5A73               ; target row
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}CHOOSE{\_}TARGET}}{AI:unCHOOSE:unTARGET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unBEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}STR}}{AI:unBEST:unSTR}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL}}{AI:unTARGET:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT}}{FIND:unNEAREST:unEVENT}}\\{{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMEMBER}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unBEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}BEST{\_}STR}}{AI:unBEST:unSTR}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}COL}}{AI:unTARGET:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DELAY{\_}WITH{\_}ANIMATION}}{DELAY:unWITH:unANIMATION}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}POS}}{EVENT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT}}{FIND:unNEAREST:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIRST{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{FIRST:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEXT{\_}GROUP{\_}MEMBER}}{NEXT:unGROUP:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MEMBER}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMEMBER}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MEMBER{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMEMBER:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-KEFBT3V5UBIE5Q2SEGO4W6K6CM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{938}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{939}{\Tt{}NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI\nwendquote} implements the movement decision for AI-controlled
characters.  It evaluates five options---north, south, west, east, and
stay---by assigning each a score and selecting the lowest.  The base score
starts at~\$0A (or \$13 if the AI has a non-zero target), and the previous
direction gets a bonus of~+3 to encourage straight-line movement.  Each
candidate direction is tested by {\Tt{}EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION\nwendquote}, which computes a
score based on map tile traversability, distance to the target, and threat
assessment.  A randomization step multiplies each score by~4 (ROL twice) and
adds a random value (range~6 normally, range~\$0F in AI mode~4) to break
ties unpredictably.  The direction with the lowest final score wins.  The
chosen direction index is XOR'd with~3 or~7 (depending on whether it is
below~3) to convert from the internal direction numbering to the movement
encoding expected by the caller.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{940}{\Tt{}DIR{\_}SCORES\nwendquote} is a 5-byte array holding the score for each direction
(indices 0--4: stay, north, south, west, east).  {\Tt{}AI{\_}DIRECTION\nwendquote} is the
index currently being evaluated, and {\Tt{}AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS\nwendquote} holds the candidate
position for that direction.  {\Tt{}NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI\nwendquote} fills the array, randomizes
the scores, and picks the direction with the lowest value.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{941}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_TEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}     EQU     $5A70   ; position being tested for direction evaluation
\nwlinkedidentc{AI_DIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}    EQU     $5A6F   ; current direction being evaluated / random range
\nwlinkedidentc{DIR_SCORES}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}      EQU     $5A6A   ; array of 5 direction scores (indexed 0-4)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{942}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{943}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}}}\moddef{npc move ai~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6742
\nwlinkedidentc{NPC_MOVE_AI}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{NPC_MOVE_AI}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}
    ; NPC movement AI: evaluate 4 directions + stay, pick best
    ; direction based on distance to target and randomized scoring.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ANIM_TICK_AND_WAIT}{PYNWmai0-ITIZTAY463ZOFFOFSBK22AG34I000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BAEQ    #$04,.do_ai
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    BANE    #$00,.do_ai
    RTS
.do_ai:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $5A6B
    STA     $5A6C
    STA     $5A6D
    STA     $5A6E
    LDA     #$0A

\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{NPC{\_}MOVE{\_}AI}}{NPC:unMOVE:unAI}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION}}{EVALUATE:unDIRECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}PREV{\_}DIR}}{AI:unPREV:unDIR}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ANIM{\_}TICK{\_}AND{\_}WAIT}}{ANIM:unTICK:unAND:unWAIT}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION}}{EVALUATE:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-UY2FKYYPYM3SOTD5G2Z3VO2UUE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{944}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{945}{\Tt{}EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION\nwendquote} scores a single candidate direction for the NPC
movement AI.  It temporarily moves the entity to the test position
({\Tt{}AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS\nwendquote}) and evaluates the result.  If the test position matches the
AI's target, a large penalty is added (the entity is already there).  The
routine computes the Manhattan distance to the target from the test position;
if the distance is not closer than the current distance, a smaller penalty is
added.  It then calls {\Tt{}FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS\nwendquote} to check what occupies the
candidate square: empty squares return cleanly, walls add a large penalty,
and entities are scored based on their type byte---friendly mobs, hostile
mobs of various strength ranges, and locked/safe events each contribute
different penalty amounts via {\Tt{}INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS\nwendquote}.  The entity's position
is restored before returning.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{946}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}}}\moddef{evaluate direction~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6815
\nwlinkedidentc{EVALUATE_DIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EVALUATE_DIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62},.skip_target
    LDY     #$09
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.skip_target:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    STA     $5A69
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TARGET_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-61}
    BEQ     .no_distance
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}
    CMP     $5A68
    BCC     .no_distance
    LDY     #$02
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.no_distance:
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     $5A69
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_TEST_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_ENTITY_AT_POS}{PYNWmai0-PLJFN4SECKS5ALV334RXDZNCVU000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}+1
    BNE     .has_entity
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}
    BNE     .wall
    RTS
.wall:
    LDY     #$07
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.has_entity:
    CMP     #$80
    BCC     .mob
    RTS
.mob:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    CMP     #$80
    BCS     .ge80
    LDY     #$03
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.ge80:
    CMP     #$C0
    BCS     .geC0
    LDY     #$06
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.geC0:
    CMP     #$D2
    BCS     .geD2
    LDY     #$01
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.geD2:
    CMP     #$D5
    BCS     .geD5
    LDY     #$02
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.geD5:
    CMP     #$D8
    BCS     .geD8
    LDY     #$03
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.geD8:
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    CMP     #$40
    BCS     .safe
    LDY     #$07
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
.safe:

; falls through to \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION}}{EVALUATE:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION}}{EVALUATE:unDIRECTION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS}}{INC:unMOB:unCOUNTERS}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}TARGET{\_}POS}}{AI:unTARGET:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}TEST{\_}POS}}{AI:unTEST:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}ENTITY{\_}AT{\_}POS}}{FIND:unENTITY:unAT:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS}}{INC:unMOB:unCOUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-D2LJS67N7N474UNMFHX542CANQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{947}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{948}{\Tt{}INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS\nwendquote} adds~Y to the direction score for the current AI
direction being evaluated.  The current direction index is in
{\Tt{}AI{\_}DIRECTION\nwendquote}, and the scores are in the {\Tt{}DIR{\_}SCORES\nwendquote} array indexed by~X.
The routine decrements~Y in a loop, incrementing {\Tt{}DIR{\_}SCORES,X\nwendquote} each time,
returning when~Y reaches zero.  This is used by {\Tt{}EVALUATE{\_}DIRECTION\nwendquote} to
penalize directions based on what occupies the candidate square.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{949}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}}}\moddef{inc mob counters~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $689F
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
; Increments mob counters; Y = count-1 on entry
\nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}:
    LDX     \nwlinkedidentc{AI_DIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}
    DEY
    BPL     .do_inc
    RTS
.do_inc:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{DIR_SCORES}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62},X
