    BPL     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_MOB_COUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS}}{INC:unMOB:unCOUNTERS}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}MOB{\_}COUNTERS}}{INC:unMOB:unCOUNTERS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}}\\{{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{AI{\_}DIRECTION}}{AI:unDIRECTION}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DIR{\_}SCORES}}{DIR:unSCORES}{PYNWmai0-OBEAH6DJ7HJ2CQLPTB22X6MACU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{950}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{951}{\Tt{}FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT\nwendquote} scans the character's event list for the closest
non-activated event, measured by Manhattan distance from the entity's current
position.  It loads the event list pointer from bytes~6--7 of the character
record at {\Tt{}{\$}FA\nwendquote} and walks the 3-byte entries: entries with byte~1 at~\$C0 or
above are already activated and are skipped, entries marked~\$FE (empty slot)
are skipped, and~\$FF marks the end of the list.  For each eligible entry,
the routine calls {\Tt{}MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE\nwendquote} and keeps track of the nearest one
found.  The winning position is returned in~A and stored at~\$5A13 for the AI
to use as a movement target.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{952}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-62}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}        EQU     $5A14   ; find nearest event: current minimum distance
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{953}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{954}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}}}\moddef{find nearest event~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $138D
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_NEAREST_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_NEAREST_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}
    ; Find nearest non-activated event (byte 1 < $C0) by Manhattan distance
    ; Returns position in A ($5A13)
    LDA     #$7F               ; initial min distance
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y       ; event list pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y       ; event list pointer high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
    JMP     .check_end
.eval:
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y      ; event byte 1 = type
    CMP     #$C0
    BCS     .advance           ; >= $C0 -> activated, skip
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y      ; event byte 0 = position
    STA     $5A15
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1} ; Manhattan distance
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}
    BPL     .advance           ; not closer
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NEAREST_DIST}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}       ; new minimum
    LDA     $5A15
    STA     $5A13              ; record position
.advance:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    CLC
    ADC     #$03               ; next 3-byte entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    BCC     .check_end
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
.check_end:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    BAEQ    #$FE,.advance      ; $FE = empty slot, skip
    BANE    #$FF,.eval         ; $FF = end of list
    LDA     $5A13              ; return nearest position
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT}}{FIND:unNEAREST:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}NEAREST{\_}EVENT}}{FIND:unNEAREST:unEVENT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NEAREST{\_}DIST}}{NEAREST:unDIST}{PYNWmai0-WJZHC4OUJYWCB7LRPDW6JSUCTQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{955}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{956}{\Tt{}MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE\nwendquote} computes the taxicab distance between a given packed
position (in~A) and the current entity's position at offset~3 of
{\Tt{}ENTITY{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.  It unpacks both positions into column/row pairs with
{\Tt{}POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW\nwendquote}, takes the absolute value of each axis difference using the
standard 6502 negate-if-negative idiom (EOR~\$FF, ADC~\$01), and sums the
results.  The function temporarily borrows {\Tt{}FONT{\_}COL\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}FONT{\_}ROW\nwendquote} as
scratch storage---these are safe to clobber here since no rendering is in
progress.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{957}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}}}\moddef{manhattan distance~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $13DB
\nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{MANHATTAN_DISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}
    ; Manhattan distance: |col(A) - col(char)| + |row(A) - row(char)|
    ; Input: A = packed position to measure from
    ; Uses char's position from (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1})[3]
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}  ; A -> col in A, row in Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}       ; save target col
    STY     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}       ; save target row
    LDY     #$03
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y ; char packed position
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{POS_TO_COLROW}{PYNWmai0-AMTAHZ55D6ORMSENT2EMDCDU24000000-1}
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_COL}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}       ; char col - target col
    BCS     .pos1
    EOR     #$FF           ; negate (absolute value)
    ADC     #$01
.pos1:
    STA     $BA            ; |delta col|
    TYA
    SEC
    SBC     \nwlinkedidentc{FONT_ROW}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-28}       ; char row - target row
    BCS     .pos2
    EOR     #$FF
    ADC     #$01
.pos2:
    CLC
    ADC     $BA            ; |delta col| + |delta row|
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{MANHATTAN{\_}DISTANCE}}{MANHATTAN:unDISTANCE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}}\\{{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}}\\{{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}COL}}{FONT:unCOL}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FONT{\_}ROW}}{FONT:unROW}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{POS{\_}TO{\_}COLROW}}{POS:unTO:unCOLROW}{PYNWmai0-DNSZHN2JFNH4TAF3E2VZ7VYGHE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{958}\nwdocspar

\section{Shops}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{959}{\Tt{}DISPLAY{\_}SHOP\nwendquote} presents the shop interface when a character enters a store
tile.  It only runs for player-controlled characters (AI mode~0).  The routine
loads the shop data pointer and advances it past earlier shop entries based on
the event type (byte~1 minus~\$D5 gives the shop index).  It then iterates
through the 8-bit item availability mask in byte~2: for each set bit, it
computes the item's price by summing price components based on the location
style (1--4 components), formats the price with {\Tt{}NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL\nwendquote}, copies
the item name string into the display buffer, and enters the game's
alternative input loop via {\Tt{}START{\_}GAME{\_}INPUT\nwendquote} so the player can choose to
buy.  The item mask is rotated right to advance through items, wrapping around
when all bits have been checked.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{960}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-63}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}          EQU     $5A81   ; shop: accumulated price low byte
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}       EQU     $5A82   ; shop: accumulated price high byte
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}      EQU     $5A80   ; shop: bitmask for current item ($80 rotating right)
\nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64} EQU    $5A85   ; offset into shop item table (5 per item)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}MASK}}{SHOP:unITEM:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}OFFSET}}{SHOP:unITEM:unOFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}MASK}}{SHOP:unITEM:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}OFFSET}}{SHOP:unITEM:unOFFSET}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{961}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{962}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}}}\moddef{display shop~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $70DF
\nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_SHOP}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_SHOP}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}
    ; Shop/store display: iterate through item bitmask,
    ; show prices and names for available items.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_AI_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-26}
    BEQ     .do_shop
    RTS
.do_shop:
    LDA     #$DD
    STA     $E6
    LDA     #$7E
    STA     $E7
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    SEC
    SBC     #$D5
    TAX
.count_loop:
    DEX
    BMI     .counted
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADVANCE_SHOP_PTR}{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}
    JMP     .count_loop
.counted:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-16}),Y
    STA     $5A83
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDY     #$28
    LDA     ($E6),Y
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_NAME_PTR}{PYNWmai0-CIXU6OTULLHO4DLZUMRP3VK33I000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SETUP_CHAR_SPRITE}{PYNWmai0-YLUBVMIOUYA2AJRYZFVOWW6AFI000000-1}
.item_start:
    LDA     #$80
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
.item_loop:
    LDA     $5A83
    AND     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    BNE     .show_item
    JMP     .next_item
.show_item:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    INY
    INY
    INY
    INY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_STYLE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    ROL
    ROL
    ROL
    ROL
    AND     #$03
    TAX
    STA     $5A84
.price_loop:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_PRICE_COMPONENT}{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}
    DEX
    BPL     .price_loop
    LDA     #$20
    LDX     #$04
.clear1:
    STA     $7D04,X
    DEX
    BPL     .clear1
    LDX     #$13
.clear2:
    STA     $7D0F,X
    DEX
    BPL     .clear2
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    LDA     #$04
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$7D
    STA     $BB
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}
    LDY     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    INY
    INY
    LDA     ($E6),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}
    INY
    LDA     ($E6),Y
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}+1
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y
    TAY
    TAX
    DEX
.copy_name:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_STRING_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-5}),Y
    STA     $7D0F,X
    DEY
    DEX
    BPL     .copy_name
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{START_GAME_INPUT}{PYNWmai0-ZBXNBA3JTDIUVPGBSSSIRKFEU4000000-1}
.next_item:
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    ROR
    BCC     .more_items
    JMP     .item_start
.more_items:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    ADC     #$05
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_ITEM_OFFSET}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    JMP     .item_loop
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}SHOP}}{DISPLAY:unSHOP}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}SHOP}}{DISPLAY:unSHOP}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ADD{\_}PRICE{\_}COMPONENT}}{ADD:unPRICE:unCOMPONENT}}\\{{\nwixident{ADVANCE{\_}SHOP{\_}PTR}}{ADVANCE:unSHOP:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}}\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}NAME{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unNAME:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}MASK}}{SHOP:unITEM:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}OFFSET}}{SHOP:unITEM:unOFFSET}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}}\\{{\nwixident{START{\_}GAME{\_}INPUT}}{START:unGAME:unINPUT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADD{\_}PRICE{\_}COMPONENT}}{ADD:unPRICE:unCOMPONENT}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ADVANCE{\_}SHOP{\_}PTR}}{ADVANCE:unSHOP:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}AI{\_}MODE}}{CHAR:unAI:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}REC}}{ENTITY:unREC}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}NAME{\_}PTR}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unNAME:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}STYLE}}{LOCATION:unSTYLE}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}STRING{\_}ADDR}}{PRINT:unSTRING:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SETUP{\_}CHAR{\_}SPRITE}}{SETUP:unCHAR:unSPRITE}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}MASK}}{SHOP:unITEM:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}ITEM{\_}OFFSET}}{SHOP:unITEM:unOFFSET}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{START{\_}GAME{\_}INPUT}}{START:unGAME:unINPUT}{PYNWmai0-MTRYGF5E27RXHB5MSLJKGKYBZI000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{963}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{964}{\Tt{}ADVANCE{\_}SHOP{\_}PTR\nwendquote} adds~\$29 (41 bytes---the size of one shop data
record) to the pointer at~\$E6/\$E7, advancing it to the next shop entry in
the data table.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{965}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}}}\moddef{advance shop ptr~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $71F0
\nwlinkedidentc{ADVANCE_SHOP_PTR}{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{ADVANCE_SHOP_PTR}{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}
    CLC
    LDA     $E6
    ADC     #$29
    STA     $E6
    BCC     .done
    INC     $E7
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADVANCE{\_}SHOP{\_}PTR}}{ADVANCE:unSHOP:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-RYS6BNO5FJP3Q6S74UTVM4QV6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ADVANCE{\_}SHOP{\_}PTR}}{ADVANCE:unSHOP:unPTR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{966}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{967}{\Tt{}ADD{\_}PRICE{\_}COMPONENT\nwendquote} adds one byte from the shop data (indexed by~Y) to
the running 16-bit price total in {\Tt{}SHOP{\_}PRICE\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI\nwendquote}.  It is
called in a loop, once for each price component determined by the location
style.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{968}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}}}\moddef{add price component~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $71FC
\nwlinkedidentc{ADD_PRICE_COMPONENT}{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{ADD_PRICE_COMPONENT}{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}
    CLC
    LDA     ($E6),Y
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
    BCC     .done
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SHOP_PRICE_HI}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}
.done:
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ADD{\_}PRICE{\_}COMPONENT}}{ADD:unPRICE:unCOMPONENT}{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ADD{\_}PRICE{\_}COMPONENT}}{ADD:unPRICE:unCOMPONENT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}}\\{{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE}}{SHOP:unPRICE}{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SHOP{\_}PRICE{\_}HI}}{SHOP:unPRICE:unHI}{PYNWmai0-N5FNAXP5F7FECA2DI5YBCBOXQQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{969}\nwdocspar

\chapter{Events and Scripting}


\section{Between-round random events}

After every character has taken a turn, {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote} runs a cascading
chain of random event checks.  Each step rolls the PRNG and compares the
result against {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}THRESHOLD\nwendquote} (the byte at {\Tt{}{\$}4239\nwendquote}, approximately a
7\% chance per roll).

The structure is deliberately cascading: each successive stage is only reached
if the previous roll \emph{failed}, meaning that on a lucky sequence of rolls,
multiple events can fire in a single round.  If all five individual checks
pass and the sixth roll also succeeds, a \emph{burst} fires: four mob spawns
in rapid succession plus a special faction event.

Most rounds see zero or one random events, but occasionally a flurry of
activity hits at once---new mobs spawn, faction skirmishes trigger, and the
game world feels unpredictably alive.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{970}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}THRESHOLD\nwendquote} at {\Tt{}{\$}4239\nwendquote} is the probability threshold for random
events.  {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote} compares each PRNG roll against this value; a
roll below the threshold triggers the corresponding event handler.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{971}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-64}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}         EQU     $4239   ; random event probability threshold (~7%)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}THRESHOLD}}{EVENT:unTHRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}THRESHOLD}}{EVENT:unTHRESHOLD}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{972}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{973}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}}}\moddef{random events~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $65A9
\nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}
    ; Between-round random event dispatcher.  Each step rolls PRNG and
    ; compares against the event threshold at $4239 (~7% chance).
    ; Cascading: the deeper it goes, the more events fire at once.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}
    BPL     .ev2
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_MOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}           ; event type 1
.ev2:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}
    BPL     .ev3
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}          ; event type 2
.ev3:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}
    BPL     .ev4
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}      ; event type 3
.ev4:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}
    BPL     .ev5
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}          ; event type 4a
.ev5:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}
    BPL     .ev6
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}          ; event type 4b
.ev6:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_THRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}
    BMI     .burst
    RTS                              ; no more events this round
.burst:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}          ; event burst: 4 + special + tail
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE_CONT}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1} ; tail into \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1} second half
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE:unCONT}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unPICK:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}THRESHOLD}}{EVENT:unTHRESHOLD}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE:unCONT}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unPICK:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}THRESHOLD}}{EVENT:unTHRESHOLD}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{974}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{975}The individual event handlers are short routines that select a random target
and dispatch to the appropriate processing function.
{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB\nwendquote} selects a random mob group (weighted by group size) via
{\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB\nwendquote} and passes it to {\Tt{}PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote}, which walks
the selected character's event list looking for triggerable entries.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{976}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}}}\moddef{event pick mob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $660D
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_MOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}
    ; Random event: pick a random mob, then process its char events.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unPICK:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unPICK:unMOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-E2OBWFXFFVYPRH5EHG2SEMEDNE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{977}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{978}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} works the same way, but selects a random character
from the active player range (players~2 through {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}PLAYER\nwendquote}$-$1)
instead of a mob group.  The distinction is that {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}MOB\nwendquote} weights
its selection by mob group count, while {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} selects uniformly
among characters.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{979}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}}}\moddef{event pick char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6613
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PICK_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}
    ; Random event: pick a random character, then process its char events.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PICK{\_}CHAR}}{EVENT:unPICK:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-75B6UFVR2SEREECNMGQ5Q3DAT4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{980}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{981}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE\nwendquote} picks a random mob and then searches the mob list
for one whose faction matches.  Factions are encoded in bits~6--5 of character
record byte~5.  If a matching mob is found, {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}SETUP\nwendquote} is called to
trigger an interaction between them.  If no match exists, the routine falls
back to {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB\nwendquote} instead.

The alternate entry {\Tt{}EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT\nwendquote} is used by the burst path
in {\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote}, which skips the initial mob selection and reuses the
character already chosen by {\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{982}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-21}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}              EQU     $F6     ; selected character/player index
\nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}            EQU     $F7     ; faction match value for \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{983}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{984}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}}}\moddef{event faction scene~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6619
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE_CONT}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}
    ; Random event: pick a random mob, check for matching faction
    ; in the mob list; if found, run \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1} for that mob.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_FACTION_SCENE_CONT}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}:               ; alternate entry from \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-QOXVCPUEVT3O42JX7V2L2CDWXU000000-1} burst
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}
    BANE    #$09,.has_char      ; $FA still at base ($4009)?
    RTS                         ; no character selected -> skip
.has_char:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y        ; char record byte 5
    AND     #$60                ; bits 6-5 = faction mask
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}        ; save for \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}
    LDA     #$00                ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}            ;  | reset $FA/$FB to $4000 (record base)
    LDA     #$40                ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1          ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1} ; search mob list for matching faction
    BANE    #$00,.found
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}     ; not found -> try spawning instead
.found:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}         ; clear source char
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}         ; set active char to found index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE:unCONT}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}FACTION{\_}SCENE{\_}CONT}}{EVENT:unFACTION:unSCENE:unCONT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}EVENTS}}{RANDOM:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-EKJO4ITG75NQJ7YAOKSQICIKLM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{985}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{986}{\Tt{}EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB\nwendquote} attempts to activate a dormant character.  It picks
a random character and checks byte~8: if nonzero, the character is already
active, so it tries once more.  If both picks are active, it gives up.  For
an inactive character, the routine extracts its faction mask, searches for a
matching mob, and if found, calls {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to bring the character
into the mob's group, followed by {\Tt{}CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD\nwendquote} to normalize its
stats.  This is the primary mechanism by which new entities enter the game
world during play.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{987}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}}}\moddef{event spawn mob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $664E
\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_SPAWN_MOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}
    ; Random event: pick a random character; if its byte 8 is nonzero
    ; (active), try again once.  If inactive, use its faction to find
    ; a matching mob and reorder it into the group.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y     ; char record byte 8
    BEQ     .inactive        ; zero = slot available
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1} ; try once more
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y
    BEQ     .inactive
    RTS                      ; both active -> give up
.inactive:
    LDY     #$05
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y     ; char record byte 5
    AND     #$60             ; faction mask
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}
    BANE    #$00,.found
    RTS                      ; no matching mob -> skip
.found:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}          ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}       ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1     ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CLAMP_CHAR_FIELD}{PYNWmai0-VZAAE44D7YBBIC7MO6FZNDLI6M000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}SPAWN{\_}MOB}}{EVENT:unSPAWN:unMOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLAMP{\_}CHAR{\_}FIELD}}{CLAMP:unCHAR:unFIELD}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-APNZRS4F5VD46JAPY653GS5D64000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{988}\nwdocspar
{\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB\nwendquote} selects a random mob group using weighted sampling.  It
generates a random number in the range {\Tt{}0..TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT-1\nwendquote}, then
iterates through the character records, subtracting each character's group
count (byte~8) from the running total.  When the total reaches zero or goes
negative, that character's record is selected.  This weighting means
characters with larger groups are proportionally more likely to be chosen.

If {\Tt{}TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT\nwendquote} is zero (no mobs in the world), the routine falls
through directly to {\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}.  The shared tail
{\Tt{}COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA\nwendquote} copies the result from {\Tt{}DATA{\_}PTR\nwendquote} to {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}PTR\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{989}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}}}\moddef{pick random mob~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6689
\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}
    ; Pick a random mob group by weighted selection.
    ; Uses \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10} as the range, then iterates char records
    ; subtracting group counts (byte 8) until the target is reached.
    ; Result: $FA/$FB points to the selected char record.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}
    BEQ     \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}     ; no mobs -> fall through to pick char
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}      ; random 0..\nwlinkedidentc{TOTAL_MOB_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-10}-1
    BAEQ    #$00,\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_MOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1} ; zero = retry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}              ; remaining count
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}           ; player index counter
.next_char:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}
    LDY     #$08
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}              ; remaining
    SEC
    SBC     (\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}),Y         ; subtract group count (byte 8)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}
    BEQ     .found               ; exact match
    BMI     .found               ; overshot -> this is the one
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}
    BNE     .next_char           ; always branches
.found:
\nwlinkedidentc{COPY_BE_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}             ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}             ;  | $FA/$FB = \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}/\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1 (selected record)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1           ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1           ; /
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}MOB}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unMOB}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TOTAL{\_}MOB{\_}COUNT}}{TOTAL:unMOB:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{990}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{991}{\Tt{}PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} selects uniformly from the active player range:
players~2 through {\Tt{}CURRENT{\_}PLAYER\nwendquote}$-$1.  It computes the range, calls
{\Tt{}RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE\nwendquote}, adds the offset to player~2, and loads the selected
character's record via {\Tt{}GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{992}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}}}\moddef{pick random char~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $66BA
\nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PICK_RANDOM_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}
    ; Pick a random character from players 2..\nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}-1.
    ; Result: $FA/$FB points to the selected char record, \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22} = index.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    SEC
    SBC     #$03            ; range = \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1} - 3
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1} ; random 0..range-1
    CLC
    ADC     #$02            ; offset to player 2
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}      ; save selected index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1} ; load record for player A
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{COPY_BE_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-A4EIO7D73KHO2QYM3SEI7JTIHQ000000-1}   ; copy \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}/\nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}+1 -> $FA/$FB
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PICK{\_}RANDOM{\_}CHAR}}{PICK:unRANDOM:unCHAR}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COPY{\_}BE{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{COPY:unBE:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-DFUNHMWIETGUP4LWNA3ZWIHLSY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{993}\nwdocspar

\section{Character event processing}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{994}{\Tt{}PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote} walks a character's event list---a sequence of
3-byte entries pointed to by bytes~6--7 of the character record.  For each
entry whose second byte falls in the range {\Tt{}{\$}40--{\$}7F\nwendquote}, the routine subtracts
{\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote} (normalizing to a 0-based index), stores the result back, and triggers
the event via {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH\nwendquote}.  Entries with byte~1 outside this
range are skipped, and {\Tt{}{\$}FF\nwendquote} in byte~0 marks the end of the list.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{995}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}}}\moddef{process char events~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $66CE
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_CHAR_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}
    ; Walk the 3-byte event list pointed to by char record bytes 6-7.
    ; For entries with byte 1 in range $40-$7F, subtract $40 from the
    ; value and trigger the event via \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}.
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y  ; char record byte 6 = event list low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y  ; byte 7 = event list high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
.scan:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y ; event byte 0
    BANE    #$FF,.check   ; $FF = end of list
    RTS
.check:
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y ; event byte 1
    BMI     .advance      ; bit 7 set -> skip
    CMP     #$40          ; < $40?
    BMI     .advance      ; yes -> skip
    SEC
    SBC     #$40          ; normalize to 0-based
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y ; write back
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_INDEX}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}   ; save triggering player index
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}
.advance:
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    ADC     #$03          ; next 3-byte entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
.no_carry:
    JMP     .scan
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}CHAR{\_}EVENTS}}{PROCESS:unCHAR:unEVENTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}}\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}INDEX}}{CHAR:unINDEX}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-PP7QBAF26FP5X5UR5G5NJDLWAA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{996}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{997}{\Tt{}FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION\nwendquote} searches the mob linked list starting from the
current character (via {\Tt{}CHAR{\_}PTR\nwendquote} byte~2) for a mob whose byte {\Tt{}{\$}0F\nwendquote} has
bit~7 set and whose bits~6--4 match {\Tt{}FACTION{\_}MASK\nwendquote}.  It returns {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=1 if
a match is found (with {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote} pointing to it), or {\Tt{}A\nwendquote}=0 if the end of
the list is reached without a match.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{998}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}}}\moddef{find mob by faction~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6706
\nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{FIND_MOB_BY_FACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}
    ; Walk the mob linked list from ($FA) byte 2, looking for a mob
    ; whose byte $0F has bit 7 set and bits 6-4 match \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22} (faction).
    ; Returns A=1 if found (with \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 pointing to it), A=0 if not.
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y       ; char record byte 2 = first link
.check_link:
    BNE     .resolve
    RTS                        ; zero link -> return A=0
.resolve:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}       ; resolve link -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}       ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}            ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1          ; /
    LDY     #$0F
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y        ; mob data byte $0F
    BPL     .next              ; bit 7 clear -> skip
    AND     #$70               ; bits 6-4
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{FACTION_MASK}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22},.next ; match faction?
    LDA     #$01               ; found -> return 1
    RTS
.next:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y        ; next link
    JMP     .check_link
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{FIND{\_}MOB{\_}BY{\_}FACTION}}{FIND:unMOB:unBY:unFACTION}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{FACTION{\_}MASK}}{FACTION:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-7K3TFY226W4NZHTNIGL3VMVJJA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{999}\nwdocspar

\section{Scene event dispatch}

{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote} is the scene event dispatcher called from the main
loop for players~1 and~3.  It orchestrates the encounter system by scanning
the mob list for hostile groups, then dispatching to {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote} with
different mode numbers depending on the situation:

\begin{itemize}
\item Mode~4: player~1 non-hostile scene
\item Mode~5: other player scene
\item Mode~6: hostile encounter introduction
\item Mode~7: post-encounter resolution
\item Mode~8: combat resolution
\end{itemize}

Several flag bytes in the {\Tt{}{\$}4230\nwendquote} region track which phases have already
been processed this round, preventing duplicate dispatches.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1000}{\Tt{}SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} record the results
of {\Tt{}SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote}.  {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX\nwendquote} is the starting group index
for the scan.  {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE\nwendquote},
{\Tt{}SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT\nwendquote} are one-shot flags in
the {\Tt{}{\$}4230\nwendquote} region that {\Tt{}CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS\nwendquote} tests and sets to prevent
the same phase from firing twice in one round.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1001}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-65}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}        EQU     $5A89   ; scan result: 1 = matching group found
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}      EQU     $5A8A   ; scan result: nonzero = hostile encountered
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}         EQU     $5A8B   ; current group index for scanning
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P3_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}           EQU     $423B   ; nonzero = player 3 scene processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P1_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}           EQU     $423C   ; nonzero = player 1 scene processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}      EQU     $423D   ; nonzero = hostile encounter processed
\nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_EVENT_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}      EQU     $423E   ; nonzero = event fully handled
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1002}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1003}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}}}\moddef{check scene events~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6DFA
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_SCENE_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_SCENE_EVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}
    ; Scene event dispatcher for players 1 & 3.  Checks encounter
    ; state and dispatches to \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1} with mode 4-8 based on
    ; game state flags.  Called from \nwlinkedidentc{MAIN_ENTRY}{PYNWmai0-RWM37KK47QPMZDB6ORCTDQOT2Y000000-1}'s character loop.
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66},.done     ; yes -> skip
    LDA     #$40
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}              ; start scanning from group $40
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}             ; scan for hostile encounter
    LDA     #$01
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66},.done       ; no -> skip
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1},.other_player ; is this player 1?
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66},.hostile  ; hostile encounter found?
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P1_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66},.done          ; yes -> skip
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P1_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}                ; mark as done
    LDA     #$04
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}                   ; mode 4: player 1 non-hostile scene
.done:
    RTS
.other_player:
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P3_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66},.done          ; yes -> skip
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_P3_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}                ; mark as done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$05
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}                   ; mode 5: other player scene
.hostile:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_DONE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}           ; mark hostile as processed
    LDA     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}                   ; mode 6: hostile encounter intro
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_SCENE_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}         ; process mob groups
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_EVENT_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    BNE     .done                        ; nonzero = event handled, stop
    LDA     #$07
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}                   ; mode 7: post-encounter
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_COMBAT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-53}
    BEQ     .done                        ; no combat -> done
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$08
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}                   ; mode 8: combat resolution
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENTS}}{CHECK:unSCENE:unEVENTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}}\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}}\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MAIN{\_}ENTRY}}{MAIN:unENTRY}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}COMBAT{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unCOMBAT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P1{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP1:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}P3{\_}DONE}}{SCENE:unP3:unDONE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-VN65KEELRJCR26ZIYIZKWOVX6M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1004}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1005}{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH\nwendquote} loads the character record for {\Tt{}ACTIVE{\_}CHAR\nwendquote}
and compares its position with {\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}POS\nwendquote}.  If they match, it clears
{\Tt{}LOCATION{\_}POS\nwendquote} to force a map redraw on the next {\Tt{}ENTER{\_}LOCATION\nwendquote} call.
This ensures the display updates when an event changes the scene.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1006}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}}}\moddef{check location match~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $672E
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_LOCATION_MATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}
    ; Load char record for \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22} ($5A29), check if \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13} matches
    ; \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}.  If so, clear \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1} to force a redraw.
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_CHAR_RECORD}{PYNWmai0-PDZVFDW3WMN7YKZPZWVSWNODJE000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-13}
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1},.match
    RTS
.match:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}                ; clear to trigger redraw
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}LOCATION{\_}MATCH}}{CHECK:unLOCATION:unMATCH}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DATA{\_}PTR}}{DATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}CHAR{\_}RECORD}}{GET:unCHAR:unRECORD}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-OH7NKJQEYIXNZDSAOSWCGRKUYA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1007}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1008}{\Tt{}SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote} walks the mob group chain starting from
{\Tt{}SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX\nwendquote}, checking each group for hostility via
{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote}.  It sets {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} to~1 when the target group
is encountered in the chain, and {\Tt{}SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} to nonzero if any
hostile group is found.  The scan continues through the entire chain even
after finding a match, so it catches all hostiles.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1009}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}}}\moddef{scan for hostile~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6E5A
\nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}
    ; Scan mob groups starting from \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66} for hostile encounters.
    ; Sets \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}=1 if the group matches, \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    ; nonzero if a hostile is found.
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}                   ; resolve group -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}                   ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}                        ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1                 ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1                      ; /
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}                       ; \\
