    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}                   ;  | save $FA/$FB into \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}+1                     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1                 ; /
.walk:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}),Y               ; mob data byte 2 = next link
    BNE     .has_link
    RTS                                    ; end of chain
.has_link:
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66},.check_hostile ; matches the target group?
    LDX     #$01
    STX     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}               ; mark as found
.check_hostile:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}                   ; resolve link -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}                   ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}                     ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = resolved mob data
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1                 ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1                   ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-GAQSOYZEBE3NQVLK37GI4L4NOY000000-1}                  ; check if hostile
    BEQ     .walk                          ; not hostile -> continue
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_HOSTILE_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}             ; hostile found
    BNE     .walk                          ; always branches, continue scan
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}HOSTILE}}{CHECK:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}HOSTILE{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unHOSTILE:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1010}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1011}{\Tt{}PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS\nwendquote} handles the hostile encounter phase by processing
mob groups {\Tt{}{\$}3F\nwendquote}, {\Tt{}{\$}41\nwendquote}, and {\Tt{}{\$}42\nwendquote} with {\Tt{}SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER\nwendquote}.  Group
{\Tt{}{\$}40\nwendquote} is skipped because it is the player's own group.  The routine
bookends the processing with {\Tt{}LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA\nwendquote} calls to save and restore
the player~3 record pointer.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1012}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}}}\moddef{process scene groups~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6E9E
\nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_SCENE_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PROCESS_SCENE_GROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}
    ; Process mob groups $3F, $41, $42 with \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1},
    ; bookended by \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1} for save/restore.
    LDA     #$03
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOURCE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-21}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}  ; save player 3's record to $FA/$FB
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}
    LDA     #$3F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1} ; group $3F
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}  ; $40 (skip -- that's the player's group)
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}  ; $41
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1} ; group $41
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}  ; $42
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1} ; group $42
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_PLAYER}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{LOAD_CHAR_TO_FA}{PYNWmai0-F36SX6HJHU7ZRPWZTXT4OI5NG4000000-1}  ; restore current player's record
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PROCESS{\_}SCENE{\_}GROUPS}}{PROCESS:unSCENE:unGROUPS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}}\\{{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}}\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}PLAYER}}{CURRENT:unPLAYER}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOAD{\_}CHAR{\_}TO{\_}FA}}{LOAD:unCHAR:unTO:unFA}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOURCE{\_}CHAR}}{SOURCE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-GK57JJI54XWHRCJVQB2JISKQX4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1013}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1014}{\Tt{}SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER\nwendquote} combines a hostile scan with a group reorder.  It
calls {\Tt{}SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE\nwendquote} and, if the target group is found, copies the mob
pointer into {\Tt{}TARGET{\_}REC\nwendquote} and calls {\Tt{}REORDER{\_}CHAR\nwendquote} to move the character
into the matching group.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1015}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}}}\moddef{scan and reorder~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6ED5
\nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_AND_REORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}
    ; Call \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1} for current \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_GROUP_IDX}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}.
    ; If a match is found, copy \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 -> \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 and reorder.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCAN_FOR_HOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-E4YXUSA3JTJZCREU546HG62MHQ000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_FOUND_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}
    BNE     .found
    RTS                  ; nothing found
.found:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}      ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}   ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}/\nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 = mob data pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1    ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TARGET_REC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-14}+1 ; /
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{REORDER_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-TSZHS7O2FMNRYEK2W57DEKVPQE000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}AND{\_}REORDER}}{SCAN:unAND:unREORDER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}}\\{{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{REORDER{\_}CHAR}}{REORDER:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCAN{\_}FOR{\_}HOSTILE}}{SCAN:unFOR:unHOSTILE}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}FOUND{\_}FLAG}}{SCENE:unFOUND:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}GROUP{\_}IDX}}{SCENE:unGROUP:unIDX}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TARGET{\_}REC}}{TARGET:unREC}{PYNWmai0-57X5LVQKSJRUL3VSPDY2CBOF6A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1016}\nwdocspar

\section{Turn events}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1017}{\Tt{}TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT\nwendquote} handles events in the {\Tt{}{\$}D2--{\$}D4\nwendquote} range of the
encounter dispatch table.  It clears the character state, then enters the
scene loop with a mode derived from the event type, triggering a scripted
scene transition.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1018}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}}}\moddef{trigger scene event~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1D04
\nwlinkedidentc{TRIGGER_SCENE_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{TRIGGER_SCENE_EVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}

    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}          ; set char field 15 state to 0
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    STA     $5A5B                   ; save event pointer low
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
    STA     $5A5C                   ; save event pointer high
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}             ; commit move
    LDA     $5A5B
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}               ; restore event pointer
    LDA     $5A5C
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y           ; event byte 2 = scene index
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; trigger scene
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y           ; event byte 1 = type
    CMP     #$D3
    BPL     .d3_or_above
    RTS                             ; $D2: trigger scene only
.d3_or_above:
    BNE     .d4
    LDA     #$FE                    ; $D3: mark event as empty
    DEY
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    RTS
.d4:
    LDA     #$FE                    ; $D4: mark event as empty
    DEY
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    LDA     #$0F
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; trigger bonus scene $0F
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}         ; random(3)
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                    ; 1-3
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1} ; apply effect to char
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TRIGGER{\_}SCENE{\_}EVENT}}{TRIGGER:unSCENE:unEVENT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-J7Q7EV5KY4I3TMCLNUF4NZNIK4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1019}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1020}When a character steps onto a treasure event, {\Tt{}PICKUP{\_}TREASURE\nwendquote} handles the
interaction.  The routine first clears the character's state, copies the event
pointer to {\Tt{}MOB{\_}PTR\nwendquote}, and commits the movement.  It then reads byte~1 of the
event entry to determine the treasure type.  Values below~\$C9 are normal
treasure: the routine subtracts~\$C0 to get a treasure table index, reads the
quantity from byte~2, calls {\Tt{}MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS\nwendquote} to look up the item data,
and---if the character's inventory is not full---adds the item and formats a
pickup message with {\Tt{}NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote}.  Values at
\$C9 or above indicate trapped chests.  A random roll selects one of four trap
types: lose 1--5~HP, lose 2--9~HP, decrement a counter in field~11, or zero
out all gold.  Each trap triggers a distinct scene (scenes~\$36--\$39).  If the
character is in a different room from the current room, the event entry's type
byte is stepped back by~9, turning the chest into a different kind of treasure
for re-encounter.  The special type~\$D1 triggers scene~\$0B, increments two
stat counters, and has a 1-in-3 chance of producing a bonus scene~\$0C---a
lucky find.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1021}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}           EQU     $5A58   ; treasure trap: random trap type (0-3)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1022}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1023}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}}}\moddef{pickup treasure~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $646B
\nwlinkedidentc{PICKUP_TREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{PICKUP_TREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}

    LDA     #$00
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CHAR_STATE}{PYNWmai0-PCWKHH6XLP7LWB7NF37UC54L3U000000-1}          ; set char field 15 state to 0
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}                 ; copy event ptr -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{COMMIT_MOVE}{PYNWmai0-R4J3AYOHIXVOKJUASYSI3Z6DLI000000-1}             ; commit move
    LDY     #$01
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y             ; event byte 1 = treasure type
    CMP     #$C9
    BPL     .trapped                ; >= $C9 -> trapped chest or special
    SEC
    SBC     #$C0                    ; $C0-$C8: treasure index 0-8
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
.rejoin:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y             ; event byte 2 = quantity
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    LDY     #$01
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CURRENT_STATS}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}    ; look up treasure data
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; char field 4
    CMP     #$15
    BCS     .mark_used              ; inventory full -> skip pickup
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_STATUS_SLOTS}{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}      ; add item to inventory
    LDA     #$AB
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$7B
    STA     $BB
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}          ; format quantity
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; char field 13 (gold low)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; char field 14 (gold high)
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    LDA     #$CC
    STA     $BA
    LDA     #$7B
    STA     $BB
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_TO_DECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-NDZSG4V5NI575YZRAEMOIOV6CM000000-1}          ; format gold amount
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$84
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    LDA     #$7B
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_AND_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}       ; display pickup message
.mark_used:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     #$FE                    ; mark event slot as empty
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    RTS

    ; --- trapped chest (type >= $C9) ---
.trapped:
    BANE    #$D1,.not_d1
    JMP     .handle_d1              ; $D1: special chest
.not_d1:
    LDA     #$06
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}         ; random(6)
    AND     #$03                    ; trap type 0-3
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}
    LDY     #$04
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; char field 4
    BMI     .apply_trap
    CMP     #$15
    BPL     .apply_trap
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$36
    CLC
    ADC     \nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}               ; scene $36 + trap type
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; show trap scene
.apply_trap:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{TRAP_TYPE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}
    CMP     #$01
    BMI     .trap0                  ; trap 0: lose 1-5 HP
    BEQ     .trap1                  ; trap 1: lose 2-9 HP
    BAEQ    #$02,.trap2             ; trap 2: decrement counter
    BNE     .trap3                  ; trap 3: zero gold
.trap0:
    LDA     #$05
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CLC
    ADC     #$01                    ; 1-5 damage
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
    JMP     .after_trap
.trap1:
    LDA     #$08
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}
    CLC
    ADC     #$02                    ; 2-9 damage
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{APPLY_DAMAGE_TO_CURRENT}{PYNWmai0-PML3AFGI24SVV4GG3OYFU3ZEAY000000-1}
    JMP     .after_trap
.trap2:
    LDY     #$0B
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; char field 11
    AND     #$1F
    BEQ     .after_trap             ; already zero
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    SEC
    SBC     #$01                    ; decrement
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    JMP     .after_trap
.trap3:
    LDY     #$0D
    LDA     #$00
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; zero gold low
    INY
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; zero gold high
.after_trap:
    LDY     #$02
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y          ; char field 2 = room
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{CURRENT_ROOM}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-36},.same_room ; current room?
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y             ; event byte 1
    SEC
    SBC     #$09                    ; step back 9 in treasure table
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y
    RTS
.same_room:
    DEY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}),Y             ; event byte 1
    SEC
    SBC     #$C9                    ; convert to treasure index
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    JMP     .rejoin                 ; loop: process next treasure

    ; --- special chest $D1 ---
.handle_d1:
    LDA     #$0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; show scene $0B
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD5_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}
    LDA     #$03
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{RANDOM_IN_RANGE}{PYNWmai0-F6322QSFMTRJBO2IS2F3GEYRZU000000-1}         ; random(3)
    BAEQ    #$00,.lucky
    RTS                             ; 2/3 chance: nothing
.lucky:
    LDA     #$0C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}              ; show bonus scene $0C
    JMP     .mark_used              ; mark event used
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{PICKUP{\_}TREASURE}}{PICKUP:unTREASURE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}}\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS}}{CLEAR:unSTATUS:unSLOTS}}\\{{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}}\\{{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}}\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD5:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{APPLY{\_}DAMAGE{\_}TO{\_}CURRENT}}{APPLY:unDAMAGE:unTO:unCURRENT}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS}}{CLEAR:unSTATUS:unSLOTS}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{COMMIT{\_}MOVE}}{COMMIT:unMOVE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CURRENT{\_}ROOM}}{CURRENT:unROOM}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD5:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}TO{\_}DECIMAL}}{NUM:unTO:unDECIMAL}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{RANDOM{\_}IN{\_}RANGE}}{RANDOM:unIN:unRANGE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CHAR{\_}STATE}}{SET:unCHAR:unSTATE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{TRAP{\_}TYPE}}{TRAP:unTYPE}{PYNWmai0-54OVBRYVAXX7KYNOX73X7MCSVQ000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1024}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1025}{\Tt{}INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote} and {\Tt{}INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER\nwendquote} increment a 5-bit counter
packed into the low bits of a character record field.  The first entry point
targets field~5 (the defense/experience counter); the second targets field~11
(the level counter).  Both share a common body that masks out the low five
bits, checks whether the value has already reached the maximum of~31, and if
not, adds~1 to the full byte---which works correctly because the upper bits
are preserved by the addition as long as the low field does not overflow past
31.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1026}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}}}\moddef{inc field5 counter~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $657B
\nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD5_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD5_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}
    ; Increment char field 5 low 5 bits (capped at $1F)
    LDY     #$05
    JMP     .body
\nwlinkedidentc{INC_FIELD_COUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}:
    ; Increment char field Y low 5 bits (capped at $1F)
    LDY     #$0B
.body:
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    TAX
    AND     #$1F
    BANE    #$1F,.inc
    RTS
.inc:
    CLC
    TXA
    ADC     #$01
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{ENTITY_PTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}),Y
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD5:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD:unCOUNTER}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD5{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD5:unCOUNTER}}\\{{\nwixident{INC{\_}FIELD{\_}COUNTER}}{INC:unFIELD:unCOUNTER}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ENTITY{\_}PTR}}{ENTITY:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-ILJFW4BMQDI7VHHKD3KXMLJ55E000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1027}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1028}{\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS\nwendquote} fills two 5-byte regions of the display buffer
(\$7BAB--\$7BAF and \$7BCC--\$7BD0) with spaces.  These regions hold the
formatted quantity and gold amount strings used by {\Tt{}PICKUP{\_}TREASURE\nwendquote}'s
display message, and clearing them ensures no stale digits remain from a
previous interaction.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1029}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}}}\moddef{clear status slots~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $6593
\nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_STATUS_SLOTS}{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_AND_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}
    ; Clear 5 bytes at $7BAB-$7BAF and $7BCC-$7BD0 (spaces)
    LDA     #$20
    LDX     #$04
.loop:
    STA     $7BAB,X
    STA     $7BCC,X
    DEX
    BPL     .loop
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS}}{CLEAR:unSTATUS:unSLOTS}{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}STATUS{\_}SLOTS}}{CLEAR:unSTATUS:unSLOTS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-V5G2GPBORD73H5D2VBSWULIAS4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1030}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1031}{\Tt{}CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY\nwendquote} zeroes the flag at~\$5A57 and tail-calls
{\Tt{}DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP\nwendquote}.  Clearing the flag ensures the message loop starts
from scratch rather than continuing a previous multi-part display sequence.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1032}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}}}\moddef{clear and display~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $65A1
\nwlinkedidentc{CLEAR_AND_DISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{MODIFY_CURRENT_STATS}{PYNWmai0-CE3SMWHVXELKSLVHOQ6UPEB6JM000000-1}
    ; Clear $5A57 and JMP $764A (display message)
    LDA     #$00
    STA     $5A57
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CLEAR{\_}AND{\_}DISPLAY}}{CLEAR:unAND:unDISPLAY}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE{\_}LOOP}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MODIFY{\_}CURRENT{\_}STATS}}{MODIFY:unCURRENT:unSTATS}{PYNWmai0-2VGIO6FUOKCI4T6WLXGV3FQEAA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1033}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1034}{\Tt{}UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST\nwendquote} maintains the character's event list when treasure is
dropped or an event is spawned at a map position.  It takes a position in~A
and a value in {\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}NUM{\_}VALUE+1\nwendquote}; if the value is zero, it returns
immediately.  The routine walks the 3-byte event entries starting from the
pointer at bytes~6--7 of the character record.  When it finds an empty slot
(\$FE), it inserts a new entry: byte~0 gets the position, byte~1 gets the
value high bits (masked to 3~bits) OR'd with~\$C0 to mark it as activated, and
byte~2 gets the value low byte.  If the routine finds an existing entry at the
same position with a type in the \$C0--\$D0 range, it adds the new value to
that entry instead of creating a duplicate.  If the list terminator~(\$FF) is
reached with no room, it displays message~\$2A (``event list full'').

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1035}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}}}\moddef{update event list~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1260
\nwlinkedidentc{UPDATE_EVENT_LIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{UPDATE_EVENT_LIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}
    ; Update event list for position A with value \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1.
    ; If \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}/\nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1 = 0, return immediately.
    ; Scans 3-byte event entries at ($FA)[6..7]:
    ;   $FF = end of list -> display message $2A
    ;   $FE = empty slot -> insert new entry
    ;   matching pos + type $C0-$D0 -> add to existing entry
    ;   else -> advance to next entry
    STA     $BA             ; save position
    LDA     #$00
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8},.has_value
    BANE    \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1,.has_value
    RTS
.has_value:
    LDY     #$06
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y    ; event list pointer low
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{CHAR_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-7}),Y    ; event list pointer high
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
.scan:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; entry byte 0 = position
    BANE    #$FF,.not_end
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$2A
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1} ; "event list full" message
.not_end:
    BANE    #$FE,.check_match
    ; Empty slot: insert new entry
    LDA     $BA
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; byte 0 = position
    INY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    AND     #$07
    ORA     #$C0            ; byte 1 = type + high bits
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    INY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; byte 2 = value low
    RTS
.check_match:
    BANE    $BA,.next       ; same position?
    INY
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; byte 1 = type
    BPL     .next           ; not activated
    CMP     #$C0
    BMI     .next           ; below $C0
    CMP     #$D1
    BPL     .next           ; above $D0
    ; Add to existing entry
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}
    INY
    ADC     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; byte 2 += value low
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    DEY
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{NUM_VALUE}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-8}+1
    AND     #$07
    ADC     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y   ; byte 1 += value high (with carry)
    STA     (\nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}),Y
    RTS
.next:
    CLC
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    ADC     #$03            ; next 3-byte entry
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{EVENT_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-19}+1
.no_carry:
    JMP     .scan
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{UPDATE{\_}EVENT{\_}LIST}}{UPDATE:unEVENT:unLIST}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{CHAR{\_}PTR}}{CHAR:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{EVENT{\_}PTR}}{EVENT:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{NUM{\_}VALUE}}{NUM:unVALUE}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-XKWR6YQCHE3H3XYJIXKNEQP64I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1036}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1037}{\Tt{}CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE\nwendquote} uses the PRNG to determine whether a character can
leave an area.  It steps the PRNG and compares the output against a threshold
of~\$40: if the random value is at or above the threshold (roughly 75\%
chance), the check passes and message~\$1C is displayed; otherwise it fails
with message~\$1D.  The result is returned in~A (1~for success, 0~for
failure).  Both paths print the mob's name before the message for context.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1038}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}}}\moddef{check can leave~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $1231
\nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_CAN_LEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{CHECK_CAN_LEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}
    ; Check hostility threshold: if \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13} >= $40, show message $1C
    ; and return 1; else show message $1D and return 0.
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}
    CMP     #$40
    BPL     .pass
    JMP     .fail
.pass:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$1C
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$01
    RTS
.fail:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{PRINT_MOB_NAME}{PYNWmai0-U2DT53IODGLRLPVDYRFI4YX3IQ000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCROLL_STATUS_LINE}{PYNWmai0-VSOM3Y22ENSC7KWTE4S3GWHRJ4000000-1}
    LDA     #$1D
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISPLAY_MESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-PLQAK2MUE37THNKRCI7RJB7UJY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{CHECK{\_}CAN{\_}LEAVE}}{CHECK:unCAN:unLEAVE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}}\\{{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPLAY{\_}MESSAGE}}{DISPLAY:unMESSAGE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRINT{\_}MOB{\_}NAME}}{PRINT:unMOB:unNAME}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCROLL{\_}STATUS{\_}LINE}}{SCROLL:unSTATUS:unLINE}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-Y73USUXCWE3XTH2Q2VI7A6AKSA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1039}\nwdocspar

\section{Script engine}

\label{sec:script_engine}

The script engine runs short bytecode programs that control animations,
sound, and game events.  It is called with a script index in X.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1040}{\Tt{}ATTRACT{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} is set to 1 when {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} is invoked with
script index 6 (the attract/demo mode) and cleared to 0 for all other
indices.  Downstream code checks this flag to alter behavior during the
title screen sequence.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1041}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-67}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}        EQU     $5AA7   ; 1 = attract/demo mode, 0 = normal
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1042}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1043}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{\relax}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $795B
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}

    STA     $C010             ; clear keyboard strobe
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}      ; attract_flag = 0
    BXNE    #$06,.not_attract ; script index 6 = attract
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}      ; attract_flag = 1
.not_attract:

    BXEQ    #$02,.setup_2     ; special setup for index 2
    BXEQ    #$04,.setup_4     ; special setup for index 4
    JMP     .load_ptr

.setup_2:
    DEY
    STY     $80D5             ; patch byte in script 1 data
    JMP     .load_ptr
.setup_4:
    DEY
    STY     $80E3             ; patch byte in script 2 data
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1044}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1045}{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PC\nwendquote} is the 2-byte script instruction pointer at {\Tt{}{\$}E4/{\$}E5\nwendquote}.
The script base address is loaded from the table at {\Tt{}{\$}80AE\nwendquote} into
{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PC\nwendquote}, and the interpreter reads successive bytes through this
pointer, advancing it after each instruction.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1046}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}}}\moddef{zero page defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-22}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}               EQU     $E4     ; script instruction pointer (2 bytes, $E4/$E5)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1047}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1048}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.load_ptr:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1},X   ; low byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}+1,X ; high byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1      ; \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}/\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1 = script start address

\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1049}The eight script base addresses are stored in the table below.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1050}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}}}\moddef{script pointer table~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $80AE
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_TABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}:
    DC.W    $80C6 ; script 0
    DC.W    $80C7 ; script 1
    DC.W    $80D7 ; script 2
    DC.W    $A300 ; script 3 (attract -- EALDR resident)
    DC.W    $A3C3 ; script 4
    DC.W    $A3CE ; script 5
    DC.W    $A3DE ; script 6
    DC.W    $A409 ; script 7
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}{PYNWmai0-33FGP2UXYD5EEQJUC5DEXEFVLE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}TABLE}}{SCRIPT:unTABLE}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1051}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1052}Scripts 3--7 are in the {\Tt{}{\$}A300\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}A5FF\nwendquote} resident region (which was
also copied to {\Tt{}{\$}0500\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}07FF\nwendquote} by EALDR, but the script table
points to the original addresses).

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1053}{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR\nwendquote} counts iterations of the script's built-in loop
construct.  {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK\nwendquote} controls action randomization: the
interpreter ANDs the PRNG output with this mask before dispatching.
Both are initialized to 0 and 1 respectively at the start of each
script invocation.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1054}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}     EQU     $5A8D   ; script loop iteration counter
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}    EQU     $5A92   ; PRNG mask for action randomization
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1055}\nwdocspar

After setup, the interpreter initializes its loop counter and PRNG mask:

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1056}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-2}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwenddeflinemarkup

    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}  ; loop counter = 0
    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69} ; PRNG mask = 1
SCRIPT_ENGINE_FETCH:
.fetch:
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}),Y    ; read script byte
    CMP     #$27
    BCC     .control         ; < $27 -> control command
    JMP     .action          ; >= $27 -> action dispatch
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1057}\nwdocspar
\subsubsection{Control commands (< \$27)}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1058}{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} is a 2-byte address saved by the ``set loop
address'' command (\$1F).  When the loop counter has not yet reached the
target byte value, the interpreter copies {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} back into
{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PC\nwendquote} to restart the loop body.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1059}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}    EQU     $5A8E   ; script loop address (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1060}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1061}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-3}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.control:
    BAEQ    #$25,.cmd_25              ; set PRNG mask = $0F
    BCS     .cmd_26                   ; $26: PRNG mask = $00

    BAEQ    #$23,.cmd_23              ; set action vector -> \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}
    BCS     .cmd_24                   ; set action vector -> \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}

    BAEQ    #$21,.cmd_21              ; gosub
    BCS     .cmd_22                   ; nop (return)

    BAEQ    #$1F,.cmd_1F              ; set loop address
    BCS     .cmd_20                   ; set gosub address

    ; --- Loop/end-loop (byte < $1F) ---
    BAEQ    \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69},.end_loop ; compare with loop counter
    BCC     .end_loop

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}           ; counter++
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}          ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}                 ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}/\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1 = loop address
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}+1        ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1               ; /
    JMP     .fetch

.end_loop:
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_CTR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}           ; reset loop counter
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}CTR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unCTR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1062}\nwdocspar
When the byte value equals or exceeds the loop counter, the loop
terminates and the counter resets.  Otherwise, the counter increments
and execution jumps back to the saved loop address.

\subsubsection{Command implementations}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1063}{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR\nwendquote} saves the return address for the script's gosub
command (\$21): after the subroutine finishes, {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PC\nwendquote} is restored
from this 2-byte value.  {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC\nwendquote} is a 2-byte vector set by
commands \$23 and \$24 to select between the tone and noise action handlers.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1064}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}}}\moddef{defines~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-72}\nwenddeflinemarkup
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}   EQU     $5A90   ; script gosub return address (2 bytes)
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}   EQU     $5A93   ; action handler vector (2 bytes)
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}}}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1065}\nwdocspar

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1066}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-4}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.cmd_25:                            ; PRNG mask = $0F
    LDA     #$0F
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_26:                            ; PRNG mask = $00
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_23:                            ; action vector -> \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_TONE}{PYNWmai0-DKDEJLHVFZFB5XCPIKJ6VYCXTM000000-1},\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_24:                            ; action vector -> \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1}
    \nwlinkedidentc{STOW}{PYNWmai0-UDRZI6QCMYPCHBPEW5VLDMJPJU000000-1}    \nwlinkedidentc{PLAY_NOISE}{PYNWmai0-JOHWSGNPHOGV3JMFIHMJPZ66QM000000-1},\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

.cmd_22:                            ; nop (return from script)
    RTS

.cmd_21:                            ; gosub: jump to saved address
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1
    JMP     .fetch

.cmd_1F:                            ; set loop address = current+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_LOOP_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-70}+1
    JMP     .fetch

.cmd_20:                            ; set gosub address = current+1
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_GOSUB_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71}+1
    JMP     .fetch
\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}}\\{{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}NOISE}}{PLAY:unNOISE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PLAY{\_}TONE}}{PLAY:unTONE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}GOSUB{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unGOSUB:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}LOOP{\_}ADDR}}{SCRIPT:unLOOP:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STOW}}{STOW}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1067}\nwdocspar
\subsubsection{Action dispatch ($\geq$ \$27)}

When the script byte is {\Tt{}{\$}27\nwendquote} or higher, the PRNG output is masked and
XORed with the action byte, introducing randomness.  The action vector
at {\Tt{}{\textbackslash}DISPATCH{\_}VEC\nwendquote} is set by the handlers at {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1068}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}}}\moddef{script engine~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-1}}}\plusendmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwprevnextdefs{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-5}{\relax}\nwenddeflinemarkup

.action:
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}         ; save action byte
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{STEP_PRNG}{PYNWmai0-3OGDZ4EYEYE7YXQHNEV2CZPRBM000000-1}
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{PRNG_OUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-13}            ; PRNG output
    AND     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PRNG_MASK}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-69}       ; apply mask
    EOR     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}         ; XOR with action byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_FREQ}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}             ; modified action
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}          ; advance script pointer
    LDY     #$00
    LDA     (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}),Y          ; read parameter byte
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SOUND_DURATION}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-9}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_INDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1} ; -> JMP (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71})
    JMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{DISPATCH_VEC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-2})         ; dispatch via action vector
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE}}{SCRIPT:unENGINE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}}\\{{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}}\\{{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISPATCH{\_}VEC}}{DISPATCH:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{PRNG{\_}OUTPUT}}{PRNG:unOUTPUT}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PRNG{\_}MASK}}{SCRIPT:unPRNG:unMASK}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}DURATION}}{SOUND:unDURATION}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SOUND{\_}FREQ}}{SOUND:unFREQ}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{STEP{\_}PRNG}}{STEP:unPRNG}{PYNWmai0-ETUEZGHCU2DXYIDN2GSMAGYCHA000000-6}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1069}\nwdocspar
The ``advance'' routine is the target of all {\Tt{}JMP\ SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE\nwendquote} in
the control commands.  It increments the script pointer, checks for user
input (during attract mode), and loops back to {\Tt{}.fetch\nwendquote}.

During the attract screen ({\Tt{}ATTRACT{\_}FLAG\nwendquote} = 1), {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE\nwendquote} checks
for keyboard or joystick input.  If detected, it returns immediately via RTS,
which exits the entire {\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}ENGINE\nwendquote} call.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1070}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}}}\moddef{script advance~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7A4F
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}

    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}       ; advance script pointer
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_FLAG}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-68}        ; attract_flag
    BEQ     .continue           ; not attract mode -> skip input check

    ; Attract mode: check keyboard
    LDA     $C000               ; keyboard register
    BPL     .check_joy          ; no key -> check joystick
    RTS                         ; key pressed -> exit

.check_joy:
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{INPUT_MODE}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-9}          ; joystick flag
    BEQ     .continue           ; no joystick -> continue script
    LDX     #$00
    LDA     $C061,X             ; button 0
    BPL     .btn1               ; not pressed
    RTS                         ; pressed -> exit
.btn1:
    INX
    LDA     $C061,X             ; button 1
    BPL     .continue           ; not pressed -> continue
    RTS                         ; pressed -> exit

.continue:
    LSR     \nwlinkedidentc{WAIT_LOOP_COUNT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-16}     ; shift timing flag
    JMP     SCRIPT_ENGINE_FETCH ; loop back to interpreter
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ADVANCE}}{SCRIPT:unADVANCE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}}\\{{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}}\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}\\{{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}FLAG}}{ATTRACT:unFLAG}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{INPUT{\_}MODE}}{INPUT:unMODE}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{WAIT{\_}LOOP{\_}COUNT}}{WAIT:unLOOP:unCOUNT}{PYNWmai0-V3JA2NOBVSV23YOIWF45X5ET3A000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1071}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1072}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}}}\moddef{script action indirect~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7A4C
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_INDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}:
    JMP     (\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_ACTION_VEC}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-71})
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}INDIRECT}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unINDIRECT}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}ACTION{\_}VEC}}{SCRIPT:unACTION:unVEC}{PYNWmai0-D73PSGMZDDPPPC5Q4P2TPTLYE4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1073}\nwdocspar
\nwenddocs{}\nwbegindocs{1074}{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC\nwendquote} increments the 16-bit script program counter at
{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PC\nwendquote}/{\Tt{}SCRIPT{\_}PC+1\nwendquote}, handling the carry from low to high byte.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1075}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}}}\moddef{script helpers~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $7A77
\nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_INC_PC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}

    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}
    BEQ     .carry
    RTS
.carry:
    INC     \nwlinkedidentc{SCRIPT_PC}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-23}+1
    RTS
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}INC{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unINC:unPC}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCRIPT{\_}PC}}{SCRIPT:unPC}{PYNWmai0-YKM7U5LKWXQRE6XMMPCFSM6W4I000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1076}\nwdocspar

\chapter{The Attract Screen}

The soft-switch reads at {\Tt{}{\$}C050\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}C057\nwendquote} configure the Apple II display:
{\Tt{}GR\nwendquote}, full-screen (no split text), page 1, hi-res. This puts the display
into HGR mode showing the framebuffer at {\Tt{}{\$}2000\nwendquote}--{\Tt{}{\$}3FFF\nwendquote}.

\label{sec:attract_screen}

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1077}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}}}\moddef{attract screen~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $09F4
\nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_SCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{ATTRACT_SCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}

    LDA     #$01
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{ACTIVE_CHAR}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-22}        ; scene/character index = 1
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_EVENT_RESULT}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-66} ; mark event as handled
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{GET_MOB_DATA}{PYNWmai0-VTKXUQPSOCRIDYWOEIFECHPTSM000000-1}  ; scene 1 pointer -> \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}       ; \\
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}            ;  | \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1 = \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}/\nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1 (save pointer)
    LDA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_DATA_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-11}+1     ;  |
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{MOB_PTR}{PYNWmai0-AJE4SNIWWSAT23GB2VNG3SS6JI000000-12}+1          ; /
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_SETUP}{PYNWmai0-EDKCSDZ4YL2YCTUIJVHBQRMHYY000000-1}
    LDA     #$00
    STA     \nwlinkedidentc{LOCATION_POS}{PYNWmai0-4XHAE6ADBEGDO3TDMJXX7ROHNM000000-1}       ; clear location-change flag
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{SET_CURSOR_ROW21}{PYNWmai0-UOBA5Y3PKYLQKGPLIBUCA3M2SE000000-1}
    LDA     #$26               ; scene number $26 (38 decimal)
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{SCENE_LOOP}{PYNWmai0-5E23YPEUUG4SZHWM2ZQ6MSHERE000000-1}         ; tail-call
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{ATTRACT{\_}SCREEN}}{ATTRACT:unSCREEN}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}}\\{{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}}\\{{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}}\\{{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}}\\{{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{ACTIVE{\_}CHAR}}{ACTIVE:unCHAR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{GET{\_}MOB{\_}DATA}}{GET:unMOB:unDATA}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{LOCATION{\_}POS}}{LOCATION:unPOS}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}DATA{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unDATA:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{MOB{\_}PTR}}{MOB:unPTR}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}EVENT{\_}RESULT}}{SCENE:unEVENT:unRESULT}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}LOOP}}{SCENE:unLOOP}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SCENE{\_}SETUP}}{SCENE:unSETUP}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{SET{\_}CURSOR{\_}ROW21}}{SET:unCURSOR:unROW21}{PYNWmai0-J5774R6PCWTLDLXH4MIVVDMLZE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1078}\nwdocspar
The entry point for the resident interpreter.  Each iteration swaps
context (zero-page state) and dispatches one bytecode instruction.
