\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1165}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op call~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B58A
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_CALL}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}:
    SUBROUTINE \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_CALL}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1} ; read target -> $54/$55
    TYA
    CLC
    ADC     $52               ; \\ resolve absolute IP
    STA     $52               ;  | (base + Y offset)
    BCC     .no_carry
    INC     $53               ; /
.no_carry:
    LDA     $52               ; \\ push IP for RET
    PHA                       ;  |
    LDA     $53               ;  |
    PHA                       ; /
    LDY     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SET_IP}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}    ; GOTO target address
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}CALL}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unCALL}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}SET{\_}IP}}{DISK:unVM:unSET:unIP}{PYNWmai0-3QWD7BX5IJT4C2OKNNLRS6DWEE000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1166}\nwdocspar
VM-level subroutine return.  Pops the IP previously pushed by
opcode~5 (CALL) and resumes execution there.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1167}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op ret~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5A2
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_RET}{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}:
    PLA         ; \\ pop saved IP
    STA     $53 ;  | (high byte pushed last)
    PLA         ;  |
    STA     $52 ; / (low byte pushed first)
    LDY     #$00
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}RET}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unRET}{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}RET}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unRET}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-RTV2NMHWFMFP7DFFTHLWMZPUDM000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1168}\nwdocspar
Stores the VM accumulator to an absolute address.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1169}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op sta abs~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5AD
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_STA_ABS}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1} ; read address -> $54/$55
    LDA     $56               ; A = accumulator
    LDX     #$00
    STA     ($54,X)           ; *(address) = ACC
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}STA{\_}ABS}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSTA:unABS}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}STA{\_}ABS}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSTA:unABS}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-GBEJGVQC4IV5VS7YJEW6DYRT7Y000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1170}\nwdocspar
Subtracts an encrypted immediate value from the VM accumulator.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1171}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op sub imm~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5B9
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_SUB_IMM}{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}:
    LDA     ($52),Y ; read encrypted byte
    INY
    BNE     .no_page
    INC     $53
.no_page:
    EOR     #$7A    ; decrypt
    STA     $54     ; temp
    LDA     $56     ; A = accumulator
    SEC
    SBC     $54     ; ACC - immediate
    STA     $56     ; accumulator = result
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}SUB{\_}IMM}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSUB:unIMM}{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}SUB{\_}IMM}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unSUB:unIMM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-ZOSTYFEMLOABU7ZHW7SMEZNVI4000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1172}\nwdocspar
Increments the byte at an absolute address and loads the new value
into the VM accumulator.  Atomic read-modify-write.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1173}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm op inc load~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5CE
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_INC_LOAD}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}:
    JSR     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_READ_ADDR}{PYNWmai0-ZISC3PL4VWECRONWMEC26G53VU000000-1} ; read address -> $54/$55
    LDX     #$00
    LDA     ($54,X)           ; read current value
    CLC
    ADC     #$01              ; increment
    STA     ($54,X)           ; write back
    STA     $56               ; accumulator = new value
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_RESUME}{PYNWmai0-3WUSACKGWRVXW4WEKG7CMO6Q2Y000000-1}
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}INC{\_}LOAD}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unINC:unLOAD}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}INC{\_}LOAD}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unINC:unLOAD}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}}\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}READ{\_}ADDR}}{DISK:unVM:unREAD:unADDR}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}RESUME}}{DISK:unVM:unRESUME}{PYNWmai0-GY2JRRVP4L6EUYZF2KA6ZLLY4M000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1174}\nwdocspar
The self-modifying {\Tt{}JMP\nwendquote} instruction whose low byte is patched by
{\Tt{}DISK{\_}VM{\_}DISPATCH\nwendquote} before each handler call.  The byte at
{\Tt{}{\$}B5E0\nwendquote} is overwritten with the handler's low address from the
opcode table.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1175}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm trampoline~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5DF
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_TRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}:
    JMP     \nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_OP_GOTO}{PYNWmai0-6V42YT5TYM2DEE5FKAVFCDQSX4000000-1}         ; self-modified: low byte patched
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{DISK:unVM:unTRAMPOLINE}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}TRAMPOLINE}}{DISK:unVM:unTRAMPOLINE}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}GOTO}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unGOTO}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}OP{\_}GOTO}}{DISK:unVM:unOP:unGOTO}{PYNWmai0-52EDTY2P6XACMBHKFKS45MCWBU000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1176}\nwdocspar
Three bytes between the dispatch trampoline and the saved state.
{\Tt{}{\$}B5E2\nwendquote} is the error accumulator used by {\Tt{}READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY\nwendquote}
to count failed sector reads across multiple attempts.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1177}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm error accum~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5E2
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_ERROR_ACCUM}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}:
    DC.B    0   ; error count (updated by \nwlinkedidentc{READ_AND_VERIFY}{PYNWmai0-R67OK4YBMROAH3RWLL533FQFDE000000-1})
    DC.B    0,0 ; scratch
\nwindexdefn{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}ACCUM}}{DISK:unVM:unERROR:unACCUM}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}\eatline
\nwidentdefs{\\{{\nwixident{DISK{\_}VM{\_}ERROR{\_}ACCUM}}{DISK:unVM:unERROR:unACCUM}}}\nwidentuses{\\{{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}}}\nwindexuse{\nwixident{READ{\_}AND{\_}VERIFY}}{READ:unAND:unVERIFY}{PYNWmai0-3LNGT77F4DQTH3TJC5JDNHUVFY000000-1}\nwendcode{}\nwbegindocs{1178}\nwdocspar
The 16-byte region at~{\Tt{}{\$}B5E5--{\$}B5F4\nwendquote} holds the saved copy of
zero-page {\Tt{}{\$}50--{\$}5F\nwendquote} when the VM is not executing.  The context
swap routine ({\Tt{}DISK{\_}VM{\_}SWAP\nwendquote}) exchanges these with the live
zero-page values on each VM entry and exit.  Bytes~11--13 (\$5B--\$5D)
hold initial values {\Tt{}{\$}4A\ {\$}4C\ {\$}4E\nwendquote}.

Bytes at~{\Tt{}{\$}B5F5--{\$}B5FF\nwendquote} are additional VM workspace:
{\Tt{}{\$}B5F6\nwendquote} stores a mismatched nibble from {\Tt{}VERIFY{\_}DATA{\_}FIELD\nwendquote}.

\nwenddocs{}\nwbegincode{1179}\sublabel{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}\nwmargintag{{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}}}\moddef{disk vm saved state~{\nwtagstyle{}\subpageref{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}}}\endmoddef\nwstartdeflinemarkup\nwusesondefline{\\{PYNWmai0-4RSQDT2TWU2QLEUIDKRLWKU4JE000000-1}}\nwenddeflinemarkup
    ORG     $B5E5
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SAVED_STATE}{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}:
;            $50                        $54                  $58
    HEX     00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 4a 4c 4e 00 00 00 00
;           saved ZP $50-$5F; bytes 9-11 ($59-$5B) = $4A,$4C,$4E
\nwlinkedidentc{DISK_VM_SCRATCH}{PYNWmai0-TC5SHQB655SMTUZ5XO3B24FCVA000000-1}:
    HEX     00          ; $B5F5
    HEX     00          ; $B5F6: bad nibble storage
    HEX     00 00 00    ; $B5F7-$B5F9
    HEX     a0 a0       ; $B5FA-$B5FB
    HEX     00 00 00 01 ; $B5FC-$B5FF
